❌ Rejection Required

Please provide rejection comments and attach evidence below.

⚙️ Admin Panel

⏳ Pending Approvals

Records awaiting your approval. Enter admin password to approve each one.

📋 Inspection Activity Lists

Manage activities available in each inspection module dropdown.

✅ WIR Checkpoints per Project

Each project has its own WIR checklists. Select project → module → activity to manage.

📋 Project Activities

💰 Project BOQ Specification Library

Pre-configure BOQ rates, units, spec clauses & contract quantities per project per activity. When creating a WIR, selecting an activity auto-fills all billing fields from this library — the Billing Engineer only enters the period quantity.

BOQ ItemActivityDescription UnitRateCur.Contract QtyRetention%Spec ClauseActions
Select a project to view its BOQ specifications.
➕ Add / Edit BOQ Specification

📧 Email Configuration (Password Reset)

Configure EmailJS to enable password reset emails. Free plan: 200 emails/month.

Network ready
Setup steps: 1) Sign up at emailjs.com → 2) Add email service → 3) Create template with variables: {{to_email}} {{to_name}} {{reset_code}} → 4) Paste IDs above.

👤 User Management

Create and manage user accounts with roles.

Add New User
Role Access Guide:
This guide is reference only. It is not compulsory for every project.
Admin can decide actual roles and module permissions project-wise as per project requirements.
Billing Engineer / Billing Manager are available for IPC and billing-related assignments.
System Administrator remains fully unrestricted.
Hold Ctrl/Cmd to select multiple. Leave blank to allow access to all projects.
Linking a user to a contractor means they only appear in user dropdowns when that contractor is selected in a form.

🛡️ Role Management

Only System Administrator can create, rename or disable roles. Delete is replaced by Active / Inactive for system safety. System Administrator and Admin remain fixed roles.

Inactive roles are hidden from new user assignment, but existing historical users and records stay intact.
Create New Role

👷 Team Members

This list is auto-linked from User Management. Role controls access and scorecard points. Team Member shows the actual person name used in form dropdowns like Inspection Member, Created By, Prepared By, Reviewed By and Certified By.

Auto mapping: Team Member name → linked User Role → role-based permissions and scorecard points.
To change a team member role, update the user in User Management.

🏢 Contractors / Subcontractors

Each contractor must be assigned to project(s). It will only appear in dropdowns for those projects. Users linked to a contractor only appear when that contractor is selected in a form.

🔒 Privacy rule: Contractor dropdown → only contractors of the selected project  ·  User dropdown → only that contractor's staff on that project
➕ Add New Contractor
Hold Ctrl/Cmd to select multiple · Required

🌍 Country & City Management

Manage countries and cities in dropdown lists.

Cities in

📊 Scorecard Points

Only System Administrator can modify scorecard point values. Admin and other roles can view scorecards but cannot change scoring rules.

This control covers all dashboard scorecard modules. Only System Administrator can change point values for every role and module.

🏗️ Project Master

Manage multiple projects, switch between them, and keep data isolated project-wise.

🔑 Change My Password

Session

Data

🔐 Admin Approval
Enter your admin password to approve this inspection.

👤 My Profile

Your email is used for password reset. Keep it up to date.

⬇️ Download Report

Select format and modules to include in your export. Non-Super-Admin users can download only their assigned project data.

Format
Modules to Include
Filter by Project

IPC Detail

Project Manager review authority
Client / Consultant Representative final certification
`; const win = window.open('','_blank','width=900,height=700'); if (!win) { alert('Please allow pop-ups to open the PDF.'); return; } win.document.write(html); win.document.close(); win.focus(); setTimeout(() => win.print(), 700); } // ════════════════════════════════════ // PDF BUILDER — pure canvas/HTML // ════════════════════════════════════ function buildPDF(sheetsData, projLabel, exportedBy){ // Uses hidden iframe with styled HTML, then window.print() approach // Actually we build a proper multi-page printable HTML and open it const now = new Date().toLocaleString(); const DARK='#1A2550'; const GOLD='#C8972A'; const LIGHT='#f5f7ff'; let html=` CIMS Report

CONSTRUCTION IMS

Quality Management System Report

Project: ${projLabel}

Generated: ${now}

Exported by: ${exportedBy}

`; sheetsData.forEach(({name, rows}, idx)=>{ if(!rows||!rows.length) return; const cols=Object.keys(rows[0]); html += idx>0 ? `
` : ''; html += `
📋 ${name}
`; html += `
${rows.length} record${rows.length!==1?'s':''}
`; html += `${cols.map(c=>``).join('')}`; rows.forEach(row=>{ html+=`${cols.map(c=>``).join('')}`; }); html+=`
${c}
${safeStr(row[c])}
`; html+=`
CONSTRUCTION IMS — Confidential · ${now} · ${exportedBy}
`; }); html+=` `; const win=window.open('','_blank','width=1100,height=750'); if(!win){alert('Please allow pop-ups for this site to open the PDF report.');return;} win.document.write(html); win.document.close(); win.focus(); setTimeout(()=>win.print(), 800); } // ════════════════════════════════════ // RUN EXPORT // ════════════════════════════════════ // ── XLS Builder (HTML-table format, opens in Excel) ── function buildXLS(sheetsData, projLabel, exportedBy){ const now = new Date().toLocaleString(); const DARK='#1A2550'; const GOLD='#C8972A'; let html=` `; sheetsData.forEach(({name, rows})=>{ if(!rows||!rows.length) return; const cols=Object.keys(rows[0]); html+=`
`; html+=`

${name}

`; html+=`

Project: ${projLabel}  |  Records: ${rows.length}  |  Exported: ${now}  |  By: ${exportedBy}

`; html+=``; cols.forEach(c=>{ html+=``; }); html+=``; rows.forEach((row,ri)=>{ html+=``; cols.forEach(c=>{ html+=``; }); html+=``; }); html+=`
${c}
${safeStr(row[c])}
`; }); html+=` `; return html; } function runExport(){ const btn=document.getElementById('export-go-btn'); const prog=document.getElementById('export-progress'); const proj=getExportProject(); const mods=['ex-qms','ex-wir','ex-imir','ex-rfi','ex-mockup_quality','ex-mockup_safety','ex-tds','ex-skilleval','ex-conccube','ex-concreg','ex-training','ex-goodpractice']; if(!mods.some(id=>chk(id))){prog.style.color='var(--red)';prog.textContent='Select at least one module.';return;} btn.disabled=true; prog.style.color='var(--text3)'; prog.textContent=exportFmt==='pdf'?'Building PDF report…':'Building spreadsheet…'; setTimeout(()=>{ try{ const projLabel=proj==='ALL'?'All Projects':proj; const exportedBy=currentUser?`${currentUser.name} (${ROLE_LABELS[currentUser.role]||currentUser.role})`:'Unknown'; const fname=`CIMS-${proj==='ALL'?'All':proj.replace(/[^a-z0-9]/gi,'-')}-${today()}`; const sheets=[]; if(chk('ex-qms')) sheets.push({name:'Obs-NCR', rows:flatIssues(proj)}); if(chk('ex-wir')) sheets.push({name:'WIR', rows:flatWIRs(proj)}); if(chk('ex-ipc')) sheets.push({name:'IPC', rows:flatIPCs(proj)}); if(chk('ex-imir')) sheets.push({name:'IMIR', rows:flatIMIRs(proj)}); if(chk('ex-rfi')) sheets.push({name:'RFI', rows:flatSimple('rfi',proj)}); if(chk('ex-mockup_quality')) sheets.push({name:'Quality-Mockup', rows:flatSimple('mockup_quality',proj)}); if(chk('ex-mockup_safety')) sheets.push({name:'Safety-Mockup', rows:flatSimple('mockup_safety',proj)}); if(chk('ex-tds')) sheets.push({name:'TDS-Approval', rows:flatSimple('tds',proj)}); if(chk('ex-skilleval')) sheets.push({name:'Skill-Evaluation',rows:flatSimple('skilleval',proj)}); if(chk('ex-conccube')) sheets.push({name:'Concrete-Cube', rows:flatSimple('conccube',proj)}); if(chk('ex-concreg')) sheets.push({name:'Concrete-Register', rows:flatConcReg(proj)}); if(chk('ex-training')) sheets.push({name:'Training', rows:flatSimple('training',proj)}); if(chk('ex-goodpractice')) sheets.push({name:'Good-Practice', rows:flatSimple('goodpractice',proj)}); const totalRecs=sheets.reduce((s,sh)=>s+(sh.rows?.length||0),0); if(!totalRecs){prog.style.color='var(--gold2)';prog.textContent='No records found.';btn.disabled=false;return;} const summaryRows=sheets.map(sh=>({'Module':sh.name,'Records':sh.rows?.length||0})); summaryRows.push({'Module':'Project','Records':projLabel},{'Module':'Exported By','Records':exportedBy},{'Module':'Export Date','Records':new Date().toLocaleString()}); if(exportFmt==='xlsx'){ const allSheets=[{name:'Summary',rows:summaryRows},...sheets]; const bytes=buildXLSX(allSheets); const blob=new Blob([bytes],{type:'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet'}); const a=document.createElement('a');a.href=URL.createObjectURL(blob);a.download=fname+'.xlsx';a.click(); setTimeout(()=>URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href),5000); prog.style.color='var(--green)';prog.textContent=`✅ Downloaded: ${fname}.xlsx (${totalRecs} records)`; } else if(exportFmt==='xls'){ const allSheets=[{name:'Summary',rows:summaryRows},...sheets]; const xlsHtml=buildXLS(allSheets, projLabel, exportedBy); const blob=new Blob([xlsHtml],{type:'application/vnd.ms-excel;charset=utf-8'}); const a=document.createElement('a');a.href=URL.createObjectURL(blob);a.download=fname+'.xls';a.click(); setTimeout(()=>URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href),5000); prog.style.color='var(--green)';prog.textContent=`✅ Downloaded: ${fname}.xls (${totalRecs} records)`; } else { buildPDF(sheets, projLabel, exportedBy); prog.style.color='var(--green)';prog.textContent='✅ PDF opened — use Print → Save as PDF'; } setTimeout(()=>{prog.textContent='';btn.disabled=false;closeExportModal();},3500); } catch(e){ prog.style.color='var(--red)';prog.textContent='❌ Export error: '+e.message; btn.disabled=false;console.error('Export error:',e); } },60); } function exportData(){ openExportModal(); } function confirmWipe(){ if(confirm('⚠️ Wipe ALL data permanently?')){const c=prompt('Type CONFIRM:');if(c==='CONFIRM'){issues=[];wirs=[];imirs=[];specRecs=[];projects=[];SIMPLE_MODS.forEach(m=>{simpleRecs[m]=[];});docCtrlRecs=[];persist();populateProjectSelectors();updateStats();renderList();closeAdmin();alert('All data wiped.');}} } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════ // DASHBOARD // ══════════════════════════════════════════════ // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════ // DASHBOARD ENGINE — dark-blue 4K professional // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════ function barChart(containerId, data, colorFn){ const max=Math.max(...Object.values(data),1); const el=document.getElementById(containerId);if(!el)return; const rows=Object.entries(data).filter(([,v])=>v>0); el.innerHTML=rows.length ? rows.map(([k,v])=>`
${esc(k)}
${v}
`).join('') : '
No data yet.
'; } function donutChart(containerId, data, colors){ const el=document.getElementById(containerId);if(!el)return; const total=Object.values(data).reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0); if(!total){el.innerHTML='
No data yet.
';return;} const cx=48,cy=48,r=36,stroke=12; const circ=2*Math.PI*r; let cum=0; const segs=Object.entries(data).map(([k,v],i)=>{ const pct=v/total, dash=pct*circ; const off=-(cum*circ/(2*Math.PI)); cum+=pct*2*Math.PI; return ``; }); const svg=``; const legend=Object.entries(data).map(([k,v],i)=>`
${k}${v}
`).join(''); el.innerHTML=`
${svg}
${legend}
`; } function kpiCard(val, lbl, color, sub, badgeObj){ return `
${val}
${lbl}
${sub?`
${sub}
`:''} ${badgeObj?`
${badgeObj.txt}
`:''}
`; } // ── Render both overdue-record warnings AND pending-feed-item warnings ── function renderDelayWarnings(si, sw, sm, srca){ const nowMs=Date.now(); const dayMs=86400000; const sec=document.getElementById('dash-warn-section');if(!sec)return; let html=''; // ── Section A: Overdue open records ── const warnings=[]; si.filter(i=>['Open','In Progress'].includes(i.status)&&i.date).forEach(i=>{ const d=Math.floor((nowMs-new Date(i.date).getTime())/dayMs); if(d>=7) warnings.push({id:i.id,txt:i.title||'NCR/Obs',days:d,mod:'qms',recId:i.id,label:'Open NCR/Obs'}); }); sw.filter(w=>['Pending','Under Review'].includes(w.status)&&w.date).forEach(w=>{ const d=Math.floor((nowMs-new Date(w.date).getTime())/dayMs); if(d>=3) warnings.push({id:w.id,txt:w.activity||'WIR',days:d,mod:'wir',recId:w.id,label:'WIR Pending'}); }); sm.filter(m=>['Pending','Conditional'].includes(m.status)&&m.date).forEach(m=>{ const d=Math.floor((nowMs-new Date(m.date).getTime())/dayMs); if(d>=3) warnings.push({id:m.id,txt:m.material||'IMIR',days:d,mod:'imir',recId:m.id,label:'IMIR Pending'}); }); (srca||[]).filter(r=>r.status==='Pending Approval'&&r.date).forEach(r=>{ const d=Math.floor((nowMs-new Date(r.date).getTime())/dayMs); if(d>=2) warnings.push({id:r.id,txt:r.title||'Rework',days:d,mod:'rca',recId:r.id,label:'Rework Delay'}); }); warnings.sort((a,b)=>b.days-a.days); if(warnings.length){ const items=warnings.slice(0,6).map(w=>{ const oc=w.mod==='qms'?`switchModule('qms');setTimeout(()=>openDetail('${w.recId}'),60)`: w.mod==='wir'?`switchModule('wir');setTimeout(()=>openWIRDetail('${w.recId}'),60)`: w.mod==='imir'?`switchModule('imir');setTimeout(()=>openIMIRDetail('${w.recId}'),60)`: `switchModule('rca');setTimeout(()=>openRCADetail('${w.recId}'),60)`; return `
⚠ ${esc(w.label)} ${esc(w.id)} ${esc(w.txt)} ${w.days}d overdue
`; }).join(''); html+=`
🚨 Action Required — ${warnings.length} Overdue Record${warnings.length!==1?'s':''}
${items}
`; } // ── Section B: Pending feed items assigned to THIS user ── const feedItems = getFeedItems(); if(feedItems.length){ const modColors={qms:'#3b82f6',wir:'#06b6d4',imir:'#8b5cf6',rca:'#f97316',mockup_quality:'#f97316',mockup_safety:'#be123c',tds:'#22c55e',rfi:'#7c3aed',safetyobs:'#ef4444',safetyinsp:'#ef4444',auditcheck:'#0f766e',envinsp:'#16a34a',workpermit:'#a78bfa',docctrl:'#2563eb',goodpractice:'#22c55e',training:'#06b6d4',skilleval:'#C8972A',conccube:'#d97706'}; const modIcons={qms:'📋',wir:'🔍',imir:'📦',rca:'🔧',mockup_quality:'🧱',mockup_safety:'🛡️',tds:'📄',rfi:'❓',safetyobs:'🦺',safetyinsp:'🧯',auditcheck:'🧾',envinsp:'🌿',workpermit:'📝',docctrl:'📁',goodpractice:'⭐',training:'🎓',skilleval:'🏅',conccube:'🟦'}; const pills = feedItems.slice(0,8).map(item=>{ const col = modColors[item.mod]||'#888'; const icon = modIcons[item.mod]||'📌'; const actionShort = item.action.replace(/[⏳🔄💬📦⚠🔔]/g,'').trim().slice(0,22); return `
${icon} ${esc(item.id)} — ${esc(actionShort)}
`; }).join(''); html+=`
⚠️ ${feedItems.length} Pending Action${feedItems.length!==1?'s':''} Require Your Attention ${currentUser?currentUser.name:''}
${pills}
Click any item to take immediate action, or view all in My Feed
`; } sec.innerHTML = html; } function renderDash(){ const visibleProjects = getAssignedProjects(); document.getElementById('dash-proj-btns').innerHTML= ``+ visibleProjects.map(p=>``).join(''); const now=new Date(); const upd=document.getElementById('dash-last-updated'); if(upd) upd.textContent='Updated '+now.toLocaleTimeString([],{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'}); // ── Update notification bell badge ── const feedCount = getFeedItems().length; const bellBadge = document.getElementById('dash-bell-badge'); if(bellBadge){bellBadge.style.display=feedCount>0?'block':'none';bellBadge.textContent=feedCount;} const bellEl = document.getElementById('dash-notif-bell'); if(bellEl) bellEl.style.animation = feedCount>0?'bell-ring 1.8s ease-in-out infinite':'none'; const avatarEl = document.getElementById('dash-user-avatar'); if(avatarEl) avatarEl.title = (currentUser?.name||'User')+' · '+feedCount+' pending action'+(feedCount===1?'':'s'); // Privacy filter: restrict all data to assigned projects only const _pf = r => visibleProjects.includes(r.project); const _vIssues = isRole('super_admin') ? issues : issues.filter(_pf); const _vWirs = isRole('super_admin') ? wirs : wirs.filter(_pf); const _vImirs = isRole('super_admin') ? imirs : imirs.filter(_pf); const _vRca = isRole('super_admin')||!isRole('client_representative','consultant_representative') ? (isRole('super_admin') ? rcaRecs : rcaRecs.filter(_pf)) : []; const _vSobs = isRole('super_admin') ? (simpleRecs.safetyobs||[]) : (simpleRecs.safetyobs||[]).filter(_pf); const _vWp = isRole('super_admin') ? (simpleRecs.workpermit||[]) : (simpleRecs.workpermit||[]).filter(_pf); const _vRfi = isRole('super_admin') ? (simpleRecs.rfi||[]) : (simpleRecs.rfi||[]).filter(_pf); const _vCc = isRole('super_admin') ? (simpleRecs.conccube||[]) : (simpleRecs.conccube||[]).filter(_pf); const _vTrn = isRole('super_admin') ? (simpleRecs.training||[]) : (simpleRecs.training||[]).filter(_pf); const _vMkpQ = isRole('super_admin') ? (simpleRecs.mockup_quality||[]) : (simpleRecs.mockup_quality||[]).filter(_pf); const _vMkpS = isRole('super_admin') ? (simpleRecs.mockup_safety||[]) : (simpleRecs.mockup_safety||[]).filter(_pf); const _vTds = isRole('super_admin') ? (simpleRecs.tds||[]) : (simpleRecs.tds||[]).filter(_pf); const _vSkl = isRole('super_admin') ? (simpleRecs.skilleval||[]) : (simpleRecs.skilleval||[]).filter(_pf); const _vGp = isRole('super_admin') ? (simpleRecs.goodpractice||[]) : (simpleRecs.goodpractice||[]).filter(_pf); // Then apply dashProj filter on top const si = dashProj==='ALL' ? _vIssues : _vIssues.filter(i=>i.project===dashProj); const sw = dashProj==='ALL' ? _vWirs : _vWirs.filter(w=>w.project===dashProj); const sm = dashProj==='ALL' ? _vImirs : _vImirs.filter(m=>m.project===dashProj); const srca = dashProj==='ALL' ? _vRca : _vRca.filter(r=>r.project===dashProj); const sobs = dashProj==='ALL' ? _vSobs : _vSobs.filter(r=>r.project===dashProj); const swp = dashProj==='ALL' ? _vWp : _vWp.filter(r=>r.project===dashProj); const srfi = dashProj==='ALL' ? _vRfi : _vRfi.filter(r=>r.project===dashProj); const scc = dashProj==='ALL' ? _vCc : _vCc.filter(r=>r.project===dashProj); const str = dashProj==='ALL' ? _vTrn : _vTrn.filter(r=>r.project===dashProj); const smkpq = dashProj==='ALL' ? _vMkpQ : _vMkpQ.filter(r=>r.project===dashProj); const smkps = dashProj==='ALL' ? _vMkpS : _vMkpS.filter(r=>r.project===dashProj); const stds = dashProj==='ALL' ? _vTds : _vTds.filter(r=>r.project===dashProj); const sskl = dashProj==='ALL' ? _vSkl : _vSkl.filter(r=>r.project===dashProj); const sgp = dashProj==='ALL' ? _vGp : _vGp.filter(r=>r.project===dashProj); // ── Executive overview + action panels ── const openIssuesCount = si.filter(i=>['Open','In Progress'].includes(i.status)).length; const pendingApprovals = getFeedItems().filter(i=>/approval|review/i.test(i.action||'')).length; const pendingRework = srca.filter(r=>r.status==='Pending Approval').length + si.filter(i=>i.status==='In Progress').length; const inspPending = sw.filter(w=>w.status==='Pending').length + sm.filter(m=>m.status==='Pending').length; const activeProjects = [...new Set([].concat(si.map(r=>r.project), sw.map(r=>r.project), sm.map(r=>r.project), sobs.map(r=>r.project), srca.map(r=>r.project)).filter(Boolean))].length; const totalVisibleRecords = si.length+sw.length+sm.length+sobs.length+swp.length+srca.length+srfi.length+scc.length; const closureRate = Math.round(si.filter(i=>i.status==='Closed').length/Math.max(si.length,1)*100); const execEl = document.getElementById('dash-exec-overview'); if(execEl){ const projText = dashProj==='ALL' ? (activeProjects+' active project'+(activeProjects===1?'':'s')) : dashProj; execEl.innerHTML = `
Executive Overview

Project controls dashboard for quality, safety, inspections, and planning.

This workspace now groups workflow pressure, approval exposure, and project health into one professional overview. All data shown here follows project assignment privacy and role-based visibility.
${esc((currentUser&¤tUser.name)||'User')}
🏗️ ${esc(projText)}
🔔 ${feedCount} action item${feedCount===1?'':'s'}
📦 ${totalVisibleRecords} controlled record${totalVisibleRecords===1?'':'s'}
Pending approvals
${pendingApprovals}
${pendingApprovals>0?'Items waiting for review or decision':'No approvals currently waiting'}
Inspection pipeline
${inspPending}
${sw.length} WIR · ${sm.length} IMIR visible in current scope
Open quality pressure
${openIssuesCount}
${closureRate}% closure rate across visible NCR / observations
Rework exposure
${pendingRework}
${srca.length} total rework records in selected scope
`; } const actionEl = document.getElementById('dash-action-panel'); if(actionEl){ const actionItems = getFeedItems().slice(0,5); actionEl.innerHTML = `
⚡
Action Required
Priority items for your role and current project scope
${actionItems.length ? actionItems.map((item,idx)=>{ const label = /reject|rework|correction/i.test(item.action||'') ? 'Rework' : /approval|review/i.test(item.action||'') ? 'Approval' : /pending/i.test(item.action||'') ? 'Pending' : 'Update'; const cls = label==='Rework'?'red':label==='Approval'?'blue':label==='Pending'?'amber':'green'; return `
${idx+1}
${esc(item.title||'Record')}
${esc(item.project||'—')} · ${esc((item.action||'Action Required').replace(/[⏳🔄💬📦]/g,'').trim())}
${label}
`; }).join('') : '
✅ No immediate action pending. Your assigned queue is clear.
'}
`; } const healthEl = document.getElementById('dash-health-panel'); if(healthEl){ const healthProjects = visibleProjects.map(proj=>{ const issuesCt = _vIssues.filter(r=>r.project===proj).length; const inspCt = _vWirs.filter(r=>r.project===proj).length + _vImirs.filter(r=>r.project===proj).length; const rcCt = _vRca.filter(r=>r.project===proj).length; const total = issuesCt + inspCt + rcCt; const closed = _vIssues.filter(r=>r.project===proj && r.status==='Closed').length + _vWirs.filter(r=>r.project===proj && r.status==='Approved').length + _vImirs.filter(r=>r.project===proj && r.status==='Accepted').length; const score = total ? Math.max(10, Math.min(100, Math.round((closed/total)*100))) : 100; return {proj, score, issuesCt, inspCt, rcCt}; }).sort((a,b)=>b.score-a.score).slice(0,5); healthEl.innerHTML = `
🏗️
Project Health
Snapshot based on visible inspections, issues, and rework workflow
${healthProjects.length ? healthProjects.map(p=>{ const col = p.score>=80?'#22c55e':p.score>=55?'#f59e0b':'#ef4444'; return `
${esc(p.proj)}
${p.issuesCt} issues · ${p.inspCt} inspections · ${p.rcCt} rework
${p.score}%
`; }).join('') : '
No project data available in current visibility scope.
'}
`; } renderDelayWarnings(si, sw, sm, srca); // ── Chart title helpers ── const sct=(id,v)=>{const e=document.getElementById(id);if(e)e.textContent=v;}; sct('dct-ncr-total', si.length); const critMaj=si.filter(i=>i.severity==='Critical'||i.severity==='Major').length; sct('dct-sev-total', critMaj+' crit/maj'); sct('dct-insp-total', sw.length+sm.length); const allPend=si.filter(i=>['Open','In Progress'].includes(i.status)).length +sw.filter(w=>w.status==='Pending').length+sm.filter(m=>m.status==='Pending').length +srca.filter(r=>r.status==='Pending Approval').length; sct('dct-pipe-total', allPend+' pending'); const rcaCost=srca.reduce((s,r)=>(s+(parseFloat(r.totalMatCost)||0)+(parseFloat(r.labourCost)||0)),0); const cur=srca.length>0?(srca.find(r=>r.currency)?.currency||'AED'):'AED'; sct('dct-rca-cost', rcaCost>0?(cur+' '+Math.round(rcaCost).toLocaleString()):'—'); sct('dct-safety-total', sobs.length); sct('dct-rfi-total', srfi.length); sct('dct-cc-total', scc.length); // ── KPI Cards ── const openNCR=si.filter(i=>['Open','In Progress'].includes(i.status)).length; const closedIssues=si.filter(i=>i.status==='Closed').length; const closeRate=Math.round(closedIssues/Math.max(si.length,1)*100); const kpiEl=document.getElementById('dash-kpi-row'); if(kpiEl) kpiEl.innerHTML= kpiCard(si.length,'NCR / Obs','#3b82f6',si.filter(i=>i.type==='ncr').length+' NCR · '+si.filter(i=>i.type==='observation').length+' Obs')+ kpiCard(openNCR,'Open Issues',openNCR>0?'#ef4444':'#22c55e',openNCR>5?'⚠ Action needed':'Under control',openNCR>0?{bg:'rgba(239,68,68,.18)',col:'#fca5a5',txt:'OPEN'}:null)+ kpiCard(sw.length,'WIR Records','#06b6d4',sw.filter(w=>w.status==='Pending').length+' pending')+ kpiCard(sm.length,'IMIR Records','#8b5cf6','Material inspections')+ kpiCard(sobs.length,'Safety Obs','#f43f5e',sobs.filter(s=>s.status==='Pending').length+' pending')+ kpiCard(swp.length,'Work Permits','#a78bfa',swp.filter(s=>['Pending','Safety Approved'].includes(s.status)).length+' active')+ kpiCard(srca.length,'Rework Requests','#f97316',srca.filter(r=>r.status==='Pending Approval').length+' awaiting approval',srca.filter(r=>r.status==='Pending Approval').length>0?{bg:'rgba(249,115,22,.18)',col:'#fdba74',txt:'PENDING'}:null)+ kpiCard(rcaCost>0?(cur+' '+Math.round(rcaCost).toLocaleString()):'—','Est. Rework Cost','#C8972A','Total across all reworks')+ kpiCard(closeRate+'%','Closure Rate',closeRate>=80?'#22c55e':closeRate>=50?'#f59e0b':'#ef4444',closedIssues+' of '+si.length+' closed'); // ── Helpers ── function hasPendingFeed(modKey){ return getFeedItems().some(item=>item.mod===modKey); } function warnBadge(modKey){ return hasPendingFeed(modKey)?'⚠ ACTION':''; } function dmcCard(icon,title,color,stats,bgGrad,modKey,onClick){ const bg = bgGrad || `linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(255,255,255,.06) 0%,rgba(255,255,255,.02) 100%)`; const wb = modKey ? warnBadge(modKey) : ''; const clickAttr = onClick ? `onclick="${onClick}" style="cursor:pointer;"` : ''; return `
${icon}
${title} ${wb}
${stats.map(s=>`
${s.val}
${s.lbl}
`).join('')}
`; } // ── Row 1: NCR/Obs · WIR · IMIR · Good Practice ── const mc1=document.getElementById('dash-module-cards'); if(mc1) mc1.innerHTML= dmcCard('📋','OBS / NCRs','#3b82f6', [{val:si.filter(i=>['Open','In Progress'].includes(i.status)).length,lbl:'Open',cls:'red'},{val:si.filter(i=>i.status==='Closed').length,lbl:'Closed',cls:'green'}], 'linear-gradient(145deg,#0c2550 0%,#091c3c 60%,#050e22 100%)','qms',"switchModule('qms')")+ dmcCard('🔍','WIR','#06b6d4', [{val:sw.filter(w=>w.status==='Pending').length,lbl:'Pending',cls:'amber'},{val:sw.filter(w=>['Approved','Closed'].includes(w.status)).length,lbl:'Approved',cls:'green'}], 'linear-gradient(145deg,#053540 0%,#032830 60%,#021820 100%)','wir',"switchModule('wir')")+ dmcCard('📦','IMIR','#8b5cf6', [{val:sm.filter(m=>m.status==='Hold').length,lbl:'On Hold',cls:'red'},{val:sm.filter(m=>m.status==='Accepted').length,lbl:'Accepted',cls:'green'}], 'linear-gradient(145deg,#1c0b44 0%,#140830 60%,#0a051c 100%)','imir',"switchModule('imir')")+ dmcCard('⭐','Good Practice','#22c55e', [{val:sgp.filter(g=>g.status==='Active').length,lbl:'Active',cls:'blue'},{val:sgp.filter(g=>g.status!=='Active').length,lbl:'Completed',cls:'green'}], 'linear-gradient(145deg,#082814 0%,#051e0e 60%,#030e08 100%)','goodpractice',"switchModule('goodpractice')"); // ── Row 2: Training · Mockup · TDS · Skill Eval ── const mc2=document.getElementById('dash-training-cards'); if(mc2) mc2.innerHTML= dmcCard('🎓','QHSE Training','#06b6d4', [{val:str.length,lbl:'Total',cls:'blue'},{val:str.filter(t=>t.status==='Completed').length,lbl:'Completed',cls:'green'},{val:str.filter(t=>t.status==='In Progress').length,lbl:'In Progress',cls:'amber'}], 'linear-gradient(145deg,#042c38 0%,#032030 60%,#021520 100%)','training',"switchModule('training')")+ dmcCard('🧱','Quality Mockup','#f97316', [{val:smkpq.filter(m=>m.status==='Pending').length,lbl:'Pending',cls:'amber'},{val:smkpq.filter(m=>m.status==='QM Approved').length,lbl:'QM Approved',cls:'green'},{val:smkpq.filter(m=>m.status==='Fully Complete').length,lbl:'FC',cls:'green'},{val:smkpq.filter(m=>m.status==='Rejected').length,lbl:'Rejected',cls:'red'}], 'linear-gradient(145deg,#341704 0%,#261002 60%,#170902 100%)','mockup_quality',"switchModule('mockup_quality')")+ dmcCard('🛡️','Safety Mockup','#be123c', [{val:smkps.filter(m=>m.status==='Pending').length,lbl:'Pending',cls:'amber'},{val:smkps.filter(m=>m.status==='Safety Approved').length,lbl:'SM Approved',cls:'blue'},{val:smkps.filter(m=>m.status==='Fully Complete').length,lbl:'FC',cls:'green'},{val:smkps.filter(m=>m.status==='Rejected').length,lbl:'Rejected',cls:'red'}], 'linear-gradient(145deg,#2d0510 0%,#1e0309 60%,#0f0105 100%)','mockup_safety',"switchModule('mockup_safety')")+ dmcCard('📄','TDS Approval','#3b82f6', [{val:stds.length,lbl:'Total',cls:'blue'},{val:stds.filter(t=>t.status==='Approved').length,lbl:'Approved',cls:'green'},{val:stds.filter(t=>t.status==='Rejected').length,lbl:'Rejected',cls:'red'}], 'linear-gradient(145deg,#091c3e 0%,#071430 60%,#040b20 100%)','tds',"switchModule('tds')")+ dmcCard('🏅','Skill Evaluation','#C8972A', [{val:sskl.length,lbl:'Assessed',cls:'amber'},{val:sskl.filter(s=>parseFloat(s.score)>=60).length,lbl:'Passed',cls:'green'},{val:sskl.filter(s=>parseFloat(s.score)<60&&s.score).length,lbl:'Failed',cls:'red'}], 'linear-gradient(145deg,#281c02 0%,#1e1402 60%,#120e01 100%)','skilleval',"switchModule('skilleval')"); // ── Safety Observations Detail ── const safEl=document.getElementById('dash-safety-detail'); if(safEl){ const sevCount={High:0,Major:0,Moderate:0,Minor:0}; sobs.forEach(s=>{const k=s.severity||'Minor';if(sevCount[k]!==undefined)sevCount[k]++;else sevCount['Minor']++;}); const obsThisMonth=sobs.filter(s=>{if(!s.date)return false;const d=new Date(s.date),n=new Date();return d.getMonth()===n.getMonth()&&d.getFullYear()===n.getFullYear();}).length; const sevColors={High:'#dc2626',Major:'#f97316',Moderate:'#f59e0b',Minor:'#22c55e'}; // Build SVG donut for safety const sevEntries = Object.entries(sevCount); const sevTotal = sevEntries.reduce((s,[,v])=>s+v,0)||1; let svgOffset = 0; const svgR = 38, svgC = 48, svgCirc = 2*Math.PI*svgR; const sevArcs = sevEntries.map(([k,v])=>{ const pct = v/sevTotal; const dash = pct*svgCirc; const arc = ``; svgOffset += pct; return arc; }).join(''); safEl.innerHTML=`
${obsThisMonth}
This Month
${sevEntries.map(([k,v])=>`
${k}
${v}
`).join('')}
${sobs.filter(s=>['Open','Pending'].includes(s.status)).length} pending action · ${sobs.length} total
`; } // ── Pipeline (Work Permits + Approvals) ── const pipeEl=document.getElementById('dash-pipeline'); if(pipeEl){ const stages=[ {l:'Active Permits',n:swp.filter(s=>['Approved','Safety Approved'].includes(s.status)).length,c:'#a78bfa'}, {l:'Expired/Rejected',n:swp.filter(s=>s.status==='Rejected').length,c:'#ef4444'}, {l:'Hot Work',n:swp.filter(s=>(s.type||'')=='Hot Work').length,c:'#f97316'}, {l:'Working at Height',n:swp.filter(s=>(s.type||'')=='Working at Height').length,c:'#06b6d4'}, {l:'Confined Space',n:swp.filter(s=>(s.type||'')=='Confined Space').length,c:'#8b5cf6'}, {l:'WIR Pending',n:sw.filter(w=>w.status==='Pending').length,c:'#f59e0b'}, {l:'Rework Pending',n:srca.filter(r=>r.status==='Pending Approval').length,c:'#C8972A'}, ]; const maxP=Math.max(...stages.map(s=>s.n),1); pipeEl.innerHTML=stages.map(s=>`
${s.l}
${s.n}
`).join(''); } // ── RFI Detail ── const rfiEl=document.getElementById('dash-rfi-detail'); if(rfiEl){ const rfiOpen=srfi.filter(r=>r.status==='Open').length; const rfiResp=srfi.filter(r=>r.status==='Responded'||r.status==='Closed').length; const rfiOvd=srfi.filter(r=>r.due&&new Date(r.due)
${rfiOpen}
Open
${rfiResp}
Responded
${rfiOvd}
Overdue
${srfi.slice(0,4).map(r=>{ const isOvd=r.due&&new Date(r.due)
${esc(r.id)} ${esc(r.title||'—')} ${isOvd?'Overdue':r.status} `; }).join('')||'
No RFI records yet.
'}`; } // ── Concrete Cube Detail ── const ccEl=document.getElementById('dash-cc-detail'); if(ccEl){ const ccPend=scc.filter(c=>!c.d28).length; const ccPass=scc.filter(c=>c.d28&&c.req&&parseFloat(c.d28)>=parseFloat(c.req)).length; const ccFail=scc.filter(c=>c.d28&&c.req&&parseFloat(c.d28)0?Math.round(ccPass/Math.max(ccPass+ccFail,1)*100):0; const avg7=scc.filter(c=>c.d7).reduce((s,c)=>s+parseFloat(c.d7||0),0)/Math.max(scc.filter(c=>c.d7).length,1); ccEl.innerHTML=`
${ccPend}
Tests Pending
${ccPass}
Passing
Pass Rate ${passRate}%
🟦
7-Day Avg Strength
${avg7>0?avg7.toFixed(1)+' N/mm²':'— N/mm²'}
Failed
${ccFail}
`; } // ── Notifications ── const notifEl=document.getElementById('dash-notifications'); if(notifEl){ const feedItems=getFeedItems().slice(0,6); if(!feedItems.length){ notifEl.innerHTML='
✅ All caught up
'; } else { const notifColors={qms:'#3b82f6',wir:'#06b6d4',imir:'#8b5cf6',rca:'#C8972A',mockup_quality:'#f97316',mockup_safety:'#be123c',tds:'#22c55e',rfi:'#7c3aed',safetyobs:'#ef4444',workpermit:'#a78bfa'}; const notifIcons={qms:'📋',wir:'🔍',imir:'📦',rca:'🔧',mockup_quality:'🧱',mockup_safety:'🛡️',tds:'📄',rfi:'❓',safetyobs:'🦺',workpermit:'📝'}; notifEl.innerHTML=feedItems.map(item=>`
${notifIcons[item.mod]||'📌'} ${esc(item.action.replace(/[⏳🔄💬📦]/g,'').trim())}
${esc(item.title)} · ${esc(item.project)}
`).join(''); } } // ── A1: NCR Status Donut ── const statusData={}; ['Open','In Progress','Closed','Voided'].forEach(s=>{const c=si.filter(i=>i.status===s).length;if(c)statusData[s]=c;}); donutChart('dash-status-donut',statusData,['#ef4444','#f97316','#22c55e','#6b7280']); // ── A2: Severity Bars ── const sevData={}; ['Critical','Major','Minor','Observation'].forEach(s=>{const c=si.filter(i=>i.severity===s).length;if(c)sevData[s]=c;}); barChart('dash-sev-bars',sevData,k=>SEV_COLOR[k]||'#888'); // ── B2: Inspection Results ── barChart('dash-insp-bars',{ 'Approved':sw.filter(w=>w.status==='Approved').length+sm.filter(m=>m.status==='Accepted').length, 'Rejected':sw.filter(w=>w.status==='Rejected').length+sm.filter(m=>m.status==='Rejected').length, 'Pending':sw.filter(w=>w.status==='Pending').length+sm.filter(m=>m.status==='Pending').length, 'Conditional':sm.filter(m=>m.status==='Conditional').length, }, k=>INSP_ST_COLOR[k]||'#888'); // ── B3: Module Activity ── const modEl=document.getElementById('dash-mod-activity'); if(modEl){ const mods=[ {n:'NCR/Obs',c:si.length,col:'#3b82f6'},{n:'WIR',c:sw.length,col:'#06b6d4'}, {n:'IMIR',c:sm.length,col:'#8b5cf6'},{n:'Safety',c:sobs.length,col:'#f43f5e'}, {n:'W.Permit',c:swp.length,col:'#a78bfa'},{n:'Rework',c:srca.length,col:'#C8972A'}, {n:'RFI',c:srfi.length,col:'#f97316'},{n:'Training',c:str.length,col:'#06b6d4'}, ]; modEl.innerHTML=`
${mods.map(m=>`
${m.c}
${m.n}
`).join('')}
`; } // ── C1: Project Breakdown ── const projData={}; visibleProjects.forEach(p=>{ const lbl=p.length>14?p.slice(0,14)+'…':p; projData[lbl]=si.filter(i=>i.project===p).length+sw.filter(w=>w.project===p).length+sm.filter(m=>m.project===p).length; }); barChart('dash-proj-bars',projData,()=>'#3b82f6'); // ── C3: Top Rework Cost ── const rcaSumEl=document.getElementById('dash-rca-summary'); if(rcaSumEl){ const stCol={'Pending Approval':'#f97316','Approved':'#3b82f6','Material Issued':'#8b5cf6','Completed':'#22c55e','Rejected':'#ef4444'}; const catCost={}; srca.forEach(r=>{const c=r.category||'Other';catCost[c]=(catCost[c]||0)+(parseFloat(r.totalMatCost)||0)+(parseFloat(r.labourCost)||0);}); const topCat=Object.entries(catCost).sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1]).slice(0,4); const maxC=Math.max(...topCat.map(([,v])=>v),1); rcaSumEl.innerHTML=`
${['Pending Approval','Approved','Material Issued','Completed'].map(s=>`
${srca.filter(r=>r.status===s).length}
${s.replace('Pending Approval','Pending').replace('Material Issued','Issued')}
`).join('')}
${topCat.map(([k,v])=>`
${k}
${cur} ${Math.round(v).toLocaleString()}
`).join('')||'
No rework data yet.
'}` } const rcaTopEl=document.getElementById('dash-rca-top'); if(rcaTopEl){ const top5=srca.filter(r=>(parseFloat(r.totalMatCost)||0)+(parseFloat(r.labourCost)||0)>0) .sort((a,b)=>((parseFloat(b.totalMatCost)||0)+(parseFloat(b.labourCost)||0))-((parseFloat(a.totalMatCost)||0)+(parseFloat(a.labourCost)||0))) .slice(0,5); if(!top5.length){rcaTopEl.innerHTML='
No rework cost data yet.
';} else{ const mx=Math.max(...top5.map(r=>(parseFloat(r.totalMatCost)||0)+(parseFloat(r.labourCost)||0)),1); rcaTopEl.innerHTML=top5.map(r=>{ const cost=(parseFloat(r.totalMatCost)||0)+(parseFloat(r.labourCost)||0); const rc=r.currency||'AED'; return `
${esc(r.id)}
${rc} ${Math.round(cost).toLocaleString()}
`; }).join(''); } } // ── Recent Records ── const allRec=[ ...si.map(i=>({...i,_t:'issue',_title:i.title,_click:`switchModule('qms');setTimeout(()=>openDetail('${i.id}'),60)`})), ...sw.map(w=>({...w,_t:'wir',_title:w.activity,_click:`switchModule('wir');setTimeout(()=>openWIRDetail('${w.id}'),60)`})), ...sm.map(m=>({...m,_t:'imir',_title:m.material,_click:`switchModule('imir');setTimeout(()=>openIMIRDetail('${m.id}'),60)`})), ...srca.map(r=>({...r,_t:'rca',_title:r.title,_click:`switchModule('rca');setTimeout(()=>openRCADetail('${r.id}'),60)`})), ].sort((a,b)=>(b.date||''). localeCompare(a.date||'')).slice(0,10); const colMap={issue:'#3b82f6',wir:'#06b6d4',imir:'#8b5cf6',rca:'#C8972A'}; document.getElementById('dash-recent').innerHTML=allRec.length ? allRec.map(r=>{ const col=colMap[r._t]||'#aaa'; const stc=INSP_ST_COLOR[r.status]||ST_COLOR[r.status]||'#888'; return `
${esc(r.id)} ${r.date||'—'} ${esc(r._title||'')} ${badge(r.status,stc)}
`; }).join('') : '
No records yet.
'; // ── PM Scorecard ── renderDashPMScorecard(); // ── Safety Manager Scorecard ── renderDashSMScorecard(); // ── Quality Manager Scorecard ── renderDashQMScorecard(); // ── Client & Consultant Scorecards ── renderDashCCScorecard(); // ── QA Inspector / QA/QC Engineer Scorecard ── renderDashQAScorecard(); // ── Safety Officer Scorecard ── renderDashSOScorecard(); // ── Site Engineer Scorecard ── renderDashSEScorecard(); // ── Store In-Charge Scorecard ── renderDashSIScorecard(); // ── Planner / Surveyor Scorecard ── renderDashPLScorecard(); // ── Safety Man-Hours ── const _allWpFull = isRole('super_admin') ? (simpleRecs.workpermit||[]) : (simpleRecs.workpermit||[]).filter(_pf); const _wpForMH = dashProj==='ALL' ? _allWpFull : _allWpFull.filter(r=>r.project===dashProj); renderDashManHours(_wpForMH, visibleProjects); // ── Employee of the Month ── // Include ALL module datasets so every user's activity is tracked: // core records + simpleRecs modules + concRegRecs + PTS planning arrays const _eomDatasets = [issues, wirs, imirs, rcaRecs, ...(Object.values(simpleRecs).filter(Array.isArray)), (typeof concRegRecs!=='undefined'?concRegRecs:[]), (typeof ptsActivities!=='undefined'?ptsActivities:[]), (typeof ptsMilestones!=='undefined'?ptsMilestones:[]), (typeof ptsDelays!=='undefined'?ptsDelays:[]) ]; renderDashEOM(visibleProjects, _eomDatasets); } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // DASHBOARD: Safety Man-Hours (Project-Wise, from Work Permits) // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ function calcPermitMH(wp){ // hours = (validDate+validTime) - (date+time), multiplied by numWorkers try{ const startStr = wp.date + 'T' + (wp.time||'00:00'); const endStr = (wp.validDate||wp.date) + 'T' + (wp.validTime||'23:59'); const start = new Date(startStr); const end = new Date(endStr); if(isNaN(start)||isNaN(end)||end<=start) return 0; const hrs = (end - start) / 3600000; // ms → hours const workers = parseInt(wp.numWorkers)||1; return Math.max(0, parseFloat((hrs * workers).toFixed(2))); } catch(e){ return 0; } } function renderDashManHours(wpRecs, visibleProjects){ const el = document.getElementById('dash-manhours-row'); if(!el) return; const today = new Date(); const todayStr = today.toISOString().slice(0,10); const monthStr = todayStr.slice(0,7); // YYYY-MM // Per-project stats const projStats = {}; (visibleProjects.length ? visibleProjects : [...new Set(wpRecs.map(w=>w.project).filter(Boolean))]).forEach(p=>{ projStats[p] = {today:0, monthly:0, total:0}; }); wpRecs.forEach(wp=>{ if(!wp.project) return; if(!projStats[wp.project]) projStats[wp.project]={today:0,monthly:0,total:0}; const mh = calcPermitMH(wp); projStats[wp.project].total += mh; if(wp.date && wp.date.slice(0,7) === monthStr) projStats[wp.project].monthly += mh; if(wp.date && wp.date === todayStr) projStats[wp.project].today += mh; }); const allToday = Object.values(projStats).reduce((s,p)=>s+p.today, 0); const allMonthly = Object.values(projStats).reduce((s,p)=>s+p.monthly, 0); const allTotal = Object.values(projStats).reduce((s,p)=>s+p.total, 0); const projEntries = Object.entries(projStats).sort((a,b)=>b[1].total-a[1].total); const maxMH = Math.max(...projEntries.map(([,v])=>v.total), 1); const fmtMH = v => v >= 1000 ? (v/1000).toFixed(1)+'K' : v.toFixed(0); const monthName = today.toLocaleString('default',{month:'long'}); el.innerHTML = `
🦺 Safe Man-Hours — ${dashProj==='ALL'?'All Projects':esc(dashProj)}
${fmtMH(allToday)}
Today's
${fmtMH(allMonthly)}
${monthName} (Monthly)
${fmtMH(allTotal)}
Total Safe MH
Project Breakdown
${projEntries.length ? projEntries.map(([proj,v])=>{ const pct = (v.total/maxMH*100).toFixed(1); return `
📁 ${esc(proj.length>14?proj.slice(0,14)+'…':proj)}
${fmtMH(v.total)} MH
Today: ${fmtMH(v.today)} Month: ${fmtMH(v.monthly)}
`; }).join('') : '
No Work Permit records yet. Submit a Work Permit with worker count to track man-hours.
'}
Man-Hours = Workers × Duration (Permit Date/Time → Valid Until Date/Time)
`; } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // DASHBOARD: Project-Wise Employee of the Month (Monthly) // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ function calcUserActivityScore(userId, userName, project, monthStr, allDatasets){ // Score weights per activity type (all IMS actions counted) const W = { submitted:5, approved:8, rejected:3, resubmit:2, close:10, update:2, approve:8, submit:5, comment:1, create:5, 'fully complete':10, 'safety review':6, 'qm review':6, 'safety approved':8, 'qm approved':8, accepted:8 }; let score = 0; const breakdown = {records:0, approvals:0, comments:0, completions:0}; function matchUser(nameOrId){ return nameOrId && (nameOrId===userId||nameOrId===userName||(typeof nameOrId==='string'&&nameOrId.toLowerCase()===userName.toLowerCase())); } allDatasets.forEach(recs=>{ recs.forEach(rec=>{ if(project && project!=='ALL' && rec.project!==project) return; // Date filter: only this month const recMonth = (rec.date||rec.submittedAt||'').slice(0,7); if(recMonth!==monthStr) return; // Submitted by this user if(matchUser(rec.submittedBy)||matchUser(rec.by)||matchUser(rec.createdBy)){ score += W.submitted; breakdown.records++; } // Action log entries by this user (rec.actionLog||[]).forEach(log=>{ if(!log.by) return; if(!matchUser(log.by)&&!matchUser(log.byName)) return; const logMonth=(log.time||'').slice(0,7)||monthStr; if(logMonth && logMonth!==monthStr) return; const wt = W[log.type] || W[log.action] || 2; score += wt; if(['approve','accepted','close','fully complete'].includes(log.type)) breakdown.approvals++; if(['submit','create'].includes(log.type)) breakdown.records++; if(log.type==='close'||log.type==='fully complete') breakdown.completions++; }); // Comments by this user (rec.comments||[]).forEach(cmt=>{ if(matchUser(cmt.author)||matchUser(cmt.by)){ score += W.comment; breakdown.comments++; } }); }); }); return {score:Math.round(score), breakdown}; } function renderDashEOM(visibleProjects, allDatasets){ const el = document.getElementById('dash-eom-row'); if(!el) return; const today = new Date(); const monthStr = today.toISOString().slice(0,7); const monthName = today.toLocaleString('default',{month:'long',year:'numeric'}); const allUsers = getAllUsers().filter(u=>u.id!=='sa'||u.role==='super_admin'); const projs = dashProj==='ALL' ? (visibleProjects.length ? visibleProjects : ['All Projects']) : [dashProj]; // Build per-project cards (max 3 shown side by side) const projectsToShow = dashProj==='ALL' ? projs.slice(0,3) : projs; const cards = projectsToShow.map(proj=>{ // Score every user for this project this month const scored = allUsers.map(u=>{ const res = calcUserActivityScore(u.id, u.name, proj==='All Projects'?'ALL':proj, monthStr, allDatasets); return {user:u, score:res.score, breakdown:res.breakdown}; }).filter(x=>x.score>0).sort((a,b)=>b.score-a.score); const winner = scored[0] || null; const runners = scored.slice(1,4); const ROLE_COL = typeof ROLE_COLORS!=='undefined' ? ROLE_COLORS : {}; const ROLE_LBL = typeof ROLE_LABELS!=='undefined' ? ROLE_LABELS : {}; const scoreTag = (label,val,col) => val>0 ? `${label}: ${val}` : ''; if(!winner){ return `
🏆 Employee of the Month — ${monthName}
📁 ${esc(proj)}

No activity recorded this month yet.
Activities across all modules are automatically tracked.
`; } const winCol = ROLE_COL[winner.user.role]||'#C8972A'; return `
🏆 Employee of the Month — ${monthName}
${projs.length>1?`
📁 ${esc(proj)}
`:''}
🥇
${esc(winner.user.name)}
${ROLE_LBL[winner.user.role]||winner.user.role}
${scoreTag('Records',winner.breakdown.records,'#3b82f6')} ${scoreTag('Approvals',winner.breakdown.approvals,'#22c55e')} ${scoreTag('Comments',winner.breakdown.comments,'#a78bfa')} ${scoreTag('Closed',winner.breakdown.completions,'#C8972A')}
${winner.score} pts
activity score
${runners.length ? `
Runners-Up
${runners.map((r,i)=>{ const medals=['🥈','🥉','4️⃣']; return `
${medals[i]||i+2}
${esc(r.user.name)}${ROLE_LBL[r.user.role]||''}
${r.score} pts
`; }).join('')}
` : ''}
Score = Σ (Records submitted + Approvals + Comments + Closures) weighted by activity type
`; }); el.innerHTML = `
${cards.join('')}
`; } function applyScoreOverrides(groupKey, baseObj){ const ov=(scorecardPointOverrides&&scorecardPointOverrides[groupKey])||{}; Object.keys(ov).forEach(k=>{ const num=Number(ov[k]); if(Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(baseObj,k) && Number.isFinite(num)) baseObj[k]=num; }); return baseObj; } const SCORECARD_POINT_DEFAULTS = {pm_good:{"goodpractice_active": 8, "workpermit_fc": 15, "workpermit_approved": 5, "docctrl_submitted": 5, "wir_fc": 15, "wir_qm_approved": 5, "wir_ipc_certified": 3, "imir_fc": 15, "imir_accepted": 5, "training_completed": 8, "skilleval_completed": 4, Submitted"],["rca_completed","RCA Completed"],["docctrl_submitted","Doc Control Submitted"],["concreg_submitted","Concrete Register Submitted"],["concreg_linked_pass","Concrete Register Linked Pass"],["capa_ca_submitted","CAPA CA Submitted"],["capa_ca_completed","CAPA CA Completed"],["training_attended","Training Attended"],["skilleval_passed","Skill Evaluation Passed"]]}, {group:"se_bad", title:"Site Engineer — Negative Points", items:[["wir_rejected","WIR Rejected"],["wir_overbilled","WIR Overbilled"],["imir_rejected","IMIR Rejected"],["wir_overdue_per_day","WIR Overdue (per day)"],["imir_overdue_per_day","IMIR Overdue (per day)"],["ncr_responsible","NCR Responsible"],["ncr_overdue_per_day","NCR Overdue (per day)"],["concreg_cube_fail","Concrete Register Cube Fail"]]}, {group:"si_good", title:"Store In-Charge — Good Points", items:[["imir_submitted","IMIR Submitted"],["imir_qm_accepted","IMIR QM Accepted"],["imir_fc","IMIR Fully Complete"],["rca_material_issued","RCA Material Issued"],["rca_completed","RCA Completed"],["docctrl_submitted","Doc Control Submitted"],["conccube_submitted","Concrete Cube Submitted"],["conccube_pass","Concrete Cube Pass"],["training_attended","Training Attended"],["goodpractice_raised","Good Practice Raised"]]}, {group:"si_bad", title:"Store In-Charge — Negative Points", items:[["imir_rejected","IMIR Rejected"],["imir_overdue_per_day","IMIR Overdue (per day)"],["conccube_fail","Concrete Cube Fail"],["rca_material_delayed","RCA Material Delayed"]]}, {group:"billing_engineer_good", title:"Billing Engineer — Good Points", items:[["ipc_prepared","IPC Prepared"],["boqspec_created","BOQ Spec Library Created"]]}, {group:"billing_engineer_bad", title:"Billing Engineer — Negative Points", items:[["ipc_delayed","IPC Delayed"],["wir_overbilled","WIR Overbilled"]]}, {group:"billing_manager_good", title:"Billing Manager — Good Points", items:[["ipc_reviewed","IPC Reviewed"],["ipc_certified","IPC Certified"]]}, {group:"billing_manager_bad", title:"Billing Manager — Negative Points", items:[["billing_delay","Billing Delay"],["ipc_delayed","IPC Delayed"]]}, {group:"planner_good", title:"Planner — Good Points", items:[["rfi_raised","RFI Raised"],["rfi_closed","RFI Closed"],["rfi_on_hold_resolved","RFI On Hold Resolved"],["docctrl_submitted","Doc Control Submitted"],["docctrl_approved","Doc Control Approved"],["wir_submitted","WIR Submitted"],["wir_fc","WIR Fully Complete"],["imir_submitted","IMIR Submitted"],["imir_fc","IMIR Fully Complete"],["training_attended","Training Attended"],["skilleval_pass","Skill Evaluation Pass"],["pts_activity_created","PTS Activity Created"],["pts_activity_completed","PTS Activity Completed"],["pts_activity_on_track","PTS Activity On Track"],["pts_milestone_achieved","PTS Milestone Achieved"],["pts_milestone_on_track","PTS Milestone On Track"],["pts_delay_identified","PTS Delay Identified"],["pts_delay_eot_approved","PTS Delay EOT Approved"],["goodpractice_raised","Good Practice Raised"]]}, {group:"planner_bad", title:"Planner — Negative Points", items:[["rfi_rejected","RFI Rejected"],["rfi_overdue_per_day","RFI Overdue (per day)"],["docctrl_rejected","Doc Control Rejected"],["pts_activity_delayed","PTS Activity Delayed"],["pts_milestone_delayed","PTS Milestone Delayed"],["pts_milestone_at_risk","PTS Milestone At Risk"]]}, {group:"surveyor_good", title:"Surveyor — Good Points", items:[["concreg_surveyed","Concrete Register Survey Qty"],["wir_submitted","WIR Submitted"],["imir_submitted","IMIR Submitted"]]}, {group:"surveyor_bad", title:"Surveyor — Negative Points", items:[["docctrl_rejected","Document / Measurement Rejected"],["rfi_overdue_per_day","Measurement / RFI Overdue (per day)"]]}, {group:"consultant_good", title:"Consultant Representative — Good Points", items:[["wir_fc_ontime","WIR Approved On Time"],["imir_fc_ontime","IMIR Approved On Time"],["workpermit_fc_ontime","Work Permit Reviewed On Time"],["mockup_quality_fc_ontime","Mockup Quality Reviewed On Time"],["mockup_safety_fc_ontime","Mockup Safety Reviewed On Time"],["tds_fc_ontime","TDS Reviewed On Time"],["rfi_answered_ontime","RFI Answered On Time"],["ncr_closed_by_cc","NCR Closed"],["obs_closed_by_cc","Observation Closed"]]}, {group:"consultant_bad", title:"Consultant Representative — Negative Points", items:[["wir_awaiting_per_day","WIR Awaiting (per day)"],["imir_awaiting_per_day","IMIR Awaiting (per day)"],["workpermit_awaiting_per_day","Work Permit Awaiting (per day)"],["mockup_quality_awaiting_per_day","Mockup Quality Awaiting (per day)"],["mockup_safety_awaiting_per_day","Mockup Safety Awaiting (per day)"],["tds_awaiting_per_day","TDS Awaiting (per day)"],["rfi_unanswered_per_day","RFI Unanswered (per day)"]]}, {group:"client_good", title:"Client Representative — Good Points", items:[["ipc_certified","Billing Certified"],["wir_fc_ontime","Final Approval On Time"],["imir_fc_ontime","Final Technical Approval On Time"],["rfi_closed","RFI Closed"]]}, {group:"client_bad", title:"Client Representative — Negative Points", items:[["wir_awaiting_per_day","Approval Awaiting (per day)"],["imir_awaiting_per_day","Inspection Awaiting (per day)"],["rfi_unanswered_per_day","RFI Unanswered (per day)"],["billing_delay","Billing Certification Delay"]]} ]; function renderScorecardAdmin(){ const wrap=document.getElementById('scorecard-admin-wrap'); if(!wrap) return; if(!isRole('super_admin')){ wrap.innerHTML='
Read only. Only System Administrator can change scorecard points.
'; return; } const cardHtml=SCORECARD_POINT_SCHEMA.map(sec=>{ const rows=sec.items.map(([key,label])=>{ const current=((scorecardPointOverrides||{})[sec.group]||{})[key]; const ph=(SCORECARD_POINT_DEFAULTS[sec.group]||{})[key] ?? ''; return `
`; }).join(''); return `
${sec.title}
${rows}
`; }).join(''); wrap.innerHTML=cardHtml+`
`; } function saveScorecardAdmin(){ if(!isRole('super_admin')){ showToast('Only System Administrator can modify scorecard points.','warn'); return; } const next={}; SCORECARD_POINT_SCHEMA.forEach(sec=>{ sec.items.forEach(([key])=>{ const inp=document.getElementById(`scp-${sec.group}-${key}`); if(!inp) return; const raw=(inp.value||'').trim(); if(raw==='') return; const num=Number(raw); if(!Number.isFinite(num)) return; if(!next[sec.group]) next[sec.group]={}; next[sec.group][key]=num; }); }); scorecardPointOverrides=next; save('cims_scorecard_points', scorecardPointOverrides); const msg=document.getElementById('scorecard-admin-msg'); if(msg){ msg.textContent='Saved. Reopen dashboard to see updated scorecard points.'; msg.style.color='var(--green)'; } showToast('Scorecard points updated.','ok'); } function resetScorecardAdmin(){ if(!isRole('super_admin')){ showToast('Only System Administrator can modify scorecard points.','warn'); return; } scorecardPointOverrides={}; save('cims_scorecard_points', scorecardPointOverrides); renderScorecardAdmin(); const msg=document.getElementById('scorecard-admin-msg'); if(msg){ msg.textContent='Overrides removed. Default scorecard points restored after reopen.'; msg.style.color='var(--orange)'; } showToast('Scorecard overrides reset.','ok'); } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // PROJECT MANAGER SCORECARD ENGINE // Points depend on ALL users' activities on the PM's assigned project. // Good activities → +points | Bad / overdue activities → -points (decay) // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // ── Scoring weights ────────────────────────────────────────────────── let PM_GOOD = applyScoreOverrides('pm_good', { // ── Positive activities — every occurrence adds points ────────────── goodpractice_active: +8, // each Good Practice record (any status) workpermit_fc: +15, // Work Permit Fully Complete by client/consultant workpermit_approved: +5, // Work Permit Safety Approved (milestone before FC) docctrl_submitted: +5, // Document Control submission (each record) wir_fc: +15, // WIR Fully Complete by client/consultant wir_qm_approved: +5, // WIR QM Reviewed (internal milestone) wir_ipc_certified: +3, // WIR with IPC billing amount certified (financial documentation) imir_fc: +15, // IMIR Fully Complete by client/consultant imir_accepted: +5, // IMIR QM Accepted (internal milestone) training_completed: +8, // QHSE Training Completed skilleval_completed: +4, // Skill Evaluation completed on project mockup_quality_fc: +12, // Quality Mockup FC (client) mockup_safety_fc: +10, // Safety Mockup FC (client) tds_fc: +12, // TDS Approval Fully Complete (client) safetyobs_fc: +5, // Safety Observation closed/Fully Complete // ── Concrete Register & Cube Tests ────────────────────────────────── concreg_submitted: +4, // Concrete Register pour record submitted (site tracking) concreg_cube_pass: +4, // Concrete cube test linked & passed (structural QA) // ── CAPA / RCA — Corrective & Preventive Action Culture ───────────── ncr_capa_completed: +6, // NCR corrective action completed/verified (CA done) ncr_pa_completed: +5, // NCR preventive action completed (PA done — recurrence control) // ── Planning / PTS ────────────────────────────────────────────────── pts_milestone_achieved: +10, // PTS Milestone achieved on project pts_activity_completed: +5, // PTS Activity completed on schedule pts_eot_approved: +6, // Delay EOT claim approved (risk & claim management) }); let PM_BAD = applyScoreOverrides('pm_bad', { // ── Bad events — deducted immediately ─────────────────────────────── ncr_open: -6, // each open NCR raised on project obs_open: -4, // each open Observation raised safetyobs_open: -5, // each open Safety Observation raised wir_rejected: -12, // WIR rejected by client/consultant wir_overbilled: -10, // WIR overbilling alert — cumulative qty exceeds BOQ (financial risk) imir_rejected: -12, // IMIR rejected by client/consultant workpermit_rejected: -8, // Work Permit rejected wir_pending: -3, // WIR not yet approved (Submitted/Pending) imir_pending: -3, // IMIR not yet accepted workpermit_pending: -2, // Work Permit pending approval concreg_cube_fail: -6, // Concrete cube test failed (structural/quality risk) // ── Overdue decay: continuous -pts/day after 7-day threshold ───────── ncr_overdue_per_day: -3, // NCR: -3 pts/day after day 7 until closed obs_overdue_per_day: -2, // Obs: -2 pts/day after day 7 safetyobs_overdue_per_day: -2, // Safety Obs: -2 pts/day after day 7 wir_overdue_per_day: -2, // WIR: -2 pts/day after day 7 if not FC/Approved imir_overdue_per_day: -2, // IMIR: -2 pts/day after day 7 if not FC/Accepted workpermit_overdue_per_day: -1, // Work Permit: -1 pt/day after day 7 // ── Planning / PTS ────────────────────────────────────────────────── pts_milestone_delayed: -8, // PTS Milestone delayed (schedule risk) pts_activity_delayed: -4, // PTS Activity behind schedule }); // ── Calculate PM Score for a specific project ──────────────────────── // Points depend on ALL activities by ALL users on the PM's project. // Good activities raise the score; bad events & overdue decay lower it. function calcPMScore(proj, allSimpleRecs) { const nowMs = Date.now(); const dayMs = 86400000; let baseScore = 500; // midpoint — score floats up/down from here const goodItems = []; const badItems = []; const overdueItems = []; // ── Helper: elapsed days since a date string (YYYY-MM-DD) ────────── function daysSince(dateStr){ if(!dateStr) return 0; return Math.max(0, Math.floor((nowMs - new Date(dateStr).getTime()) / dayMs)); } function addGood(label, id, pts){ baseScore += pts; goodItems.push({label, id, pts}); } function addBad(label, id, pts){ baseScore += pts; // pts is negative badItems.push({label, id, pts}); } function addDecay(id, title, type, d, decayPts, mod){ baseScore += decayPts; const extraDays = Math.max(0, d - 7); overdueItems.push({id, title, type, days:d, overdueDays:extraDays, decayPts, mod}); } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // ── GOOD ACTIVITIES ─────────────────────────────────────────────── // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // 1. Each Good Practice record raised on this project (allSimpleRecs.goodpractice||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj).forEach(r=>{ addGood('Good Practice', r.id, PM_GOOD.goodpractice_active); }); // 2. Document Control — every submission is a positive (typeof docCtrlRecs!=='undefined' ? docCtrlRecs : []).filter(r=>r.project===proj).forEach(r=>{ addGood('Doc Control Submitted', r.id, PM_GOOD.docctrl_submitted); }); // 3. QHSE Training completed (allSimpleRecs.training||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='Completed').forEach(r=>{ addGood('QHSE Training Completed', r.id, PM_GOOD.training_completed); }); // 4. Work Permit — Safety Approved (milestone) + Fully Complete (max reward) const wpAll = (allSimpleRecs.workpermit||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj); wpAll.filter(r=>r.status==='Safety Approved').forEach(r=>{ addGood('Work Permit Safety Approved', r.id, PM_GOOD.workpermit_approved); }); wpAll.filter(r=>r.status==='Fully Complete').forEach(r=>{ addGood('Work Permit Fully Complete ✓', r.id, PM_GOOD.workpermit_fc); }); // 5. WIR — Quality Manager reviewed (milestone) + Fully Complete (max reward from client) const wirAll = wirs.filter(r=>r.project===proj); wirAll.filter(r=>r.status==='Reviewed by Quality Manager' || r.status==='QM Approved').forEach(r=>{ addGood('WIR QM Reviewed', r.id, PM_GOOD.wir_qm_approved); }); wirAll.filter(r=>r.status==='Fully Complete').forEach(r=>{ addGood('WIR Fully Complete ✓ (Client)', r.id, PM_GOOD.wir_fc); }); // 6. IMIR — QM Accepted (milestone) + Fully Complete (max reward from client) const imirAll = imirs.filter(r=>r.project===proj); imirAll.filter(r=>r.status==='Accepted'||r.status==='QM Accepted').forEach(r=>{ addGood('IMIR Accepted', r.id, PM_GOOD.imir_accepted); }); imirAll.filter(r=>r.status==='Fully Complete').forEach(r=>{ addGood('IMIR Fully Complete ✓ (Client)', r.id, PM_GOOD.imir_fc); }); // 7a. Quality Mockup — Fully Complete (client approved) (allSimpleRecs.mockup_quality||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='Fully Complete').forEach(r=>{ addGood('Quality Mockup FC (Client)', r.id, PM_GOOD.mockup_quality_fc); }); // 7b. Safety Mockup — Fully Complete (client approved) (allSimpleRecs.mockup_safety||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='Fully Complete').forEach(r=>{ addGood('Safety Mockup FC (Client)', r.id, PM_GOOD.mockup_safety_fc); }); // 8. TDS Approval — Fully Complete (approved by client/consultant) (allSimpleRecs.tds||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='Fully Complete').forEach(r=>{ addGood('TDS Approval FC (Client)', r.id, PM_GOOD.tds_fc); }); // 9. Safety Observation — properly closed/Fully Complete (allSimpleRecs.safetyobs||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='Fully Complete').forEach(r=>{ addGood('Safety Obs Closed', r.id, PM_GOOD.safetyobs_fc); }); // 9b. Concrete Register — each pour tracked is a positive project management action (typeof concRegRecs!=='undefined' ? concRegRecs : []).filter(r=>r.project===proj).forEach(r=>{ addGood('Concrete Register Submitted', r.id, PM_GOOD.concreg_submitted); }); // 9c. PTS Planning — milestone achieved (on time delivery) (typeof ptsMillestones!=='undefined' ? ptsMillestones : ptsMilestones||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='Achieved').forEach(r=>{ addGood('Milestone Achieved ✓', r.id, PM_GOOD.pts_milestone_achieved); }); // 9d. PTS Planning — activity completed (on schedule performance) (typeof ptsActivities!=='undefined' ? ptsActivities : []).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='Completed').forEach(r=>{ addGood('Activity Completed ✓', r.id, PM_GOOD.pts_activity_completed); }); // ── WIR Billing IPC & Overbilling ────────────────────────────────── wirs.filter(r=>r.project===proj).forEach(r=>{ if(r.billing&&r.billing.thisAmt>0) addGood('WIR IPC Billing Certified',r.id,PM_GOOD.wir_ipc_certified); if(r.billing&&r.billing.isOverbilled) addBad('WIR Overbilling Alert ⚠',r.id,PM_BAD.wir_overbilled); }); // ── CAPA / RCA — Corrective & Preventive Action ───────────────────── issues.filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.type==='ncr').forEach(r=>{ if(r.ca&&(r.ca.status==='Completed'||r.ca.status==='Verified')) addGood('NCR CA Completed ✓',r.id,PM_GOOD.ncr_capa_completed); if(r.pa&&r.pa.status==='Completed') addGood('NCR PA Completed ✓',r.id,PM_GOOD.ncr_pa_completed); }); // ── Concrete Cube Pass/Fail ────────────────────────────────────────── (allSimpleRecs.conccube||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj).forEach(r=>{ if(r.status==='Pass') addGood('Concrete Cube Pass ✓',r.id,PM_GOOD.concreg_cube_pass); if(r.status==='Fail') addBad('Concrete Cube Fail ⚠',r.id,PM_BAD.concreg_cube_fail); }); // ── Skill Evaluations on project ──────────────────────────────────── (allSimpleRecs.skilleval||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='Passed').forEach(r=>{ addGood('Skill Eval Passed on Project',r.id,PM_GOOD.skilleval_completed); }); // ── PTS Delay EOT approved ────────────────────────────────────────── (typeof ptsDelays!=='undefined'?ptsDelays:[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.eotClaimed&&r.status==='Approved').forEach(r=>{ addGood('EOT Claim Approved ✓',r.id,PM_GOOD.pts_eot_approved); }); // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // ── BAD ACTIVITIES + OVERDUE DECAY ──────────────────────────────── // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // 10. NCR / Observation — each open record is a bad mark // If NOT closed after 7 days → continuous decay every additional day issues.filter(r=>r.project===proj&&['Open','In Progress'].includes(r.status)).forEach(r=>{ const isNCR = r.type==='ncr'; addBad(isNCR?'NCR Open':'Observation Open', r.id, isNCR?PM_BAD.ncr_open:PM_BAD.obs_open); const d = daysSince(r.date); if(d > 7){ const extra = d - 7; const decay = (isNCR ? PM_BAD.ncr_overdue_per_day : PM_BAD.obs_overdue_per_day) * extra; addDecay(r.id, r.title||r.id, isNCR?'NCR':'Obs', d, decay, 'qms'); } }); // 11. Safety Observation — open (Pending or Safety Approved but not FC) (allSimpleRecs.safetyobs||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&['Pending','Safety Approved'].includes(r.status)).forEach(r=>{ addBad('Safety Obs Open', r.id, PM_BAD.safetyobs_open); const d = daysSince(r.date); if(d > 7){ const extra = d - 7; addDecay(r.id, r.title||r.id, 'Safety Obs', d, PM_BAD.safetyobs_overdue_per_day * extra, 'safetyobs'); } }); // 12. WIR — Rejected (from client/consultant) is bad // Submitted/Pending > 7 days = overdue decay wirAll.filter(r=>r.status==='Rejected').forEach(r=>{ addBad('WIR Rejected (Client)', r.id, PM_BAD.wir_rejected); }); wirAll.filter(r=>r.status==='Submitted'||r.status==='Pending').forEach(r=>{ addBad('WIR Pending', r.id, PM_BAD.wir_pending); const d = daysSince(r.date); if(d > 7){ const extra = d - 7; addDecay(r.id, r.activity||r.id, 'WIR', d, PM_BAD.wir_overdue_per_day * extra, 'wir'); } }); // 13. IMIR — Rejected is bad; Submitted/Pending > 7 days = overdue decay imirAll.filter(r=>r.status==='Rejected').forEach(r=>{ addBad('IMIR Rejected (Client)', r.id, PM_BAD.imir_rejected); }); imirAll.filter(r=>r.status==='Submitted'||r.status==='Pending').forEach(r=>{ addBad('IMIR Pending', r.id, PM_BAD.imir_pending); const d = daysSince(r.date); if(d > 7){ const extra = d - 7; addDecay(r.id, r.material||r.id, 'IMIR', d, PM_BAD.imir_overdue_per_day * extra, 'imir'); } }); // 14. Work Permit — Rejected is bad; Pending > 7 days = overdue decay wpAll.filter(r=>r.status==='Rejected').forEach(r=>{ addBad('Work Permit Rejected', r.id, PM_BAD.workpermit_rejected); }); wpAll.filter(r=>r.status==='Pending').forEach(r=>{ addBad('Work Permit Pending', r.id, PM_BAD.workpermit_pending); const d = daysSince(r.date); if(d > 7){ const extra = d - 7; addDecay(r.id, r.title||r.id, 'Work Permit', d, PM_BAD.workpermit_overdue_per_day * extra, 'workpermit'); } }); // 15. PTS Planning — delayed milestones and activities (schedule risk) (typeof ptsMilestones!=='undefined' ? ptsMilestones : []).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='Delayed').forEach(r=>{ addBad('Milestone Delayed ⚠', r.id, PM_BAD.pts_milestone_delayed); }); (typeof ptsActivities!=='undefined' ? ptsActivities : []).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='Delayed').forEach(r=>{ addBad('Activity Delayed ⚠', r.id, PM_BAD.pts_activity_delayed); }); // ── Clamp score 0–1000 ──────────────────────────────────────────── baseScore = Math.max(0, Math.min(1000, Math.round(baseScore))); const totalGood = goodItems.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.pts, 0); const totalBad = badItems.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.pts, 0); const totalDecay = overdueItems.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.decayPts, 0); return { score: baseScore, totalGood, totalBad, totalDecay, goodItems, badItems, overdueItems, goodCount: goodItems.length, badCount: badItems.length, overdueCount: overdueItems.length }; } // ── Grade helper ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── function pmGrade(score){ if(score >= 800) return {g:'A+', label:'Excellent', col:'#22c55e'}; if(score >= 650) return {g:'A', label:'Good', col:'#84cc16'}; if(score >= 500) return {g:'B', label:'Satisfactory', col:'#f59e0b'}; if(score >= 350) return {g:'C', label:'Needs Attention',col:'#f97316'}; return {g:'D', label:'Critical', col:'#ef4444'}; } // ── Render PM Scorecard ────────────────────────────────────────────── function renderDashPMScorecard(){ const el = document.getElementById('dash-pm-scorecard-row'); if(!el) return; // Gather all PMs visible to current user const allUsers = getAllUsers(); const visProjs = getAssignedProjects(); // Who to show scorecards for: // - System Administrator: all PMs across all projects // - Quality Manager: PMs on their assigned projects // - Project Manager: only their own scorecard // - Others: no PM scorecard shown let pmUsers = allUsers.filter(u=>u.role==='project_manager'); if(isRole('project_manager')){ pmUsers = pmUsers.filter(u=>u.id===currentUser.id); } else if(isRole('quality_manager')){ const myP = currentUser.assignedProjects&¤tUser.assignedProjects.length ? currentUser.assignedProjects : projects; pmUsers = pmUsers.filter(u=>!u.assignedProjects||!u.assignedProjects.length||u.assignedProjects.some(p=>myP.includes(p))); } else if(!isRole('super_admin')){ el.innerHTML=''; return; // Other roles don't see PM scorecards } // Apply dashProj filter if(dashProj!=='ALL'){ pmUsers = pmUsers.filter(u=>!u.assignedProjects||!u.assignedProjects.length||u.assignedProjects.includes(dashProj)); } if(!pmUsers.length){ // Show placeholder only if user would expect to see it if(isRole('super_admin','quality_manager')){ el.innerHTML=`
📊 Project Manager Scorecard
No Project Managers assigned yet. Add a user with the Project Manager role in Settings → User Management.
`; } else { el.innerHTML=''; } return; } const cards = pmUsers.map(pm=>{ // PM may be assigned to multiple projects — score each assigned project const pmProjs = (pm.assignedProjects&&pm.assignedProjects.length) ? pm.assignedProjects.filter(p=>projects.includes(p)) : projects; // Filter to dashProj if set const targetProjs = dashProj==='ALL' ? pmProjs : pmProjs.filter(p=>p===dashProj); return targetProjs.map(proj=>{ const result = calcPMScore(proj, simpleRecs); const grade = pmGrade(result.score); // Dial arc (score 0-1000 mapped to 0-270 degrees) const dialR=36, dialC=44, dialCirc=2*Math.PI*dialR; const pct = result.score/1000; const arcDeg = pct * 270; // 270° sweep const arcRad = arcDeg * Math.PI/180; // Start at 225° (bottom-left), sweep clockwise const startAngle = 225 * Math.PI/180; const endAngle = startAngle + arcRad; const x1 = dialC + dialR*Math.cos(startAngle); const y1 = dialC + dialR*Math.sin(startAngle); const x2 = dialC + dialR*Math.cos(endAngle); const y2 = dialC + dialR*Math.sin(endAngle); const largeArc = arcDeg > 180 ? 1 : 0; const dialTrackStart = { x: dialC + dialR*Math.cos(startAngle), y: dialC + dialR*Math.sin(startAngle) }; const dialTrackEnd = { x: dialC + dialR*Math.cos((225+270)*Math.PI/180), y: dialC + dialR*Math.sin((225+270)*Math.PI/180) }; // Build overdue items HTML (max 4) const ovHtml = result.overdueItems.length ? `
⏰ Overdue — Continuous Decay (-pts/day)
`+ result.overdueItems.slice(0,4).map(o=>{ const oc = o.mod==='qms' ? `switchModule('qms');setTimeout(()=>openDetail('${o.id}'),60)` : o.mod==='wir' ? `switchModule('wir');setTimeout(()=>openWIRDetail('${o.id}'),60)` : o.mod==='imir' ? `switchModule('imir');setTimeout(()=>openIMIRDetail('${o.id}'),60)` : o.mod==='workpermit' ? `switchModule('workpermit');setTimeout(()=>openSimpleDetail('workpermit','${o.id}'),60)` : `switchModule('safetyobs');setTimeout(()=>openSimpleDetail('safetyobs','${o.id}'),60)`; const typeCol = o.mod==='qms'?'#ef4444':o.mod==='safetyobs'?'#f97316':o.mod==='wir'?'#06b6d4':o.mod==='imir'?'#8b5cf6':'#a78bfa'; return `
${esc(o.id)} ${esc(o.type)} ${esc(o.title)} −${Math.abs(o.decayPts)}pts · ${o.days}d overdue
`; }).join('')+ (result.overdueItems.length>4 ? `
+${result.overdueItems.length-4} more overdue items…
` : '') : ''; // Build good / bad summary grouped by type const goodGroups={}, badGroups={}; result.goodItems.forEach(i=>{ goodGroups[i.label]=(goodGroups[i.label]||{n:0,pts:0}); goodGroups[i.label].n++; goodGroups[i.label].pts+=i.pts; }); result.badItems.forEach(i=>{ badGroups[i.label]=(badGroups[i.label]||{n:0,pts:0}); badGroups[i.label].n++; badGroups[i.label].pts+=i.pts; }); const goodRows = Object.entries(goodGroups).map(([lbl,v])=>`
${esc(lbl)}
×${v.n}
+${v.pts}pts
`).join(''); const badRows = Object.entries(badGroups).map(([lbl,v])=>`
${esc(lbl)}
×${v.n}
${v.pts}pts
`).join(''); return `
📁 ${esc(proj)}
${esc(pm.name)}
Project Manager
${result.score}
/ 1000
${grade.g}
${grade.label}
▲ Good: +${result.totalGood} pts
▼ Issues: ${result.totalBad} pts
${result.totalDecay<0?`
⏰ Decay: ${result.totalDecay} pts
`:''}
${wirs.filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='Fully Complete').length}
WIR CC Closed ✓
${imirs.filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='Fully Complete').length}
IMIR CC Closed ✓
${(simpleRecs.workpermit||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='Fully Complete').length}
W.Permit CC Closed ✓
${result.goodCount}
Good Activities
${result.overdueCount}
Overdue Items
${goodRows||badRows ? `
Score Breakdown
${goodRows} ${badRows}` : '
No activity recorded for this project yet.
'} ${ovHtml}
Base 500 · WIR / IMIR / Work Permit reach ✓ only after CC final close · Capped 0–1000 · Good (WIR·IMIR·WP·Mockup·TDS·GP·Training) − Issues (NCR·Obs·Rejected·Pending) − Overdue Decay
`; }).join(''); }).flat(); if(!cards.length){ el.innerHTML=`
📊 Project Manager Scorecard
No projects assigned to Project Managers yet.
`; return; } // Build scoring legend rows const _pgRows = [ ['Good Practice raised', PM_GOOD.goodpractice_active, true], ['Doc Control submitted', PM_GOOD.docctrl_submitted, true], ['QHSE Training completed', PM_GOOD.training_completed, true], ['Skill Evaluation passed (project)',PM_GOOD.skilleval_completed, true], ['Work Permit Safety Approved', PM_GOOD.workpermit_approved, true], ['Work Permit CC Closed ✓', PM_GOOD.workpermit_fc, true], ['WIR QM Reviewed', PM_GOOD.wir_qm_approved, true], ['WIR CC Closed / Fully Complete ✓',PM_GOOD.wir_fc, true], ['WIR IPC Billing Certified', PM_GOOD.wir_ipc_certified, true], ['IMIR Accepted', PM_GOOD.imir_accepted, true], ['IMIR CC Closed / Fully Complete ✓',PM_GOOD.imir_fc, true], ['Quality Mockup FC (Client)', PM_GOOD.mockup_quality_fc, true], ['Safety Mockup FC (Client)', PM_GOOD.mockup_safety_fc, true], ['TDS Fully Complete (Client)', PM_GOOD.tds_fc, true], ['Safety Obs Closed', PM_GOOD.safetyobs_fc, true], ['Concrete Register submitted', PM_GOOD.concreg_submitted, true], ['Concrete Cube Pass ✓', PM_GOOD.concreg_cube_pass, true], ['NCR Corrective Action Completed',PM_GOOD.ncr_capa_completed, true], ['NCR Preventive Action Completed',PM_GOOD.ncr_pa_completed, true], ['PTS Milestone Achieved ✓', PM_GOOD.pts_milestone_achieved, true], ['PTS Activity Completed ✓', PM_GOOD.pts_activity_completed, true], ['Delay EOT Claim Approved ✓', PM_GOOD.pts_eot_approved, true], ]; const _pbRows = [ ['NCR Open', PM_BAD.ncr_open, false], ['NCR Overdue >7 days (per day)', PM_BAD.ncr_overdue_per_day, false, '/day'], ['Observation Open', PM_BAD.obs_open, false], ['Obs Overdue >7 days (per day)', PM_BAD.obs_overdue_per_day, false, '/day'], ['Safety Obs Open', PM_BAD.safetyobs_open, false], ['Safety Obs Overdue (per day)', PM_BAD.safetyobs_overdue_per_day, false, '/day'], ['WIR Rejected (Client)', PM_BAD.wir_rejected, false], ['WIR Overbilling Alert ⚠', PM_BAD.wir_overbilled, false], ['WIR Pending >7 days (per day)', PM_BAD.wir_overdue_per_day, false, '/day'], ['IMIR Rejected (Client)', PM_BAD.imir_rejected, false], ['IMIR Pending >7 days (per day)', PM_BAD.imir_overdue_per_day, false, '/day'], ['Work Permit Rejected', PM_BAD.workpermit_rejected, false], ['Work Permit Overdue (per day)', PM_BAD.workpermit_overdue_per_day, false, '/day'], ['Concrete Cube Fail ⚠', PM_BAD.concreg_cube_fail, false], ]; const _lgRow = (k,v,good,sfx) => `
${k}${good?'+':''}${v}${sfx||''} pts
`; const _legendHtml = `
ℹ️ How PM Score is Calculated  (click to expand)
✅ Good Activities (+pts)
${_pgRows.map(([k,v])=>_lgRow(k,v,true)).join('')}
❌ Bad / Overdue (−pts)
${_pbRows.map(([k,v,g,s])=>_lgRow(k,v,g,s)).join('')}
Base: 500 pts · Range: 0–1000 · Updates live
`; el.innerHTML=`
📊 Project Manager Scorecard — Live Performance Index
${_legendHtml}
${cards.join('')}
`; } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // SAFETY MANAGER SCORECARD ENGINE // Points depend on ALL safety-related activities on the SM's project. // Good activities raise score; bad events & overdue decay lower it. // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ let SM_GOOD = applyScoreOverrides('sm_good', { // ── Safety-positive activities ──────────────────────────────────── goodpractice_safety: +10, // Good Practice raised (safety-related) docctrl_safety: +5, // Doc Control submission (safety docs) workpermit_approved: +8, // Work Permit Safety Approved (by SM/SO) workpermit_fc: +15, // Work Permit Fully Complete — CC mandatory sign-off ✓ training_safety: +10, // Safety/HSE/Environment/Induction Training skilleval_safety: +8, // Skill Evaluation (safety/trades) mockup_safety_approved: +8, // Safety Mockup Safety Approved (SM internal) mockup_safety_fc: +12, // Safety Mockup Fully Complete — CC mandatory sign-off ✓ safetyobs_fc: +6, // Safety Observation properly closed — CC mandatory ✓ }); let SM_BAD = applyScoreOverrides('sm_bad', { // ── Negative safety events ──────────────────────────────────────── safetyobs_open: -6, // each open Safety Observation safetyobs_overdue_per_day: -3, // -3 pts/day after 7-day threshold workpermit_rejected: -10, // Work Permit rejected workpermit_overdue_per_day:-2, // Work Permit pending >7 days }); // ── Safety-related keyword matcher ─────────────────────────────────── function isSafetyRelated(rec){ const haystack = [ rec.title||'', rec.type||'', rec.category||'', rec.description||'', rec.scope||'', rec.topics||'', rec.trade||'', rec.remarks||'' ].join(' ').toLowerCase(); return /safety|hse|health|environment|fire|hazard|ppe|induction|risk|emergency|first.?aid|accident|incident|near.?miss|work.?at.?height|confined|excavat|lifting|radiograph|chemical|electric|hot.?work|cold.?work/.test(haystack); } // ── Calculate SM Score for a specific project ───────────────────────── function calcSMScore(proj, allSimpleRecs) { const nowMs = Date.now(); const dayMs = 86400000; let baseScore = 500; const goodItems = []; const badItems = []; const overdueItems = []; function daysSince(dateStr){ if(!dateStr) return 0; return Math.max(0, Math.floor((nowMs - new Date(dateStr).getTime()) / dayMs)); } function addGood(label, id, pts){ baseScore += pts; goodItems.push({label, id, pts}); } function addBad(label, id, pts){ baseScore += pts; badItems.push({label, id, pts}); } function addDecay(id, title, type, d, decayPts, mod){ baseScore += decayPts; overdueItems.push({id, title, type, days:d, overdueDays:Math.max(0,d-7), decayPts, mod}); } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // ── GOOD ACTIVITIES ─────────────────────────────────────────────── // 1. Good Practice — safety-related records (allSimpleRecs.goodpractice||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj).forEach(r=>{ if(isSafetyRelated(r)){ addGood('Good Practice (Safety)', r.id, SM_GOOD.goodpractice_safety); } }); // 2. Document Control — safety-related submissions (typeof docCtrlRecs!=='undefined' ? docCtrlRecs : []).filter(r=>r.project===proj).forEach(r=>{ if(isSafetyRelated(r)){ addGood('Doc Control (Safety)', r.id, SM_GOOD.docctrl_safety); } }); // 3. Work Permit — Safety Approved milestone + Fully Complete (best) const wpAll = (allSimpleRecs.workpermit||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj); wpAll.filter(r=>r.status==='Safety Approved').forEach(r=>{ addGood('Work Permit Safety Approved ✓', r.id, SM_GOOD.workpermit_approved); }); wpAll.filter(r=>r.status==='Fully Complete').forEach(r=>{ addGood('Work Permit Fully Complete ✓ (Client)', r.id, SM_GOOD.workpermit_fc); }); // 4. Training — safety, HSE, environment, induction types const safetyTrainingTypes = ['Safety Training','Induction','QMS Awareness','Skills Training']; (allSimpleRecs.training||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj).forEach(r=>{ if(r.status==='Completed' && (safetyTrainingTypes.includes(r.type) || isSafetyRelated(r))){ addGood('Safety/HSE Training Completed', r.id, SM_GOOD.training_safety); } }); // 5. Skill Evaluation — SM is responsible for safety trade evaluations (allSimpleRecs.skilleval||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj).forEach(r=>{ addGood('Skill Evaluation Conducted', r.id, SM_GOOD.skilleval_safety); }); // 6. Safety Mockup — Fully Complete (client approved). Safety Manager owns safety mockups. (allSimpleRecs.mockup_safety||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='Fully Complete').forEach(r=>{ addGood('Safety Mockup FC (Client)', r.id, SM_GOOD.mockup_safety_fc); }); // 6b. Safety Mockup — Safety Approved milestone (allSimpleRecs.mockup_safety||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='Safety Approved').forEach(r=>{ addGood('Safety Mockup SM Approved', r.id, SM_GOOD.mockup_safety_approved); }); // 6c. Safety Mockup — Rejected (bad for SM) (allSimpleRecs.mockup_safety||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='Rejected').forEach(r=>{ addBad('Safety Mockup Rejected', r.id, SM_BAD.workpermit_rejected); }); // 7.
