Safety Observation — properly closed/Fully Complete (allSimpleRecs.safetyobs||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='Fully Complete').forEach(r=>{ addGood('Safety Obs Closed', r.id, SM_GOOD.safetyobs_fc); }); // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // ── BAD ACTIVITIES + OVERDUE DECAY ──────────────────────────────── // 8. Safety Observation — open (Pending / Safety Approved but not FC) // After 7 days → continuous -pts/day every additional day until closed (allSimpleRecs.safetyobs||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&['Pending','Safety Approved'].includes(r.status)).forEach(r=>{ addBad('Safety Obs Open', r.id, SM_BAD.safetyobs_open); const d = daysSince(r.date); if(d > 7){ const extra = d - 7; addDecay(r.id, r.title||r.id, 'Safety Obs', d, SM_BAD.safetyobs_overdue_per_day * extra, 'safetyobs'); } }); // 9. Work Permit Rejected — safety failure wpAll.filter(r=>r.status==='Rejected').forEach(r=>{ addBad('Work Permit Rejected', r.id, SM_BAD.workpermit_rejected); }); // 10. Work Permit Pending > 7 days — decay wpAll.filter(r=>r.status==='Pending').forEach(r=>{ const d = daysSince(r.date); if(d > 7){ const extra = d - 7; addDecay(r.id, r.title||r.id, 'Work Permit', d, SM_BAD.workpermit_overdue_per_day * extra, 'workpermit'); } }); // Clamp 0–1000 baseScore = Math.max(0, Math.min(1000, Math.round(baseScore))); const totalGood = goodItems.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.pts, 0); const totalBad = badItems.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.pts, 0); const totalDecay = overdueItems.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.decayPts, 0); return { score: baseScore, totalGood, totalBad, totalDecay, goodItems, badItems, overdueItems, goodCount: goodItems.length, badCount: badItems.length, overdueCount: overdueItems.length }; } // ── SM Grade helper ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── function smGrade(score){ if(score >= 800) return {g:'A+', label:'Excellent', col:'#22c55e'}; if(score >= 650) return {g:'A', label:'Good', col:'#84cc16'}; if(score >= 500) return {g:'B', label:'Satisfactory', col:'#f59e0b'}; if(score >= 350) return {g:'C', label:'Needs Attention',col:'#f97316'}; return {g:'D', label:'Critical', col:'#ef4444'}; } // ── Render SM Scorecard ─────────────────────────────────────────────── function renderDashSMScorecard(){ const el = document.getElementById('dash-sm-scorecard-row'); if(!el) return; const allUsers = getAllUsers(); // Visibility: // - System Administrator: all SMs across all projects // - Quality Manager: SMs on their projects // - Safety Manager: own scorecard only // - Others: hidden let smUsers = allUsers.filter(u=>u.role==='safety_manager'); if(isRole('safety_manager')){ smUsers = smUsers.filter(u=>u.id===currentUser.id); } else if(isRole('quality_manager')){ const myP = currentUser.assignedProjects&¤tUser.assignedProjects.length ? currentUser.assignedProjects : projects; smUsers = smUsers.filter(u=>!u.assignedProjects||!u.assignedProjects.length||u.assignedProjects.some(p=>myP.includes(p))); } else if(!isRole('super_admin')){ el.innerHTML=''; return; } // Apply dashProj filter if(dashProj!=='ALL'){ smUsers = smUsers.filter(u=>!u.assignedProjects||!u.assignedProjects.length||u.assignedProjects.includes(dashProj)); } if(!smUsers.length){ if(isRole('super_admin','quality_manager')){ el.innerHTML=`
🦺 Safety Manager Scorecard
No Safety Managers assigned yet. Add a user with the Safety Manager role in Settings → User Management.
`; } else { el.innerHTML=''; } return; } const cards = smUsers.map(sm=>{ const smProjs = (sm.assignedProjects&&sm.assignedProjects.length) ? sm.assignedProjects.filter(p=>projects.includes(p)) : projects; const targetProjs = dashProj==='ALL' ? smProjs : smProjs.filter(p=>p===dashProj); return targetProjs.map(proj=>{ const result = calcSMScore(proj, simpleRecs); const grade = smGrade(result.score); // Dial arc (0–1000 → 0–270°, starting at 225°) const dialR=36, dialC=44, dialCirc=2*Math.PI*dialR; const pct = result.score/1000; const arcDeg = pct*270; const arcRad = arcDeg*Math.PI/180; const sA = 225*Math.PI/180; const eA = sA+arcRad; const x1=dialC+dialR*Math.cos(sA), y1=dialC+dialR*Math.sin(sA); const x2=dialC+dialR*Math.cos(eA), y2=dialC+dialR*Math.sin(eA); const largeArc = arcDeg>180?1:0; // Overdue items (click → open record) const ovHtml = result.overdueItems.length ? `
⏰ Overdue — Continuous Decay (−pts/day)
`+ result.overdueItems.slice(0,5).map(o=>{ const oc = o.mod==='safetyobs' ? `switchModule('safetyobs');setTimeout(()=>openSimpleDetail('safetyobs','${o.id}'),60)` : `switchModule('workpermit');setTimeout(()=>openSimpleDetail('workpermit','${o.id}'),60)`; const tc = o.mod==='safetyobs'?'#f97316':'#a78bfa'; return `
${esc(o.id)} ${esc(o.type)} ${esc(o.title)} −${Math.abs(o.decayPts)}pts · ${o.days}d overdue
`; }).join('')+ (result.overdueItems.length>5?`
+${result.overdueItems.length-5} more overdue items…
`:'') : ''; // Good / bad grouped summary const goodGroups={}, badGroups={}; result.goodItems.forEach(i=>{goodGroups[i.label]=(goodGroups[i.label]||{n:0,pts:0});goodGroups[i.label].n++;goodGroups[i.label].pts+=i.pts;}); result.badItems.forEach(i=>{badGroups[i.label]=(badGroups[i.label]||{n:0,pts:0});badGroups[i.label].n++;badGroups[i.label].pts+=i.pts;}); const goodRows = Object.entries(goodGroups).map(([lbl,v])=>`
${esc(lbl)}
×${v.n}
+${v.pts}pts
`).join(''); const badRows = Object.entries(badGroups).map(([lbl,v])=>`
${esc(lbl)}
×${v.n}
${v.pts}pts
`).join(''); // Score legend rows const _sgRows=[ ['Good Practice (Safety)', SM_GOOD.goodpractice_safety, true], ['Doc Control (Safety)', SM_GOOD.docctrl_safety, true], ['Work Permit Safety Approved', SM_GOOD.workpermit_approved,true], ['Work Permit Fully Complete (Client)',SM_GOOD.workpermit_fc, true], ['Safety/HSE/Env Training Completed', SM_GOOD.training_safety, true], ['Skill Evaluation Conducted', SM_GOOD.skilleval_safety, true], ['Safety Mockup FC (Client)', SM_GOOD.mockup_safety_fc, true], ['Safety Mockup SM Approved', SM_GOOD.mockup_safety_approved,true], ['Safety Obs Closed', SM_GOOD.safetyobs_fc, true], ]; const _sbRows=[ ['Safety Obs Open', SM_BAD.safetyobs_open, false], ['Safety Obs Overdue >7d (per day)', SM_BAD.safetyobs_overdue_per_day, false, '/day'], ['Work Permit Rejected', SM_BAD.workpermit_rejected, false], ['Work Permit Overdue >7d (per day)', SM_BAD.workpermit_overdue_per_day,false, '/day'], ]; const _slgRow=(k,v,good,sfx)=>`
${k}${good?'+':''}${v}${sfx||''} pts
`; const _smLegend=`
ℹ️ How Safety Manager Score is Calculated  (click to expand)
✅ Good Activities (+pts)
${_sgRows.map(([k,v])=>_slgRow(k,v,true)).join('')}
❌ Bad / Overdue (−pts)
${_sbRows.map(([k,v,g,s])=>_slgRow(k,v,g,s)).join('')}
Base: 500 pts · Range: 0–1000 · Updates live
`; return `
🏗 ${esc(proj)}
${esc(sm.name)}
🦺 Safety Manager
${_smLegend}
${result.score}
/ 1000
${grade.g}
${grade.label}
▲ Good: +${result.totalGood} pts
▼ Issues: ${result.totalBad} pts
${result.totalDecay<0?`
⏰ Decay: ${result.totalDecay} pts
`:''}
${(simpleRecs.workpermit||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='Fully Complete').length}
W.Permit CC Closed ✓
${(simpleRecs.workpermit||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='Safety Approved').length}
W.Permit Approved
${result.goodCount}
Good Activities
${result.overdueCount}
Overdue Items
${goodRows||badRows?`
Score Breakdown
${goodRows} ${badRows} `:'
No safety activity recorded for this project yet.
'} ${ovHtml}
🔐 Work Permit fully closed only by CC · Safety score: WP · SafetyObs · Safety Mockup · Training · Good Practice
`; }).join(''); }).flat(); if(!cards.length){ el.innerHTML=`
🦺 Safety Manager Scorecard — Safety Performance Index
No projects assigned to Safety Managers yet.
`; return; } el.innerHTML=`
🦺 Safety Manager Scorecard — Safety Performance Index
${cards.join('')}
`; } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // QUALITY MANAGER SCORECARD ENGINE // Points depend on ALL quality-related activities on the QM's project. // Good activities raise score; bad events & overdue decay lower it. // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ let QM_GOOD = applyScoreOverrides('qm_good', { goodpractice_quality: +10, // Good Practice (quality-related) docctrl_quality: +5, // Doc Control submission (quality doc) wir_fc: +15, // WIR Fully Complete (client/consultant) wir_qm_approved: +6, // WIR QM Reviewed (internal milestone — QM review action) imir_fc: +15, // IMIR Fully Complete (client/consultant) imir_accepted: +6, // IMIR QM Accepted (internal milestone) training_quality: +10, // Quality-related training completed skilleval_quality: +8, // Skill Evaluation (quality/trade) mockup_quality_fc: +12, // Quality Mockup Fully Complete (client) tds_fc: +12, // TDS Approval Fully Complete (client) rca_approved: +5, // RCA approved (quality corrective action) // ── CAPA — Corrective & Preventive Action Oversight ────────────────── ncr_capa_completed: +8, // NCR CA completed (QM's core CAPA oversight responsibility) ncr_pa_completed: +6, // NCR PA completed (recurrence prevention — QM accountability) // ── Concrete Register & Quality Testing ────────────────────────────── concreg_reviewed: +4, // Concrete Register reviewed by QM (oversight) conccube_pass: +4, // Concrete cube test passed (quality system working) // ── Safety Obs Closure (Holistic Quality Oversight) ────────────────── safetyobs_fc: +4, // Safety Observation closed (QM holistic quality role) // ── BOQ Spec Library ───────────────────────────────────────────────── boqspec_entry: +3, // BOQ Spec Library entry (quality documentation of standards) }); let QM_BAD = applyScoreOverrides('qm_bad', { ncr_open: -6, // each open NCR on project ncr_overdue_per_day: -3, // NCR not closed after 7 days: -3 pts/day obs_open: -4, // each open Observation obs_overdue_per_day: -2, // Obs not closed after 7 days: -2 pts/day wir_rejected: -12, // WIR rejected by client/consultant wir_overdue_per_day: -2, // WIR pending >7 days: -2 pts/day imir_rejected: -12, // IMIR rejected by client/consultant imir_overdue_per_day: -2, // IMIR pending >7 days: -2 pts/day mockup_quality_rejected: -8, // Quality Mockup rejected tds_rejected: -8, // TDS Approval rejected concreg_cube_fail: -8, // Concrete cube test failed (quality system failure — QM accountability) }); // ── Quality-related keyword matcher ────────────────────────────────── function isQualityRelated(rec){ const haystack = [ rec.title||'', rec.type||'', rec.category||'', rec.description||'', rec.scope||'', rec.topics||'', rec.trade||'', rec.remarks||'' ].join(' ').toLowerCase(); return /quality|qms|qc|qa\b|inspection|ncr|non.?conform|defect|snag|punch|rework|material|concrete|steel|weld|coat|waterproof|tile|finish|plaster|paint|rebar|formwork|shutt|anchor|bolt|sealant|grout|epoxy|curing|tolerance|dimension|measur|test|certif|approv|submittal|tds|mockup|spec|standard|iso|astm|bs\b|en\b|drawing|revisi|document|record|verif|calibr|audit/.test(haystack); } // ── Calculate QM Score for a specific project ───────────────────────── function calcQMScore(proj, allSimpleRecs) { const nowMs = Date.now(); const dayMs = 86400000; let baseScore = 500; const goodItems = []; const badItems = []; const overdueItems = []; function daysSince(dateStr){ if(!dateStr) return 0; return Math.max(0, Math.floor((nowMs - new Date(dateStr).getTime()) / dayMs)); } function addGood(label, id, pts){ baseScore += pts; goodItems.push({label, id, pts}); } function addBad(label, id, pts){ baseScore += pts; badItems.push({label, id, pts}); } function addDecay(id, title, type, d, decayPts, mod){ baseScore += decayPts; overdueItems.push({id, title, type, days:d, overdueDays:Math.max(0,d-7), decayPts, mod}); } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // ── GOOD ACTIVITIES ─────────────────────────────────────────────── // 1. Good Practice — quality-related records (allSimpleRecs.goodpractice||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj).forEach(r=>{ if(isQualityRelated(r)){ addGood('Good Practice (Quality)', r.id, QM_GOOD.goodpractice_quality); } }); // 2. Document Control — quality-related submissions (typeof docCtrlRecs!=='undefined' ? docCtrlRecs : []).filter(r=>r.project===proj).forEach(r=>{ if(isQualityRelated(r)){ addGood('Doc Control (Quality)', r.id, QM_GOOD.docctrl_quality); } }); // 3. WIR — QM Review milestone + Fully Complete (client) const wirAll = wirs.filter(r=>r.project===proj); wirAll.filter(r=>r.status==='Reviewed by Quality Manager' || r.status==='QM Approved').forEach(r=>{ addGood('WIR QM Reviewed', r.id, QM_GOOD.wir_qm_approved); }); wirAll.filter(r=>r.status==='Fully Complete').forEach(r=>{ addGood('WIR Fully Complete ✓ (Client)', r.id, QM_GOOD.wir_fc); }); // 4. IMIR — QM Accepted (internal milestone) + Fully Complete (client) const imirAll = imirs.filter(r=>r.project===proj); imirAll.filter(r=>r.status==='Accepted'||r.status==='QM Accepted').forEach(r=>{ addGood('IMIR Accepted', r.id, QM_GOOD.imir_accepted); }); imirAll.filter(r=>r.status==='Fully Complete').forEach(r=>{ addGood('IMIR Fully Complete ✓ (Client)', r.id, QM_GOOD.imir_fc); }); // 5. Training — quality-related types completed const qualityTrainingTypes = ['Technical Training','QMS Awareness','Skills Training','Certification Course']; (allSimpleRecs.training||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj).forEach(r=>{ if(r.status==='Completed' && (qualityTrainingTypes.includes(r.type) || isQualityRelated(r))){ addGood('Quality/QMS Training Completed', r.id, QM_GOOD.training_quality); } }); // 6. Skill Evaluation — QM conducts quality trade evaluations (allSimpleRecs.skilleval||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj).forEach(r=>{ addGood('Skill Evaluation Conducted', r.id, QM_GOOD.skilleval_quality); }); // 7. Quality Mockup — Fully Complete (client). QM owns quality mockups. (allSimpleRecs.mockup_quality||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='Fully Complete').forEach(r=>{ addGood('Quality Mockup FC (Client)', r.id, QM_GOOD.mockup_quality_fc); }); // 7b. Quality Mockup — QM Approved milestone (allSimpleRecs.mockup_quality||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='QM Approved').forEach(r=>{ addGood('Quality Mockup QM Approved', r.id, QM_GOOD.wir_qm_approved); }); // 8. TDS Approval — Fully Complete (approved by client/consultant) (allSimpleRecs.tds||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='Fully Complete').forEach(r=>{ addGood('TDS Approval FC (Client)', r.id, QM_GOOD.tds_fc); }); // 9. RCA — approved corrective actions show quality responsiveness (typeof rcaRecs!=='undefined' ? rcaRecs : []).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.status==='Approved'||r.status==='Completed')).forEach(r=>{ addGood('RCA Approved / Completed', r.id, QM_GOOD.rca_approved); }); // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // ── BAD ACTIVITIES + OVERDUE DECAY ──────────────────────────────── // 10. NCR / Observation — open records are quality failures // After 7 days without closure → continuous decay every extra day issues.filter(r=>r.project===proj&&['Open','In Progress'].includes(r.status)).forEach(r=>{ const isNCR = r.type==='ncr'; addBad(isNCR?'NCR Open':'Observation Open', r.id, isNCR?QM_BAD.ncr_open:QM_BAD.obs_open); const d = daysSince(r.date); if(d > 7){ const extra = d - 7; addDecay(r.id, r.title||r.id, isNCR?'NCR':'Obs', d, (isNCR ? QM_BAD.ncr_overdue_per_day : QM_BAD.obs_overdue_per_day) * extra, 'qms'); } }); // 11. WIR — Rejected (client/consultant quality rejection) // Pending > 7 days → decay wirAll.filter(r=>r.status==='Rejected').forEach(r=>{ addBad('WIR Rejected (Client)', r.id, QM_BAD.wir_rejected); }); wirAll.filter(r=>r.status==='Submitted'||r.status==='Pending').forEach(r=>{ const d = daysSince(r.date); if(d > 7){ const extra = d - 7; addDecay(r.id, r.activity||r.id, 'WIR', d, QM_BAD.wir_overdue_per_day * extra, 'wir'); } }); // 12. IMIR — Rejected (quality material rejection) // Pending > 7 days → decay imirAll.filter(r=>r.status==='Rejected').forEach(r=>{ addBad('IMIR Rejected (Client)', r.id, QM_BAD.imir_rejected); }); imirAll.filter(r=>r.status==='Submitted'||r.status==='Pending').forEach(r=>{ const d = daysSince(r.date); if(d > 7){ const extra = d - 7; addDecay(r.id, r.material||r.id, 'IMIR', d, QM_BAD.imir_overdue_per_day * extra, 'imir'); } }); // 13. Quality Mockup Rejected — quality submission failure (allSimpleRecs.mockup_quality||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='Rejected').forEach(r=>{ addBad('Quality Mockup Rejected', r.id, QM_BAD.mockup_quality_rejected); }); (allSimpleRecs.tds||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='Rejected').forEach(r=>{ addBad('TDS Rejected', r.id, QM_BAD.tds_rejected); }); // ── CAPA / RCA — QM Primary Oversight ────────────────────────────── issues.filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.type==='ncr').forEach(r=>{ if(r.ca&&(r.ca.status==='Completed'||r.ca.status==='Verified')) addGood('NCR CA Completed ✓',r.id,QM_GOOD.ncr_capa_completed); if(r.pa&&r.pa.status==='Completed') addGood('NCR PA Completed ✓',r.id,QM_GOOD.ncr_pa_completed); }); // ── Concrete Register (QM oversight) & Cube Tests ─────────────────── (typeof concRegRecs!=='undefined'?concRegRecs:[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj).forEach(r=>{ addGood('Concrete Register Reviewed',r.id,QM_GOOD.concreg_reviewed); }); (allSimpleRecs.conccube||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj).forEach(r=>{ if(r.status==='Pass') addGood('Concrete Cube Pass ✓',r.id,QM_GOOD.conccube_pass); if(r.status==='Fail') addBad('Concrete Cube Fail ⚠',r.id,QM_BAD.concreg_cube_fail); }); // ── Safety Obs closed (holistic quality) ──────────────────────────── (allSimpleRecs.safetyobs||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='Fully Complete').forEach(r=>{ addGood('Safety Obs Closed',r.id,QM_GOOD.safetyobs_fc); }); // ── BOQ Spec Library (quality documentation) ───────────────────────── const _qmBoqKeys=Object.keys(typeof boqSpecLib!=='undefined'?boqSpecLib:{}).filter(k=>k.startsWith(proj+'::')); _qmBoqKeys.forEach((_,i)=>{ if(i===0) addGood('BOQ Spec Library Maintained ('+_qmBoqKeys.length+' entries)',proj+'::boq',QM_GOOD.boqspec_entry*_qmBoqKeys.length); }); // Clamp 0–1000 baseScore = Math.max(0, Math.min(1000, Math.round(baseScore))); const totalGood = goodItems.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.pts, 0); const totalBad = badItems.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.pts, 0); const totalDecay = overdueItems.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.decayPts, 0); return { score: baseScore, totalGood, totalBad, totalDecay, goodItems, badItems, overdueItems, goodCount: goodItems.length, badCount: badItems.length, overdueCount: overdueItems.length }; } // ── QM Grade helper ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── function qmGrade(score){ if(score >= 800) return {g:'A+', label:'Excellent', col:'#22c55e'}; if(score >= 650) return {g:'A', label:'Good', col:'#84cc16'}; if(score >= 500) return {g:'B', label:'Satisfactory', col:'#f59e0b'}; if(score >= 350) return {g:'C', label:'Needs Attention',col:'#f97316'}; return {g:'D', label:'Critical', col:'#ef4444'}; } // ── Render QM Scorecard ─────────────────────────────────────────────── function renderDashQMScorecard(){ const el = document.getElementById('dash-qm-scorecard-row'); if(!el) return; const allUsers = getAllUsers(); // Visibility: // - System Administrator: all QMs across all projects // - Quality Manager: own scorecard only // - Others: hidden let qmUsers = allUsers.filter(u=>u.role==='quality_manager'); if(isRole('quality_manager')){ qmUsers = qmUsers.filter(u=>u.id===currentUser.id); } else if(!isRole('super_admin')){ el.innerHTML=''; return; } // Apply dashProj filter if(dashProj!=='ALL'){ qmUsers = qmUsers.filter(u=>!u.assignedProjects||!u.assignedProjects.length||u.assignedProjects.includes(dashProj)); } if(!qmUsers.length){ if(isRole('super_admin')){ el.innerHTML=`
📋 Quality Manager Scorecard
No Quality Managers assigned yet. Add a user with the Quality Manager role in Settings → User Management.
`; } else { el.innerHTML=''; } return; } const cards = qmUsers.map(qm=>{ const qmProjs = (qm.assignedProjects&&qm.assignedProjects.length) ? qm.assignedProjects.filter(p=>projects.includes(p)) : projects; const targetProjs = dashProj==='ALL' ? qmProjs : qmProjs.filter(p=>p===dashProj); return targetProjs.map(proj=>{ const result = calcQMScore(proj, simpleRecs); const grade = qmGrade(result.score); // Dial arc (0–1000 → 0–270°, start at 225°) const dialR=36, dialC=44; const pct = result.score/1000; const arcDeg = pct*270; const arcRad = arcDeg*Math.PI/180; const sA = 225*Math.PI/180; const eA = sA+arcRad; const x1=dialC+dialR*Math.cos(sA), y1=dialC+dialR*Math.sin(sA); const x2=dialC+dialR*Math.cos(eA), y2=dialC+dialR*Math.sin(eA); const largeArc = arcDeg>180?1:0; // Overdue items (click → navigate to record) const ovHtml = result.overdueItems.length ? `
⏰ Overdue — Continuous Decay (−pts/day after 7 days)
`+ result.overdueItems.slice(0,5).map(o=>{ const oc = o.mod==='qms' ? `switchModule('qms');setTimeout(()=>openDetail('${o.id}'),60)` : o.mod==='wir' ? `switchModule('wir');setTimeout(()=>openWIRDetail('${o.id}'),60)` : `switchModule('imir');setTimeout(()=>openIMIRDetail('${o.id}'),60)`; const tc = o.mod==='qms'?'#ef4444':o.mod==='wir'?'#06b6d4':'#8b5cf6'; return `
${esc(o.id)} ${esc(o.type)} ${esc(o.title)} −${Math.abs(o.decayPts)}pts · ${o.days}d overdue
`; }).join('')+ (result.overdueItems.length>5?`
+${result.overdueItems.length-5} more overdue items…
`:'') : ''; // Good / bad grouped summary const goodGroups={}, badGroups={}; result.goodItems.forEach(i=>{goodGroups[i.label]=(goodGroups[i.label]||{n:0,pts:0});goodGroups[i.label].n++;goodGroups[i.label].pts+=i.pts;}); result.badItems.forEach(i=>{badGroups[i.label]=(badGroups[i.label]||{n:0,pts:0});badGroups[i.label].n++;badGroups[i.label].pts+=i.pts;}); const goodRows = Object.entries(goodGroups).map(([lbl,v])=>`
${esc(lbl)}
×${v.n}
+${v.pts}pts
`).join(''); const badRows = Object.entries(badGroups).map(([lbl,v])=>`
${esc(lbl)}
×${v.n}
${v.pts}pts
`).join(''); // Scoring legend (collapsible) const _qgRows=[ ['Good Practice (Quality)', QM_GOOD.goodpractice_quality, true], ['Doc Control (Quality)', QM_GOOD.docctrl_quality, true], ['WIR QM Reviewed (QM action)', QM_GOOD.wir_qm_approved, true], ['WIR Fully Complete (Client)', QM_GOOD.wir_fc, true], ['IMIR Accepted', QM_GOOD.imir_accepted, true], ['IMIR Fully Complete (Client)', QM_GOOD.imir_fc, true], ['Quality/QMS Training Completed', QM_GOOD.training_quality, true], ['Skill Evaluation Conducted', QM_GOOD.skilleval_quality, true], ['Quality Mockup FC (Client)', QM_GOOD.mockup_quality_fc, true], ['NCR Corrective Action Completed ✓', QM_GOOD.ncr_capa_completed, true], ['NCR Preventive Action Completed ✓', QM_GOOD.ncr_pa_completed, true], ['Concrete Register Reviewed', QM_GOOD.concreg_reviewed, true], ['Concrete Cube Pass ✓', QM_GOOD.conccube_pass, true], ['Safety Obs Closed', QM_GOOD.safetyobs_fc, true], ['BOQ Spec Library Maintained', QM_GOOD.boqspec_entry, true], ['TDS Approval FC (Client)', QM_GOOD.tds_fc, true], ['RCA Approved / Completed', QM_GOOD.rca_approved, true], ]; const _qbRows=[ ['NCR Open', QM_BAD.ncr_open, false], ['NCR Overdue >7 days (per day)', QM_BAD.ncr_overdue_per_day, false, '/day'], ['Observation Open', QM_BAD.obs_open, false], ['Obs Overdue >7 days (per day)', QM_BAD.obs_overdue_per_day, false, '/day'], ['WIR Rejected (Client)', QM_BAD.wir_rejected, false], ['WIR Pending >7 days (per day)', QM_BAD.wir_overdue_per_day, false, '/day'], ['IMIR Rejected (Client)', QM_BAD.imir_rejected, false], ['IMIR Pending >7 days (per day)', QM_BAD.imir_overdue_per_day, false, '/day'], ['Quality Mockup Rejected', QM_BAD.mockup_quality_rejected,false], ['TDS Rejected', QM_BAD.tds_rejected, false], ]; const _qlgRow=(k,v,good,sfx)=>`
${k}${good?'+':''}${v}${sfx||''} pts
`; const _qmLegend=`
ℹ️ How Quality Manager Score is Calculated  (click to expand)
✅ Good Activities (+pts)
${_qgRows.map(([k,v])=>_qlgRow(k,v,true)).join('')}
❌ Bad / Overdue (−pts)
${_qbRows.map(([k,v,g,s])=>_qlgRow(k,v,g,s)).join('')}
Base: 500 pts · Range: 0–1000 · Updates live
`; return `
🏗 ${esc(proj)}
${esc(qm.name)}
📋 Quality Manager
${_qmLegend}
${result.score}
/ 1000
${grade.g}
${grade.label}
▲ Good: +${result.totalGood} pts
▼ Issues: ${result.totalBad} pts
${result.totalDecay<0?`
⏰ Decay: ${result.totalDecay} pts
`:''}
${wirs.filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='Fully Complete').length}
WIR CC Closed ✓
${imirs.filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='Fully Complete').length}
IMIR CC Closed ✓
${result.goodCount}
Good Activities
${result.overdueCount}
Overdue Items
${goodRows||badRows?`
Score Breakdown
${goodRows} ${badRows} `:'
No quality activity recorded for this project yet.
'} ${ovHtml}
🔐 WIR / IMIR reach ✓ only after CC final close · WIR: QM review only, CC signs off → Fully Complete · NCR/Obs overdue −pts/day after 7d
`; }).join(''); }).flat(); if(!cards.length){ el.innerHTML=`
📋 Quality Manager Scorecard — Quality Performance Index
No projects assigned to Quality Managers yet.
`; return; } el.innerHTML=`
📋 Quality Manager Scorecard — Quality Performance Index
${cards.join('')}
`; } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // CLIENT / CONSULTANT REPRESENTATIVE SCORECARD ENGINE // // The C/C rep is the owner's eyes on site. Their score reflects: // GOOD : Active inspection (raising NCRs/Obs/SafetyObs), prompt closure // of approvals awaiting them, raising Good Practices, follow-through // BAD : Sitting on approvals (WIR/IMIR/WP/Mockup/TDS awaiting client // but not acted upon), raising issues then abandoning follow-up, // never closing out items they own // // Everything is project-scoped — score reflects work on THEIR project. // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ let CC_GOOD = applyScoreOverrides('cc_good', { // ── Proactive inspection & quality activities ───────────────────── ncr_raised: +5, // Raised an NCR (doing their inspection job) obs_raised: +3, // Raised an Observation safetyobs_raised: +3, // Raised a Safety Observation goodpractice_raised: +10, // Raised a Good Practice (positive recognition) // ── Approvals closed on time (within 5 working days of readiness) ── wir_fc_ontime: +15, // Closed WIR within 5 days of QM review / submission imir_fc_ontime: +15, // Closed IMIR within 5 days of QM Accepted workpermit_fc_ontime: +12, // Closed Work Permit within 5 days of Safety Approved mockup_quality_fc_ontime: +12, // Closed Quality Mockup within 5 days mockup_safety_fc_ontime: +12, // Closed Safety Mockup within 5 days tds_fc_ontime: +10, // Closed TDS within 5 days rfi_answered_ontime: +12, // Answered RFI within 7 days of being raised rfi_closed: +10, // RFI fully closed (resolved) rfi_answered_late: +5, // Answered RFI but took > 7 days // ── Follow-through: NCR/Obs they raised are now closed ──────────── ncr_closed_by_cc: +3, // NCR raised by C/C and now Fully Complete obs_closed_by_cc: +2, // Obs raised by C/C and now Fully Complete }); let CC_BAD = applyScoreOverrides('cc_bad', { // ── Approvals sitting idle — awaiting client action ──────────────── wir_awaiting_per_day: -3, // WIR submitted/reviewed but client hasn't acted (per day after 5d) imir_awaiting_per_day: -3, // IMIR QM-Accepted but client hasn't acted workpermit_awaiting_per_day: -2, // Work Permit Safety-Approved but client hasn't closed mockup_quality_awaiting_per_day: -2, // Quality Mockup awaiting client closure mockup_safety_awaiting_per_day: -2, // Safety Mockup awaiting client closure tds_awaiting_per_day: -2, // TDS awaiting client closure // ── RFI not answered — Planner raised, CC must respond ───────────── rfi_unanswered_per_day: -3, // RFI open > 7 days without CC answer (per day) // ── NCR/Obs raised but abandoned — no follow-up after 14 days ───── ncr_abandoned_per_day: -2, // NCR they raised still Open after 7d (per day) obs_abandoned_per_day: -1, // Obs they raised still Open after 7d safetyobs_abandoned_per_day: -2, // SafetyObs still Open after 7d }); // ── Calculate CC Score for a specific user on a specific project ────── function calcCCScore(proj, ccUser, allSimpleRecs) { const nowMs = Date.now(); const dayMs = 86400000; const CLIENT_SLA = 5; // days: client expected to act within 5 days of readiness const FOLLOW_SLA = 7; // days: after raising NCR/Obs, follow-up expected within 7d let baseScore = 500; const goodItems = []; const badItems = []; const overdueItems = []; function daysSince(dateStr){ if(!dateStr) return 0; return Math.max(0, Math.floor((nowMs - new Date(dateStr).getTime()) / dayMs)); } // Days from a specific ISO timestamp (actionLog entry) function daysSinceISO(iso){ if(!iso) return 0; return Math.max(0, Math.floor((nowMs - new Date(iso).getTime()) / dayMs)); } function addGood(label, id, pts){ baseScore += pts; goodItems.push({label, id, pts}); } function addBad(label, id, pts){ baseScore += pts; badItems.push({label, id, pts}); } function addDecay(id, title, type, days, decayPts, mod){ baseScore += decayPts; overdueItems.push({id, title, type, days, overdueDays:Math.max(0,days-CLIENT_SLA), decayPts, mod}); } const ccName = ccUser.name; const ccId = ccUser.id; // Helper: was this record raised/submitted by the CC user? function raisedByCC(rec){ return rec.submittedBy===ccId || rec.submittedBy===ccName || rec.by===ccName || rec.by===ccId || (rec.actionLog||[]).some(a=> (a.by===ccName||a.by===ccId) && a.type==='issue'); } // Helper: was the record closed/approved by the CC user? function closedByCC(rec){ return (rec.actionLog||[]).some(a=> (a.by===ccName||a.by===ccId) && (a.type==='close'||a.type==='approve')); } // Helper: when did a record reach a given status? function whenStatusReached(rec, status){ const entry = (rec.actionLog||[]).find(a=>a.ns===status||a.newStatus===status); return entry ? entry.at : null; } // Helper: days a record has been waiting in a "ready for client" status function daysAwaitingClient(rec, readyStatuses){ if(!readyStatuses.includes(rec.status)) return 0; // Find most recent transition into any ready status const entries = (rec.actionLog||[]).filter(a=>readyStatuses.includes(a.ns||a.newStatus||'')); if(entries.length){ const latest = entries[entries.length-1]; return daysSinceISO(latest.at); } // Fallback: use record date return daysSince(rec.date); } // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // ── GOOD: Proactive inspection activities raised by this CC user // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // 1. NCRs raised by this CC user const projIssues = issues.filter(r=>r.project===proj); projIssues.filter(r=>r.type==='ncr'&&raisedByCC(r)).forEach(r=>{ addGood('NCR Raised (Inspection)', r.id, CC_GOOD.ncr_raised); // Bonus: they also followed through and it got closed if(['Fully Complete','Closed'].includes(r.status)){ addGood('NCR Fully Closed ✓', r.id, CC_GOOD.ncr_closed_by_cc); } }); // 2. Observations raised by this CC user projIssues.filter(r=>r.type!=='ncr'&&raisedByCC(r)).forEach(r=>{ addGood('Observation Raised', r.id, CC_GOOD.obs_raised); if(['Fully Complete','Closed'].includes(r.status)){ addGood('Observation Closed ✓', r.id, CC_GOOD.obs_closed_by_cc); } }); // 3. Safety Observations raised by this CC user (allSimpleRecs.safetyobs||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&raisedByCC(r)).forEach(r=>{ addGood('Safety Obs Raised', r.id, CC_GOOD.safetyobs_raised); }); // 4. Good Practices raised by this CC user (allSimpleRecs.goodpractice||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&raisedByCC(r)).forEach(r=>{ addGood('Good Practice Raised ✓', r.id, CC_GOOD.goodpractice_raised); }); // 5. WIR Fully Complete (client acted) — reward if closed on time wirs.filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='Fully Complete'&&closedByCC(r)).forEach(r=>{ addGood('WIR Approved & Closed ✓', r.id, CC_GOOD.wir_fc_ontime); }); // 6. IMIR Fully Complete imirs.filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='Fully Complete'&&closedByCC(r)).forEach(r=>{ addGood('IMIR Approved & Closed ✓', r.id, CC_GOOD.imir_fc_ontime); }); // 7. Work Permit Fully Complete (allSimpleRecs.workpermit||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='Fully Complete'&&closedByCC(r)).forEach(r=>{ addGood('Work Permit Closed ✓', r.id, CC_GOOD.workpermit_fc_ontime); }); // 8. Quality Mockup Fully Complete (allSimpleRecs.mockup_quality||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='Fully Complete'&&closedByCC(r)).forEach(r=>{ addGood('Quality Mockup Closed ✓', r.id, CC_GOOD.mockup_quality_fc_ontime); }); // 9. Safety Mockup Fully Complete (allSimpleRecs.mockup_safety||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='Fully Complete'&&closedByCC(r)).forEach(r=>{ addGood('Safety Mockup Closed ✓', r.id, CC_GOOD.mockup_safety_fc_ontime); }); // 10. TDS Fully Complete (allSimpleRecs.tds||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='Fully Complete'&&closedByCC(r)).forEach(r=>{ addGood('TDS Approved & Closed ✓', r.id, CC_GOOD.tds_fc_ontime); }); // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // ── BAD: Approvals sitting idle — awaiting client closure // Counted for ALL records on the project (client is accountable // for the project, not just records they personally created) // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // 11. WIR waiting for client action after QM review wirs.filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.status==='Reviewed by Quality Manager'||r.status==='QM Approved')).forEach(r=>{ const d = daysAwaitingClient(r, ['Reviewed by Quality Manager','QM Approved']); if(d > CLIENT_SLA){ const extra = d - CLIENT_SLA; const decay = CC_BAD.wir_awaiting_per_day * extra; addDecay(r.id, r.activity||r.id, 'WIR', d, decay, 'wir'); } }); // 12. IMIR waiting in 'QM Accepted' → client hasn't closed imirs.filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.status==='QM Accepted'||r.status==='Accepted')).forEach(r=>{ const d = daysAwaitingClient(r, ['QM Accepted','Accepted']); if(d > CLIENT_SLA){ const extra = d - CLIENT_SLA; addDecay(r.id, r.material||r.id, 'IMIR', d, CC_BAD.imir_awaiting_per_day * extra, 'imir'); } }); // 13. Work Permit waiting in 'Safety Approved' → client hasn't closed (allSimpleRecs.workpermit||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='Safety Approved').forEach(r=>{ const d = daysAwaitingClient(r, ['Safety Approved']); if(d > CLIENT_SLA){ const extra = d - CLIENT_SLA; addDecay(r.id, r.title||r.id, 'Work Permit', d, CC_BAD.workpermit_awaiting_per_day * extra, 'workpermit'); } }); // 14. Quality Mockup waiting 'QM Approved' → client hasn't closed (allSimpleRecs.mockup_quality||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='QM Approved').forEach(r=>{ const d = daysAwaitingClient(r, ['QM Approved']); if(d > CLIENT_SLA){ const extra = d - CLIENT_SLA; addDecay(r.id, r.title||r.id, 'Quality Mockup', d, CC_BAD.mockup_quality_awaiting_per_day * extra, 'mockup_quality'); } }); // 15. Safety Mockup waiting 'Safety Approved' → client hasn't closed (allSimpleRecs.mockup_safety||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='Safety Approved').forEach(r=>{ const d = daysAwaitingClient(r, ['Safety Approved']); if(d > CLIENT_SLA){ const extra = d - CLIENT_SLA; addDecay(r.id, r.title||r.id, 'Safety Mockup', d, CC_BAD.mockup_safety_awaiting_per_day * extra, 'mockup_safety'); } }); // 16. TDS waiting 'QM Approved' → client hasn't closed (allSimpleRecs.tds||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='QM Approved').forEach(r=>{ const d = daysAwaitingClient(r, ['QM Approved']); if(d > CLIENT_SLA){ const extra = d - CLIENT_SLA; addDecay(r.id, r.title||r.id, 'TDS', d, CC_BAD.tds_awaiting_per_day * extra, 'tds'); } }); // 17. NCR/Obs abandoned — raised (by anyone) but still open after 14d // C/C is accountable for follow-up on all project NCRs projIssues.filter(r=>['Open','In Progress'].includes(r.status)).forEach(r=>{ const d = daysSince(r.date); if(d > FOLLOW_SLA){ const extra = d - FOLLOW_SLA; const isNCR = r.type==='ncr'; const decay = (isNCR ? CC_BAD.ncr_abandoned_per_day : CC_BAD.obs_abandoned_per_day) * extra; addDecay(r.id, r.title||r.id, isNCR?'NCR':'Obs', d, decay, 'qms'); } }); // 18. Safety Obs abandoned — still open after 14d (allSimpleRecs.safetyobs||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&['Pending','Safety Approved'].includes(r.status)).forEach(r=>{ const d = daysSince(r.date); if(d > FOLLOW_SLA){ const extra = d - FOLLOW_SLA; addDecay(r.id, r.title||r.id, 'Safety Obs', d, CC_BAD.safetyobs_abandoned_per_day * extra, 'safetyobs'); } }); // Clamp 0–1000 baseScore = Math.max(0, Math.min(1000, Math.round(baseScore))); const totalGood = goodItems.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.pts, 0); const totalBad = badItems.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.pts, 0); const totalDecay = overdueItems.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.decayPts, 0); // Pending approvals summary (what client is currently sitting on) const pendingWIR = wirs.filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.status==='Submitted'||r.status==='Reviewed by Quality Manager'||r.status==='QM Approved')).length; const pendingIMIR = imirs.filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.status==='QM Accepted'||r.status==='Accepted')).length; const pendingWP = (allSimpleRecs.workpermit||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='Safety Approved').length; const pendingMkpQ = (allSimpleRecs.mockup_quality||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='QM Approved').length; const pendingMkpS = (allSimpleRecs.mockup_safety||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='Safety Approved').length; const pendingTDS = (allSimpleRecs.tds||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='QM Approved').length; const totalPending = pendingWIR+pendingIMIR+pendingWP+pendingMkpQ+pendingMkpS+pendingTDS; const openNCRObs = projIssues.filter(r=>['Open','In Progress'].includes(r.status)).length; // ── RFI: Client/Consultant is responsible for answering & closing ── const RFI_SLA = 7; // CC expected to answer RFI within 7 days of raising (allSimpleRecs.rfi||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj).forEach(r=>{ const d = daysSince(r.date); if(r.status==='CC Answered'){ if(d<=RFI_SLA) addGood('RFI Answered On Time ✓',r.id,CC_GOOD.rfi_answered_ontime); else addGood('RFI Answered (Late)',r.id,CC_GOOD.rfi_answered_late); } else if(r.status==='Closed'){ addGood('RFI Closed (Resolved)',r.id,CC_GOOD.rfi_closed); if(d<=RFI_SLA) addGood('RFI Answered & Closed On Time',r.id,CC_GOOD.rfi_answered_ontime); } else if(r.status==='Open'||r.status==='On Hold'){ if(d>RFI_SLA){ const extra=d-RFI_SLA; addBad('RFI Unanswered >7d',r.id,CC_BAD.rfi_unanswered_per_day*extra); addDecay(r.id,r.title||r.id,'RFI',d,CC_BAD.rfi_unanswered_per_day*extra,'rfi'); } } }); const openRFI=(allSimpleRecs.rfi||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.status==='Open'||r.status==='On Hold')).length; return { score: baseScore, totalGood, totalBad, totalDecay, goodItems, badItems, overdueItems, goodCount: goodItems.length, badCount: badItems.length, overdueCount: overdueItems.length, // Accountability KPIs pendingWIR, pendingIMIR, pendingWP, pendingMkpQ, pendingMkpS, pendingTDS, totalPending, openNCRObs, openRFI }; } // ── CC Grade helper ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── function ccGrade(score){ if(score >= 800) return {g:'A+', label:'Excellent', col:'#22c55e'}; if(score >= 650) return {g:'A', label:'Good', col:'#84cc16'}; if(score >= 500) return {g:'B', label:'Satisfactory', col:'#f59e0b'}; if(score >= 350) return {g:'C', label:'Needs Attention',col:'#f97316'}; return {g:'D', label:'Not Accountable', col:'#ef4444'}; } // ── Render CC Scorecard ─────────────────────────────────────────────── function renderDashCCScorecard(){ const el = document.getElementById('dash-cc-scorecard-row'); if(!el) return; const allUsers = getAllUsers(); // Visibility: // - System Administrator: all CC reps across all projects // - Project Manager / QM / SM: CC reps on their project // - Client/Consultant: own scorecard only // - Others: hidden let ccUsers = allUsers.filter(u=>['client_representative','consultant_representative'].includes(u.role)); if(isRole('client_representative','consultant_representative')){ ccUsers = ccUsers.filter(u=>u.id===currentUser.id); } else if(isRole('project_manager','quality_manager','safety_manager')){ const myP = currentUser.assignedProjects&¤tUser.assignedProjects.length ? currentUser.assignedProjects : projects; ccUsers = ccUsers.filter(u=>!u.assignedProjects||!u.assignedProjects.length||u.assignedProjects.some(p=>myP.includes(p))); } else if(!isRole('super_admin')){ el.innerHTML=''; return; } if(dashProj!=='ALL'){ ccUsers = ccUsers.filter(u=>!u.assignedProjects||!u.assignedProjects.length||u.assignedProjects.includes(dashProj)); } if(!ccUsers.length){ if(isRole('super_admin','project_manager','quality_manager','safety_manager')){ el.innerHTML=`
🏛️ Client & Consultant Scorecards
No Client/Consultant Representatives assigned yet. Add a user with the Client/Consultant role in Settings → User Management.
`; } else { el.innerHTML=''; } return; } const cards = ccUsers.map(cc=>{ const ccProjs = (cc.assignedProjects&&cc.assignedProjects.length) ? cc.assignedProjects.filter(p=>projects.includes(p)) : projects; const targetProjs = dashProj==='ALL' ? ccProjs : ccProjs.filter(p=>p===dashProj); return targetProjs.map(proj=>{ const result = calcCCScore(proj, cc, simpleRecs); const grade = ccGrade(result.score); // Dial const dialR=36, dialC=44; const pct = result.score/1000; const arcDeg = pct*270, arcRad=arcDeg*Math.PI/180; const sA=225*Math.PI/180, eA=sA+arcRad; const x1=dialC+dialR*Math.cos(sA), y1=dialC+dialR*Math.sin(sA); const x2=dialC+dialR*Math.cos(eA), y2=dialC+dialR*Math.sin(eA); const largeArc=arcDeg>180?1:0; // Pending approvals responsibility panel const pendRows = [ ['RFI awaiting your answer', result.openRFI||0, '#ef4444','rfi'], ['WIR awaiting your approval', result.pendingWIR, '#06b6d4','wir'], ['IMIR awaiting your sign-off', result.pendingIMIR, '#8b5cf6','imir'], ['Work Permit awaiting your close', result.pendingWP, '#a78bfa','workpermit'], ['Quality Mockup awaiting your approve',result.pendingMkpQ, '#f97316','mockup_quality'], ['Safety Mockup awaiting your approve', result.pendingMkpS, '#be123c','mockup_safety'], ['TDS awaiting your approval', result.pendingTDS, '#3b82f6','tds'], ['NCR/Obs open on project', result.openNCRObs, '#ef4444','qms'], ].filter(([,v])=>v>0); const respHtml = pendRows.length ? `
⏳ Awaiting Your Action
${pendRows.map(([label,val,col,mod])=>{ const nav=`switchModule('${mod}')`; return `
${label} ${val} pending
`; }).join('')}
` : `
✅ No Pending Approvals
All items actioned — excellent responsiveness!
`; // Overdue items const ovHtml = result.overdueItems.length ? `
⏰ Overdue — Points Decaying (−pts/day)
`+ result.overdueItems.slice(0,6).map(o=>{ const oc = o.mod==='qms' ? `switchModule('qms');setTimeout(()=>openDetail('${o.id}'),60)` : o.mod==='wir' ? `switchModule('wir');setTimeout(()=>openWIRDetail('${o.id}'),60)` : o.mod==='imir' ? `switchModule('imir');setTimeout(()=>openIMIRDetail('${o.id}'),60)` : `switchModule('${o.mod}');setTimeout(()=>openSimpleDetail('${o.mod}','${o.id}'),60)`; const tc={'qms':'#ef4444','wir':'#06b6d4','imir':'#8b5cf6','workpermit':'#a78bfa','mockup_quality':'#f97316','mockup_safety':'#be123c','tds':'#3b82f6','safetyobs':'#f97316'}[o.mod]||'#94a3b8'; return `
${esc(o.id)} ${esc(o.type)} ${esc(o.title)} −${Math.abs(o.decayPts)}pts · ${o.days}d
`; }).join('')+ (result.overdueItems.length>6?`
+${result.overdueItems.length-6} more items…
`:'') : ''; // Breakdown const goodGroups={}, badGroups={}; result.goodItems.forEach(i=>{goodGroups[i.label]=(goodGroups[i.label]||{n:0,pts:0});goodGroups[i.label].n++;goodGroups[i.label].pts+=i.pts;}); result.badItems.forEach(i=>{badGroups[i.label]=(badGroups[i.label]||{n:0,pts:0});badGroups[i.label].n++;badGroups[i.label].pts+=i.pts;}); const goodRows=Object.entries(goodGroups).map(([lbl,v])=>`
${esc(lbl)}
×${v.n}
+${v.pts}pts
`).join(''); const badRows=Object.entries(badGroups).map(([lbl,v])=>`
${esc(lbl)}
×${v.n}
${v.pts}pts
`).join(''); // Scoring legend const _cgRows=[ ['NCR Raised (active inspection)', CC_GOOD.ncr_raised, true], ['NCR Raised & Fully Closed', CC_GOOD.ncr_closed_by_cc, true], ['Observation Raised', CC_GOOD.obs_raised, true], ['Observation Raised & Closed', CC_GOOD.obs_closed_by_cc, true], ['Safety Obs Raised', CC_GOOD.safetyobs_raised, true], ['Good Practice Raised', CC_GOOD.goodpractice_raised, true], ['WIR Approved & Closed', CC_GOOD.wir_fc_ontime, true], ['IMIR Approved & Closed', CC_GOOD.imir_fc_ontime, true], ['Work Permit Closed', CC_GOOD.workpermit_fc_ontime, true], ['Quality Mockup Closed', CC_GOOD.mockup_quality_fc_ontime, true], ['Safety Mockup Closed', CC_GOOD.mockup_safety_fc_ontime, true], ['TDS Approved & Closed', CC_GOOD.tds_fc_ontime, true], ['RFI Answered On Time (≤7 days)', CC_GOOD.rfi_answered_ontime, true], ['RFI Answered Late (>7 days)', CC_GOOD.rfi_answered_late, true], ['RFI Fully Closed', CC_GOOD.rfi_closed, true], ]; const _cbRows=[ ['RFI unanswered >7 days (per day)', CC_BAD.rfi_unanswered_per_day, false,'/day'], ['WIR awaiting client >5d (per day)', CC_BAD.wir_awaiting_per_day, false,'/day'], ['IMIR awaiting client >5d (per day)', CC_BAD.imir_awaiting_per_day, false,'/day'], ['Work Permit awaiting >5d (per day)', CC_BAD.workpermit_awaiting_per_day, false,'/day'], ['Quality Mockup awaiting >5d (per day)', CC_BAD.mockup_quality_awaiting_per_day,false,'/day'], ['Safety Mockup awaiting >5d (per day)', CC_BAD.mockup_safety_awaiting_per_day, false,'/day'], ['TDS awaiting >5d (per day)', CC_BAD.tds_awaiting_per_day, false,'/day'], ['NCR open >7d — no follow-up (per day)',CC_BAD.ncr_abandoned_per_day, false,'/day'], ['Obs open >7d — no follow-up (per day)',CC_BAD.obs_abandoned_per_day, false,'/day'], ['SafetyObs open >7d (per day)', CC_BAD.safetyobs_abandoned_per_day, false,'/day'], ]; const _clgRow=(k,v,good,sfx)=>`
${k}${good?'+':''}${v}${sfx||''} pts
`; const _ccLegend=`
ℹ️ How Client/Consultant Score is Calculated  (click to expand)
✅ Good Activities (+pts)
${_cgRows.map(([k,v])=>_clgRow(k,v,true)).join('')}
❌ Delays / Abandoned (−pts)
${_cbRows.map(([k,v,g,s])=>_clgRow(k,v,g,s)).join('')}
Base: 500 · SLA: 5d (approvals) · 14d (follow-up) · Range 0–1000
`; return `
🏗 ${esc(proj)}
${esc(cc.name)}
🏛️ Client / Consultant Representative
${_ccLegend}
${result.score}
/ 1000
${grade.g}
${grade.label}
▲ Good: +${result.totalGood} pts
▼ Delays: ${result.totalBad||0} pts
${result.totalDecay<0?`
⏰ Decay: ${result.totalDecay} pts
`:''}
${result.goodCount}
Good Activities
${result.totalPending}
Pending Approvals
${result.openNCRObs}
Open NCR/Obs
${result.overdueCount}
Overdue Items
${respHtml} ${goodRows||badRows?`
Activity Breakdown
${goodRows} ${badRows}`:'
No client activity recorded for this project yet.
'} ${ovHtml}
C/C accountability: Raising NCR/Obs/SafetyObs +pts · Closing WIR/IMIR/WP/Mockup/TDS on time +pts · Idle approvals −pts/day after 5d · Open NCR/Obs after 7d −pts/day
`; }).join(''); }).flat(); if(!cards.length){ el.innerHTML=`
🏛️ Client & Consultant Scorecards — Accountability Index
No Client/Consultant Representatives assigned to any projects yet.
`; return; } el.innerHTML=`
🏛️ Client / Consultant Representative Scorecard — Separate Accountability Index
${cards.join('')}
`; } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // SHARED SCORECARD UTILITIES // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // Build a standard dial SVG (270° sweep) function buildDialSVG(score, color, size=88){ const r=36, cx=44, cy=44; const pct=score/1000; const arcDeg=pct*270; const arcRad=arcDeg*Math.PI/180; const startA=225*Math.PI/180; const endA=startA+arcRad; const x1=cx+r*Math.cos(startA), y1=cy+r*Math.sin(startA); const x2=cx+r*Math.cos(endA), y2=cy+r*Math.sin(endA); const large=arcDeg>180?1:0; const tx1=cx+r*Math.cos(startA), ty1=cy+r*Math.sin(startA); const tx2=cx+r*Math.cos((225+270)*Math.PI/180), ty2=cy+r*Math.sin((225+270)*Math.PI/180); return ``; } // Build a standard role scorecard card (shared template across all new scorecards) function buildRoleCard(opts){ // opts: {name, role, roleLabel, roleColor, accentColor, score, grade, // goodItems, badItems, overdueItems, kpis:[{val,lbl,col}], navClick} const {name,role,roleLabel,roleColor,accentColor,score,grade,goodItems,badItems,overdueItems,kpis,projectName} = opts; const goodGroups={}, badGroups={}; goodItems.forEach(i=>{ goodGroups[i.label]=(goodGroups[i.label]||{n:0,pts:0}); goodGroups[i.label].n++; goodGroups[i.label].pts+=i.pts; }); badItems.forEach(i=>{ badGroups[i.label]=(badGroups[i.label]||{n:0,pts:0}); badGroups[i.label].n++; badGroups[i.label].pts+=i.pts; }); const goodRows=Object.entries(goodGroups).map(([lbl,v])=> `
${esc(lbl)}
×${v.n}
+${v.pts}pts
`).join(''); const badRows=Object.entries(badGroups).map(([lbl,v])=> `
${esc(lbl)}
×${v.n}
${v.pts}pts
`).join(''); const ovHtml=overdueItems.length ? `
⏰ Overdue — Continuous Decay
`+ overdueItems.slice(0,4).map(o=>{ const oc=o.mod==='qms'?`switchModule('qms');setTimeout(()=>openDetail('${o.id}'),60)`: o.mod==='wir'?`switchModule('wir');setTimeout(()=>openWIRDetail('${o.id}'),60)`: o.mod==='imir'?`switchModule('imir');setTimeout(()=>openIMIRDetail('${o.id}'),60)`: `switchModule('${o.mod}');setTimeout(()=>openSimpleDetail('${o.mod}','${o.id}'),60)`; const tc=o.mod==='qms'?'#ef4444':o.mod==='wir'?'#06b6d4':o.mod==='imir'?'#8b5cf6':'#f97316'; return `
${esc(o.id)} ${esc(o.type)} ${esc(o.title)} −${Math.abs(o.decayPts)}pts·${o.days}d
`; }).join('')+ (overdueItems.length>4?`
+${overdueItems.length-4} more…
`:'') : ''; const kpiHtml=kpis.map(k=> `
${k.val}
${k.lbl}
`).join(''); return `
📁 ${esc(projectName)}
${esc(name)}
${esc(roleLabel)}
${buildDialSVG(score,grade.col)}
${score}
/ 1000
${grade.g}
${grade.label}
▲ Good: +${goodItems.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.pts,0)} pts
▼ Issues: ${badItems.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.pts,0)} pts
${kpiHtml}
${goodRows||badRows?`
Score Breakdown
${goodRows}${badRows}` :'
No activity recorded yet.
'} ${ovHtml}
`; } // Generic grade function (same thresholds for all roles) function roleGrade(score){ if(score>=800) return {g:'A+',label:'Outstanding', col:'#22c55e'}; if(score>=650) return {g:'A', label:'Excellent', col:'#84cc16'}; if(score>=500) return {g:'B', label:'Good', col:'#f59e0b'}; if(score>=350) return {g:'C', label:'Satisfactory', col:'#f97316'}; return {g:'D', label:'Needs Review', col:'#ef4444'}; } // Generic legend builder function buildLegendSection(headingText, accentColor, goodRows, badRows, baseNote){ const _lgRow=(k,v,good,sfx)=>`
${k}${good?'+':''}${v}${sfx||''} pts
`; return `
ℹ️ How ${headingText} Score is Calculated  (click to expand)
✅ Good Activities (+pts)
${goodRows.map(([k,v])=>_lgRow(k,v,true)).join('')}
❌ Bad / Overdue (−pts)
${badRows.map(([k,v,g,s])=>_lgRow(k,v,false,s)).join('')}
${baseNote}
`; } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // QA INSPECTOR / QA/QC ENGINEER SCORECARD // Responsibility: Raise NCR/OBS, Submit & Review WIR/IMIR, // Raise Safety Obs, Internal approval chain participation // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ let QA_GOOD = applyScoreOverrides('qa_good', { ncr_raised: +8, // NCR raised (active inspection) ncr_closed: +5, // NCR fully closed (Fully Complete) obs_raised: +4, // Observation raised obs_closed: +3, // Observation closed (Fully Complete) wir_qm_approved: +10, // WIR QA/QM Approved — QA internal step wir_fc: +15, // WIR Fully Complete — CC signed off ✓ (QA approval enabled this) imir_accepted: +10, // IMIR QA/QM Accepted — QA internal step imir_fc: +15, // IMIR Fully Complete — CC signed off ✓ (QA acceptance enabled this) safetyobs_raised: +4, // Safety Obs raised safetyobs_fc: +5, // Safety Obs fully closed goodpractice_raised: +6, // Good Practice raised spec_qa_reviewed: +8, // Spec module (weld/excav etc.) QA Reviewed (key QA action) spec_approved: +10, // Spec module QM Approved // ── NEW: Concrete Register ────────────────────────────────────────── concreg_reviewed: +6, // Concrete Register reviewed/approved by QA conccube_pass: +5, // Concrete cube test result — Pass (QA validates) // ── CAPA Facilitation & RCA Review ─────────────────────────────────── ncr_capa_facilitated: +5, // NCR CAPA completed (QA facilitates CA/PA process) rca_reviewed: +4, // RCA reviewed/approved by QA (root cause analysis) // ── Training Conducted by QA ───────────────────────────────────────── training_conducted: +5, // Training session conducted by QA Inspector/Engineer }); let QA_BAD = applyScoreOverrides('qa_bad', { ncr_open_long: -5, // NCR open > 7 days (flat) ncr_overdue_per_day: -2, // per day after 7d obs_open_long: -3, // Obs open > 7 days wir_rejected: -8, // WIR rejected (reflects on QA work quality) imir_rejected: -8, // IMIR rejected spec_rejected: -5, // Spec rejected // ── NEW: Concrete Register ────────────────────────────────────────── conccube_fail: -10, // Concrete cube test failure (quality failure) }); function calcQAScore(proj, user, allSimpleRecs){ const nowMs=Date.now(), dayMs=86400000; let score=500; const goodItems=[], badItems=[], overdueItems=[]; function dSince(d){ return d?Math.max(0,Math.floor((nowMs-new Date(d).getTime())/dayMs)):0; } function addG(l,id,pts){ score+=pts; goodItems.push({label:l,id,pts}); } function addB(l,id,pts){ score+=pts; badItems.push({label:l,id,pts}); } function addD(id,title,type,d,pts,mod){ score+=pts; overdueItems.push({id,title,type,days:d,decayPts:pts,mod}); } const myName = user.name; // NCR / OBS raised by this QA user issues.filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.assignee===myName||r.raisedBy===myName||r.createdBy===myName)).forEach(r=>{ if(r.type==='ncr'){ addG('NCR Raised',r.id,QA_GOOD.ncr_raised); if(r.status==='Fully Complete') addG('NCR Fully Closed',r.id,QA_GOOD.ncr_closed); if(['Open','In Progress','QM Approved'].includes(r.status)){ const d=dSince(r.date); if(d>7){ addB('NCR Open >7d',r.id,QA_BAD.ncr_open_long); addD(r.id,r.title||r.id,'NCR',d,QA_BAD.ncr_overdue_per_day*(d-7),'qms'); } } } else { addG('Observation Raised',r.id,QA_GOOD.obs_raised); if(r.status==='Fully Complete') addG('Obs Fully Closed',r.id,QA_GOOD.obs_closed); if(['Open','In Progress'].includes(r.status)){ const d=dSince(r.date); if(d>7) addB('Obs Open >7d',r.id,QA_BAD.obs_open_long); } } }); // WIRs — Quality Manager reviews; Client/Consultant approves. // QA team is not counted as WIR approver in this workflow. wirs.filter(r=>r.project===proj).forEach(r=>{ if(r.status==='Reviewed by Quality Manager'||r.status==='QM Approved'||r.status==='Fully Complete') addG('WIR QM Reviewed / Client Closed',r.id,QA_GOOD.wir_qm_approved); if(r.status==='Fully Complete') addG('WIR CC Closed ✓',r.id,QA_GOOD.wir_fc); if(r.status==='Rejected') addB('WIR Rejected',r.id,QA_BAD.wir_rejected); }); // IMIRs — QA is the APPROVER. Scores on accepted/FC records on their project. imirs.filter(r=>r.project===proj).forEach(r=>{ if(r.status==='QM Accepted'||r.status==='Fully Complete') addG('IMIR QA/QM Accepted',r.id,QA_GOOD.imir_accepted); if(r.status==='Fully Complete') addG('IMIR CC Closed ✓',r.id,QA_GOOD.imir_fc); if(r.status==='Rejected') addB('IMIR Rejected',r.id,QA_BAD.imir_rejected); }); // Safety Obs (allSimpleRecs.safetyobs||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.inspector===myName||(r.inspector||'').includes(myName)||r.by===myName)).forEach(r=>{ addG('Safety Obs Raised',r.id,QA_GOOD.safetyobs_raised); if(r.status==='Fully Complete') addG('Safety Obs Closed',r.id,QA_GOOD.safetyobs_fc); }); // Good Practice (allSimpleRecs.goodpractice||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.by===myName||r.raisedBy===myName)).forEach(r=>{ addG('Good Practice Raised',r.id,QA_GOOD.goodpractice_raised); }); // Spec modules (weld/excav/masonry etc.) — inspector or created by specRecs.filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.inspector===myName||(r.inspector||'').includes(myName))).forEach(r=>{ if(r.status==='QA Reviewed'||r.status==='Approved') addG('Spec QA Reviewed',r.id,QA_GOOD.spec_qa_reviewed); if(r.status==='Approved') addG('Spec Approved',r.id,QA_GOOD.spec_approved); if(r.status==='Rejected') addB('Spec Rejected',r.id,QA_BAD.spec_rejected); }); // Concrete Register — QA reviews and approves concrete pour records (typeof concRegRecs!=='undefined'?concRegRecs:[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj).forEach(r=>{ addG('Concrete Register Reviewed',r.id,QA_GOOD.concreg_reviewed); }); // Concrete Cube — QA validates test results (allSimpleRecs.conccube||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj).forEach(r=>{ if(r.status==='Pass') addG('Concrete Cube Pass ✓',r.id,QA_GOOD.conccube_pass); if(r.status==='Fail') addB('Concrete Cube Fail ⚠',r.id,QA_BAD.conccube_fail); }); // CAPA — QA facilitates corrective/preventive action on NCRs raised by QA issues.filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.type==='ncr'&&(r.assignee===myName||(r.assignee||'').includes(myName)||r.raisedBy===myName)).forEach(r=>{ if(r.ca&&(r.ca.status==='Completed'||r.ca.status==='Verified')) addG('NCR CAPA Facilitated ✓',r.id,QA_GOOD.ncr_capa_facilitated); }); // RCA reviewed/approved by QA rcaRecs.filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.submittedBy===myName||r.raisedBy===myName||r.by===myName)).forEach(r=>{ if(r.status==='Completed'||r.status==='Approved') addG('RCA Reviewed/Approved ✓',r.id,QA_GOOD.rca_reviewed); }); // Training conducted by QA Inspector/Engineer (allSimpleRecs.training||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.by===myName||r.trainer===myName||(r.trainer||'').includes(myName))).forEach(r=>{ if(r.status==='Completed') addG('Training Conducted ✓',r.id,QA_GOOD.training_conducted); }); score=Math.max(0,Math.min(1000,Math.round(score))); return {score,goodItems,badItems,overdueItems, totalGood:goodItems.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.pts,0), totalBad:badItems.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.pts,0)}; } function renderDashQAScorecard(){ const el=document.getElementById('dash-qa-scorecard-row'); if(!el) return; const allUsers=getAllUsers(); // Visibility: SA sees all, QM sees QA on their projects, QA sees own card let qaUsers=allUsers.filter(u=>u.role==='qa_inspector'||u.role==='qa_qc_engineer'); if(isRole('qa_inspector','qa_qc_engineer')){ qaUsers=qaUsers.filter(u=>u.id===currentUser.id); } else if(isRole('quality_manager')){ const myP=currentUser.assignedProjects&¤tUser.assignedProjects.length?currentUser.assignedProjects:projects; qaUsers=qaUsers.filter(u=>!u.assignedProjects||!u.assignedProjects.length||u.assignedProjects.some(p=>myP.includes(p))); } else if(isRole('project_manager')){ const myP=currentUser.assignedProjects&¤tUser.assignedProjects.length?currentUser.assignedProjects:projects; qaUsers=qaUsers.filter(u=>!u.assignedProjects||!u.assignedProjects.length||u.assignedProjects.some(p=>myP.includes(p))); } else if(!isRole('super_admin')){ el.innerHTML=''; return; } if(dashProj!=='ALL') qaUsers=qaUsers.filter(u=>!u.assignedProjects||!u.assignedProjects.length||u.assignedProjects.includes(dashProj)); if(!qaUsers.length){ el.innerHTML=''; return; } const AC='#7c3aed'; const cards=qaUsers.map(user=>{ const userProjs=(user.assignedProjects&&user.assignedProjects.length)?user.assignedProjects.filter(p=>projects.includes(p)):projects; const targetProjs=dashProj==='ALL'?userProjs:userProjs.filter(p=>p===dashProj); return targetProjs.map(proj=>{ const res=calcQAScore(proj,user,simpleRecs); const grade=roleGrade(res.score); const roleLabel=ROLE_LABELS[user.role]||user.role; return buildRoleCard({name:user.name,role:user.role,roleLabel,roleColor:ROLE_COLORS[user.role]||AC, accentColor:AC,score:res.score,grade,goodItems:res.goodItems,badItems:res.badItems, overdueItems:res.overdueItems,projectName:proj, kpis:[ {val:res.goodItems.length,lbl:'Good Activities',col:'#22c55e'}, {val:wirs.filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.status==='Reviewed by Quality Manager'||r.status==='QM Approved'||r.status==='Fully Complete')).length,lbl:'WIRs Reviewed/Closed',col:'#06b6d4'}, {val:wirs.filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='Fully Complete').length,lbl:'WIRs CC Closed ✓',col:'#22c55e'}, {val:imirs.filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='Fully Complete').length,lbl:'IMIRs CC Closed ✓',col:'#22c55e'}, {val:issues.filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.assignee===user.name||r.raisedBy===user.name)).filter(r=>r.type==='ncr').length,lbl:'NCRs Raised',col:'#f97316'}, {val:res.overdueItems.length,lbl:'Overdue',col:res.overdueItems.length>0?'#ef4444':'rgba(255,255,255,.25)'}, ]}); }).join(''); }).flat(); if(!cards.length||cards.every(c=>!c)){ el.innerHTML=''; return; } const legend=buildLegendSection('QA Inspector / QA-QC',AC, [['NCR Raised',QA_GOOD.ncr_raised],['NCR Fully Closed',QA_GOOD.ncr_closed],['Observation Raised',QA_GOOD.obs_raised],['Obs Fully Closed',QA_GOOD.obs_closed],['WIR QM Reviewed / Client Closed',QA_GOOD.wir_qm_approved],['WIR CC Closed ✓ (mandatory)',QA_GOOD.wir_fc],['IMIR QA/QM Accepted (QA action)',QA_GOOD.imir_accepted],['IMIR CC Closed ✓ (mandatory)',QA_GOOD.imir_fc],['Spec QA Reviewed',QA_GOOD.spec_qa_reviewed],['Spec Approved',QA_GOOD.spec_approved],['Good Practice Raised',QA_GOOD.goodpractice_raised],['NCR CAPA Facilitated ✓',QA_GOOD.ncr_capa_facilitated],['RCA Reviewed/Approved ✓',QA_GOOD.rca_reviewed],['Training Conducted ✓',QA_GOOD.training_conducted]], [['NCR Open >7 days',QA_BAD.ncr_open_long,false],['NCR Overdue (per day)',QA_BAD.ncr_overdue_per_day,false,'/day'],['Obs Open >7 days',QA_BAD.obs_open_long,false],['WIR Rejected',QA_BAD.wir_rejected,false],['IMIR Rejected',QA_BAD.imir_rejected,false],['Spec Rejected',QA_BAD.spec_rejected,false]], '🔐 Fully Complete = CC mandatory sign-off · QM reviews WIR, QA/QM approve IMIR internally → CC final closes → score milestone · Base 500 · Range 0–1000' ); el.innerHTML=`
🔍 QA Inspector / QA/QC Engineer Scorecard — Inspection Performance Index
${legend}
${cards.join('')}
`; } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // SAFETY OFFICER SCORECARD // Responsibility: Raise Safety Obs, Issue Work Permits, Safety Mockup, // Safety training, Toolbox talks — front-line safety enforcement // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ let SO_GOOD = applyScoreOverrides('so_good', { safetyobs_raised: +8, // Safety Observation raised (proactive hazard identification) safetyobs_fc: +6, // Safety Obs fully closed — CC mandatory sign-off ✓ workpermit_approved: +10, // Work Permit Safety Approved by SO/SM (SO approval action) workpermit_fc: +15, // Work Permit Fully Complete — CC signed off ✓ (mandatory) mockup_safety_approved:+10, // Safety Mockup Safety Approved by SO/SM mockup_safety_fc: +12, // Safety Mockup Fully Complete — CC closed ✓ training_safety_done: +10, // Safety/HSE/Toolbox Training conducted & completed goodpractice_safety: +6, // Good Practice (safety context — proactive culture) toolbox_training: +5, // Toolbox Talk / informal safety training conducted // ── Doc Control & RCA (Safety) ────────────────────────────────────── docctrl_submitted: +4, // Safety document submitted via Doc Control (HSE records) rca_submitted: +4, // Safety-related RCA submitted (incident investigation) rca_completed: +6, // Safety RCA completed & closed // ── Skill Evaluation (Safety Competency) ──────────────────────────── skilleval_conducted: +5, // Skill/Competency evaluation conducted by SO }); let SO_BAD = applyScoreOverrides('so_bad', { safetyobs_open: -5, // Safety Obs open (unresolved risk) safetyobs_overdue: -2, // per day after 7d workpermit_rejected: -10, // WP rejected (major failure) workpermit_pending_long:-3, // WP pending > 7 days }); function calcSOScore(proj, user, allSimpleRecs){ const nowMs=Date.now(), dayMs=86400000; let score=500; const goodItems=[], badItems=[], overdueItems=[]; function dSince(d){return d?Math.max(0,Math.floor((nowMs-new Date(d).getTime())/dayMs)):0;} function addG(l,id,pts){score+=pts;goodItems.push({label:l,id,pts});} function addB(l,id,pts){score+=pts;badItems.push({label:l,id,pts});} function addD(id,title,type,d,pts,mod){score+=pts;overdueItems.push({id,title,type,days:d,decayPts:pts,mod});} const myName=user.name; // Safety Obs raised by this SO (allSimpleRecs.safetyobs||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.inspector===myName||(r.inspector||'').includes(myName)||r.by===myName)).forEach(r=>{ addG('Safety Obs Raised',r.id,SO_GOOD.safetyobs_raised); if(r.status==='Fully Complete') addG('Safety Obs Fully Closed',r.id,SO_GOOD.safetyobs_fc); else { const d=dSince(r.date); addB('Safety Obs Open',r.id,SO_BAD.safetyobs_open); if(d>7) addD(r.id,r.title||r.id,'Safety Obs',d,SO_BAD.safetyobs_overdue*(d-7),'safetyobs'); } }); // Work Permits approved or created by this SO (allSimpleRecs.workpermit||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.inspector===myName||(r.inspector||'').includes(myName)||r.by===myName)).forEach(r=>{ if(['Safety Approved','Fully Complete'].includes(r.status)) addG('Work Permit Safety Approved',r.id,SO_GOOD.workpermit_approved); if(r.status==='Fully Complete') addG('Work Permit CC Closed ✓',r.id,SO_GOOD.workpermit_fc); if(r.status==='Rejected') addB('Work Permit Rejected',r.id,SO_BAD.workpermit_rejected); if(r.status==='Pending'){ const d=dSince(r.date); if(d>7) addB('Work Permit Pending Long',r.id,SO_BAD.workpermit_pending_long); } }); // Safety Mockup (allSimpleRecs.mockup_safety||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.inspector===myName||(r.inspector||'').includes(myName)||r.by===myName)).forEach(r=>{ if(['Safety Approved','Fully Complete'].includes(r.status)) addG('Safety Mockup Safety Approved',r.id,SO_GOOD.mockup_safety_approved); if(r.status==='Fully Complete') addG('Safety Mockup CC Closed ✓',r.id,SO_GOOD.mockup_safety_fc); }); // Safety Training conducted by SO (allSimpleRecs.training||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.by===myName||r.trainer===myName)).forEach(r=>{ if(r.status==='Completed') addG('Safety Training Completed',r.id,isSafetyRelated(r)?SO_GOOD.training_safety_done:SO_GOOD.toolbox_training); }); // Good Practice (safety context) (allSimpleRecs.goodpractice||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.by===myName||r.raisedBy===myName)).forEach(r=>{ if(isSafetyRelated(r)) addG('Good Practice (Safety)',r.id,SO_GOOD.goodpractice_safety); }); // Doc Control (safety documents) (typeof docCtrlRecs!=='undefined'?docCtrlRecs:[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.by===myName||r.createdBy===myName||r.submittedBy===myName)&&isSafetyRelated(r)).forEach(r=>{ addG('Safety Doc Control Submitted',r.id,SO_GOOD.docctrl_submitted); }); // RCA — safety incident investigation rcaRecs.filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.submittedBy===myName||r.raisedBy===myName||r.by===myName)).forEach(r=>{ addG('Safety RCA Submitted',r.id,SO_GOOD.rca_submitted); if(r.status==='Completed') addG('Safety RCA Completed ✓',r.id,SO_GOOD.rca_completed); }); // Skill evaluations conducted by SO (allSimpleRecs.skilleval||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.inspector===myName||r.by===myName||(r.inspector||'').includes(myName))).forEach(r=>{ addG('Skill Eval Conducted',r.id,SO_GOOD.skilleval_conducted); }); score=Math.max(0,Math.min(1000,Math.round(score))); return {score,goodItems,badItems,overdueItems, totalGood:goodItems.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.pts,0),totalBad:badItems.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.pts,0)}; } function renderDashSOScorecard(){ const el=document.getElementById('dash-so-scorecard-row'); if(!el) return; const allUsers=getAllUsers(); let soUsers=allUsers.filter(u=>u.role==='safety_officer'); if(isRole('safety_officer')){ soUsers=soUsers.filter(u=>u.id===currentUser.id); } else if(isRole('safety_manager','project_manager')){ const myP=currentUser.assignedProjects&¤tUser.assignedProjects.length?currentUser.assignedProjects:projects; soUsers=soUsers.filter(u=>!u.assignedProjects||!u.assignedProjects.length||u.assignedProjects.some(p=>myP.includes(p))); } else if(!isRole('super_admin')){ el.innerHTML=''; return; } if(dashProj!=='ALL') soUsers=soUsers.filter(u=>!u.assignedProjects||!u.assignedProjects.length||u.assignedProjects.includes(dashProj)); if(!soUsers.length){ el.innerHTML=''; return; } const AC='#e11d48'; const cards=soUsers.map(user=>{ const userProjs=(user.assignedProjects&&user.assignedProjects.length)?user.assignedProjects.filter(p=>projects.includes(p)):projects; const tP=dashProj==='ALL'?userProjs:userProjs.filter(p=>p===dashProj); return tP.map(proj=>{ const res=calcSOScore(proj,user,simpleRecs); const grade=roleGrade(res.score); return buildRoleCard({name:user.name,role:user.role,roleLabel:'Safety Officer',roleColor:ROLE_COLORS.safety_officer||AC, accentColor:AC,score:res.score,grade,goodItems:res.goodItems,badItems:res.badItems, overdueItems:res.overdueItems,projectName:proj, kpis:[ {val:(simpleRecs.safetyobs||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.inspector===user.name||(r.inspector||'').includes(user.name))).length,lbl:'Safety Obs',col:'#f97316'}, {val:(simpleRecs.workpermit||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.inspector===user.name||(r.inspector||'').includes(user.name))).length,lbl:'Permits Raised',col:'#f97316'}, {val:(simpleRecs.workpermit||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.inspector===user.name||(r.inspector||'').includes(user.name))&&r.status==='Fully Complete').length,lbl:'Permits CC Closed ✓',col:'#22c55e'}, {val:res.badItems.length,lbl:'Issues',col:res.badItems.length>0?'#ef4444':'rgba(255,255,255,.25)'}, {val:res.overdueItems.length,lbl:'Overdue',col:res.overdueItems.length>0?'#ef4444':'rgba(255,255,255,.25)'}, ]}); }).join(''); }).flat(); if(!cards.length||cards.every(c=>!c)){ el.innerHTML=''; return; } const legend=buildLegendSection('Safety Officer',AC, [['Safety Obs Raised',SO_GOOD.safetyobs_raised],['Safety Obs Fully Closed',SO_GOOD.safetyobs_fc],['Work Permit Safety Approved (SO action)',SO_GOOD.workpermit_approved],['Work Permit CC Closed ✓ (mandatory)',SO_GOOD.workpermit_fc],['Safety Mockup Safety Approved',SO_GOOD.mockup_safety_approved],['Safety Mockup CC Closed ✓',SO_GOOD.mockup_safety_fc],['Safety/HSE Training Completed',SO_GOOD.training_safety_done],['Toolbox Talk Conducted',SO_GOOD.toolbox_training],['Good Practice (Safety)',SO_GOOD.goodpractice_safety],['Safety Doc Control Submitted',SO_GOOD.docctrl_submitted],['Safety RCA Submitted',SO_GOOD.rca_submitted],['Safety RCA Completed ✓',SO_GOOD.rca_completed],['Skill Eval Conducted',SO_GOOD.skilleval_conducted]], [['Safety Obs Open (unresolved risk)',SO_BAD.safetyobs_open,false],['Safety Obs Overdue (per day)',SO_BAD.safetyobs_overdue,false,'/day'],['Work Permit Rejected',SO_BAD.workpermit_rejected,false],['WP Pending >7 days',SO_BAD.workpermit_pending_long,false]], '🔐 Work Permit Fully Complete = CC mandatory sign-off · SO Safety Approves → CC Final Closes → score milestone · Base 500 · Range 0–1000' ); el.innerHTML=`
🦺 Safety Officer Scorecard — Safety Enforcement Index
${legend}
${cards.join('')}
`; } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // SITE ENGINEER SCORECARD // Responsibility: Submit WIRs/IMIRs for inspections, request work permits, // maintain site progress, close open issues on site // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ let SE_GOOD = applyScoreOverrides('se_good', { wir_submitted: +5, // WIR submitted for QM review / client approval wir_qm_approved: +8, // WIR QM Reviewed (optional milestone) wir_fc: +15, // WIR Fully Complete — CC signed off ✓ (mandatory) wir_ipc_submitted: +5, // WIR with IPC billing entry — SE certifies billable work (financial duty) imir_submitted: +5, // IMIR submitted for QA/QM acceptance imir_qm_accepted: +8, // IMIR QM Accepted (internal milestone) imir_fc: +15, // IMIR Fully Complete — CC signed off ✓ (mandatory) workpermit_submitted: +5, // Work Permit raised workpermit_safety_approved: +8, // Work Permit Safety Approved workpermit_fc: +12, // Work Permit Fully Complete — CC closed ✓ (mandatory) rca_submitted: +4, // RCA / Rework request submitted rca_completed: +6, // RCA completed docctrl_submitted: +4, // Doc Control record submitted // ── Concrete Register ─────────────────────────────────────────────── concreg_submitted: +5, // Concrete Register pour record submitted (site tracking) concreg_linked_pass: +6, // Concrete Cube linked to this pour — passed test ✓ // ── CAPA / RCA — Site-level corrective action ──────────────────────── capa_ca_submitted: +4, // NCR Corrective Action submitted by SE (responsible party) capa_ca_completed: +6, // NCR Corrective Action completed & verified (SE closed the gap) // ── Training & Skill Development ──────────────────────────────────── training_attended: +3, // Training completed / attended skilleval_passed: +5, // Skill Evaluation passed (competency demonstrated) }); let SE_BAD = applyScoreOverrides('se_bad', { wir_rejected: -8, // WIR rejected (quality of submission) wir_overbilled: -12, // WIR overbilling flag — cumulative qty exceeds BOQ (serious financial error) imir_rejected: -8, wir_overdue_per_day: -2, // WIR pending > 7 days imir_overdue_per_day: -2, ncr_responsible: -8, // NCR where site engineer is responsible person ncr_overdue_per_day: -3, // ── Concrete Register ─────────────────────────────────────────────── concreg_cube_fail: -10, // Concrete cube linked to this pour failed (serious) }); function calcSEScore(proj, user, allSimpleRecs){ const nowMs=Date.now(), dayMs=86400000; let score=500; const goodItems=[], badItems=[], overdueItems=[]; function dSince(d){return d?Math.max(0,Math.floor((nowMs-new Date(d).getTime())/dayMs)):0;} function addG(l,id,pts){score+=pts;goodItems.push({label:l,id,pts});} function addB(l,id,pts){score+=pts;badItems.push({label:l,id,pts});} function addD(id,title,type,d,pts,mod){score+=pts;overdueItems.push({id,title,type,days:d,decayPts:pts,mod});} const myName=user.name; // WIRs where SE is creator/submitter/inspector wirs.filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.createdBy===myName||r.submittedBy===myName||r.inspector===myName||(r.inspector||'').includes(myName))).forEach(r=>{ if(['Submitted','Reviewed by Quality Manager','QM Approved','Fully Complete'].includes(r.status)) addG('WIR Submitted',r.id,SE_GOOD.wir_submitted); if(r.status==='Reviewed by Quality Manager'||r.status==='QM Approved'||r.status==='Fully Complete') addG('WIR QM Reviewed',r.id,SE_GOOD.wir_qm_approved); if(r.status==='Fully Complete') addG('WIR CC Closed ✓',r.id,SE_GOOD.wir_fc); if(r.status==='Rejected') addB('WIR Rejected',r.id,SE_BAD.wir_rejected); if(r.status==='Submitted'||r.status==='Pending'){ const d=dSince(r.date); if(d>7) addD(r.id,r.activity||r.id,'WIR',d,SE_BAD.wir_overdue_per_day*(d-7),'wir'); } }); // IMIRs imirs.filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.createdBy===myName||r.submittedBy===myName||r.inspector===myName||(r.inspector||'').includes(myName))).forEach(r=>{ if(['Submitted','QM Accepted','Fully Complete'].includes(r.status)) addG('IMIR Submitted',r.id,SE_GOOD.imir_submitted); if(r.status==='QM Accepted'||r.status==='Fully Complete') addG('IMIR QM Accepted',r.id,SE_GOOD.imir_qm_accepted); if(r.status==='Fully Complete') addG('IMIR CC Closed ✓',r.id,SE_GOOD.imir_fc); if(r.status==='Rejected') addB('IMIR Rejected',r.id,SE_BAD.imir_rejected); if(r.status==='Submitted'||r.status==='Pending'){ const d=dSince(r.date); if(d>7) addD(r.id,r.material||r.id,'IMIR',d,SE_BAD.imir_overdue_per_day*(d-7),'imir'); } }); // Work Permits raised by SE (allSimpleRecs.workpermit||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.by===myName||r.inspector===myName||(r.inspector||'').includes(myName))).forEach(r=>{ addG('Work Permit Raised',r.id,SE_GOOD.workpermit_submitted); if(r.status==='Safety Approved'||r.status==='Fully Complete') addG('Work Permit Safety Approved',r.id,SE_GOOD.workpermit_safety_approved); if(r.status==='Fully Complete') addG('Work Permit CC Closed ✓',r.id,SE_GOOD.workpermit_fc); }); // RCA submitted by SE rcaRecs.filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.submittedBy===myName||r.raisedBy===myName||r.by===myName)).forEach(r=>{ addG('RCA Submitted',r.id,SE_GOOD.rca_submitted); if(r.status==='Completed') addG('RCA Completed',r.id,SE_GOOD.rca_completed); }); // Doc Control (typeof docCtrlRecs!=='undefined'?docCtrlRecs:[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.submittedBy===myName||r.raisedBy===myName||r.by===myName||r.createdBy===myName)).forEach(r=>{ addG('Doc Control Submitted',r.id,SE_GOOD.docctrl_submitted); }); // Concrete Register — SE is primary submitter of pour records (typeof concRegRecs!=='undefined'?concRegRecs:[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.by===myName||r.createdBy===myName||r.inspector===myName)).forEach(r=>{ addG('Concrete Register Submitted',r.id,SE_GOOD.concreg_submitted); // Check if linked cube tests passed or failed const linkedCubes=(typeof simpleRecs!=='undefined'?simpleRecs.conccube||[]:allSimpleRecs.conccube||[]).filter(c=>c.concRegId===r.id); linkedCubes.forEach(c=>{ if(c.status==='Pass') addG('Concrete Cube Pass ✓',c.id,SE_GOOD.concreg_linked_pass); if(c.status==='Fail') addB('Concrete Cube Fail ⚠',c.id,SE_BAD.concreg_cube_fail); }); }); // WIR Billing — IPC certification & Overbilling wirs.filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.createdBy===myName||r.submittedBy===myName||r.inspector===myName||(r.inspector||'').includes(myName))).forEach(r=>{ if(r.billing&&r.billing.thisAmt>0) addG('WIR IPC Billing Certified',r.id,SE_GOOD.wir_ipc_submitted); if(r.billing&&r.billing.isOverbilled) addB('WIR Overbilling Alert ⚠',r.id,SE_BAD.wir_overbilled); }); // CAPA — SE is responsible party for corrective actions on NCRs issues.filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.type==='ncr'&&r.ca&&(r.ca.responsible===myName||r.responsiblePerson===myName)).forEach(r=>{ if(r.ca.description) addG('NCR CA Submitted',r.id,SE_GOOD.capa_ca_submitted); if(r.ca.status==='Completed'||r.ca.status==='Verified') addG('NCR CA Completed ✓',r.id,SE_GOOD.capa_ca_completed); }); // Training attended by SE (allSimpleRecs.training||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='Completed'&&(r.by===myName||(r.attendees||'').includes(myName))).forEach(r=>{ addG('Training Completed',r.id,SE_GOOD.training_attended); }); // Skill Evaluation passed by SE (allSimpleRecs.skilleval||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='Passed'&&(r.by===myName||r.inspector===myName)).forEach(r=>{ addG('Skill Eval Passed ✓',r.id,SE_GOOD.skilleval_passed); }); // NCRs where SE is responsible person (negative) issues.filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.responsiblePerson===myName&&['Open','In Progress'].includes(r.status)).forEach(r=>{ addB('NCR Responsible (Open)',r.id,SE_BAD.ncr_responsible); const d=dSince(r.date); if(d>7) addD(r.id,r.title||r.id,'NCR',d,SE_BAD.ncr_overdue_per_day*(d-7),'qms'); }); score=Math.max(0,Math.min(1000,Math.round(score))); return {score,goodItems,badItems,overdueItems, totalGood:goodItems.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.pts,0),totalBad:badItems.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.pts,0)}; } function renderDashSEScorecard(){ const el=document.getElementById('dash-se-scorecard-row'); if(!el) return; const allUsers=getAllUsers(); let seUsers=allUsers.filter(u=>u.role==='site_engineer'); if(isRole('site_engineer')){ seUsers=seUsers.filter(u=>u.id===currentUser.id); } else if(isRole('project_manager','quality_manager','safety_manager')){ const myP=currentUser.assignedProjects&¤tUser.assignedProjects.length?currentUser.assignedProjects:projects; seUsers=seUsers.filter(u=>!u.assignedProjects||!u.assignedProjects.length||u.assignedProjects.some(p=>myP.includes(p))); } else if(!isRole('super_admin')){ el.innerHTML=''; return; } if(dashProj!=='ALL') seUsers=seUsers.filter(u=>!u.assignedProjects||!u.assignedProjects.length||u.assignedProjects.includes(dashProj)); if(!seUsers.length){ el.innerHTML=''; return; } const AC='#d97706'; const cards=seUsers.map(user=>{ const uP=(user.assignedProjects&&user.assignedProjects.length)?user.assignedProjects.filter(p=>projects.includes(p)):projects; const tP=dashProj==='ALL'?uP:uP.filter(p=>p===dashProj);
