return tP.map(proj=>{ const res=calcSEScore(proj,user,simpleRecs); const grade=roleGrade(res.score); return buildRoleCard({name:user.name,role:'site_engineer',roleLabel:'Site Engineer',roleColor:ROLE_COLORS.site_engineer||AC, accentColor:AC,score:res.score,grade,goodItems:res.goodItems,badItems:res.badItems, overdueItems:res.overdueItems,projectName:proj, kpis:[ {val:wirs.filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.createdBy===user.name||r.submittedBy===user.name)).length,lbl:'WIRs Submitted',col:'#06b6d4'}, {val:wirs.filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.createdBy===user.name||r.submittedBy===user.name)&&r.status==='Fully Complete').length,lbl:'WIRs CC Closed ✓',col:'#22c55e'}, {val:imirs.filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.createdBy===user.name||r.submittedBy===user.name)&&r.status==='Fully Complete').length,lbl:'IMIRs CC Closed ✓',col:'#22c55e'}, {val:(simpleRecs.workpermit||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.by===user.name||r.inspector===user.name||(r.inspector||'').includes(user.name))&&r.status==='Fully Complete').length,lbl:'W.Permit CC Closed ✓',col:'#22c55e'}, {val:res.badItems.length,lbl:'Issues / Rejects',col:res.badItems.length>0?'#ef4444':'rgba(255,255,255,.25)'}, {val:res.overdueItems.length,lbl:'Overdue',col:res.overdueItems.length>0?'#ef4444':'rgba(255,255,255,.25)'}, ]}); }).join(''); }).flat(); if(!cards.length||cards.every(c=>!c)){ el.innerHTML=''; return; } const legend=buildLegendSection('Site Engineer',AC, [['WIR Submitted',SE_GOOD.wir_submitted],['WIR QM Reviewed (optional)',SE_GOOD.wir_qm_approved],['WIR CC Closed ✓ (mandatory)',SE_GOOD.wir_fc],['WIR IPC Billing Certified',SE_GOOD.wir_ipc_submitted],['IMIR Submitted',SE_GOOD.imir_submitted],['IMIR QM Accepted (internal)',SE_GOOD.imir_qm_accepted],['IMIR CC Closed ✓ (mandatory)',SE_GOOD.imir_fc],['Work Permit Raised',SE_GOOD.workpermit_submitted],['WP Safety Approved',SE_GOOD.workpermit_safety_approved],['WP CC Closed ✓ (mandatory)',SE_GOOD.workpermit_fc],['RCA Submitted',SE_GOOD.rca_submitted],['RCA Completed',SE_GOOD.rca_completed],['Doc Control Submitted',SE_GOOD.docctrl_submitted],['Concrete Register Submitted',SE_GOOD.concreg_submitted],['Concrete Cube Pass ✓',SE_GOOD.concreg_linked_pass],['NCR CA Submitted',SE_GOOD.capa_ca_submitted],['NCR CA Completed ✓',SE_GOOD.capa_ca_completed],['Training Completed',SE_GOOD.training_attended],['Skill Eval Passed ✓',SE_GOOD.skilleval_passed]], [['WIR Rejected',SE_BAD.wir_rejected,false],['WIR Overbilling Alert ⚠',SE_BAD.wir_overbilled,false],['IMIR Rejected',SE_BAD.imir_rejected,false],['WIR Overdue (per day)',SE_BAD.wir_overdue_per_day,false,'/day'],['IMIR Overdue (per day)',SE_BAD.imir_overdue_per_day,false,'/day'],['NCR Responsible (Open)',SE_BAD.ncr_responsible,false],['Concrete Cube Fail ⚠',SE_BAD.concreg_cube_fail,false]], '🔐 WIR / IMIR / Work Permit Fully Complete = CC mandatory sign-off · SE submits → QA/QM/Safety approves → CC final closes · Base 500 · Range 0–1000' ); el.innerHTML=`
🏗️ Site Engineer Scorecard — Field Execution Index
${legend}
${cards.join('')}
`; } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // STORE IN-CHARGE SCORECARD // Responsibility: IMIR material approvals, Issue materials for RCA, // maintain material records, document control for materials // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ let SI_GOOD = applyScoreOverrides('si_good', { imir_submitted: +5, // IMIR submitted for QA/QM acceptance imir_qm_accepted: +8, // IMIR QM Accepted (internal milestone) imir_fc: +15, // IMIR Fully Complete — CC signed off ✓ (mandatory) rca_material_issued: +10, // Materials issued for Rework (RCA) rca_completed: +6, // RCA completed after material issue docctrl_submitted: +5, // Doc Control entry (material certs etc.) conccube_submitted: +4, // Concrete cube test submitted conccube_pass: +8, // Concrete cube test passed // ── Training & Good Practice ───────────────────────────────────────── training_attended: +3, // Training attended/completed (competency & site induction) goodpractice_raised: +4, // Good Practice raised (proactive site culture) }); let SI_BAD = applyScoreOverrides('si_bad', { imir_rejected: -8, // IMIR rejected (material non-conformance) imir_overdue_per_day: -2, // IMIR pending > 7 days conccube_fail: -10, // Concrete cube failure (serious) rca_material_delayed: -5, // RCA approved but materials not issued > 7d }); function calcSIScore(proj, user, allSimpleRecs){ const nowMs=Date.now(), dayMs=86400000; let score=500; const goodItems=[], badItems=[], overdueItems=[]; function dSince(d){return d?Math.max(0,Math.floor((nowMs-new Date(d).getTime())/dayMs)):0;} function addG(l,id,pts){score+=pts;goodItems.push({label:l,id,pts});} function addB(l,id,pts){score+=pts;badItems.push({label:l,id,pts});} function addD(id,title,type,d,pts,mod){score+=pts;overdueItems.push({id,title,type,days:d,decayPts:pts,mod});} const myName=user.name; // IMIRs imirs.filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.createdBy===myName||r.submittedBy===myName||r.inspector===myName||(r.inspector||'').includes(myName))).forEach(r=>{ addG('IMIR Submitted',r.id,SI_GOOD.imir_submitted); if(r.status==='QM Accepted'||r.status==='Fully Complete') addG('IMIR QM Accepted',r.id,SI_GOOD.imir_qm_accepted); if(r.status==='Fully Complete') addG('IMIR CC Closed ✓',r.id,SI_GOOD.imir_fc); if(r.status==='Rejected') addB('IMIR Rejected',r.id,SI_BAD.imir_rejected); if(['Submitted','Pending'].includes(r.status)){ const d=dSince(r.date); if(d>7) addD(r.id,r.material||r.id,'IMIR',d,SI_BAD.imir_overdue_per_day*(d-7),'imir'); } }); // RCA — materials issued by Store rcaRecs.filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.materialRequired).forEach(r=>{ if(r.status==='Material Issued'||r.status==='Completed') addG('RCA Materials Issued',r.id,SI_GOOD.rca_material_issued); if(r.status==='Completed') addG('RCA Completed',r.id,SI_GOOD.rca_completed); // Delayed material issue if(r.status==='Approved'&&r.materialRequired){ const d=dSince(r.date); if(d>7) addB('RCA Material Issue Delayed',r.id,SI_BAD.rca_material_delayed); } }); // Doc Control (typeof docCtrlRecs!=='undefined'?docCtrlRecs:[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.by===myName||r.createdBy===myName||r.submittedBy===myName)).forEach(r=>{ addG('Doc Control Submitted',r.id,SI_GOOD.docctrl_submitted); }); // Concrete Cube (allSimpleRecs.conccube||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.by===myName||r.createdBy===myName)).forEach(r=>{ addG('Concrete Cube Submitted',r.id,SI_GOOD.conccube_submitted); if(r.status==='Pass') addG('Concrete Cube Pass',r.id,SI_GOOD.conccube_pass); if(r.status==='Fail') addB('Concrete Cube Fail',r.id,SI_BAD.conccube_fail); }); // Training attended by Store In-Charge (allSimpleRecs.training||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='Completed'&&(r.by===myName||(r.attendees||'').includes(myName))).forEach(r=>{ addG('Training Completed',r.id,SI_GOOD.training_attended); }); // Good Practice raised by Store In-Charge (allSimpleRecs.goodpractice||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.by===myName||r.raisedBy===myName)).forEach(r=>{ addG('Good Practice Raised',r.id,SI_GOOD.goodpractice_raised); }); score=Math.max(0,Math.min(1000,Math.round(score))); return {score,goodItems,badItems,overdueItems, totalGood:goodItems.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.pts,0),totalBad:badItems.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.pts,0)}; } function renderDashSIScorecard(){ const el=document.getElementById('dash-si-scorecard-row'); if(!el) return; const allUsers=getAllUsers(); let siUsers=allUsers.filter(u=>u.role==='store_incharge'); if(isRole('store_incharge')){ siUsers=siUsers.filter(u=>u.id===currentUser.id); } else if(isRole('project_manager','quality_manager')){ const myP=currentUser.assignedProjects&¤tUser.assignedProjects.length?currentUser.assignedProjects:projects; siUsers=siUsers.filter(u=>!u.assignedProjects||!u.assignedProjects.length||u.assignedProjects.some(p=>myP.includes(p))); } else if(!isRole('super_admin')){ el.innerHTML=''; return; } if(dashProj!=='ALL') siUsers=siUsers.filter(u=>!u.assignedProjects||!u.assignedProjects.length||u.assignedProjects.includes(dashProj)); if(!siUsers.length){ el.innerHTML=''; return; } const AC='#b45309'; const cards=siUsers.map(user=>{ const uP=(user.assignedProjects&&user.assignedProjects.length)?user.assignedProjects.filter(p=>projects.includes(p)):projects; const tP=dashProj==='ALL'?uP:uP.filter(p=>p===dashProj); return tP.map(proj=>{ const res=calcSIScore(proj,user,simpleRecs); const grade=roleGrade(res.score); return buildRoleCard({name:user.name,role:'store_incharge',roleLabel:'Store In-Charge',roleColor:ROLE_COLORS.store_incharge||AC, accentColor:AC,score:res.score,grade,goodItems:res.goodItems,badItems:res.badItems, overdueItems:res.overdueItems,projectName:proj, kpis:[ {val:imirs.filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.createdBy===user.name||r.submittedBy===user.name)).length,lbl:'IMIRs Submitted',col:'#8b5cf6'}, {val:imirs.filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.createdBy===user.name||r.submittedBy===user.name)&&r.status==='Fully Complete').length,lbl:'IMIRs CC Closed ✓',col:'#22c55e'}, {val:rcaRecs.filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.materialRequired&&(r.status==='Material Issued'||r.status==='Completed')).length,lbl:'Materials Issued',col:'#10b981'}, {val:(allSimpleRecs.conccube||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='Fail').length,lbl:'Cube Failures',col:'#ef4444'}, {val:res.overdueItems.length,lbl:'Overdue',col:res.overdueItems.length>0?'#ef4444':'rgba(255,255,255,.25)'}, ]}); }).join(''); }).flat(); if(!cards.length||cards.every(c=>!c)){ el.innerHTML=''; return; } const legend=buildLegendSection('Store In-Charge',AC, [['IMIR Submitted',SI_GOOD.imir_submitted],['IMIR QM Accepted (internal)',SI_GOOD.imir_qm_accepted],['IMIR CC Closed ✓ (mandatory)',SI_GOOD.imir_fc],['RCA Materials Issued',SI_GOOD.rca_material_issued],['RCA Completed',SI_GOOD.rca_completed],['Concrete Cube Submitted',SI_GOOD.conccube_submitted],['Concrete Cube Pass',SI_GOOD.conccube_pass],['Doc Control Submitted',SI_GOOD.docctrl_submitted]], [['IMIR Rejected',SI_BAD.imir_rejected,false],['IMIR Overdue (per day)',SI_BAD.imir_overdue_per_day,false,'/day'],['Concrete Cube Fail',SI_BAD.conccube_fail,false],['RCA Material Issue Delayed',SI_BAD.rca_material_delayed,false]], '🔐 IMIR Fully Complete = CC mandatory sign-off · SI submits → QA/QM accepts → CC final closes → top score · Base 500 · Range 0–1000' ); el.innerHTML=`
📦 Store In-Charge Scorecard — Material Management Index
${legend}
${cards.join('')}
`; } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // PLANNER / SURVEYOR SCORECARD (separate roles, shared dashboard row) // Responsibility: RFI management, Doc Control, planning activities, // on-time document submissions, schedule adherence support // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ let PL_GOOD = applyScoreOverrides('pl_good', { rfi_raised: +6, // RFI raised (identified information need) rfi_closed: +10, // RFI closed by Client/Consultant (Planner's RFI resolved) rfi_on_hold_resolved: +4, // On-hold RFI resolved docctrl_submitted: +5, // Document submitted via Doc Control docctrl_approved: +8, // Document approved wir_submitted: +4, // WIR submitted (surveyor field inspections) wir_fc: +10, // WIR Fully Complete — CC signed off ✓ imir_submitted: +4, // IMIR submitted (material management) imir_fc: +10, // IMIR Fully Complete — CC signed off ✓ training_attended: +4, // Training completed (attended) skilleval_pass: +6, // Skill evaluation passed // ── NEW: PTS Planning Module (Planner's primary responsibility) ────── pts_activity_created: +5, // Activity added to schedule (plan maintained) pts_activity_completed:+10, // Activity marked Completed on or ahead of plan pts_activity_on_track: +4, // Activity In Progress with actual >= planned progress pts_milestone_achieved:+12, // Milestone achieved (on-time delivery ✓) pts_milestone_on_track:+5, // Milestone On Track (proactive monitoring) pts_delay_identified: +3, // Delay event raised (proactive risk identification) pts_delay_eot_approved:+8, // Delay with EOT approved (claim management) // ── BOQ Spec Library (Planner / Quantity Surveyor duty) ────────────── boqspec_created: +4, // BOQ Spec Library entry created (schedule-cost documentation) // ── Concrete Register (Surveyor — quantity measurement) ────────────── concreg_surveyed: +4, // Concrete Register submitted by Surveyor (quantity verification) // ── Good Practice ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── goodpractice_raised: +3, // Good Practice raised (planning or quality context) }); let PL_BAD = applyScoreOverrides('pl_bad', { rfi_rejected: -8, // RFI rejected (poor quality / info gap) rfi_overdue_per_day: -2, // RFI open > 14 days without answer docctrl_rejected: -5, // Document rejected // ── NEW: PTS Planning penalties ───────────────────────────────────── pts_activity_delayed: -6, // Activity delayed (schedule slippage) pts_milestone_delayed: -10, // Milestone delayed (major schedule failure) pts_milestone_at_risk: -5, // Milestone At Risk (early warning penalty) }); function calcPLScore(proj, user, allSimpleRecs){ const nowMs=Date.now(), dayMs=86400000; let score=500; const goodItems=[], badItems=[], overdueItems=[]; function dSince(d){return d?Math.max(0,Math.floor((nowMs-new Date(d).getTime())/dayMs)):0;} function addG(l,id,pts){score+=pts;goodItems.push({label:l,id,pts});} function addB(l,id,pts){score+=pts;badItems.push({label:l,id,pts});} function addD(id,title,type,d,pts,mod){score+=pts;overdueItems.push({id,title,type,days:d,decayPts:pts,mod});} const myName=user.name; // RFIs raised by planner — CC answers & closes (allSimpleRecs.rfi||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.raisedBy===myName||r.by===myName||r.createdBy===myName)).forEach(r=>{ addG('RFI Raised',r.id,PL_GOOD.rfi_raised); if(r.status==='CC Answered'||r.status==='Closed') addG('RFI Answered by CC',r.id,PL_GOOD.rfi_on_hold_resolved); if(r.status==='Closed') addG('RFI Closed (Resolved)',r.id,PL_GOOD.rfi_closed); if(r.status==='Rejected') addB('RFI Rejected',r.id,PL_BAD.rfi_rejected); if(['Open','On Hold'].includes(r.status)){ const d=dSince(r.date); if(d>14) addD(r.id,r.title||r.id,'RFI',d,PL_BAD.rfi_overdue_per_day*(d-14),'rfi'); } }); // Doc Control (typeof docCtrlRecs!=='undefined'?docCtrlRecs:[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.by===myName||r.createdBy===myName||r.submittedBy===myName)).forEach(r=>{ addG('Doc Control Submitted',r.id,PL_GOOD.docctrl_submitted); if(r.status==='Approved') addG('Document Approved',r.id,PL_GOOD.docctrl_approved); if(r.status==='Rejected') addB('Document Rejected',r.id,PL_BAD.docctrl_rejected); }); // WIRs (surveyor role) if(user.role==='surveyor'){ wirs.filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.createdBy===myName||r.submittedBy===myName||r.inspector===myName||(r.inspector||'').includes(myName))).forEach(r=>{ if(['Submitted','QM Approved','Fully Complete'].includes(r.status)) addG('WIR Submitted (Survey)',r.id,PL_GOOD.wir_submitted); if(r.status==='Fully Complete') addG('WIR CC Closed ✓',r.id,PL_GOOD.wir_fc); }); imirs.filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.createdBy===myName||r.inspector===myName||(r.inspector||'').includes(myName))).forEach(r=>{ if(['Submitted','QM Accepted','Fully Complete'].includes(r.status)) addG('IMIR Submitted (Survey)',r.id,PL_GOOD.imir_submitted); if(r.status==='Fully Complete') addG('IMIR CC Closed ✓',r.id,PL_GOOD.imir_fc); }); } // Training (allSimpleRecs.training||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='Completed'&&(r.by===myName||r.trainer===myName||r.attendees===myName||(r.attendees||'').includes(myName))).forEach(r=>{ addG('Training Completed',r.id,PL_GOOD.training_attended); }); // Good Practice raised by Planner/Surveyor (allSimpleRecs.goodpractice||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.by===myName||r.raisedBy===myName)).forEach(r=>{ addG('Good Practice Raised',r.id,PL_GOOD.goodpractice_raised); }); // BOQ Spec Library entries created/maintained by Planner const _plBoqKeys=Object.keys(typeof boqSpecLib!=='undefined'?boqSpecLib:{}).filter(k=>k.startsWith(proj+'::')); if(_plBoqKeys.length) addG('BOQ Spec Library ('+_plBoqKeys.length+' specs)',proj+'::pl_boq',PL_GOOD.boqspec_created*_plBoqKeys.length); // Concrete Register — Surveyor submits pour quantity records if(user.role==='surveyor'){ (typeof concRegRecs!=='undefined'?concRegRecs:[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.by===myName||r.createdBy===myName||r.inspector===myName)).forEach(r=>{ addG('Concrete Register (Survey Qty)',r.id,PL_GOOD.concreg_surveyed); }); } // Skill eval passed (allSimpleRecs.skilleval||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&r.status==='Passed'&&(r.by===myName||r.inspector===myName)).forEach(r=>{ addG('Skill Eval Passed',r.id,PL_GOOD.skilleval_pass); }); // ── PTS Planning Module — Planner's primary module ────────────────── // Activities: Planner is responsible for all PTS activities on the project (typeof ptsActivities!=='undefined'?ptsActivities:[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj).forEach(r=>{ addG('Activity Created / Tracked',r.id,PL_GOOD.pts_activity_created); if(r.status==='Completed'){ addG('Activity Completed ✓',r.id,PL_GOOD.pts_activity_completed); } else if(r.status==='In Progress'){ // On-track: actual progress >= planned progress (within 5% tolerance) if((r.actualProgress||0) >= (r.plannedProgress||0) - 5){ addG('Activity On Track ✓',r.id,PL_GOOD.pts_activity_on_track); } else { addB('Activity Behind Schedule',r.id,PL_BAD.pts_activity_delayed); } } else if(r.status==='Delayed'){ addB('Activity Delayed ⚠',r.id,PL_BAD.pts_activity_delayed); } }); // Milestones: Planner tracks and is accountable for milestone delivery (typeof ptsMilestones!=='undefined'?ptsMilestones:[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj).forEach(r=>{ if(r.status==='Achieved'){ addG('Milestone Achieved ✓',r.id,PL_GOOD.pts_milestone_achieved); } else if(r.status==='On Track'){ addG('Milestone On Track ✓',r.id,PL_GOOD.pts_milestone_on_track); } else if(r.status==='At Risk'){ addB('Milestone At Risk ⚠',r.id,PL_BAD.pts_milestone_at_risk); } else if(r.status==='Delayed'){ addB('Milestone Delayed ⚠',r.id,PL_BAD.pts_milestone_delayed); } }); // Delay Register: proactive identification earns points; unresolved delays penalise (typeof ptsDelays!=='undefined'?ptsDelays:[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj).forEach(r=>{ addG('Delay Event Identified',r.id,PL_GOOD.pts_delay_identified); if(r.eotClaimed && r.status==='Approved'){ addG('EOT Claim Approved ✓',r.id,PL_GOOD.pts_delay_eot_approved); } }); score=Math.max(0,Math.min(1000,Math.round(score))); return {score,goodItems,badItems,overdueItems, totalGood:goodItems.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.pts,0),totalBad:badItems.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.pts,0)}; } function renderDashPLScorecard(){ const el=document.getElementById('dash-pl-scorecard-row'); if(!el) return; const allUsers=getAllUsers(); let plUsers=allUsers.filter(u=>u.role==='planner'||u.role==='surveyor'); if(isRole('planner','surveyor')){ plUsers=plUsers.filter(u=>u.id===currentUser.id); } else if(isRole('project_manager','quality_manager')){ const myP=currentUser.assignedProjects&¤tUser.assignedProjects.length?currentUser.assignedProjects:projects; plUsers=plUsers.filter(u=>!u.assignedProjects||!u.assignedProjects.length||u.assignedProjects.some(p=>myP.includes(p))); } else if(!isRole('super_admin')){ el.innerHTML=''; return; } if(dashProj!=='ALL') plUsers=plUsers.filter(u=>!u.assignedProjects||!u.assignedProjects.length||u.assignedProjects.includes(dashProj)); if(!plUsers.length){ el.innerHTML=''; return; } const AC='#0369a1'; const cards=plUsers.map(user=>{ const uP=(user.assignedProjects&&user.assignedProjects.length)?user.assignedProjects.filter(p=>projects.includes(p)):projects; const tP=dashProj==='ALL'?uP:uP.filter(p=>p===dashProj); return tP.map(proj=>{ const res=calcPLScore(proj,user,simpleRecs); const grade=roleGrade(res.score); const roleLabel=user.role==='surveyor'?'Surveyor':'Planner'; const roleColor=user.role==='surveyor'?ROLE_COLORS.surveyor:ROLE_COLORS.planner||AC; return buildRoleCard({name:user.name,role:user.role,roleLabel,roleColor, accentColor:AC,score:res.score,grade,goodItems:res.goodItems,badItems:res.badItems, overdueItems:res.overdueItems,projectName:proj, kpis:[ {val:(allSimpleRecs.rfi||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.raisedBy===user.name||r.by===user.name)).length,lbl:'RFIs Raised',col:'#f59e0b'}, {val:(allSimpleRecs.rfi||[]).filter(r=>r.project===proj&&(r.raisedBy===user.name||r.by===user.name)&&(r.status==='Closed'||r.status==='CC Answered')).length,lbl:'RFIs Resolved',col:'#22c55e'}, {val:res.badItems.length,lbl:'Issues',col:res.badItems.length>0?'#ef4444':'rgba(255,255,255,.25)'}, {val:res.overdueItems.length,lbl:'Overdue',col:res.overdueItems.length>0?'#ef4444':'rgba(255,255,255,.25)'}, ]}); }).join(''); }).flat(); if(!cards.length||cards.every(c=>!c)){ el.innerHTML=''; return; } const legend=buildLegendSection('Planner / Surveyor',AC, [['RFI Raised',PL_GOOD.rfi_raised],['RFI Answered by CC',PL_GOOD.rfi_on_hold_resolved],['RFI Fully Closed',PL_GOOD.rfi_closed],['Doc Control Submitted',PL_GOOD.docctrl_submitted],['Document Approved',PL_GOOD.docctrl_approved],['WIR Submitted (Survey)',PL_GOOD.wir_submitted],['WIR CC Closed ✓',PL_GOOD.wir_fc],['IMIR Submitted (Survey)',PL_GOOD.imir_submitted],['IMIR CC Closed ✓',PL_GOOD.imir_fc],['Training Completed',PL_GOOD.training_attended],['Skill Eval Passed',PL_GOOD.skilleval_pass],['Good Practice Raised',PL_GOOD.goodpractice_raised],['BOQ Spec Library Entry',PL_GOOD.boqspec_created],['Concrete Register (Survey Qty)',PL_GOOD.concreg_surveyed],['📅 PTS Activity Created/Tracked',PL_GOOD.pts_activity_created],['📅 PTS Activity Completed ✓',PL_GOOD.pts_activity_completed],['📅 PTS Activity On Track',PL_GOOD.pts_activity_on_track],['🏁 PTS Milestone Achieved ✓',PL_GOOD.pts_milestone_achieved],['🏁 PTS Milestone On Track',PL_GOOD.pts_milestone_on_track],['⚠️ Delay Event Identified (proactive)',PL_GOOD.pts_delay_identified],['✅ EOT Claim Approved',PL_GOOD.pts_delay_eot_approved]], [['RFI Rejected',PL_BAD.rfi_rejected,false],['RFI Overdue >14d (per day)',PL_BAD.rfi_overdue_per_day,false,'/day'],['Document Rejected',PL_BAD.docctrl_rejected,false],['📅 PTS Activity Delayed ⚠',PL_BAD.pts_activity_delayed,false],['🏁 PTS Milestone Delayed ⚠',PL_BAD.pts_milestone_delayed,false],['🏁 PTS Milestone At Risk',PL_BAD.pts_milestone_at_risk,false]], '📅 PTS Planning is Planner\'s primary module · BOQ Spec Library, RFI, DocCtrl, WIR/IMIR, Good Practice, Concrete Register (Surveyor) all scored · Base 500 · Range 0–1000' ); el.innerHTML=`
📐 Planner / Surveyor Scorecard — Separate Accountability
${legend}
${cards.join('')}
`; } function setDashProj(p){dashProj=p;renderDash();} // ══════════════════════════════════════════════ // REWORK COST ANALYSIS (RCA) MODULE // ══════════════════════════════════════════════ let _openRCAId = null; let editingRCAId=null; let editingWIRId=null; let editingIMIRId=null; function openRCANew(){ if(!canCreate('rca')){ showToast('You do not have permission to create Rework Cost records.','warn'); return; } populateProjectSelectors(); const projEl = document.getElementById('rcaf-project'); const proj = (projEl&&projEl.value) || getAssignedProjects()[0] || null; // ── Contractor: project-scoped ── fillContractorSelect('rcaf-contractor', proj||''); // ── Requested By: person picker ── const _rcaPool = getPersonPool(proj||''); mountPersonField('rcaf-by-picker-outer', _rcaPool, false); // ── When project changes: refresh contractor + Requested By ── if(projEl) projEl.onchange = function(){ const p2=this.value; fillContractorSelect('rcaf-contractor', p2); const _pool2 = getPersonPool(p2); mountPersonField('rcaf-by-picker-outer', _pool2, false); }; // ── When contractor changes: refresh Requested By picker ── const ctEl = document.getElementById('rcaf-contractor'); if(ctEl) ctEl.onchange = function(){ const p2 = (document.getElementById('rcaf-project')||{}).value||proj||''; mountPersonField('rcaf-by-picker-outer', getPersonPool(p2), false); }; const pd=document.getElementById('rcaf-date'); if(pd&&!pd.value) pd.value=today(); const pt=document.getElementById('rcaf-time'); if(pt&&!pt.value) pt.value=nowHHMM(); document.getElementById('rca-mat-rows').innerHTML=''; document.getElementById('rcaf-mat-cost').value='0'; const tcEl=document.getElementById('rcaf-total-cost'); if(tcEl) tcEl.value=''; document.getElementById('rcaf-mat-required').value='no'; document.getElementById('rca-materials-section').style.display='none'; document.getElementById('rcaf-photo-previews').innerHTML=''; document.getElementById('new-rca-overlay').classList.add('open'); } function closeRCANew(){editingRCAId=null;document.getElementById('new-rca-overlay').classList.remove('open');} function toggleRCAMaterials(){ const val=document.getElementById('rcaf-mat-required').value; document.getElementById('rca-materials-section').style.display=val==='yes'?'':'none'; if(val==='yes' && !document.querySelectorAll('#rca-mat-rows .rca-mat-row').length) addRCAMaterialRow(); } function addRCAMaterialRow(){ const tbody=document.getElementById('rca-mat-rows'); const idx=Date.now(); const rowNum=tbody.querySelectorAll('tr').length+1; const matOpts=MATERIAL_NAMES.map(n=>``).join(''); const unitOpts=MATERIAL_UNITS.map(u=>``).join(''); const tr=document.createElement('tr'); tr.id='rca-row-'+idx; tr.style.borderBottom='1px solid #eef0f6'; tr.innerHTML=` ${rowNum}
0.00
`; tbody.appendChild(tr); } function removeRCARow(rowId){ const el=document.getElementById(rowId);if(el)el.remove(); // Renumber document.querySelectorAll('#rca-mat-rows tr').forEach((tr,i)=>{ const numEl=tr.querySelector('span[style*="border-radius:50%"]'); if(numEl) numEl.textContent=i+1; }); } function calcRCAMatCost(){ let matTotal=0; const cur=(document.getElementById('rcaf-currency')?.value)||'AED'; document.querySelectorAll('#rca-mat-rows tr').forEach(tr=>{ const id=tr.id.replace('rca-row-',''); const qty=parseFloat(document.getElementById('rcam-qty-'+id)?.value)||0; const price=parseFloat(document.getElementById('rcam-price-'+id)?.value)||0; const rowTotal=qty*price; matTotal+=rowTotal; const el=document.getElementById('rcam-total-'+id); if(el) el.textContent=formatRCACurrency(cur,rowTotal); }); const matEl=document.getElementById('rcaf-mat-cost'); if(matEl) matEl.value=matTotal.toFixed(2); const labour=parseFloat(document.getElementById('rcaf-labour-cost')?.value)||0; const grandTotal=matTotal+labour; const totalEl=document.getElementById('rcaf-total-cost'); if(totalEl) totalEl.value=formatRCACurrency(cur,grandTotal); // Grand total band const gtEl=document.getElementById('rca-mat-grand-val'); if(gtEl) gtEl.textContent=formatRCACurrency(cur,matTotal); const gtDiv=document.getElementById('rca-mat-grand-total'); if(gtDiv) gtDiv.style.display=matTotal>0?'flex':'none'; } function getRCAMaterials(){ const cur=(document.getElementById('rcaf-currency')?.value)||'AED'; const items=[]; document.querySelectorAll('#rca-mat-rows tr').forEach(tr=>{ const id=tr.id.replace('rca-row-',''); const nameSel=document.getElementById('rcam-name-'+id)?.value||''; const nameCustom=document.getElementById('rcam-custom-'+id)?.value||''; const desc=nameCustom||nameSel; const qty=parseFloat(document.getElementById('rcam-qty-'+id)?.value)||0; const unit=document.getElementById('rcam-unit-'+id)?.value||''; const price=parseFloat(document.getElementById('rcam-price-'+id)?.value)||0; if(desc||qty) items.push({desc,qty,unit,price,total:qty*price,currency:cur}); }); return items; } function loadRCAPhotoPreviews(photos){ const wrap=document.getElementById('rcaf-photo-previews'); if(!wrap) return; wrap.innerHTML=''; (photos||[]).forEach((p,idx)=>{ const div=document.createElement('div'); div.className='photo-thumb'; div.style.width='72px';div.style.height='58px';div.style.padding='0';div.style.overflow='hidden'; const src=p?.data||''; div.innerHTML=``; wrap.appendChild(div); }); } function openRCAEdit(id){ const rec=rcaRecs.find(r=>r.id===id); if(!rec) return; if(rec.status!=='Rejected'){ showToast('Only rejected RCA records can be corrected and resubmitted.','warn'); return; } if(!canCurrentUserResubmitRecord(rec,'rca')){ showToast('Only the responsible submitter can correct and resubmit this rejected Rework Cost record.','warn'); return; } openRCANew(); editingRCAId=id; const setVal=(elId,val)=>{ const el=document.getElementById(elId); if(el) el.value=val??''; }; setVal('rcaf-project',rec.project||''); fillContractorOptions(document.getElementById('rcaf-contractor'), rec.project||''); setVal('rcaf-title',rec.title||''); setVal('rcaf-date',rec.date||today()); setVal('rcaf-time',rec.time||nowHHMM()); setVal('rcaf-country',rec.country||''); setVal('rcaf-city',rec.city||''); const loc=String(rec.location||''); const parts=loc.split(' · '); setVal('rcaf-floor',parts.length>1?parts[0]:''); setVal('rcaf-location',parts.length>1?parts.slice(1).join(' · '):loc); setVal('rcaf-category',rec.category||''); setVal('rcaf-ref',rec.reference||''); setVal('rcaf-contractor',rec.contractor||''); try{ mountPersonField('rcaf-by-picker-outer', getPersonPool(rec.project||''), false, rec.by||currentUser?.name||''); }catch(e){} setVal('rcaf-priority',rec.priority||'Normal'); setVal('rcaf-currency',rec.currency||'AED'); setVal('rcaf-mat-required',rec.materialRequired?'yes':'no'); toggleRCAMaterials(); document.getElementById('rca-mat-rows').innerHTML=''; (rec.materials||[]).forEach(m=>{ addRCAMaterialRow(); const tr=document.querySelector('#rca-mat-rows tr:last-child'); if(!tr) return; const rid=tr.id.replace('rca-row-',''); const sel=document.getElementById('rcam-name-'+rid); if(sel) sel.value=(MATERIAL_NAMES.includes(m.desc)?m.desc:''); const cus=document.getElementById('rcam-custom-'+rid); if(cus) cus.value=(MATERIAL_NAMES.includes(m.desc)?'':(m.desc||'')); const qty=document.getElementById('rcam-qty-'+rid); if(qty) qty.value=m.qty??''; const unit=document.getElementById('rcam-unit-'+rid); if(unit) unit.value=m.unit||''; const price=document.getElementById('rcam-price-'+rid); if(price) price.value=(m.price ?? m.cost ?? ''); }); setVal('rcaf-labour-cost',rec.labourCost||''); setVal('rcaf-duration',rec.duration||''); setVal('rcaf-desc',rec.desc||''); setVal('rcaf-reason',rec.reason||''); setVal('rcaf-remarks',rec.remarks||''); loadRCAPhotoPreviews(rec.photos||[]); calcRCAMatCost(); const btn=document.querySelector('#new-rca-overlay .btn-submit'); if(btn) btn.textContent='Save Changes & Resubmit'; const ttl=document.querySelector('#new-rca-overlay .new-head-title'); if(ttl) ttl.textContent='CORRECT & RESUBMIT REWORK COST ANALYSIS'; } function submitRCA(){ if(!canCreate('rca')){ showToast('You do not have permission to submit Rework Cost records.','warn'); return; } const project=document.getElementById('rcaf-project').value; const title=(document.getElementById('rcaf-title').value||'').trim(); const date=document.getElementById('rcaf-date').value; const reason=(document.getElementById('rcaf-reason').value||'').trim(); const _byEl=document.getElementById('rcaf-by-picker-outer-val');const by=_byEl?_byEl.value:''; if(!project){alert('Please select a project.');return;} if(!title){alert('Please enter a rework title.');return;} if(!date){alert('Please select a date.');return;} if(!reason){alert('Please enter the justification / reason for rework.');return;} const currency=document.getElementById('rcaf-currency')?.value||'AED'; calcRCAMatCost(); const materials=document.getElementById('rcaf-mat-required').value==='yes'?getRCAMaterials():[]; const totalMatCost=materials.reduce((s,m)=>s+m.total,0); const labourCost=parseFloat(document.getElementById('rcaf-labour-cost').value)||0; const duration=document.getElementById('rcaf-duration').value||''; // Gather photos const photoPs=document.querySelectorAll('#rcaf-photo-previews .photo-thumb img'); const photos=[]; photoPs.forEach(img=>{photos.push({data:img.src,name:img.alt||'photo',type:'image'});}); const existingRec = editingRCAId ? rcaRecs.find(r=>r.id===editingRCAId) : null; const prefix='RCA'; const nextNum=(rcaRecs.filter(r=>r.id.startsWith(prefix)).length+1).toString().padStart(4,'0'); const id=existingRec?.id || `${prefix}-${nextNum}`; const rec={ ...(existingRec||{}), id, project,title,date, time:document.getElementById('rcaf-time').value||nowHHMM(), country:document.getElementById('rcaf-country').value||'', city:document.getElementById('rcaf-city').value||'', location:(()=>{const _f=document.getElementById('rcaf-floor')?.value||'';const _l=document.getElementById('rcaf-location')?.value?.trim()||'';return _f&&_l?_f+' · '+_l:_f||_l;})(), category:document.getElementById('rcaf-category').value||'', reference:document.getElementById('rcaf-ref').value||'', contractor:document.getElementById('rcaf-contractor').value||'', by:by||currentUser?.name||'', priority:document.getElementById('rcaf-priority').value||'Normal', currency, materialRequired:document.getElementById('rcaf-mat-required').value==='yes', materials, totalMatCost, labourCost, duration, desc:document.getElementById('rcaf-desc').value||'', reason, remarks:document.getElementById('rcaf-remarks').value||'', status:'Pending Approval', photos:(photos.length?photos:(existingRec?.photos||[])), comments:[...(existingRec?.comments||[])], actionLog:[...(existingRec?.actionLog||[])], submittedAt:new Date().toISOString(), createdBy:existingRec?.createdBy||currentUser?.name||by||'', createdRole:existingRec?.createdRole||currentUser?.role||'', }; rec.rejectionComment=null; rec.rejectionBy=null; rec.rejectionAt=null; if(rec.actionLog) rec.actionLog=rec.actionLog.filter(a=>!['approve','reject','close','complete'].includes(a.type)); if(editingRCAId){ logAction(rec,'resubmit'); rec.comments.push({author:currentUser?.name||'System',time:nowTime(), text:`🔄 Resubmitted by ${currentUser?.name||'User'} (${currentUser?.role||''}) at ${nowDateTime()} after correcting editable amount / currency fields.`}); const ix=rcaRecs.findIndex(r=>r.id===editingRCAId); if(ix>=0) rcaRecs[ix]=rec; else rcaRecs.push(rec); } else { logAction(rec,'submit'); rcaRecs.push(rec); } persist(); sendEmailNotification(editingRCAId?'resubmission':'submission', rec, 'Rework Cost Analysis'); const wasEdit=!!editingRCAId; editingRCAId=null; closeRCANew();updateStats();renderRCAList(); showToast(wasEdit?`RCA Request ${id} corrected and resubmitted for approval.`:`RCA Request ${id} submitted. Awaiting QM/QA approval.`,'success'); } function renderRCAList(){ const listEl=document.getElementById('rca-list'); const footerEl=document.getElementById('rca-footer'); if(!canOpenModule('rca')){ if(listEl) listEl.innerHTML='
Access denied for Rework Cost module.
'; if(footerEl) footerEl.textContent=''; return; } const search=(document.getElementById('rca-search')?.value||'').toLowerCase(); const statusFilter=document.getElementById('rca-sf')?.value||''; const visProjs=getAssignedProjects(); let filtered=rcaRecs.filter(r=>isRole('super_admin')||visProjs.includes(r.project)); const proj=activeProject==='ALL'?null:activeProject; if(proj) filtered=filtered.filter(r=>r.project===proj); if(statusFilter) filtered=filtered.filter(r=>r.status===statusFilter); if(search) filtered=filtered.filter(r=>(r.id+r.title+r.project+r.category).toLowerCase().includes(search)); filtered=[...filtered].sort((a,b)=>b.date.localeCompare(a.date)); const STATUS_COLORS={'Pending Approval':'#f97316',Approved:'#2563eb','Material Issued':'#7c3aed',Completed:'#16a34a',Rejected:'#dc2626','Fully Complete':'#059669'}; if(!listEl)return; if(!filtered.length){listEl.innerHTML='
No rework requests found.
';document.getElementById('rca-footer').textContent='';return;} listEl.innerHTML=filtered.map(r=>{ const stc=STATUS_COLORS[r.status]||'#888'; const matFlag=r.materialRequired?'📦 MAT':''; const totalCost=(parseFloat(r.totalMatCost)||0)+(parseFloat(r.labourCost)||0); const costTag=totalCost>0?`${formatRCACurrency(r.currency||'INR', Math.round(totalCost))}`:''; return `
${esc(r.id)} ${esc(r.title)}
${esc(r.project)} · ${esc(r.category||'')}
${matFlag} ${costTag} ${r.status}
`; }).join(''); document.getElementById('rca-footer').textContent=`${filtered.length} request${filtered.length!==1?'s':''}`; } function openRCADetail(id){ if(!canOpenModule('rca')){ showToast('This module is blocked by your access permissions.','warn'); return; } const rec=rcaRecs.find(r=>r.id===id); if(!rec) return; if(!isRole('super_admin')&&rec.project&&!getAssignedProjects().includes(rec.project)){showToast('Access denied — record belongs to a different project.','warn');return;} _openRCAId=id; _openPDFContext.rca=rec; const STATUS_COLORS={'Pending Approval':'#f97316',Approved:'#2563eb','Material Issued':'#7c3aed',Completed:'#16a34a',Rejected:'#dc2626','Fully Complete':'#059669'}; const stc=STATUS_COLORS[rec.status]||'#888'; document.getElementById('rca-det-badges').innerHTML= `🔧 Rework Cost Analysis ${rec.status} ${esc(rec.project)}`; document.getElementById('rca-det-title').textContent=rec.title; // Build workflow buttons (ONE-TIME IMMUTABLE) let wfBtns=''; const isQMQA = isRole('quality_manager','qa_inspector','super_admin'); const isStore = isRole('store_incharge','super_admin'); const isSubmitter = canCurrentUserResubmitRecord(rec,'rca'); if(LOCKED_STATUSES.has(rec.status) && rec.status!=='Rejected'){ wfBtns = lockedNotice(rec.status,'#22c55e') + actionStamp(rec,'approve','#22c55e') + actionStamp(rec,'issue','#8b5cf6') + actionStamp(rec,'complete','#22c55e'); } else if(rec.status==='Rejected'){ if(isSubmitter){ wfBtns = resubmitBanner(rec, `resubmitRCA('${id}')`); } else { wfBtns = `
🚫 Rejected — awaiting resubmission by responsible user.
`; } } else if(rec.status==='Pending Approval'){ if(isQMQA){ if(!alreadyActed(rec,'approve')){ wfBtns+=``; } else { wfBtns+=actionStamp(rec,'approve','#22c55e'); } if(!alreadyActed(rec,'reject')){ wfBtns+=``; } else { wfBtns+=actionStamp(rec,'reject','#ef4444'); } } else { wfBtns=`
⏳ Awaiting QM / QA Inspector approval.
`; } } else if(rec.status==='Approved'){ if(isStore && rec.materialRequired){ if(!alreadyActed(rec,'issue')){ wfBtns+=``; } else { wfBtns+=actionStamp(rec,'issue','#8b5cf6'); } } else if(!rec.materialRequired && isQMQA){ if(!alreadyActed(rec,'complete')){ wfBtns+=``; } else { wfBtns+=actionStamp(rec,'complete','#22c55e'); } } else { wfBtns=`
✅ Approved.${rec.materialRequired?' Store In-Charge to issue materials.':' Awaiting completion.'}
`; } } else if(rec.status==='Material Issued'){ if(isQMQA || isSubmitter){ if(!alreadyActed(rec,'complete')){ wfBtns+=``; } else { wfBtns+=actionStamp(rec,'complete','#22c55e'); } } } // Materials table let matHtml=''; if(rec.materialRequired && rec.materials?.length){ const rows=rec.materials.map(m=>`${esc(m.desc)}${m.qty} ${m.unit}${formatRCACurrency(rec.currency||'AED',(m.cost||m.price||0))}${formatRCACurrency(rec.currency||'AED',(m.total||0))}${esc(m.issued?'✅ Issued':'⏳ Pending')}`).join(''); matHtml=`
📦 Material Request
${rows}
ItemQty / UnitUnit CostTotalStatus
Material Total${formatRCACurrency(rec.currency||'AED',(rec.totalMatCost||0))}
`; } else if(rec.materialRequired){ matHtml=`
Material required but no items listed.
`; } else { matHtml=`
Labour-only rework. No materials requested.
`; } // Cost summary const totalCost=(parseFloat(rec.totalMatCost)||0)+(parseFloat(rec.labourCost)||0); const costSummary=`
${formatRCACurrency(rec.currency||'AED',(parseFloat(rec.labourCost)||0))}
${formatRCACurrency(rec.currency||'AED',(parseFloat(rec.totalMatCost)||0))}
${formatRCACurrency(rec.currency||'AED',totalCost)}
`; const rejBox=rec.rejectionComment?`
🚫 Rejection Reason
${esc(rec.rejectionComment)}
By: ${esc(rec.rejectionBy||'')} · ${rec.rejectionAt?new Date(rec.rejectionAt).toLocaleDateString():''}
`:''; const issueBox=rec.issueNote?`
📦 Material Issue Note
${esc(rec.issueNote)}
Issued by: ${esc(rec.issuedBy||'')} · ${rec.issuedAt?new Date(rec.issuedAt).toLocaleDateString():''}
`:''; const cmts=renderComments(rec.comments); document.getElementById('rca-det-body').innerHTML=`
${wfBtns}
${rejBox}${issueBox}
${esc(rec.id)}
${esc(rec.project)}
${esc(rec.date||'—')}
${esc(rec.category||'—')}
${esc(rec.priority||'—')}
${esc(rec.reference||'—')}
${esc(rec.country||'—')}
${esc(rec.city||'—')}
${esc(rec.location||'—')}
${esc(rec.contractor||'—')}
${esc(rec.by||'—')}
${esc(rec.duration||'—')}
${costSummary} ${rec.desc?`
Rework Description
${esc(rec.desc)}
`:''} ${rec.reason?`
⚡ Justification / Reason
${esc(rec.reason)}
`:''}
📦 Material Details
${matHtml} ${rec.remarks?`
Remarks
${esc(rec.remarks)}
`:''} ${rec.photos?.length?`
📷 Photos (${rec.photos.length})
${rec.photos.map(p=>`
`).join('')}
`:''}
Comments (${(rec.comments||[]).length})
${cmts}
${renderActionTrail(rec)} `; document.getElementById('rca-detail-overlay').classList.add('open'); } function closeRCADetail(){document.getElementById('rca-detail-overlay').classList.remove('open');_openRCAId=null;} function rcaAction(id, newStatus){ const rec=rcaRecs.find(r=>r.id===id); if(!rec) return; const isQMQA = isRole('quality_manager','qa_inspector','qa_qc_engineer','super_admin'); const isSubmitter = isRole('project_manager','site_engineer','qa_inspector','quality_manager','safety_officer','safety_manager','super_admin'); if(newStatus==='Approved' && !(isQMQA && canApproveMod('rca'))){ showToast('You do not have approval access for Rework Cost.','warn'); return; } if(newStatus==='Completed'){ const canComplete = (rec.status==='Approved' && !rec.materialRequired && isQMQA && canApproveMod('rca')) || (rec.status==='Material Issued' && ((isQMQA && canApproveMod('rca')) || (isSubmitter && canCreate('rca')))); if(!canComplete){ showToast('You do not have completion access for this Rework Cost record.','warn'); return; } } const actionType=newStatus==='Completed'?'complete':newStatus==='Approved'?'approve':'update'; if(alreadyActed(rec, actionType)){showToast(`Already ${actionType}d — action is locked.`,'error');return;} if(LOCKED_STATUSES.has(rec.status)&&rec.status!=='Rejected'){showToast(`Locked at "${rec.status}".`,'error');return;} rec.status=newStatus; logAction(rec, actionType); rec.lastActionBy=currentUser?.name||''; rec.lastActionAt=new Date().toISOString(); if(!rec.comments)rec.comments=[]; rec.comments.push({author:currentUser?.name||'System',time:nowTime(), text:`Status → "${newStatus}" by ${currentUser?.name||'User'} (${currentUser?.role||''}) at ${nowDateTime()}`}); // ── AUTO-COMPLETE: After QM/QA/QC approval, if no material required → // automatically set to Completed (no client step for RCA) ── if(newStatus==='Approved' && !rec.materialRequired){ rec.status='Completed'; logAction(rec,'complete'); rec.lastActionBy='System (Auto)'; rec.lastActionAt=new Date().toISOString(); rec.comments.push({author:'System',time:nowTime(), text:`⚡ Auto-Completed: Rework Cost Analysis automatically marked Completed after QA/QM approval (no materials required). ${nowDateTime()}`}); showToast('✅ RCA Auto-Completed after QA/QM approval.','ok'); } else if(newStatus==='Approved' && rec.materialRequired){ // Has materials: auto-complete happens after Material Issued step showToast('✅ RCA Approved — Store In-Charge to issue materials, then auto-completes.','ok'); } persist();renderRCAList();updateStats();refreshWorkflowUI();openRCADetail(id); sendEmailNotification(rec.status==='Completed'?'approval_close':'approval', rec, 'Rework Cost Analysis'); } function rcaReject(id, comment){ const rec=rcaRecs.find(r=>r.id===id); if(!rec) return; if(!(isRole('quality_manager','qa_inspector','qa_qc_engineer','super_admin') && canApproveMod('rca'))){ showToast('You do not have rejection access for Rework Cost.','warn'); return; } if(alreadyActed(rec,'reject')){showToast('Already rejected — action is locked.','error');return;} if(LOCKED_STATUSES.has(rec.status)&&rec.status!=='Rejected'){showToast(`Locked at "${rec.status}".`,'error');return;} rec.status='Rejected'; rec.rejectionComment=comment; rec.rejectionBy=currentUser?.name||''; rec.rejectionAt=new Date().toISOString(); logAction(rec,'reject',comment); rec.lastActionBy=currentUser?.name||''; rec.lastActionAt=new Date().toISOString(); if(!rec.comments)rec.comments=[]; rec.comments.push({author:currentUser?.name||'System',time:nowTime(), text:`🚫 Rejected by ${currentUser?.name||'User'} (${currentUser?.role||''}) at ${nowDateTime()}: ${comment}`}); persist();renderRCAList();updateStats();refreshWorkflowUI();openRCADetail(id); sendEmailNotification('rejection', rec, 'Rework Cost Analysis'); } function resubmitRCA(id){ openRCAEdit(id); } function openRCAIssueMaterial(id){ const note=prompt('Enter material issue note (optional):') || ''; const rec=rcaRecs.find(r=>r.id===id); if(!rec) return; if(!(isRole('store_incharge','super_admin') && (getModuleAccess('rca')==='full' || getModuleAccess('rca')==='approve' || getModuleAccess('rca')==='submit'))){ showToast('You do not have material issue access for Rework Cost.','warn'); return; } if(alreadyActed(rec,'issue')){showToast('Materials already issued — action is locked.','error');return;} rec.status='Material Issued'; rec.issueNote=note; rec.issuedBy=currentUser?.name||'Store In-Charge'; rec.issuedAt=new Date().toISOString(); logAction(rec,'issue',note||null); if(rec.materials) rec.materials.forEach(m=>m.issued=true); if(!rec.comments)rec.comments=[]; rec.comments.push({author:currentUser?.name||'Store',time:nowTime(), text:`📦 Materials issued to site by ${currentUser?.name||'Store In-Charge'} (${currentUser?.role||''}) at ${nowDateTime()}. Note: ${note||'—'}`}); // ── AUTO-COMPLETE after material issue: mark Completed automatically ── rec.status='Completed'; logAction(rec,'complete'); rec.lastActionBy='System (Auto)'; rec.lastActionAt=new Date().toISOString(); rec.comments.push({author:'System',time:nowTime(), text:`⚡ Auto-Completed: Rework Cost Analysis automatically Completed after materials issued. ${nowDateTime()}`}); persist();renderRCAList();updateStats();refreshWorkflowUI();openRCADetail(id); sendEmailNotification('approval_close', rec, 'Rework Cost Analysis — Completed'); showToast('✅ Materials issued & RCA Auto-Completed!','ok'); } function postRCACmt(id){ const rec=rcaRecs.find(r=>r.id===id); if(!rec) return; const inp=document.getElementById('rca-cmt-inp'); const txt=inp?inp.value.trim():''; if(!txt) return; if(!rec.comments)rec.comments=[]; rec.comments.push({author:currentUser?.name||'User',time:nowTime(),text:txt}); persist(); if(inp)inp.value=''; openRCADetail(id); } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════ // ACTIVITY LIST MANAGEMENT (Admin) // ══════════════════════════════════════════════ function populateActivityDropdown(selId, mod){ const sel=document.getElementById(selId);if(!sel)return; const list=activities[mod]||[]; sel.innerHTML=''+list.map(a=>``).join(''); } function renderActivityList(){ const mod=document.getElementById('act-mod-sel').value; const list=activities[mod]||[]; const sa=isRole('super_admin'); document.getElementById('activity-list-container').innerHTML=list.length ? list.map((a,i)=>`
${esc(a)}
${sa?``:''}
`).join('') : '
No activities yet. Add one below.
'; } function addActivity(){ const mod=document.getElementById('act-mod-sel').value; const inp=document.getElementById('new-act-input'); const name=inp.value.trim(); if(!name){alert('Enter an activity name.');return;} if(!activities[mod]) activities[mod]=[]; if(activities[mod].includes(name)){alert('Activity already exists.');return;} activities[mod].push(name);persist();inp.value='';renderActivityList(); } function deleteActivity(mod,idx){ if(!isRole('super_admin')){showToast('Only System Administrator can delete activities.','warn');return;} if(!confirm('Remove this activity from the list?'))return; activities[mod].splice(idx,1);persist();renderActivityList(); } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════ // APPROVAL MODAL // ══════════════════════════════════════════════ function openApprovalModal(id,type){ pendingApprovalId=id;pendingApprovalType=type; let rec; if(type==='wir') rec=wirs.find(x=>x.id===id); else rec=specRecs.find(x=>x.id===id); if(!rec)return; const label=rec.activity||rec.title||rec.id; document.getElementById('approval-record-info').innerHTML=`${esc(rec.id)}
${esc(label)}
${esc(rec.project)}`; document.getElementById('approval-pw-input').value=''; document.getElementById('approval-warning').textContent=''; document.getElementById('approval-modal').style.display='flex'; } function closeApprovalModal(){ document.getElementById('approval-modal').style.display='none'; pendingApprovalId=null;pendingApprovalType=null; } function confirmApproval(){ const pw=document.getElementById('approval-pw-input').value; if(pw!==password){document.getElementById('approval-warning').textContent='Incorrect password.';document.getElementById('approval-pw-input').value='';return;} // Apply approval if(pendingApprovalType==='wir'){ const w=wirs.find(x=>x.id===pendingApprovalId);if(w){w.status='Approved';w.approvedBy='Admin';w.approvedAt=new Date().toISOString();} persist();updateStats();refreshWorkflowUI();closeApprovalModal();openWIRDetail(pendingApprovalId);renderSpecList('wir'); } else { const r=specRecs.find(x=>x.id===pendingApprovalId);if(r){r.status='Approved';r.approvedBy='Admin';r.approvedAt=new Date().toISOString();} persist();updateStats();refreshWorkflowUI();closeApprovalModal();openGenericSpecDetail(pendingApprovalId);renderGenericList(r.mod); } } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════ // PENDING APPROVALS LIST (Admin Panel) // ══════════════════════════════════════════════ function renderPendingApprovals(){ const pendingWIRs=wirs.filter(w=>w.status==='Pending'); const pendingSpecs=specRecs.filter(r=>r.status==='Pending'); const all=[...pendingWIRs.map(w=>({...w,_t:'wir',label:w.activity})),...pendingSpecs.map(r=>({...r,_t:'spec',label:r.title}))]; const el=document.getElementById('pending-approvals-list'); if(!all.length){el.innerHTML='
✅ No records pending approval.
';return;} el.innerHTML=all.map(r=>`
${esc(r.id)} ${esc(r.label)}
${esc(r.project)}
`).join(''); } function adminApproveDirectly(id,type){ if(type==='wir'){const w=wirs.find(x=>x.id===id);if(w){w.status='Approved';w.approvedBy='Admin';w.approvedAt=new Date().toISOString();}} else{const r=specRecs.find(x=>x.id===id);if(r){r.status='Approved';r.approvedBy='Admin';r.approvedAt=new Date().toISOString();}} persist();updateStats();refreshWorkflowUI();renderPendingApprovals(); } function adminRejectDirectly(id,type){ if(type==='wir'){const w=wirs.find(x=>x.id===id);if(w)w.status='Rejected';} else{const r=specRecs.find(x=>x.id===id);if(r)r.status='Rejected';} persist();updateStats();refreshWorkflowUI();renderPendingApprovals(); } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════ // MEMBERS MANAGEMENT (Admin) // ══════════════════════════════════════════════ function renderMembersList(){ const el=document.getElementById('members-list'); if(!el) return; const visibleUsers=(isRole('super_admin') ? getAllUsers().filter(u=>u && u.name && u.id!=='sa') : getAllUsers().filter(u=>u && u.name && u.id!=='sa' && (u.id===currentUser?.id || canManageTargetUser(u) || (u.assignedProjects||[]).some(p=>getAssignedProjects().includes(p)))) ).sort((a,b)=>String(a.name||'').localeCompare(String(b.name||''))); if(!visibleUsers.length){ el.innerHTML='
No team members available in your project scope.
'; return; } el.innerHTML=visibleUsers.map(u=>{ const roleLbl=ROLE_LABELS[u.role]||humanizeRole(u.role||''); const roleCol=ROLE_COLORS[u.role]||'#64748b'; const projs=(u.assignedProjects&&u.assignedProjects.length)?u.assignedProjects.join(', '):'All assigned projects'; const contractor=u.contractor?`🏢 ${esc(u.contractor)}`:''; const canEdit=(u.id!=='sa') && (isRole('super_admin') || (isRole('admin') && canManageTargetUser(u) && u.id!==currentUser?.id)); return `
👤 ${esc(u.name)}
Used in module dropdowns as Team Member / Inspection Member / Created By.
${esc(roleLbl)} ${contractor}
📁 ${esc(projs)}
${canEdit?`
`:''}
`; }).join(''); } function addMember(){ showToast('Team Members are now auto-linked from User Management. Add a user instead.','warn'); } function deleteMember(idx){ showToast('Delete the linked user from User Management if you want to remove this team member.','warn'); } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════ // CONTRACTORS MANAGEMENT (System Administrator only) // ══════════════════════════════════════════════ function renderContractorsList(){ const el=document.getElementById('contractors-list'); if(!el) return; const isSA=isRole('super_admin'); const myP=getAssignedProjects(); // SA sees all; others see only contractors on their projects const visible = isSA ? contractorsList : contractorsList.filter(ct=>(ct.projects||[]).some(p=>myP.includes(p))); // Show/hide add-row const addRow=document.getElementById('contractor-add-row'); if(addRow) addRow.style.display=isSA?'':'none'; // Fill project options in the add form const ncpEl=document.getElementById('new-contractor-projects'); if(ncpEl) ncpEl.innerHTML=projects.map(p=>``).join(''); if(!visible.length){ el.innerHTML=`
${ isSA?'No contractors yet. Add one below.':'No contractors are assigned to your projects.' }
`; return; } el.innerHTML=visible.map(ct=>{ const gi = contractorsList.indexOf(ct); const name = ct.name||ct; const pa = ct.projects||[]; const ctUsers = getAllUsers().filter(u=>u.contractor===name); const projChips = pa.length ? pa.map(p=>`${esc(p)}`).join('') : `⚠ Not assigned to any project`; return `
🏢 ${esc(name)} 👤 ${ctUsers.length} staff
${isSA ?`
` :'🔒'}
Projects: ${projChips}
${ctUsers.length?`
Staff: ${ctUsers.slice(0,5).map(u=>esc(u.name)).join(', ')}${ctUsers.length>5?' +'+(ctUsers.length-5)+' more':''}
`:''}
`; }).join(''); } function addContractor(){ if(!isRole('super_admin')){showToast('Only System Administrator can add contractors.','warn');return;} const inp=document.getElementById('new-contractor-input'); const name=(inp?.value||'').trim(); if(!name){showToast('Enter a contractor name.','warn');return;} if(contractorsList.some(ct=>(ct.name||ct)===name)){showToast('Contractor already exists.','warn');return;} const ps=document.getElementById('new-contractor-projects'); const projs=ps?Array.from(ps.selectedOptions).map(o=>o.value):[]; if(!projs.length){ showToast('Select at least one project to assign this contractor.','warn'); if(ps){ps.style.outline='2px solid #dc2626';setTimeout(()=>ps.style.outline='',3000);} return; } contractorsList.push({name,projects:projs}); persist(); if(inp) inp.value=''; if(ps) Array.from(ps.options).forEach(o=>o.selected=false); renderContractorsList(); showToast(`Contractor "${name}" added to ${projs.length} project(s).`,'ok'); } function editContractor(gi){ if(!isRole('super_admin')){showToast('Only System Administrator can edit contractors.','warn');return;} const ct=contractorsList[gi]; if(!ct) return; const curName=ct.name||ct, curProjs=ct.projects||[]; const ctUsers=getAllUsers().filter(u=>u.contractor===curName); document.getElementById('sm-modal-title').textContent='✏️ Edit Contractor'; document.getElementById('sm-modal-body').innerHTML=`
Hold Ctrl/Cmd to select multiple. Contractor only appears in forms for assigned projects.
${ctUsers.length?`
👤 ${ctUsers.length} registered staff: ${ctUsers.map(u=>esc(u.name)).join(', ')}
`:''}
`; _smOnSave=function(){ const newName=(document.getElementById('sm-ct-name').value||'').trim(); if(!newName){showToast('Name cannot be empty.','warn');return false;} const clash=contractorsList.findIndex((ct2,i2)=>(ct2.name||ct2)===newName&&i2!==gi); if(clash!==-1){showToast('Contractor name already exists.','warn');return false;} const ps2=document.getElementById('sm-ct-projects'); const newProjs=ps2?Array.from(ps2.selectedOptions).map(o=>o.value):[]; if(!newProjs.length){showToast('Assign to at least one project.','warn');return false;} if(newName!==curName) getAllUsers().forEach(u=>{if(u.contractor===curName) u.contractor=newName;}); contractorsList[gi]={name:newName,projects:newProjs}; persist(); renderContractorsList(); showToast(`Contractor updated: "${newName}"`,'ok'); return true; }; document.getElementById('sm-modal').style.display='flex'; } function deleteContractor(gi){ if(!isRole('super_admin')){showToast('Only System Administrator can delete contractors.','warn');return;} const name=(contractorsList[gi]?.name)||contractorsList[gi]||'this contractor'; if(!confirm(`Remove "${name}"? This cannot be undone.`)) return; contractorsList.splice(gi,1); persist(); renderContractorsList(); showToast('Contractor removed.','ok'); } function initCountryCityAdmin(){ const sel=document.getElementById('admin-country-sel');if(!sel)return; const countries=Object.keys(CITIES_BY_COUNTRY).sort(); sel.innerHTML=''+countries.map(c=>``).join(''); // Country list (for adding/deleting) const cl=document.getElementById('country-list'); if(cl){cl.innerHTML=countries.map((c,i)=>`
🌍 ${esc(c)}
`).join('')||'
No countries.
';} document.getElementById('city-mgmt-section').style.display='none'; } function renderCityList(){ const country=document.getElementById('admin-country-sel')?.value; const sec=document.getElementById('city-mgmt-section'); if(!country){if(sec)sec.style.display='none';return;} if(sec)sec.style.display=''; const lbl=document.getElementById('city-country-label');if(lbl)lbl.textContent=country; const cities=CITIES_BY_COUNTRY[country]||[]; const cl=document.getElementById('city-list'); if(cl){cl.innerHTML=cities.map((c,i)=>`
🏙️ ${esc(c)}
`).join('')||'
No cities.
';} } function addCountry(){ if(!isRole('super_admin')){alert('Only System Administrator can add countries.');return;} const inp=document.getElementById('new-country-input');const name=(inp?.value||'').trim(); if(!name)return; if(CITIES_BY_COUNTRY[name]){alert('Country already exists.');return;} CITIES_BY_COUNTRY[name]=[];inp.value='';initCountryCityAdmin(); // Persist to localStorage secureStoreRaw('cims_cities',JSON.stringify(CITIES_BY_COUNTRY)); } function deleteCountry(country){ if(!isRole('super_admin')){alert('Only System Administrator can delete countries.');return;} if(!confirm(`Delete country "${country}" and all its cities?`))return; delete CITIES_BY_COUNTRY[country]; secureStoreRaw('cims_cities',JSON.stringify(CITIES_BY_COUNTRY)); initCountryCityAdmin(); } function addCity(){ if(!isRole('super_admin')){alert('Only System Administrator can add cities.');return;} const country=document.getElementById('admin-country-sel')?.value; if(!country){alert('Select a country first.');return;} const inp=document.getElementById('new-city-input');const name=(inp?.value||'').trim(); if(!name)return; if(!CITIES_BY_COUNTRY[country])CITIES_BY_COUNTRY[country]=[]; if(CITIES_BY_COUNTRY[country].includes(name)){alert('City already exists.');return;} CITIES_BY_COUNTRY[country].push(name);inp.value=''; secureStoreRaw('cims_cities',JSON.stringify(CITIES_BY_COUNTRY)); renderCityList(); } function deleteCity(country, city){ if(!isRole('super_admin')){alert('Only System Administrator can delete cities.');return;} if(!confirm(`Delete city "${city}"?`))return; CITIES_BY_COUNTRY[country]=(CITIES_BY_COUNTRY[country]||[]).filter(c=>c!==city); secureStoreRaw('cims_cities',JSON.stringify(CITIES_BY_COUNTRY)); renderCityList(); } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════ // CHECKPOINTS PER PROJECT & ACTIVITY (Admin) // ══════════════════════════════════════════════ // Key format: "PROJECT::mod::activity" (per-project) // "mod::activity" (global fallback) // Quality Manager: scoped to their assignedProjects only // ══════════════════════════════════════════════ // Helper: get project activities (per-project first, then global fallback) function getProjActivities(proj, mod){ if(proj && projectActivities[proj] && projectActivities[proj][mod]) return projectActivities[proj][mod]; return activities[mod]||[]; } // Helper: can current user edit checkpoints for this project? function canEditProjectChk(proj){ if(!proj) return false; if(isRole('super_admin')) return true; if(isRole('admin','quality_manager')){ if(!currentUser.assignedProjects||!currentUser.assignedProjects.length) return true; // unscoped admin/QM return currentUser.assignedProjects.includes(proj); } return false; } // Populate project selector in checkpoint panel function populateChkProjSelector(){ const sel=document.getElementById('chk-proj-sel'); if(!sel) return; // System Administrator sees all; Admin / QM see only assigned projects let visibleProjects=projects; if(isRole('admin','quality_manager') && currentUser.assignedProjects && currentUser.assignedProjects.length){ visibleProjects=projects.filter(p=>currentUser.assignedProjects.includes(p)); } sel.innerHTML=''+ visibleProjects.map(p=>``).join(''); // Update note const note=document.getElementById('chk-section-note'); if(note){ if(isRole('admin','quality_manager')){ const scopeLbl=isRole('admin')?'Admin Scope':'QM Scope'; const ps=currentUser.assignedProjects&¤tUser.assignedProjects.length?currentUser.assignedProjects.join(', '):'All assigned projects'; note.innerHTML=`⚠️ ${scopeLbl}: You can add, edit and delete project checklists/checkpoints only for: ${ps}`; } else { note.textContent='Each project has its own WIR checklists. Select project → module → activity to manage.'; } } } function onChkProjectChange(){ const proj=document.getElementById('chk-proj-sel').value; const mod=document.getElementById('chk-mod-sel').value; // Show/hide project activity panel const panel=document.getElementById('proj-activity-panel'); if(panel) panel.style.display=proj?'block':'none'; const label=document.getElementById('proj-act-project-label'); if(label) label.textContent=proj?`— ${proj}`:''; renderCheckpointActivities(); renderProjectActivityList(); } function renderCheckpointActivities(){ const proj=document.getElementById('chk-proj-sel')?.value||''; const mod=document.getElementById('chk-mod-sel')?.value||'wir'; const list=getProjActivities(proj, mod); const sel=document.getElementById('chk-act-sel'); if(!sel) return; sel.innerHTML=''+list.map(a=>``).join(''); const container=document.getElementById('checkpoint-list-container'); if(container){ if(!proj) container.innerHTML='
Select a project first.
'; else container.innerHTML='
Select an activity above.
'; } const addRow=document.getElementById('chk-add-row'); if(addRow) addRow.style.display='none'; } function renderCheckpointList(){ const proj=document.getElementById('chk-proj-sel')?.value||''; const mod=document.getElementById('chk-mod-sel')?.value||'wir'; const act=document.getElementById('chk-act-sel')?.value||''; const container=document.getElementById('checkpoint-list-container'); const addRow=document.getElementById('chk-add-row'); if(!act){if(container)container.innerHTML='';if(addRow)addRow.style.display='none';return;} if(!proj){if(container)container.innerHTML='
⚠️ Select a project to manage project-specific checkpoints.
'; if(addRow)addRow.style.display='none'; return;} const canEdit=canEditProjectChk(proj); // Key: per-project key first, then global fallback const projKey=`${proj}::${mod}::${act}`; const globalKey=`${mod}::${act}`; const projList=checkpointsDB[projKey]||null; const globalList=checkpointsDB[globalKey]||null; const cfg=MOD_CFG[mod]; const defaults=mod==='wir'?DEFAULT_WIR_CHECKS:mod==='imir'?[]:cfg?cfg.defaultChecks:[]; // Priority: project-specific > global > defaults const list=projList||globalList||defaults; const isProjectCustom=!!projList; const isGlobalCustom=!projList&&!!globalList; let sourceNote=''; if(isProjectCustom) sourceNote=`
✅ Project-specific checkpoints for: ${esc(proj)}
`; else if(isGlobalCustom) sourceNote=`
ℹ️ Using global checkpoints. Add below to create project-specific ones.
`; else sourceNote=`
⚠️ Using module defaults. Add below to set project-specific checkpoints.
`; if(container) container.innerHTML= sourceNote+ (list.length ? list.map((c,i)=>`
✓ ${esc(c)} ${(canEdit&&isProjectCustom)?``:''}
`).join('') : '
No checkpoints. Add below.
'); if(addRow) addRow.style.display=canEdit?'':'none'; } function addCheckpoint(){ const proj=document.getElementById('chk-proj-sel')?.value||''; const mod=document.getElementById('chk-mod-sel')?.value||'wir'; const act=document.getElementById('chk-act-sel')?.value||''; const inp=document.getElementById('new-chk-input'); const name=inp.value.trim(); if(!proj){alert('Select a project first.');return;} if(!act){alert('Select an activity first.');return;} if(!name){alert('Enter a checkpoint description.');return;} if(!canEditProjectChk(proj)){alert('You do not have permission to edit checkpoints for this project.');return;} const key=`${proj}::${mod}::${act}`; if(!checkpointsDB[key])checkpointsDB[key]=[]; if(checkpointsDB[key].includes(name)){alert('Checkpoint already exists.');return;} checkpointsDB[key].push(name); persist();inp.value='';renderCheckpointList(); } function editCheckpoint(proj,mod,act,idx){ if(!canEditProjectChk(proj)){alert('No permission for this project.');return;} const key=`${proj}::${mod}::${act}`; if(!checkpointsDB[key] || !checkpointsDB[key][idx]) return; const cur=checkpointsDB[key][idx]; const next=(prompt('Edit checkpoint', cur)||'').trim(); if(!next || next===cur) return; if(checkpointsDB[key].includes(next)){alert('Checkpoint already exists.');return;} checkpointsDB[key][idx]=next; persist();renderCheckpointList(); } function deleteCheckpoint(proj,mod,act,idx){ if(!canEditProjectChk(proj)){alert('No permission for this project.');return;} const key=`${proj}::${mod}::${act}`; if(!checkpointsDB[key])return; if(!confirm('Delete this checkpoint?'))return; checkpointsDB[key].splice(idx,1); if(!checkpointsDB[key].length)delete checkpointsDB[key]; persist();renderCheckpointList(); } // ── Per-project activity management ── function renderProjectActivityList(){ const proj=document.getElementById('chk-proj-sel')?.value||''; const mod=document.getElementById('chk-mod-sel')?.value||'wir'; const el=document.getElementById('proj-activity-list'); if(!el||!proj) return; const canEdit=canEditProjectChk(proj); const list=getProjActivities(proj, mod); const isProjectSpecific=!!(projectActivities[proj]&&projectActivities[proj][mod]&&projectActivities[proj][mod].length); el.innerHTML=(isProjectSpecific?'':`
Showing global activities. Add below to create project-specific list.
`)+ (list.length ? list.map((a,i)=>`
📌 ${esc(a)} ${(canEdit&&isProjectSpecific)?``:''}
`).join('') : '
No activities. Add below.
'); } function addProjectActivity(){ const proj=document.getElementById('chk-proj-sel')?.value||''; const mod=document.getElementById('chk-mod-sel')?.value||'wir'; const inp=document.getElementById('new-proj-act-input'); const name=inp.value.trim(); if(!proj){alert('Select a project first.');return;} if(!name){alert('Enter an activity name.');return;} if(!canEditProjectChk(proj)){alert('No permission for this project.');return;} if(!projectActivities[proj])projectActivities[proj]={}; if(!projectActivities[proj][mod])projectActivities[proj][mod]=[]; if(projectActivities[proj][mod].includes(name)){alert('Activity already exists for this project.');return;} projectActivities[proj][mod].push(name); persist();inp.value=''; renderProjectActivityList(); renderCheckpointActivities(); // Refresh WIR activity dropdown if open if(document.getElementById('new-spec-wir-overlay')?.classList.contains('open')) populateWIRActivities(); } function editProjectActivity(proj,mod,idx){ if(!canEditProjectChk(proj)){alert('No permission.');return;} if(!(projectActivities[proj]&&projectActivities[proj][mod]&&projectActivities[proj][mod][idx])) return; const cur=projectActivities[proj][mod][idx]; const next=(prompt('Edit project activity', cur)||'').trim(); if(!next || next===cur) return; if(projectActivities[proj][mod].includes(next)){alert('Activity already exists for this project.');return;} projectActivities[proj][mod][idx]=next; persist(); renderProjectActivityList(); renderCheckpointActivities(); if(document.getElementById('new-spec-wir-overlay')?.classList.contains('open')) populateWIRActivities(); } function deleteProjectActivity(proj,mod,idx){ if(!canEditProjectChk(proj)){alert('No permission.');return;} if(!confirm('Remove this activity from the project?'))return; if(projectActivities[proj]&&projectActivities[proj][mod]){ projectActivities[proj][mod].splice(idx,1); if(!projectActivities[proj][mod].length)delete projectActivities[proj][mod]; persist(); renderProjectActivityList(); renderCheckpointActivities(); } } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════ // ACTIVITY CHANGE HANDLERS (Form preview) // ══════════════════════════════════════════════ // Populate WIR activity dropdown with project-specific activities function populateWIRActivities(){ const proj=document.getElementById('wf-project')?.value||''; const sel=document.getElementById('wf-activity'); if(!sel)return; const list=getProjActivities(proj,'wir'); const curVal=sel.value; sel.innerHTML=''+ list.map(a=>``).join(''); if(curVal)sel.value=curVal; } function onWIRActivityChange(){ wirLoadBOQSpec(); // Load from BOQ Spec Library + auto-fill billing wirBilAutoFill(); const act=document.getElementById('wf-activity').value; const proj=document.getElementById('wf-project')?.value||''; const el=document.getElementById('wf-checkpoints-preview'); if(!act){el.textContent='Select an activity above to load its checkpoints automatically.';toggleWIRConcreteGrade();return;} // Per-project key first, then global, then default const projKey=`${proj}::wir::${act}`; const globalKey='wir::'+act; const list=checkpointsDB[projKey]||checkpointsDB[globalKey]||DEFAULT_WIR_CHECKS; el.innerHTML=''+list.length+' CHECKPOINTS WILL LOAD:
'+ list.map(c=>`✓ ${esc(c)}`).join(''); toggleWIRConcreteGrade(); } function onCCRConcRegChange(){ const crId = document.getElementById('ccrf-concreg-ref')?.value||''; const hintEl = document.getElementById('ccrf-cr-hint'); const dateSrcEl = document.getElementById('ccrf-date-src'); const volSrcEl = document.getElementById('ccrf-vol-src'); const sdPanel = document.getElementById('ccrf-sameday-panel'); if(!crId){ if(dateSrcEl) dateSrcEl.style.display='none'; if(volSrcEl) volSrcEl.style.display='none'; if(sdPanel) sdPanel.style.display='none'; if(hintEl) hintEl.innerHTML='Select the structure from Concrete Register to auto-fill its date, volume & grade.'; return; } const cr = concRegRecs.find(r=>r.id===crId); if(!cr) return; const gradeLabel = (cr.grade||'').split(' — ')[0]; // ── 1. Pour Date — from THIS CR record ────────────── const dateEl = document.getElementById('ccrf-date'); if(dateEl && cr.date){ dateEl.value = cr.date; if(dateSrcEl) dateSrcEl.style.display='inline'; autoConcreteDates(); } // ── 2. Supplier — from THIS CR record ─────────────── const supEl = document.getElementById('ccrf-supplier'); if(supEl && cr.supplier){ Array.from(supEl.options).forEach(o=>{ if(o.value===cr.supplier||o.text===cr.supplier) supEl.value=o.value; }); } // ── 3. Volume — THIS structure's own volume only ──── // IS 456:2000: sampling is per placement/element, NOT cumulative per day // Each structure (Raft, Column, Wall…) = its own CR = its own CCR const volEl = document.getElementById('ccrf-volume'); if(volEl){ volEl.value = cr.volume||''; if(volSrcEl) volSrcEl.style.display='inline'; autoConcreteCubes(); } // ── 4. Required Strength — from THIS CR grade ─────── const match = (cr.grade||'').match(/(\d+)\s*N\/mm/); if(match){ const reqEl = document.getElementById('ccrf-req'); if(reqEl) reqEl.value = match[1]; autoConcreteStatus(); } // ── 5. Linked hint ─────────────────────────────────── if(hintEl){ const _alreadyLinked = (simpleRecs.conccube||[]).some(c=>c.concRegId===crId); hintEl.innerHTML = `🔗 Linked: ${esc(cr.id)}`+ `  ·  ${esc(gradeLabel)}`+ `  ·  ${esc(cr.structure||'—')}`+ `  ·  ${cr.date||'—'}`+ `  ·  ${cr.volume||'—'} m³`+ (_alreadyLinked ? ` ⚠ A cube test is already linked to this CR` : ''); } // ── 6. Same-day same-grade reference panel ─────────── // Show OTHER structures poured on the same day (for reference/awareness) // Each still gets its OWN CCR — this is just informational if(sdPanel){ const others = concRegRecs.filter(r=> r.id !== crId && r.project === cr.project && r.date === cr.date && (r.grade||'').split(' — ')[0] === gradeLabel ); if(others.length){ const statusColors={Poured:'#0ea5e9',Curing:'#f59e0b',Completed:'#22c55e','On Hold':'#b45309',Rejected:'#ef4444'}; const totalDayVol = [cr,...others].reduce((s,r)=>s+(parseFloat(r.volume)||0),0); const rows = others.map(r=>{ const col = statusColors[r.status]||'#0ea5e9'; const hasCCR = (simpleRecs.conccube||[]).some(c=>c.concRegId===r.id); return `
${esc(r.id)} ${esc(r.structure||'—')} ${r.volume||'—'} m³ ${esc(r.location||'—')}${r.gridNo?' / '+esc(r.gridNo):''} ${r.status} ${hasCCR ? `🧪 CCR Linked` : `⚠ No CCR`}
`; }).join(''); sdPanel.style.display='block'; sdPanel.innerHTML = `
📅 Other Structures Poured on Same Day with ${esc(gradeLabel)} (for reference — each needs its own CCR)
${rows}
Total ${esc(gradeLabel)} poured on ${cr.date||'—'}: ${totalDayVol.toFixed(1)} m³ (${others.length+1} structures combined — each tested separately per IS 456:2000)
`; } else { sdPanel.style.display='none'; } } } function toggleWIRConcreteGrade(){ const act=(document.getElementById('wf-activity')?.value||'').toLowerCase(); const mat=(document.getElementById('wf-material')?.value||'').toLowerCase(); const grp=document.getElementById('wf-concrete-grade-group'); if(!grp)return; const show=act.includes('concrete')||mat==='concrete'; grp.style.display=show?'':'none'; if(!show){const sel=document.getElementById('wf-concrete-grade');if(sel)sel.value='';} } function onSpecActivityChange(){ const act=document.getElementById('sf-title').value; const el=document.getElementById('sf-checkpoints-preview'); if(!act){el.textContent='Select an activity above to load its checkpoints automatically.';return;} const key=currentSpecMod+'::'+act; const cfg=MOD_CFG[currentSpecMod]; const list=checkpointsDB[key]||(cfg?cfg.defaultChecks:[]); el.innerHTML=''+list.length+' CHECKPOINTS WILL LOAD:
'+ list.map(c=>`✓ ${esc(c)}`).join(''); } function onIMIRMatTypeChange(){ const act=document.getElementById('mf-mattype').value; const el=document.getElementById('mf-checkpoints-preview'); if(!act){el.textContent='Select a material type above to load its checkpoints.';return;} const key='imir::'+act; const list=checkpointsDB[key]||[]; if(!list.length){el.textContent='No checkpoints defined for this material type. Admin can add them.';return;} el.innerHTML=''+list.length+' CHECKPOINTS WILL LOAD:
'+ list.map(c=>`✓ ${esc(c)}`).join(''); } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════ // PHOTO ATTACHMENTS // ══════════════════════════════════════════════ const _photoStore={wf:[],mf:[],'f-before':[],'f-after':[]}; function fileIcon(name){ const ext=(name||'').split('.').pop().toLowerCase(); if(['jpg','jpeg','png'].includes(ext)) return null; // image — use img tag if(ext==='pdf') return {icon:'📄',color:'#e84040',label:'PDF'}; if(['doc','docx'].includes(ext)) return {icon:'📝',color:'#4a8cf0',label:'DOCX'}; if(['xls','xlsx'].includes(ext)) return {icon:'📊',color:'#28b870',label:'XLSX'}; if(ext==='zip') return {icon:'🗜️',color:'#f59e0b',label:'ZIP'}; if(ext==='rar') return {icon:'🗜️',color:'#d97706',label:'RAR'}; if(ext==='7z') return {icon:'🗜️',color:'#b45309',label:'7Z'}; return {icon:'📎',color:'#8090b0',label:ext.toUpperCase()}; } function fileThumbHtml(p,removeCall){ const fi=fileIcon(p.name); const inner=fi ? `
${fi.icon} ${fi.label}
` : ``; return `
${inner}
${p.name}
${removeCall?``:''}
`; } function handlePhotoAttach(prefix){ const inputId=prefix.endsWith('-input')?prefix:prefix+'-photo-input'; const input=document.getElementById(inputId)||document.getElementById(prefix+'-input'); if(!input)return; if(!_photoStore[prefix]) _photoStore[prefix]=[]; const previewId=prefix+'-previews'; const preview=document.getElementById(previewId)||document.getElementById(prefix+'-photo-previews'); if(!preview)return; const MAX_FILES=5; const MAX_SIZE=5*1024*1024; const existing=(_photoStore[prefix]||[]).filter(Boolean).length; const files=Array.from(input.files); let added=0; files.forEach((file,fi)=>{ if(existing+added>=MAX_FILES){alert('Maximum 5 attachments allowed per submission.');return;} if(file.size>MAX_SIZE){alert(`"${file.name}" exceeds 5MB limit and was skipped.`);return;} const idx=existing+added; added++; const reader=new FileReader(); reader.onload=e=>{ while(_photoStore[prefix].length<=idx) _photoStore[prefix].push(null); _photoStore[prefix][idx]={name:file.name,data:e.target.result,type:file.type}; renderAttachPreview(prefix); }; reader.readAsDataURL(file); }); input.value=''; } function removeAttach(prefix,idx){ _photoStore[prefix].splice(idx,1); renderAttachPreview(prefix); } function renderAttachPreview(prefix){ const preview=document.getElementById(prefix+'-previews')||document.getElementById(prefix+'-photo-previews'); if(!preview)return; const items=(_photoStore[prefix]||[]).filter(Boolean); const thumbs=items.map((p,i)=>fileThumbHtml(p,`removeAttach('${prefix}',${i})`)).join(''); const hint=`
📎 JPG · PNG · PDF · DOC · XLS · ZIP · RAR · 7Z  |  Max 5 files · 5 MB each
`; preview.innerHTML=thumbs+(items.length<5?hint:''); } function renderPhotoPreview(prefix){renderAttachPreview(prefix);} function clearAttach(prefix){ _photoStore[prefix]=[]; const p=document.getElementById(prefix+'-photo-previews');if(p)p.innerHTML=''; const i=document.getElementById(prefix+'-photo-input');if(i)i.value=''; } function viewFileFull(data,name,type){ const isImg=type&&type.startsWith('image')||/\.(jpg|jpeg|png)$/i.test(name||''); const lb=document.createElement('div'); lb.style.cssText='position:fixed;inset:0;background:#000d;z-index:900;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:16px;'; if(isImg){ lb.innerHTML=`
${name}
`; } else { lb.innerHTML=`
${fileIcon(name)?.icon||'📎'}
${name}
⬇ Download
`; } lb.onclick=e=>{if(e.target===lb)lb.remove();}; document.body.appendChild(lb); } function viewPhotoLightbox(data,name){viewFileFull(data,name,'image');} function buildPhotoRow(photoData,addFn){ const thumbs=(photoData||[]).filter(Boolean).map((p,i)=>fileThumbHtml(p,null)).join(''); return `
${thumbs}${addFn?`
＋
`:''}
`; } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════ // ══════════════════════════════════════════════ // REJECTION MODAL // ══════════════════════════════════════════════ let rejectContext = null; // {type, id, newStatus, onConfirm} let rejectEvidenceFiles = []; function openRejectModal(ctx){ rejectContext=ctx; rejectEvidenceFiles=[]; document.getElementById('reject-comment').value=''; document.getElementById('reject-evidence-previews').innerHTML=''; document.getElementById('reject-modal').classList.add('open'); } function closeRejectModal(){ document.getElementById('reject-modal').classList.remove('open'); rejectContext=null;rejectEvidenceFiles=[]; } function handleRejectEvidence(){ const inp=document.getElementById('reject-evidence-input'); const prev=document.getElementById('reject-evidence-previews'); Array.from(inp.files).forEach(f=>{ rejectEvidenceFiles.push(f.name); const sp=document.createElement('span'); sp.style.cssText='font-size:10px;background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--red);border-radius:4px;padding:2px 7px;color:var(--red);'; sp.textContent='📎 '+f.name; prev.appendChild(sp); }); inp.value=''; } function confirmReject(){ const comment=(document.getElementById('reject-comment').value||'').trim(); if(!comment){alert('Rejection comment is required. Please describe the reason.');return;} if(rejectContext&&rejectContext.onConfirm){ rejectContext.onConfirm(comment, rejectEvidenceFiles); } closeRejectModal(); } // ── Workflow action button builder ── function buildWFButtons(wfKey, rec, reloadFn){ // ── Project guard: non-SA users can only act on records in their assigned projects ── if(!isRole('super_admin') && rec.project && !getAssignedProjects().includes(rec.project)){ return `
🔒 You are not assigned to project: ${esc(rec.project)}
