`; } // LOCKED: terminal state (not Rejected) if(LOCKED_STATUSES.has(rec.status) && rec.status!=='Rejected'){ return lockedNotice(rec.status, (rec.status.toLowerCase().includes('approv')||rec.status.toLowerCase().includes('accept')||rec.status==='Fully Complete')?'#059669':'#C8972A') + actionStamp(rec,'approve','#22c55e') + actionStamp(rec,'close','#C8972A'); } // REJECTED: show resubmit banner if eligible if(rec.status==='Rejected'){ const canResub = canCurrentUserResubmitRecord(rec,wfKey); if(canResub){ const editBtn = wfKey==='wir' ? `` : (wfKey==='imir' ? `` : ((wfKey==='issue') ? `` : ``)); return `
🔄 Record Rejected — Correction Required
The responsible submitter can edit the rejected fields and then resubmit for a fresh approval cycle. ${rec.rejectionComment?`
Rejection reason: ${esc(rec.rejectionComment)}`:''}
${editBtn}
`; } return `
🚫 Rejected — visible to assigned project users and awaiting submitter correction.
`; } // Active workflow const wfMap = WF_TRANSITIONS[wfKey]||{}; const transitions = wfMap[rec.status]||[]; if(!transitions.length) return `
Status: ${rec.status} — no actions available.
`; let btns=''; transitions.forEach(t=>{ const allowed=t.role||[]; const roleAllowed = currentUser && (allowed.includes(currentUser.role) || allowed.includes('*')); if(!roleAllowed) return; // Check per-user module access: if transition is an approval step, verify approve permission const isApprovalStep = t.ns && (t.ns.toLowerCase().includes('approv')||t.ns.toLowerCase().includes('accept')||t.ns.toLowerCase().includes('complete')); if(isApprovalStep && !canApproveMod(wfKey)) return; const canAct = true; // role check passed + module access checked above if(!canAct) return; const isReject=!!t.reject; const actionType=isReject?'reject':(t.ns.toLowerCase().includes('approv')||t.ns.toLowerCase().includes('accept'))?'approve':'close'; // One-time lock — show stamp instead of button if already acted if(alreadyActed(rec, actionType)){ btns+=actionStamp(rec, actionType, isReject?'#ef4444':'#22c55e'); return; } const col=isReject?'var(--red)':'var(--green)'; const bg=isReject?'var(--surface)':'#0a2a18'; btns+=``; }); if(!btns) return `
Status: ${rec.status} — waiting for ${getNextRoleLabel(wfKey,rec.status)}
`; return btns; } function getNextRoleLabel(wfKey,status){ const wfMap=WF_TRANSITIONS[wfKey]||{}; const tr=wfMap[status]||[]; if(!tr.length)return 'no further action'; const roles=[...new Set(tr.flatMap(t=>t.role||[]))]; return roles.map(r=>ROLE_LABELS[r]||r).join(' / '); } function resubmitWFRecord(wfKey, id){ let rec=null; if(wfKey==='wir') rec=wirs.find(x=>x.id===id); else if(wfKey==='imir') rec=imirs.find(x=>x.id===id); else { for(const m of Object.keys(simpleRecs)){ rec=simpleRecs[m].find(x=>x.id===id); if(rec){wfKey=m;break;} } } if(!rec||rec.status!=='Rejected'){showToast('Only rejected records can be resubmitted.','error');return;} if(!canCurrentUserResubmitRecord(rec,wfKey)){showToast('Only the responsible submitter can resubmit this rejected record.','warn');return;} rec.status='Pending'; rec.rejectionComment=null;rec.rejectionBy=null;rec.rejectionAt=null; if(rec.actionLog) rec.actionLog=rec.actionLog.filter(a=>!['approve','reject','close'].includes(a.type)); logAction(rec,'resubmit'); if(!rec.comments)rec.comments=[]; rec.comments.push({author:currentUser?.name||'System',time:nowTime(), text:`🔄 Resubmitted by ${currentUser?.name||'User'} (${currentUser?.role||''}) at ${nowDateTime()} — fresh approval cycle.`}); persist();updateStats();refreshWorkflowUI(); if(wfKey==='wir'){renderSpecList('wir');openWIRDetail(id);} else if(wfKey==='imir'){renderSpecList('imir');openIMIRDetail(id);} else{renderSimpleList(wfKey);openSimpleDetail(wfKey,id);} showToast('Record resubmitted for approval.','success'); } function applyWFAction(wfKey, id, newStatus, rejectComment, evidence){ let rec=null; if(wfKey==='wir') rec=wirs.find(x=>x.id===id); else if(wfKey==='imir') rec=imirs.find(x=>x.id===id); else if(wfKey==='rfi') rec=simpleRecs.rfi.find(x=>x.id===id); else if(wfKey==='mockup_quality') rec=simpleRecs.mockup_quality.find(x=>x.id===id); else if(wfKey==='mockup_safety') rec=simpleRecs.mockup_safety.find(x=>x.id===id); else if(wfKey==='tds') rec=simpleRecs.tds.find(x=>x.id===id); else if(['weld','excav','masonry','waterproof','painting','mep'].includes(wfKey)) rec=specRecs.find(x=>x.id===id&&x.mod===wfKey); if(!rec) return; // Determine action type const actionType = rejectComment?'reject': (newStatus.toLowerCase().includes('approv')||newStatus.toLowerCase().includes('accept'))?'approve': (newStatus.toLowerCase().includes('close')||newStatus.toLowerCase().includes('complete'))?'close':'update'; // One-time lock check if(alreadyActed(rec, actionType)){ showToast(`This record has already been ${actionType}d — action is locked.`,'error'); return; } if(LOCKED_STATUSES.has(rec.status) && rec.status!=='Rejected'){ showToast(`Record is locked at status "${rec.status}".`,'error'); return; } rec.status=newStatus; logAction(rec, actionType, rejectComment||null); rec.lastActionBy=currentUser?currentUser.name:''; rec.lastActionRole=currentUser?currentUser.role:''; rec.lastActionAt=new Date().toISOString(); if(rejectComment){ rec.rejectionComment=rejectComment; rec.rejectionBy=currentUser?currentUser.name:''; rec.rejectionAt=new Date().toISOString(); rec.rejectionEvidence=evidence||[]; } if(!rec.comments)rec.comments=[]; const msg=rejectComment ?`🚫 Rejected by ${currentUser?.name||'User'} (${currentUser?.role||''}): ${rejectComment}` :`✅ Status → "${newStatus}" by ${currentUser?.name||'User'} (${currentUser?.role||''}) at ${nowDateTime()}`; rec.comments.push({author:currentUser?.name||'System',time:nowTime(),text:msg}); persist();updateStats();refreshWorkflowUI(); const actionEmailType=rejectComment?'rejection':(newStatus.toLowerCase().includes('closed')||newStatus.toLowerCase().includes('client')||newStatus==='Fully Complete')?'approval_close':'approval'; sendEmailNotification(actionEmailType, rec, wfKey); // ── Auto "Fully Complete" toast when Client/Consultant gives final approval ── if(newStatus==='Fully Complete' && !rejectComment){ showToast(`✅ Activity Fully Complete — all approvals obtained!`,'ok'); } // Re-open detail if(wfKey==='wir'){renderSpecList('wir');openWIRDetail(id);} else if(wfKey==='imir'){renderSpecList('imir');openIMIRDetail(id);} else if(wfKey==='rfi'){renderSimpleList('rfi');openSimpleDetail('rfi',id);} else if(wfKey==='mockup_quality'){renderSimpleList('mockup_quality');openSimpleDetail('mockup_quality',id);} else if(wfKey==='mockup_safety'){renderSimpleList('mockup_safety');openSimpleDetail('mockup_safety',id);} else if(wfKey==='tds'){renderSimpleList('tds');openSimpleDetail('tds',id);} else if(wfKey==='safetyobs'){renderSimpleList('safetyobs');openSimpleDetail('safetyobs',id);} else if(wfKey==='workpermit'){renderSimpleList('workpermit');openSimpleDetail('workpermit',id);} else if(['weld','excav','masonry','waterproof','painting','mep'].includes(wfKey)){ const _specRec=specRecs.find(x=>x.id===id);if(_specRec){_specRec.status=rec.status;persist();} renderGenericList(wfKey);openGenericSpecDetail(id); } } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════ // SIMPLE MODULES (Good Practices, Training, Mockup, TDS, Skill Eval, Concrete Cube, RFI) // ══════════════════════════════════════════════ function genSimpleId(mod){ const cfg=SIMPLE_CFG[mod]; const recs=simpleRecs[mod]; const n=(recs.length+1).toString().padStart(4,'0'); return cfg.prefix+'-'+n; } function openSimpleNew(mod){ const prefMap={goodpractice:'gpf',training:'trnf',mockup_quality:'mqf',mockup_safety:'msf',tds:'tdsf',skilleval:'sklf',conccube:'ccrf',rfi:'rfif',safetyobs:'sobsf',safetyinsp:'sif',auditcheck:'acf',envinsp:'eif',workpermit:'wpf'}; const pre=prefMap[mod]; if(!pre) return; // ── Project selector: only assigned projects ── const visProjs = getAssignedProjects(); const sel=document.getElementById(pre+'-project'); if(sel){ sel.innerHTML=visProjs.map(p=>``).join(''); // auto-select active project if valid if(activeProject!=='ALL' && visProjs.includes(activeProject)) sel.value=activeProject; } // Determine project context for member dropdowns const proj = sel ? sel.value : (visProjs[0]||null); // ── Helper: populate a select with project team members ── function fillUsers(id, placeholder){ const el=document.getElementById(id); if(!el) return; el.innerHTML=buildUserOpts(proj, placeholder||'— Select —'); // Auto-select current user if present if(currentUser){ const opt=Array.from(el.options).find(o=>o.value===currentUser.name); if(opt) el.value=opt.value; } } // ── Helper: populate contractor select (project-scoped) ── function fillContractors(id){ fillContractorSelect(id, proj); } // ── Ensure every module has a contractor dropdown (project-scoped) ── ensureModuleContractorField(pre, proj); // ── Mount person pickers for all person-select fields ── const _pool = getPersonPool(proj); // ── By-field picker for each module ── const byPickerMap = { goodpractice: 'gpf-by-picker-outer', training: 'trnf-by-picker-outer', mockup_quality:'mqf-by-picker-outer', mockup_safety: 'msf-by-picker-outer', tds: 'tdsf-by-picker-outer', rfi: 'rfif-raisedby-picker-outer', safetyobs: 'sobsf-by-picker-outer', safetyinsp: 'sif-by-picker-outer', auditcheck: 'acf-by-picker-outer', envinsp: 'eif-by-picker-outer', workpermit: 'wpf-by-picker-outer', conccube: 'ccrf-by-picker-outer', }; if(byPickerMap[mod]) mountPersonField(byPickerMap[mod], _pool, false); // ── OLD fillUsers calls for by-fields replaced above — skip them ── // const byFields removed — now handled by pickers if(mod==='safetyobs'){ // Mount person pickers for safetyobs — inspector (multi) + responsible (single) + by (done above) const _sobsPool = _pool; mountPersonField('sobsf-inspector-picker-outer', _sobsPool, true); document._pickerShims['sobsf-inspector'] = 'sobsf-inspector-picker-outer-val'; mountPersonField('sobsf-responsible-picker-outer', _sobsPool, false); document._pickerShims['sobsf-responsible'] = 'sobsf-responsible-picker-outer-val'; fillContractors('sobsf-contractor'); } if(mod==='safetyinsp'){ mountPersonField('sif-responsible-picker-outer', _pool, false); fillContractors('sif-contractor'); } if(mod==='auditcheck'){ mountPersonField('acf-responsible-picker-outer', _pool, false); } if(mod==='envinsp'){ mountPersonField('eif-responsible-picker-outer', _pool, false); fillContractors('eif-contractor'); } if(mod==='workpermit'){ const _wpPool = _pool; mountPersonField('wpf-inspector-picker-outer', _wpPool, true); document._pickerShims['wpf-inspector'] = 'wpf-inspector-picker-outer-val'; fillContractors('wpf-contractor'); } if(mod==='rfi'){ mountPersonField('rfif-directed-picker-outer', _pool, false); mountPersonField('rfif-respby-picker-outer', _pool, false); } if(mod==='mockup_quality'){ const mqConsEl=document.getElementById('mqf-consultant'); if(mqConsEl) mqConsEl.innerHTML=buildUserOpts(proj,'— Select Consultant —'); fillContractors('mqf-contractor'); } if(mod==='mockup_safety'){ const msConsEl=document.getElementById('msf-consultant'); if(msConsEl) msConsEl.innerHTML=buildUserOpts(proj,'— Select Consultant —'); fillContractors('msf-contractor'); } if(mod==='goodpractice') fillContractors('gpf-contractor'); if(mod==='training') fillContractors('trnf-contractor'); if(mod==='tds') fillContractors('tdsf-contractor'); if(mod==='skilleval') fillContractors('sklf-contractor'); if(mod==='auditcheck') fillContractors('acf-contractor'); if(mod==='rfi') fillContractors('rfif-contractor'); if(mod==='conccube'){ fillContractors('ccrf-supplier'); fillContractors('ccrf-contractor'); const _stdEl=document.getElementById('ccrf-sampling-std'); if(_stdEl && !_stdEl.value) _stdEl.value='IS456_3'; // Populate Concrete Register ref dropdown for selected project const _ccrProj = document.getElementById('ccrf-project')?.value||''; const _crSel = document.getElementById('ccrf-concreg-ref'); if(_crSel){ const _crOpts = concRegRecs.filter(r=>!_ccrProj||r.project===_ccrProj) .map(r=>``) .join(''); _crSel.innerHTML=''+_crOpts; _crSel.value=''; } // Fill Location and Grid No dropdowns for this project fillCCRLocationSelect('ccrf-location', _ccrProj); fillCCRGridSelect('ccrf-gridno', _ccrProj); } // Re-populate when project changes in form if(sel) sel.onchange = function(){ openSimpleNew(mod); }; // ── Re-filter users when contractor changes ── const _ctEl = document.getElementById(pre+'-contractor'); if(_ctEl) _ctEl.onchange = function(){ onContractorChange(pre+'-contractor', pre+'-project'); }; // ── Contractors, dates, times ── const dateFlds={goodpractice:'gpf-date',training:'trnf-date',mockup_quality:'mqf-date',mockup_safety:'msf-date',tds:'tdsf-date', skilleval:'sklf-date',conccube:'ccrf-date',rfi:'rfif-date',safetyobs:'sobsf-date',safetyinsp:'sif-date',auditcheck:'acf-date',envinsp:'eif-date',workpermit:'wpf-date'}; const timeFlds={safetyobs:'sobsf-time',workpermit:'wpf-time'}; const df=document.getElementById(dateFlds[mod]);if(df&&!df.value)df.value=today(); const tf=document.getElementById(timeFlds[mod]);if(tf&&!tf.value)tf.value=nowHHMM(); if(mod==='conccube'){ const _balJson = document.getElementById('ccrf-balance-results-json'); if(_balJson) _balJson.value=''; const _balWrap = document.getElementById('ccrf-balance-results-container'); if(_balWrap) _balWrap.innerHTML=''; autoConcreteDates(); autoConcreteCubes(); updateConcreteCubeTracking(); syncBalanceCubeResultBlocks(); } document.getElementById('new-'+mod+'-overlay').classList.add('open'); } function closeSimpleNew(mod){ _l=v('gpf-location');return _f&&_l?_f+' · '+_l:_f||_l;})(),country:v('gpf-country'),city:v('gpf-city'),description:v('gpf-desc'),benefit:v('gpf-benefit')};} else if(mod==='training'){extra={category:v('trnf-category'),type:v('trnf-type'),frequency:v('trnf-frequency'),trainer:v('trnf-trainer'),duration:v('trnf-duration'),attendees:v('trnf-attendees'),location:v('trnf-location'),country:v('trnf-country'),city:v('trnf-city'),topics:v('trnf-topics'),remarks:v('trnf-remarks')};} // collect photos for the module const photoPrefix={goodpractice:'gpf',training:'trnf',mockup_quality:'mqf',mockup_safety:'msf',tds:'tdsf',skilleval:'sklf',conccube:'ccrf',rfi:'rfif',safetyobs:'sobsf',safetyinsp:'sif',auditcheck:'acf',envinsp:'eif',workpermit:'wpf'}[mod]; const photos=(_photoStore[photoPrefix]||[]).filter(Boolean).slice(0,5); const existingSimple = (editingSimpleCtx && editingSimpleCtx.mod===mod) ? (simpleRecs[mod]||[]).find(r=>r.id===editingSimpleCtx.id) : null; const rec={ id:existingSimple?existingSimple.id:genSimpleId(mod), mod, project:projEl?projEl.value:'', title:titleEl.value.trim(), date:dateEl?dateEl.value:today(), submittedAt:existingSimple?(existingSimple.submittedAt||new Date().toISOString()):new Date().toISOString(), status:existingSimple?'Pending':(statusEl?statusEl.value:cfg.statusOpts[0]), submittedBy:existingSimple?(existingSimple.submittedBy||currentUser?.name||''):(currentUser?.name||''),submittedRole:existingSimple?(existingSimple.submittedRole||currentUser?.role||''):(currentUser?.role||''), by:byEl?byEl.value:'', contractor:(()=>{const c=document.getElementById(pre+'-contractor');return c?c.value:'';})(), photos:(photos.length?photos:((existingSimple&&existingSimple.photos)||[])), comments:existingSimple?(existingSimple.comments||[]):[], actionLog:existingSimple?(existingSimple.actionLog||[]):[], ...extra }; if(!rec.project){alert('Please select a project.');return;} if(photos.length>5){alert('Maximum 5 attachments allowed.');return;} if(existingSimple){ rec.rejectionComment=null; rec.rejectionBy=null; rec.rejectionAt=null; if(rec.actionLog) rec.actionLog=rec.actionLog.filter(a=>!['approve','reject','close'].includes(a.type)); logAction(rec,'resubmit'); const idx=(simpleRecs[mod]||[]).findIndex(r=>r.id===existingSimple.id); if(idx>=0) simpleRecs[mod][idx]=rec; else simpleRecs[mod].unshift(rec); } else { logAction(rec,'submit'); simpleRecs[mod].unshift(rec); } clearAttach(photoPrefix); persist();updateStats();refreshWorkflowUI();renderSimpleList(mod);closeSimpleNew(mod); editingSimpleCtx=null; // Email notification for submissions sendEmailNotification(existingSimple?'resubmission':'submission', rec, mod); } function v(id){const el=document.getElementById(id);return el?el.value.trim():'';} function openSimpleEdit(mod,id){ const rec=(simpleRecs[mod]||[]).find(r=>r.id===id); if(!rec) return; if(rec.status!=='Rejected'){ showToast('Only rejected records can be corrected and resubmitted.','warn'); return; } if(!canCurrentUserResubmitRecord(rec,mod)){ showToast('Only the responsible submitter can correct and resubmit this rejected record.','warn'); return; } editingSimpleCtx={mod,id}; openSimpleNew(mod); const setv=(id,val)=>{ const el=document.getElementById(id); if(el) el.value=val||''; }; const prefMap={goodpractice:'gpf',training:'trnf',mockup_quality:'mqf',mockup_safety:'msf',tds:'tdsf',skilleval:'sklf',conccube:'ccrf',rfi:'rfif',safetyobs:'sobsf',safetyinsp:'sif',auditcheck:'acf',envinsp:'eif',workpermit:'wpf'}; const pre=prefMap[mod]; if(!pre) return; setv(pre+'-project', rec.project); if(typeof ensureModuleContractorField==='function') ensureModuleContractorField(pre, rec.project); if(typeof fillContractorSelect==='function') try{ fillContractorSelect(pre+'-contractor', rec.project); }catch(_){ } setv(pre+'-title', rec.title); setv({goodpractice:'gpf-date',training:'trnf-date',mockup_quality:'mqf-date',mockup_safety:'msf-date',tds:'tdsf-date',skilleval:'sklf-date',conccube:'ccrf-date',rfi:'rfif-date',safetyobs:'sobsf-date',safetyinsp:'sif-date',auditcheck:'acf-date',envinsp:'eif-date',workpermit:'wpf-date'}[mod], rec.date); setv({safetyobs:'sobsf-time',workpermit:'wpf-time'}[mod], rec.time); setv(pre+'-status', rec.status); setv(pre+'-contractor', rec.contractor); setv(pre+'-country', rec.country); setv(pre+'-city', rec.city); const locParts=(rec.location||'').split(' · '); const floorVal=locParts.length>1?locParts[0]:''; const locVal=locParts.length>1?locParts.slice(1).join(' · '):(rec.location||''); const floorMap={goodpractice:'gpf-floor',envinsp:'eif-floor',safetyinsp:'sif-floor',mockup_quality:'mqf-floor',mockup_safety:'msf-floor',rfi:'rfif-floor',safetyobs:'sobsf-floor',workpermit:'wpf-floor',conccube:'ccrf-location'}; const locMap={goodpractice:'gpf-location',envinsp:'eif-location',safetyinsp:'sif-location',mockup_quality:'mqf-location',mockup_safety:'msf-location',rfi:'rfif-location',safetyobs:'sobsf-location',workpermit:'wpf-location'}; if(floorMap[mod] && mod!=='conccube') setv(floorMap[mod], floorVal); if(locMap[mod]) setv(locMap[mod], locVal); if(mod==='conccube'){ setv('ccrf-location', rec.location); setv('ccrf-gridno', rec.gridNo); } setPickerHiddenValue({goodpractice:'gpf-by',training:'trnf-by',mockup_quality:'mqf-by',mockup_safety:'msf-by',tds:'tdsf-by',skilleval:'sklf-by',conccube:'ccrf-by',rfi:'rfif-raisedby',safetyobs:'sobsf-by',safetyinsp:'sif-by',auditcheck:'acf-by',envinsp:'eif-by',workpermit:'wpf-by'}[mod], rec.by||rec.raisedBy||''); if(mod==='auditcheck'){ setv('acf-type',rec.type); setv('acf-dept',rec.department); setv('acf-criteria',rec.criteria); setPickerHiddenValue('acf-responsible-picker-outer',rec.responsiblePerson); setv('acf-targetdate',rec.targetDate); setv('acf-observation',rec.observation); setv('acf-nonconf',rec.nonconformity); setv('acf-action',rec.action); setv('acf-remarks',rec.remarks); } else if(mod==='envinsp'){ setv('eif-category',rec.category); setv('eif-risk',rec.risk); setPickerHiddenValue('eif-responsible-picker-outer',rec.responsiblePerson); setv('eif-targetdate',rec.targetDate); setv('eif-desc',rec.description); setv('eif-action',rec.action); setv('eif-remarks',rec.remarks); } else if(mod==='safetyinsp'){ setv('sif-category',rec.category); setv('sif-risk',rec.risk); setPickerHiddenValue('sif-responsible-picker-outer',rec.responsiblePerson); setv('sif-targetdate',rec.targetDate); setv('sif-desc',rec.description); setv('sif-action',rec.action); setv('sif-remarks',rec.remarks); } else if(mod==='mockup_quality'){ setv('mqf-type',rec.type); setv('mqf-contractor',rec.contractor); setv('msf-contractor',rec.contractor); setv('msf-consultant',rec.consultant); setv('msf-standard',rec.standard); setv('msf-risk',rec.risk); setv('msf-desc',rec.description); setv('msf-remarks',rec.remarks); setv('tdsf-remarks',rec.remarks); } else if(mod==='rfi'){ setv('rfif-disc',rec.disc); setPickerHiddenValue('rfif-directed',rec.directed); setv('rfif-drawing',rec.drawing); setv('rfif-priority',rec.priority); setv('rfif-due',rec.due); setv('rfif-question',rec.question); setv('rfif-response',rec.response); setv('rfif-respdate',rec.respdate); setPickerHiddenValue('rfif-respby',rec.respby); } else if(mod==='safetyobs'){ setv('sobsf-type',rec.type); setv('sobsf-category',rec.category); setv('sobsf-severity',rec.severity); setv('sobsf-incidentseverity',rec.incidentSeverity); setv('sobsf-injurytype',rec.injuryType); setPickerHiddenValue('sobsf-inspector',rec.inspector); setPickerHiddenValue('sobsf-responsible',rec.responsiblePerson); setv('sobsf-immediate',rec.immediateAction); setv('sobsf-rootcause',rec.rootCause); setv('sobsf-desc',rec.description); setv('sobsf-action',rec.action); setv('sobsf-remarks',rec.remarks); } else if(mod==='workpermit'){ setv('wpf-type',rec.type); setv('wpf-risk',rec.risk); setPickerHiddenValue('wpf-inspector',rec.inspector); setv('wpf-scope',rec.scope); setv('wpf-hazards',rec.hazards); setv('wpf-ppe',rec.ppe); setv('wpf-workers',rec.numWorkers); setv('wpf-remarks',rec.remarks); setv('wpf-valid-date',rec.validDate); setv('wpf-valid-time',rec.validTime); } const photoPrefix={goodpractice:'gpf',training:'trnf',mockup_quality:'mqf',mockup_safety:'msf',tds:'tdsf',skilleval:'sklf',conccube:'ccrf',rfi:'rfif',safetyobs:'sobsf',safetyinsp:'sif',auditcheck:'acf',envinsp:'eif',workpermit:'wpf'}[mod]; if(photoPrefix){ _photoStore[photoPrefix]=(rec.photos||[]).slice(); renderAttachPreview(photoPrefix); } const btn=document.querySelector('#new-'+mod+'-overlay .btn-submit'); if(btn) btn.textContent='Update and Resubmit'; } function renderSimpleList(mod){ const cfg=SIMPLE_CFG[mod]; const listEl=document.getElementById(mod+'-list'); const footEl=document.getElementById(mod+'-footer'); if(!listEl)return; const searchEl=document.getElementById(mod+'-search'); const sfEl=document.getElementById(mod+'-sf'); const q=(searchEl?searchEl.value:'').toLowerCase(); const sf=sfEl?sfEl.value:''; const visProjs=getAssignedProjects(); let data=(simpleRecs[mod]||[]).filter(r=>{ // Privacy: only show records from user's assigned projects if(!isRole('super_admin') && !visProjs.includes(r.project)) return false; if(activeProject!=='ALL'&&r.project!==activeProject)return false; if(sf&&r.status!==sf)return false; if(q&&!r.title.toLowerCase().includes(q)&&!r.project.toLowerCase().includes(q))return false; return true; }); if(!data.length){listEl.innerHTML='
No records found.
';footEl.textContent='';return;} const sc=cfg.statusColors||{}; listEl.innerHTML=data.map(r=>{ const col=sc[r.status]||cfg.color; return `
${r.id}
${mod==='conccube'?(r.req?r.req+' N/mm²':(r.title||r.id))+(r.supplier?' · '+esc(r.supplier):''):r.title}
${r.project||''}${r.date?' · '+r.date:''}${mod==='conccube'&&r.structure?' · '+esc(r.structure):''}${mod==='conccube'&&r.location?' 📍 '+esc(r.location):''}${mod==='conccube'&&r.gridNo?' · Grid: '+esc(r.gridNo):''}
${r.status}
`; }).join(''); footEl.textContent=`Showing ${data.length} of ${(simpleRecs[mod]||[]).length}`; } function openSimpleDetail(mod,id){ const cfg=SIMPLE_CFG[mod]; const rec=simpleRecs[mod].find(r=>r.id===id); if(!rec)return; if(!isRole('super_admin')&&rec.project&&!getAssignedProjects().includes(rec.project)){showToast('Access denied — record belongs to a different project.','warn');return;} const sc=cfg.statusColors||{}; // Workflow buttons for modules with defined WF_TRANSITIONS const WF_MODS_SIMPLE=['rfi','mockup_quality','mockup_safety','tds','safetyobs','workpermit']; let stBtns=''; if(WF_MODS_SIMPLE.includes(mod)){ stBtns=buildWFButtons(mod,rec,()=>{renderSimpleList(mod);openSimpleDetail(mod,id);}); } else { // Simple status toggle for non-workflow modules stBtns=cfg.statusOpts.map(s=>``).join(''); } // Build extra fields HTML let extraHtml=''; if(mod==='goodpractice'){extraHtml=`
${rec.category||'—'}
${rec.trade||'—'}
${rec.location||'—'}
${rec.by||'—'}
${rec.description?`
Description
${rec.description}
`:''}${rec.benefit?`
Benefit / Impact
${rec.benefit}
`:''}`;} else if(mod==='training'){extraHtml=`
${rec.category||'—'}
${rec.type||'—'}
${rec.frequency||'—'}
${rec.trainer||'—'}
${rec.duration||'—'} mins
${rec.attendees||'—'}
${rec.location||'—'}
${rec.by||'—'}
${rec.topics?`
Topics Covered
${rec.topics}
`:''}${rec.remarks?`
Remarks
${rec.remarks}
`:''}`;} else if(mod==='mockup_quality'){extraHtml=`
${rec.type||'—'}
${rec.contractor||'—'}
${rec.consultant||'—'}
${rec.drawing||'—'}
${rec.location||'—'}
${rec.by||'—'}
${rec.qmresult?`
${rec.qmresult}
`:''}
${rec.description?`
Quality Scope / Description
${rec.description}
`:''}${rec.remarks?`
QM / Client Approval Comments
${rec.remarks}
`:''}`;} else if(mod==='mockup_safety'){const riskColor={Low:'#15803d',Medium:'#b45309',High:'#dc2626',Critical:'#7f1d1d'}[rec.risk]||'var(--text)';extraHtml=`
${rec.type||'—'}
${rec.risk||'—'}
${rec.contractor||'—'}
${rec.consultant||'—'}
${rec.location||'—'}
${rec.standard||'—'}
${rec.by||'—'}
${rec.description?`
Safety Scope / Description
${rec.description}
`:''}${rec.remarks?`
🛡️ Safety Manager / Client Comments
${rec.remarks}
`:''}`;} else if(mod==='tds'){extraHtml=`
${rec.category||'—'}
${rec.manufacturer||'—'}
${rec.supplier||'—'}
${rec.ref||'—'}
${rec.rev||'—'}
${rec.spec||'—'}
${rec.remarks?`
Review Comments
${rec.remarks}
`:''}`;} else if(mod==='skilleval'){extraHtml=`
${rec.trade||'—'}
${rec.badge||'—'}
${rec.nationality||'—'}
${rec.experience||'—'} yrs
${rec.score||'—'}%
${rec.by||'—'}

${rec.safety||'—'}
${rec.quality||'—'}
${rec.remarks?`
Remarks
${rec.remarks}
`:''}`;} else if(mod==='conccube'){ const _stdMap={'IS456_3':'IS 456:2000 — 3 cubes/sample','BSEN206_3':'BS EN 206 — 3 cubes/sample','ACI318_2':'ACI 318 — 2 cylinders/sample','ACI318_3':'ACI 318 — 3 cylinders/sample','AS1379_3':'AS 1379 — 3 cores/sample','PROJ_6':'Project Spec — 6 cubes/sample','PROJ_9':'Project Spec — 9 cubes/sample','PROJ_12':'Project Spec — 12 cubes/sample'}; const _stdLabel=_stdMap[rec.samplingStd||'IS456_3']||rec.samplingStd||'IS 456:2000 — 3 cubes/sample'; const _wbType=rec.workabilityType==='slump'?'Slump Test':rec.workabilityType==='flow'?'Flow Table Test':rec.workabilityType||'—'; const _wbVal=(rec.workabilityVal||(rec.slump||rec.flow)||'—')+(rec.workabilityVal||rec.slump||rec.flow?' mm':''); const _wbClass=rec.workabilityClass||'—'; const _d7pass=rec.d7&&rec.req&&Number(rec.d7)>=Number(rec.req)*0.67; const _d28col=rec.d28&&rec.req?(Number(rec.d28)>=Number(rec.req)?'var(--green)':'var(--red)'):'var(--text)'; extraHtml=`
${rec.by||'—'}
${rec.structure||'—'}
${rec.lift||'—'}
${rec.location||'—'}
${rec.gridNo||'—'}
${rec.contractor||'—'}
${rec.deliveryNote||'—'}
${rec.supplier||'—'}
${rec.volume||'—'}
${rec.cubes||'—'}
${_stdLabel}
${rec.req||'—'} N/mm²
${_wbType}
${_wbVal}  ·  ${_wbClass}
📅 7-Day Results  ${rec.d7date||'—'}
CUBE 1
${rec.d7c1||'—'}
N/mm²
CUBE 2
${rec.d7c2||'—'}
N/mm²
CUBE 3
${rec.d7c3||'—'}
N/mm²
AVG.
${rec.d7||'—'}
N/mm²
📅 28-Day Results  ${rec.d28date||'—'}
CUBE 1
${rec.d28c1||'—'}
N/mm²
CUBE 2
${rec.d28c2||'—'}
N/mm²
CUBE 3
${rec.d28c3||'—'}
N/mm²
AVG. ${rec.d28&&rec.req?(Number(rec.d28)>=Number(rec.req)?'✔ PASS':'✘ FAIL'):''}
${rec.d28||'—'}
N/mm²
${(()=>{ const _c1=parseFloat(rec.d28c1),_c2=parseFloat(rec.d28c2),_c3=parseFloat(rec.d28c3),_req=parseFloat(rec.req); const _vals=[_c1,_c2,_c3].filter(v=>!isNaN(v)); if(_vals.length<2||isNaN(_req))return ''; const _avg=(_vals.reduce((s,v)=>s+v,0)/_vals.length); const _minV=Math.min(..._vals); const _avgOk=_avg>=_req, _minOk=_minV>=(_req-3), _ok=_avgOk&&_minOk; const _ac=_ok?'#15803d':'#dc2626', _acbg=_ok?'#dcfce7':'#fee2e2', _acbd=_ok?'#86efac':'#fca5a5'; return `
${_ok?'✔':'✘'} IS 456:2000 Acceptance: Avg ${_avg.toFixed(1)} N/mm² (${_avgOk?'✔ ≥':'✘ <'} fck ${_req}) Min ${_minV.toFixed(1)} N/mm² (${_minOk?'✔ ≥':'✘ <'} fck−3=${_req-3}) ${_ok?'ACCEPTED':'REJECTED'}
`; })()}
${rec.labRef||'—'}
${rec.cubeSize||'150mm Cube'}
${rec.curingMethod||'Water Tank'}
${rec.remarks?`
Remarks
${rec.remarks}
`:''} `; } else if(mod==='rfi'){extraHtml=`
${rec.disc||'—'}
${rec.priority||'—'}
${rec.directed||'—'}
${rec.drawing||'—'}
${rec.due||'—'}

${rec.question?`
Question / Clarification
${rec.question}
`:''}${rec.response?`
Response
${rec.response}

${rec.linked}
`:''}`;} else if(mod==="safetyobs"){const sevColor={Minor:"#15803d",Moderate:"#b45309",Major:"#dc2626",Critical:"#7f1d1d"}[rec.severity]||"var(--text)";extraHtml=`

`:""}`;} else if(mod==="workpermit"){const riskColor={Low:"#15803d",Medium:"#b45309",High:"#dc2626","Very High":"#7f1d1d"}[rec.risk]||"var(--text)";extraHtml=`

`:""}`;} else if(mod==="envinsp"){const riskColor={Low:"#15803d",Medium:"#b45309",High:"#dc2626",Critical:"#7f1d1d"}[rec.risk]||"var(--text)";extraHtml=`

Remarks
${rec.remarks}
`:""}`;} const col=sc[rec.status]||cfg.color; const ov=document.getElementById('spec-overlay'); document.getElementById('spec-det-badges').innerHTML=`${cfg.label}${rec.status}`; document.getElementById('spec-det-title').textContent=mod==='conccube'?((rec.req?rec.req+' N/mm²':'Concrete Cube Record')+(rec.structure?' — '+rec.structure:'')):(rec.grade||'').split(' — ')[0]+(rec.structure?' — '+rec.structure:''); const simRejBox=rec.rejectionComment?`
🚫 Rejection
${esc(rec.rejectionComment)}
By: ${esc(rec.rejectionBy||'')} · ${rec.rejectionAt?new Date(rec.rejectionAt).toLocaleDateString():''}
${(rec.status==='Rejected'&&canCurrentUserResubmitRecord(rec,mod))?`
`:''}
`:''; document.getElementById('spec-det-body').innerHTML=`
${stBtns}
${simRejBox}
${rec.id}
${rec.project||'—'}
${rec.date||'—'}
${rec.status}
${extraHtml}
Comments
${(rec.comments||[]).map(c=>`
${c.author}${c.time}
${c.text}
`).join('')}
`; ov.classList.add('open'); ov.dataset.simplemod=mod; ov.dataset.simpleid=rec.id; _openPDFContext.spec = Object.assign({_mod: mod}, rec); // Hide PDF button for client_consultant on conccube const specPdfBtn = document.getElementById('spec-pdf-btn'); if(specPdfBtn) specPdfBtn.style.display = (isRole('client_representative','consultant_representative') && mod==='conccube') ? 'none' : ''; } function setSimpleStatus(mod,id,s){ const rec=simpleRecs[mod].find(r=>r.id===id);if(!rec)return; rec.status=s;persist();renderSimpleList(mod);openSimpleDetail(mod,id); } function addSimpleComment(mod,id){ const rec=simpleRecs[mod].find(r=>r.id===id);if(!rec)return; const inp=document.getElementById('simple-cmt-inp-'+id); const txt=inp?inp.value.trim():'';if(!txt)return; if(!rec.comments)rec.comments=[]; rec.comments.push({author: currentUser ? currentUser.name : 'CIMS Team', time:nowTime(),text:txt}); persist();inp.value=''; const box=document.getElementById('simple-comments-'+id); if(box)box.innerHTML=rec.comments.map(c=>`
${c.author}${c.time}
${c.text}
`).join(''); } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════ // IPC MODULE // ══════════════════════════════════════════════ function genIPCId(){ const n=(ipcRecs.length+1).toString().padStart(4,'0'); return 'IPC-'+n; } function ipcFmt(cur,n){ n=parseFloat(n)||0; return n?`${cur||'INR'} ${n.toLocaleString('en-US',{minimumFractionDigits:2,maximumFractionDigits:2})}`:''; } function ipcCalc(){ const n=id=>parseFloat(document.getElementById(id)?.value)||0; const set=(id,val)=>{const el=document.getElementById(id); if(el) el.value=val;}; const cur=document.getElementById('ipcf-currency')?.value||'INR'; const claimed=n('ipcf-claimedqty'), certified=n('ipcf-certifiedqty'), rate=n('ipcf-rate'); const retention=n('ipcf-retention'), deductions=n('ipcf-deductions'); const claimedAmt=claimed*rate, certifiedAmt=certified*rate; const net=certifiedAmt - (certifiedAmt*retention/100) - deductions; set('ipcf-claimedamt', ipcFmt(cur,claimedAmt)); set('ipcf-certifiedamt', ipcFmt(cur,certifiedAmt)); set('ipcf-netpayable', ipcFmt(cur,Math.max(0, net))); } function populateIPCWIRs(){ const proj=document.getElementById('ipcf-project')?.value||''; const sel=document.getElementById('ipcf-wirs'); if(!sel) return; const data=wirs.filter(w=>w.project===proj && ['Fully Complete','Approved','Approved by Client/Consultant','Closed'].includes(w.status)); sel.innerHTML=data.length ? data.map(w=>``).join('') : ''; } function populateIPCInspectors(){ const proj=document.getElementById('ipcf-project')?.value||''; const sel=document.getElementById('ipcf-inspector'); if(!sel) return; sel.innerHTML=buildUserOpts(proj,'— Select Inspection Member —'); } function populateIPCRoleUsers(){ const proj=document.getElementById('ipcf-project')?.value||''; const prep=document.getElementById('ipcf-preparedby'); const rev=document.getElementById('ipcf-reviewedby'); const cert=document.getElementById('ipcf-certifiedby'); if(prep) prep.innerHTML = buildUserOptsByRoles(proj,'— Select Billing Engineer / Manager —',['billing_engineer','billing_manager'], null, true); if(rev) rev.innerHTML = buildUserOptsByRoles(proj,'— Select Project Manager —',['project_manager']); if(cert) cert.innerHTML = buildUserOptsByRoles(proj,'— Select Client / Consultant / Representative —',['client_representative','consultant_representative']); } function openIPCNew(){ if(!canCreate('ipc')){showToast('You do not have permission to add IPC records.','warn');return;} document.body.classList.add('ov-open'); populateProjectSelectors(); const projSel=document.getElementById('ipcf-project'); const proj=(activeProject!=='ALL'&&getAssignedProjects().includes(activeProject))?activeProject:(getAssignedProjects()[0]||''); if(projSel&&proj) projSel.value=proj; fillContractorSelect('ipcf-contractor', proj||''); ['ipcf-desc','ipcf-boq','ipcf-claimedqty','ipcf-checkedqty','ipcf-certifiedqty','ipcf-rate','ipcf-prevamt','ipcf-retention','ipcf-deductions','ipcf-claimedamt','ipcf-certifiedamt','ipcf-netpayable','ipcf-remarks','ipcf-inspector'].forEach(id=>{const el=document.getElementById(id); if(el) el.value='';}); document.getElementById('ipcf-no').value=genIPCId(); document.getElementById('ipcf-status').value='Draft'; document.getElementById('ipcf-currency').value='INR'; if(document.getElementById('ipcf-certdate')) document.getElementById('ipcf-certdate').value=today(); populateIPCWIRs(); populateIPCInspectors(); populateIPCRoleUsers(); ipcCalc(); const _ipci=document.getElementById('ipcf-inspector'); if(_ipci && currentUser?.name){ const _opt=Array.from(_ipci.options).find(o=>o.value===currentUser.name); if(_opt) _ipci.value=currentUser.name; } const _pre=document.getElementById('ipcf-preparedby'); if(_pre && currentUser?.name){ const _opt=Array.from(_pre.options).find(o=>o.value===currentUser.name); if(_opt) _pre.value=currentUser.name; } document.getElementById('new-ipc-overlay').classList.add('open'); document.body.classList.add('ov-open'); } function closeIPCNew(){document.getElementById('new-ipc-overlay').classList.remove('open');document.body.classList.remove('ov-open');} function renderIPCList(){ const listEl=document.getElementById('ipc-list'); const footEl=document.getElementById('ipc-footer'); if(!listEl) return; const q=(document.getElementById('ipc-search')?.value||'').toLowerCase(); const sf=document.getElementById('ipc-sf')?.value||''; const visProjs=getAssignedProjects(); const data=ipcRecs.filter(r=>{ if(!isRole('super_admin') && !visProjs.includes(r.project)) return false; if(activeProject!=='ALL' && r.project!==activeProject) return false; if(sf && r.status!==sf) return false; const blob=`${r.id} ${r.project} ${r.contractor||''} ${r.boqItem||''}`.toLowerCase(); if(q && !blob.includes(q)) return false; return true; }); if(!data.length){listEl.innerHTML='
No IPC records found.
'; if(footEl) footEl.textContent=''; return;} const SC={'Draft':'#6b7280','Submitted':'#b45309','Under Review':'#2563eb','Certified':'#059669','Returned':'#dc2626'}; listEl.innerHTML=data.map(r=>`
${esc(r.id)}
${esc(r.project||'—')}
${esc(r.contractor||'—')} · ${esc(r.inspector||'—')} · ${esc(r.periodFrom||'—')} → ${esc(r.periodTo||'—')}
${ipcFmt(r.currency,r.netPayable)||'—'}
${esc(r.status)}
`).join(''); if(footEl) footEl.textContent=`Showing ${data.length} of ${ipcRecs.length} IPC records`; } function submitIPC(){ const proj=document.getElementById('ipcf-project')?.value||''; const ipcNo=(document.getElementById('ipcf-no')?.value||'').trim(); if(!proj || !ipcNo){ alert('Please fill IPC No. and Project.'); return; } const claim=parseFloat(document.getElementById('ipcf-claimedqty')?.value)||0; const checked=parseFloat(document.getElementById('ipcf-checkedqty')?.value)||0; const certified=parseFloat(document.getElementById('ipcf-certifiedqty')?.value)||0; const rate=parseFloat(document.getElementById('ipcf-rate')?.value)||0; const prevAmt=parseFloat(document.getElementById('ipcf-prevamt')?.value)||0; const retentionPct=parseFloat(document.getElementById('ipcf-retention')?.value)||0; const deductions=parseFloat(document.getElementById('ipcf-deductions')?.value)||0; const currency=document.getElementById('ipcf-currency')?.value||'INR'; const certifiedAmt=certified*rate; const claimedAmt=claim*rate; const netPayable=Math.max(0, certifiedAmt - (certifiedAmt*retentionPct/100) - deductions); const linkedSel=document.getElementById('ipcf-wirs'); const linkedWIRs=linkedSel ? Array.from(linkedSel.selectedOptions||[]).map(o=>o.value).filter(Boolean) : []; ipcRecs.unshift({ id:ipcNo, project:proj, contractor:document.getElementById('ipcf-contractor')?.value||'', inspector:(document.getElementById('ipcf-inspector')?.value||'').trim(), periodFrom:document.getElementById('ipcf-from')?.value||'', periodTo:document.getElementById('ipcf-to')?.value||'', linkedWIRs, boqItem:(document.getElementById('ipcf-boq')?.value||'').trim(), description:(document.getElementById('ipcf-desc')?.value||'').trim(), claimedQty:claim, checkedQty:checked, certifiedQty:certified, unit:document.getElementById('ipcf-unit')?.value||'', rate, currency, claimedAmount:claimedAmt, certifiedAmount:certifiedAmt, previousCertifiedAmount:prevAmt, retentionPct, deductions, netPayable, preparedBy:(document.getElementById('ipcf-preparedby')?.value||'').trim(), reviewedBy:(document.getElementById('ipcf-reviewedby')?.value||'').trim(), certifiedBy:(document.getElementById('ipcf-certifiedby')?.value||'').trim(), certificationDate:document.getElementById('ipcf-certdate')?.value||'', status:document.getElementById('ipcf-status')?.value||'Draft', remarks:(document.getElementById('ipcf-remarks')?.value||'').trim(), submittedAt:new Date().toISOString(), submittedBy:currentUser?.name||'', comments:[] }); persist(); renderIPCList(); closeIPCNew(); showToast('IPC saved — '+ipcNo,'ok'); } function openIPCDetail(id){ const r=ipcRecs.find(x=>x.id===id); if(!r) return; if(!isRole('super_admin')&&r.project&&!getAssignedProjects().includes(r.project)){showToast('Access denied — record belongs to a different project.','warn');return;} const SC={'Draft':'#6b7280','Submitted':'#b45309','Under Review':'#2563eb','Certified':'#059669','Returned':'#dc2626'}; const sc=SC[r.status]||'#888'; document.getElementById('ipc-det-badges').innerHTML=`${esc(r.id)}${esc(r.status)}${esc(r.project||'—')}`; document.getElementById('ipc-det-title').textContent = r.description || 'Interim Payment Certificate'; const stBtns=['Draft','Submitted','Under Review','Certified','Returned'].map(s=>``).join(''); const comments=(r.comments||[]).map(c=>`
${esc(c.author)}${esc(c.time)}
${esc(c.text)}
`).join(''); document.getElementById('ipc-det-body').innerHTML=`
${stBtns}
${esc(r.contractor||'—')}
${esc(r.inspector||'—')}
${esc(r.periodFrom||'—')} → ${esc(r.periodTo||'—')}
${esc((r.linkedWIRs||[]).join(', ')||'—')}
${esc(r.boqItem||'—')}
${esc(r.unit||'—')}
${ipcFmt(r.currency,r.rate)||'—'}
${esc(String(r.claimedQty||0))}
${esc(String(r.checkedQty||0))}
${esc(String(r.certifiedQty||0))}
${ipcFmt(r.currency,r.claimedAmount)||'—'}
${ipcFmt(r.currency,r.certifiedAmount)||'—'}
${ipcFmt(r.currency,r.previousCertifiedAmount)||'—'}
${esc(String(r.retentionPct||0))}%
${ipcFmt(r.currency,r.deductions)||'—'}
${ipcFmt(r.currency,r.netPayable)||'—'}
${esc(r.preparedBy||'—')}
${esc(r.reviewedBy||'—')}
${esc(r.certifiedBy||'—')}
${esc(r.certificationDate||'—')}
${r.remarks?`
Remarks
${esc(r.remarks)}
`:''}
Comments (${(r.comments||[]).length})
${comments}
`; document.getElementById('ipc-detail-overlay').classList.add('open'); document.body.classList.add('ov-open'); } function closeIPCDetail(){document.getElementById('ipc-detail-overlay').classList.remove('open');document.body.classList.remove('ov-open');} function setIPCStatus(id,s){ const r=ipcRecs.find(x=>x.id===id); if(!r) return; r.status=s; persist(); renderIPCList(); openIPCDetail(id); } function addIPCComment(id){ const r=ipcRecs.find(x=>x.id===id); if(!r) return; const inp=document.getElementById('ipc-cmt-inp-'+id); const txt=inp?inp.value.trim():''; if(!txt) return; if(!r.comments) r.comments=[]; r.comments.push({author:currentUser?.name||'CIMS Team', time:nowTime(), text:txt}); persist(); openIPCDetail(id); } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════ // DOCUMENT CONTROL MODULE // ══════════════════════════════════════════════ const DOC_TYPE_COLORS = { 'Approved Drawings': '#2563eb', 'Method of Statement': '#0891b2', 'ITP': '#7c3aed', 'PQP / QAP': '#6d28d9', 'Calibration Reports': '#0d9488', 'Third Party Reports': '#059669', 'QC Lab Report': '#16a34a', 'Safety Records': '#dc2626', 'Concrete Mix Design Reports':'#d97706', 'HIRA': '#b45309', 'Risk Assessment': '#c2410c', 'Vehicle & Equipment Report':'#7c3aed', 'Weekly Report': '#1d4ed8', 'Monthly Report': '#4338ca', }; const DOC_STATUS_COLORS = { 'Active': '#16a34a', 'Under Review': '#f59e0b', 'Superseded': '#6b7280', 'Void': '#dc2626', }; function genDocId(){ const n = (docCtrlRecs.length+1).toString().padStart(4,'0'); return 'DOC-'+n; } function openDocCtrlNew(){ if(!canCreate('docctrl')){showToast('You do not have permission to add documents.','warn');return;} populateProjectSelectors(); const proj = (activeProject!=='ALL'&&getAssignedProjects().includes(activeProject)) ? activeProject : (getAssignedProjects()[0]||null); const docfProjEl = document.getElementById('docf-project'); if(docfProjEl&&proj) docfProjEl.value=proj; // ── Contractor: project-scoped ── fillContractorSelect('docf-contractor', proj||''); // ── Mount person pickers for Prepared By + Approved By ── function _mountDocPickers(p){ const pool = getPersonPool(p||''); mountPersonField('docf-preparedby-picker-outer', pool, false); mountPersonField('docf-approvedby-picker-outer', pool, false); } _mountDocPickers(proj); // ── When project changes: refresh contractor + pickers ── if(docfProjEl) docfProjEl.onchange = function(){ const p2=this.value; fillContractorSelect('docf-contractor', p2); _mountDocPickers(p2); }; // ── When contractor changes: refresh pickers ── const ctEl = document.getElementById('docf-contractor'); if(ctEl) ctEl.onchange = function(){ const p2 = (docfProjEl&&docfProjEl.value)||proj||''; _mountDocPickers(p2); }; const dEl=document.getElementById('docf-date'); if(dEl&&!dEl.value) dEl.value=today(); ['docf-title','docf-ref','docf-rev','docf-expiry','docf-desc','docf-remarks'] .forEach(id=>{const el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.value='';}); document.getElementById('docf-type').value=''; document.getElementById('docf-status').value='Active'; if(typeof _photoStore!=='undefined'&&_photoStore['docf']) _photoStore['docf']=[]; const prevEl=document.getElementById('docf-photo-previews'); if(prevEl) prevEl.innerHTML=''; document.getElementById('new-docctrl-overlay').classList.add('open'); } function closeDocCtrlNew(){document.getElementById('new-docctrl-overlay').classList.remove('open');} function submitDocCtrl(){ const type=v('docf-type'); const title=v('docf-title'); const project=v('docf-project'); const ref=v('docf-ref'); const date=v('docf-date'); if(!type||!title||!project||!ref||!date){showToast('Please fill all required fields (*)','warn');return;} const rec={ id: genDocId(), type, title, project, ref, rev: v('docf-rev'), date, expiry: v('docf-expiry'), contractor: v('docf-contractor'), preparedby: (document.getElementById('docf-preparedby-picker-outer-val')||{value:''}).value || v('docf-preparedby'), approvedby: (document.getElementById('docf-approvedby-picker-outer-val')||{value:''}).value || v('docf-approvedby'), status: v('docf-status')||'Active', desc: v('docf-desc'), remarks: v('docf-remarks'), createdBy: currentUser?currentUser.name:'—', createdAt: Date.now(), comments:[], }; docCtrlRecs.unshift(rec); persist(); closeDocCtrlNew(); renderDocCtrlList(); showToast('Document saved — '+rec.id,'ok'); } function renderDocCtrlList(){ // Populate filter dropdowns const fpEl=document.getElementById('docctrl-filter-project'); if(fpEl){ const cur=fpEl.value; fpEl.innerHTML=''+getAssignedProjects().map(p=>``).join(''); } const fProj=document.getElementById('docctrl-filter-project')?.value||'ALL'; const fType=document.getElementById('docctrl-filter-type')?.value||'ALL'; const fStat=document.getElementById('docctrl-filter-status')?.value||'ALL'; const fSearch=(document.getElementById('docctrl-search')?.value||'').toLowerCase(); const assignedProjs=getAssignedProjects(); let data=docCtrlRecs.filter(r=>{ if(!isRole('super_admin')&&!assignedProjs.includes(r.project)) return false; if(fProj!=='ALL'&&r.project!==fProj) return false; if(fType!=='ALL'&&r.type!==fType) return false; if(fStat!=='ALL'&&r.status!==fStat) return false; if(fSearch&&!(r.title+r.ref+r.type+r.project).toLowerCase().includes(fSearch)) return false; return true; }); const body=document.getElementById('docctrl-list-body'); const footer=document.getElementById('docctrl-footer'); if(footer)footer.textContent=`Showing ${data.length} of ${docCtrlRecs.length} documents`; if(!data.length){body.innerHTML=`
📁
No documents found
Add a new document using the + New button.
`;return;} body.innerHTML=data.map(r=>{ const tc=DOC_TYPE_COLORS[r.type]||'#3b82f6'; const sc=DOC_STATUS_COLORS[r.status]||'#888'; const expWarn=r.expiry&&new Date(r.expiry)
${esc(r.id)}
${esc(r.title)}
📁 ${esc(r.type)} · 📂 Ref: ${esc(r.ref)}${r.rev?' · Rev '+esc(r.rev):''}
📅 ${r.date||'—'}
${r.status} ${expWarn?'⚠ Expired':''}
📌 ${esc(r.project&&r.project.length>16?r.project.slice(0,16)+'…':r.project||'—')}
`; }).join(''); } let _openDocCtrlId=null; function openDocCtrlDetail(id){ const rec=docCtrlRecs.find(r=>r.id===id);if(!rec)return; if(!isRole('super_admin')&&rec.project&&!getAssignedProjects().includes(rec.project)){showToast('Access denied — record belongs to a different project.','warn');return;} _openDocCtrlId=id; const tc=DOC_TYPE_COLORS[rec.type]||'#3b82f6'; const sc=DOC_STATUS_COLORS[rec.status]||'#888'; const expWarn=rec.expiry&&new Date(rec.expiry)📁 ${esc(rec.type)} ${rec.status} ${esc(rec.project)} ${expWarn?'⚠ Expired':''}`; document.getElementById('docctrl-det-title').textContent=rec.title; // Show/hide delete button — only quality_manager can delete const delBtn=document.getElementById('docctrl-delete-btn'); if(delBtn)delBtn.style.display=canDelete('docctrl')?'':'none'; // Status toggles — only quality_manager can change status const stBtns=isRole('quality_manager','super_admin')? ['Active','Under Review','Superseded','Void'].map(s=>``).join('') :''; const comments=(rec.comments||[]).map(c=>`
${esc(c.author)}${c.time}
${esc(c.text)}
`).join(''); document.getElementById('docctrl-det-body').innerHTML=`
${stBtns}
${esc(rec.ref)}
${esc(rec.rev||'—')}
${rec.date||'—'}
${rec.expiry||'—'}${expWarn?' ⚠':''}
${esc(rec.project||'—')}
${esc(rec.contractor||'—')}
${esc(rec.preparedby||'—')}
${esc(rec.approvedby||'—')}
${esc(rec.createdBy||'—')}
${rec.desc?`
Scope / Description
${esc(rec.desc)}
`:''} ${rec.remarks?`
Remarks
${esc(rec.remarks)}
`:''}
Comments
${comments}
`; document.getElementById('docctrl-detail-overlay').classList.add('open'); } function closeDocCtrlDetail(){document.getElementById('docctrl-detail-overlay').classList.remove('open');_openDocCtrlId=null;} function setDocCtrlStatus(id,s){ if(!isRole('quality_manager','super_admin')){showToast('Only Quality Manager can change document status.','warn');return;} const rec=docCtrlRecs.find(r=>r.id===id);if(!rec)return; rec.status=s;persist();renderDocCtrlList();refreshWorkflowUI();openDocCtrlDetail(id); } function deleteDocCtrlRecord(){ if(!isRole('quality_manager','super_admin')){showToast('Only Quality Manager can delete documents.','warn');return;} if(!_openDocCtrlId)return; if(!confirm('Delete this document record? This cannot be undone.'))return; const idx=docCtrlRecs.findIndex(r=>r.id===_openDocCtrlId); if(idx!==-1){docCtrlRecs.splice(idx,1);persist();} closeDocCtrlDetail(); renderDocCtrlList(); showToast('Document deleted','ok'); } function addDocCtrlComment(id){ const rec=docCtrlRecs.find(r=>r.id===id);if(!rec)return; const inp=document.getElementById('docctrl-cmt-inp-'+id); const txt=inp?inp.value.trim():'';if(!txt)return; if(!rec.comments)rec.comments=[]; rec.comments.push({author:currentUser?currentUser.name:'CIMS User',time:nowTime(),text:txt}); persist();inp.value=''; const box=document.getElementById('docctrl-comments-'+id); if(box)box.innerHTML=rec.comments.map(c=>`
${esc(c.author)}${c.time}
${esc(c.text)}
`).join(''); } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════ // USER FEED MODULE // ══════════════════════════════════════════════ function getFeedItems(){ const items = []; const pushItem = (item)=>{ if(!item || !item.id) return; if(items.some(x=>x.mod===item.mod && x.id===item.id && x.action===item.action)) return; items.push(item); }; const commonPush = (mod, rec, title, color, open, fallbackAction='📌 Pending in your project')=>{ if(!isProjectRecordVisibleToCurrentUser(rec)) return; if(!isRecordPendingForProjectFeed(rec)) return; pushItem({ mod, id:rec.id, title:title||rec.id, project:rec.project, status:rec.status, action:getProjectFeedAction(rec, fallbackAction), date:rec.date||'', color, open }); }; issues.forEach(r=>{ commonPush('qms', r, r.title||r.id, '#e11d48', `switchModule('qms');setTimeout(()=>openDetail('${r.id}'),60)`, r.status==='Pending QM Approval'?'⏳ Awaiting QM approval in your project': r.status==='Pending Client Approval'?'⏳ Awaiting client approval in your project':'📌 QMS item pending in your project'); }); wirs.forEach(r=>{ commonPush('wir', r, r.activity||r.id, '#2563eb', `switchModule('wir');setTimeout(()=>openWIRDetail('${r.id}'),60)`, r.status==='Submitted'?'📌 WIR submitted in your project': r.status==='QM Approved'?'📌 WIR awaiting client sign-off in your project':'📌 WIR pending in your project'); }); imirs.forEach(r=>{ commonPush('imir', r, r.material||r.id, '#7c3aed', `switchModule('imir');setTimeout(()=>openIMIRDetail('${r.id}'),60)`, r.status==='Submitted'?'📌 IMIR submitted in your project': r.status==='QM Approved' || r.status==='QM Accepted' ? '📌 IMIR awaiting sign-off in your project' : '📌 IMIR pending in your project'); }); if(!isRole('client_representative','consultant_representative')){ rcaRecs.forEach(r=>{ commonPush('rca', r, r.title||r.id, '#e11d48', `switchModule('rca');setTimeout(()=>openRCADetail('${r.id}'),60)`, r.status==='Pending Approval'?'📌 RCA pending approval in your project': r.status==='Approved'?'📦 Material issue pending in your project':'📌 RCA pending in your project'); }); } const wfSimpleMods = [ {key:'mockup_quality',color:'#f97316'},{key:'mockup_safety',color:'#be123c'},{key:'tds',color:'#059669'}, {key:'safetyobs',color:'#dc2626'},{key:'workpermit',color:'#b45309'},{key:'rfi',color:'#7c3aed'}, {key:'auditcheck',color:'#0f766e'},{key:'envinsp',color:'#16a34a'},{key:'safetyinsp',color:'#ef4444'} ]; wfSimpleMods.forEach(({key,color})=>{ (simpleRecs[key]||[]).forEach(r=>{ commonPush(key, r, r.title||r.id, color, `switchModule('${key}');setTimeout(()=>openSimpleDetail('${key}','${r.id}'),60)`, key==='rfi' && r.status==='Open' ? '💬 RFI response pending in your project' : '📌 Pending in your project'); }); }); items.sort((a,b)=>(String(b.date||'')+b.id).localeCompare(String(a.date||'')+a.id)); return items; } function renderFeed(){ const container = document.getElementById('feed-list'); if(!container) return; const items = getFeedItems(); // Update feed tab badge count const feedTab = document.getElementById('tab-feed'); if(feedTab){ feedTab.innerHTML = items.length > 0 ? `🔔 My Feed ${items.length}` : '🔔 My Feed'; } if(!items.length){ container.innerHTML=`
✅
All caught up!
No pending actions for your role at this time.
`; return; } container.innerHTML = items.map(item=>{ const rec = item.mod==='qms' ? issues.find(r=>r.id===item.id) : item.mod==='wir' ? wirs.find(r=>r.id===item.id) : item.mod==='imir' ? imirs.find(r=>r.id===item.id) : item.mod==='rca' ? rcaRecs.find(r=>r.id===item.id) : (simpleRecs[item.mod]||[]).find(r=>r.id===item.id); const comments = rec?.comments || []; const commentHtml = comments.length ? comments.map(c=>`
${esc(c.author)}${c.time}
${esc(c.text)}
`).join('') : ''; // Warning urgency: resubmissions and approvals get ⚠ URGENT badge const isUrgent = item.action.includes('Resubmission') || item.action.includes('Awaiting'); const urgencyBadge = isUrgent ? `⚠ Immediate Action Required` : `🔔 Action Pending`; return `
${isUrgent?'⚠️':'🔔'}
${urgencyBadge}
${item.action.replace(/[⏳🔄💬📦]/g,'').trim()}
${esc(item.title)}
📁 ${esc(item.project)} · ${item.id} · ${item.date}
${item.status}
${commentHtml ? `
${commentHtml}
` : ''}
`; }).join(''); } function addFeedComment(mod, id, inputEl){ const txt = inputEl?.value?.trim(); if(!txt) return; // Find the record in the correct store let rec = null; if(mod==='qms') rec = issues.find(r=>r.id===id); else if(mod==='wir') rec = wirs.find(r=>r.id===id); else if(mod==='imir') rec = imirs.find(r=>r.id===id); else if(mod==='rca') rec = rcaRecs.find(r=>r.id===id); else rec = (simpleRecs[mod]||[]).find(r=>r.id===id); if(!rec) return; if(!rec.comments) rec.comments = []; const author = currentUser ? currentUser.name : 'CIMS User'; rec.comments.push({author, time:nowTime(), text:txt}); persist(); inputEl.value=''; showToast('Comment posted','ok'); renderFeed(); } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // CONCRETE REGISTER MODULE // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ function genCRId(){return 'CR-'+String(Date.now()).slice(-5)+'-'+String(Math.floor(Math.random()*900+100));} function openConcRegNew(){ if(!canCreate('concreg')){alert('No permission.');return;} // Populate project const pEl=document.getElementById('crf-project'); const visProjs=isRole('super_admin')?projects:getAssignedProjects(); if(pEl){ pEl.innerHTML=''+visProjs.map(p=>``).join(''); if(activeProject!=='ALL'&&visProjs.includes(activeProject)) pEl.value=activeProject; } const proj=pEl?pEl.value:(visProjs[0]||''); // Populate supplier const sEl=document.getElementById('crf-supplier'); if(sEl){sEl.innerHTML=''+(contractorsList||[]).map(c=>``).join('');} // Populate contractor const cEl=document.getElementById('crf-contractor'); if(cEl){cEl.innerHTML=''+(contractorsList||[]).map(c=>``).join('');} // Inspector — project-scoped person picker const _pool=getPersonPool(proj); mountPersonField('crf-by-picker-outer',_pool,false); // Auto-select current user setTimeout(()=>{ const _hv=document.getElementById('crf-by-picker-outer-val'); if(_hv&¤tUser&&!_hv.value){ const _match=_pool.find(p=>p===currentUser.name); if(_match){_hv.value=_match;const _inp=document.querySelector('#crf-by-picker-outer input[type=text]');if(_inp)_inp.value=_match;} } },80); // Re-wire when project changes if(pEl) pEl.onchange=function(){ const _p=this.value; mountPersonField('crf-by-picker-outer',getPersonPool(_p),false); fillCRLocationSelect('crf-location',_p); fillCRGridSelect('crf-gridno',_p); const _sList=document.getElementById('crf-supplier'); if(_sList){_sList.innerHTML=''+(contractorsList||[]).map(c=>``).join('');} const _cList=document.getElementById('crf-contractor'); if(_cList){_cList.innerHTML=''+(contractorsList||[]).map(c=>``).join('');} }; // Default date const dEl=document.getElementById('crf-date');if(dEl&&!dEl.value)dEl.value=today(); // Clear fields ['crf-dn','crf-remarks','crf-volume'].forEach(id=>{const el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.value='';}); const gEl=document.getElementById('crf-grade');if(gEl)gEl.selectedIndex=0; const stEl=document.getElementById('crf-structure');if(stEl)stEl.selectedIndex=0; fillCRLocationSelect('crf-location',proj); fillCRGridSelect('crf-gridno',proj); const liftEl=document.getElementById('crf-lift');if(liftEl)liftEl.selectedIndex=0; const statusEl=document.getElementById('crf-status');if(statusEl)statusEl.value='Poured'; if(!_photoStore['crf'])_photoStore['crf']=[];clearAttach('crf'); document.getElementById('new-concreg-overlay').classList.add('open'); } function closeSimpleCR(){ document.getElementById('new-concreg-overlay').classList.remove('open'); } function submitConcReg(){ const proj=document.getElementById('crf-project')?.value||''; const grade=document.getElementById('crf-grade')?.value||''; const volume=document.getElementById('crf-volume')?.value||''; if(!proj){alert('Please select a project.');return;} if(!grade){alert('Please select a Concrete Grade.');return;} if(!volume||isNaN(parseFloat(volume))){alert('Please enter a valid volume.');return;} const byH=document.getElementById('crf-by-picker-outer-val'); const photos=(_photoStore['crf']||[]).filter(Boolean).slice(0,5); const rec={ id:genCRId(), mod:'concreg', project:proj, grade, volume:parseFloat(volume), structure:document.getElementById('crf-structure')?.value||'', location:document.getElementById('crf-location')?.value||'', gridNo:document.getElementById('crf-gridno')?.value||'', lift:document.getElementById('crf-lift')?.value||'', supplier:document.getElementById('crf-supplier')?.value||'', contractor:document.getElementById('crf-contractor')?.value||'', dn:document.getElementById('crf-dn')?.value.trim()||'', by:byH&&byH.value?byH.value:'', date:document.getElementById('crf-date')?.value||today(), status:document.getElementById('crf-status')?.value||'Poured', remarks:document.getElementById('crf-remarks')?.value.trim()||'', submittedBy:currentUser?.name||'', submittedAt:new Date().toISOString(), photos, comments:[], actionLog:[] }; concRegRecs.unshift(rec); persist(); closeSimpleCR(); renderConcReg(); showToast('Pour record saved — '+rec.id,'ok'); // Audit prompt — remind user to link a cube test if none exists for this grade+date+project const _existingCCR=(simpleRecs.conccube||[]).some(c=>c.concRegId===rec.id); if(!_existingCCR){ setTimeout(()=>{ showToast('⚠ No cube test record linked yet. Go to Concrete Cube module to add test results.','warn'); },1800); } } function renderConcReg(){ const listEl=document.getElementById('concreg-list'); const footEl=document.getElementById('concreg-footer'); const sumEl=document.getElementById('concreg-summary'); if(!listEl)return; const q=(document.getElementById('concreg-search')?.value||'').toLowerCase(); const sfGrade=(document.getElementById('concreg-sf-grade')?.value||''); const sfStatus=(document.getElementById('concreg-sf-status')?.value||''); const visProjs=getAssignedProjects(); let data=concRegRecs.filter(r=>{ if(!isRole('super_admin')&&!visProjs.includes(r.project))return false; if(activeProject!=='ALL'&&r.project!==activeProject)return false; if(sfGrade&&!r.grade.startsWith(sfGrade.split(' ')[0]))return false; if(sfStatus&&r.status!==sfStatus)return false; if(q&&!r.project.toLowerCase().includes(q)&&!r.grade.toLowerCase().includes(q)&&!(r.location||'').toLowerCase().includes(q))return false; return true; }); // Grade summary const gradeTotals={}; data.forEach(r=>{ const gKey=(r.grade||'').split(' — ')[0].split(' ')[0]; // e.g. "C25" gradeTotals[gKey]=(gradeTotals[gKey]||0)+(parseFloat(r.volume)||0); }); const totalVol=data.reduce((s,r)=>s+(parseFloat(r.volume)||0),0); const gradeColors={'C15':'#6b7280','C20':'#0369a1','C25':'#0891b2','C30':'#0f766e','C35':'#15803d','C40':'#4d7c0f','C45':'#d97706','C50':'#b45309','C55':'#c2410c','C60':'#dc2626','C70':'#7f1d1d','C80':'#7c3aed','C90':'#6d28d9','C100':'#4c1d95','SCC':'#0369a1','ESC':'#b45309','PQC':'#0f766e','DLC':'#6b7280','RHC':'#c2410c'}; const statusColors={Poured:'#0ea5e9',Curing:'#f59e0b',Completed:'#22c55e','On Hold':'#b45309',Rejected:'#ef4444'}; if(sumEl){ const gradeItems=Object.entries(gradeTotals).sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1]).map(([g,v])=>{ const col=gradeColors[g]||'#0369a1'; return `${g} ${v.toFixed(1)} m³`; }).join(''); sumEl.innerHTML=`GRADE TOTALS:${gradeItems}TOTAL: ${totalVol.toFixed(1)} m³`; } if(!data.length){listEl.innerHTML='
No pour records found.
';footEl.textContent='';return;} listEl.innerHTML=data.map(r=>{ const col=statusColors[r.status]||'#0ea5e9'; const gradeKey=(r.grade||'').split(' — ')[0].split(' ')[0]; const gradeCol=gradeColors[gradeKey]||'#0369a1'; const _hasCCR=(simpleRecs.conccube||[]).some(c=>c.concRegId===r.id); const _ccrBadge=_hasCCR ? `🧪 CCR` : `⚠ No CCR`; return `
${r.id}
${esc((r.grade||'').split(' — ')[0])}${r.structure?' — '+esc(r.structure):''}${_ccrBadge}
${esc(r.project)} · ${r.date||''}${r.lift?' · '+esc(r.lift):''}
${esc((r.grade||'').split(' — ')[0])} ${r.volume||'—'} m³ ${r.status}
`; }).join(''); footEl.textContent=`Showing ${data.length} record${data.length!==1?'s':''} · Total: ${totalVol.toFixed(1)} m³`; } function openConcRegDetail(id){ const rec=concRegRecs.find(r=>r.id===id); if(!rec)return; if(!isRole('super_admin')&&rec.project&&!getAssignedProjects().includes(rec.project)){showToast('Access denied.','warn');return;} const statusColors={Poured:'#0ea5e9',Curing:'#f59e0b',Completed:'#22c55e','On Hold':'#b45309',Rejected:'#ef4444'}; const col=statusColors[rec.status]||'#0ea5e9'; const stBtns=['Poured','Curing','Completed','On Hold','Rejected'].map(s=>``).join(''); const ov=document.getElementById('spec-overlay'); const _crHasCCR=(simpleRecs.conccube||[]).some(c=>c.concRegId===rec.id); document.getElementById('spec-det-badges').innerHTML= `🏗️ Concrete Register`+ `${rec.status}`+ (_crHasCCR ? `🧪 Cube Test Linked` : ``); document.getElementById('spec-det-title').textContent=mod==='conccube'?((rec.req?rec.req+' N/mm²':'Concrete Cube Record')+(rec.structure?' — '+rec.structure:'')):(rec.grade||'').split(' — ')[0]+(rec.structure?' — '+rec.structure:''); document.getElementById('spec-det-body').innerHTML=`
${stBtns}
${esc(rec.id)}
${esc(rec.project||'—')}
${rec.date||'—'}
${esc(rec.grade||'—')}
${esc(rec.structure||'—')}
${rec.volume||'—'} m³
${esc(rec.location||'—')}
${esc(rec.gridNo||'—')}
${esc(rec.lift||'—')}
${esc(rec.supplier||'—')}
${esc(rec.dn||'—')}
${esc(rec.contractor||'—')}
${esc(rec.by||'—')}
${rec.remarks?`
Remarks
${esc(rec.remarks)}
`:''} ${(()=>{ const _linkedCCRs=(simpleRecs.conccube||[]).filter(r=>r.concRegId===rec.id); if(!_linkedCCRs.length) return '
🧪 No Cube Test Records linked yet. Open Concrete Cube module and link this pour.
'; const _ccrSC={Pass:'#15803d','Pending Test':'#b45309',Fail:'#dc2626','Awaiting Results':'#0369a1'}; const _rows=_linkedCCRs.map(r=>{ const _col=_ccrSC[r.status]||'#0369a1'; const _pass=r.d28&&r.req&&Number(r.d28)>=Number(r.req); const _fail=r.d28&&r.req&&Number(r.d28) ${esc(r.id)} ${r.date||'—'} Req: ${r.req||'—'} N/mm² 7d: ${r.d7||'—'} 28d: ${r.d28||'—'} N/mm² ${_pass?'✔':_fail?'✘':''} ${r.status} `; }).join(''); return `
🧪 Linked Cube Test Results (${_linkedCCRs.length})
${_rows}
`; })()}
Comments (${(rec.comments||[]).length})
${renderComments(rec.comments)}
`; ov.dataset.simplemod='concreg'; ov.dataset.simpleid=id; _openPDFContext.spec=Object.assign({},rec,{_mod:'concreg'}); ov.classList.add('open'); // hide modify/delete if no permission const modBtn=document.getElementById('spec-modify-btn'); if(modBtn)modBtn.style.display=canModify('concreg')?'':'none'; const delBtn=document.getElementById('spec-delete-btn'); if(delBtn)delBtn.style.display=canDelete('concreg')?'':'none'; const pdfBtn=document.getElementById('spec-pdf-btn'); if(pdfBtn)pdfBtn.style.display=''; } function setConcRegStatus(id,s){ const rec=concRegRecs.find(r=>r.id===id); if(!rec)return; rec.status=s;persist();renderConcReg();openConcRegDetail(id); showToast('Status updated to '+s,'ok'); } function postConcRegCmt(id){ const inp=document.getElementById('concreg-cmt-'+id); const txt=inp?.value?.trim();if(!txt)return; const rec=concRegRecs.find(r=>r.id===id);if(!rec)return; if(!rec.comments)rec.comments=[]; rec.comments.push({author:currentUser?.name||'User',time:nowTime(),text:txt}); persist();inp.value='';openConcRegDetail(id); showToast('Comment posted','ok'); } function flatConcReg(proj){ const data=proj&&proj!=='ALL'?concRegRecs.filter(r=>r.project===proj):concRegRecs; return data.map(r=>({ 'CR No.':r.id,'Project':r.project,'Date':r.date||'','Concrete Grade':r.grade||'','Structure Type':r.structure||'', 'Volume (m³)':r.volume||'','Location':r.location||'','Grid No.':r.gridNo||'','Lift No.':r.lift||'','Supplier':r.supplier||'', 'Delivery Note':r.dn||'','Contractor':r.contractor||'','Inspector':r.by||'', 'Status':r.status||'','Remarks':r.remarks||'','Submitted By':r.submittedBy||'', })); } // ── End Concrete Register ───────────────────────────────────── // ══════════════════════════════════════════════ // START // ══════════════════════════════════════════════ // Login keyboard shortcuts handled inline in HTML // Ensure login-password also fires on Enter const lpEl=document.getElementById('login-password'); if(lpEl)lpEl.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{if(e.key==='Enter')tryLogin();}); // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // FLOOR LEVEL SYSTEM // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // CCR LOCATION & GRID NO MANAGER // Per-project manageable dropdown lists for Concrete Cube Records // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ let _ccrListMgrType = 'location'; // 'location' | 'gridno' let _ccrListMgrProj = ''; let _ccrListMgrModule = 'ccr'; // 'ccr' | 'cr' — which data store to use function _getCCRList(type, proj){ if(_ccrListMgrModule === 'cr'){ if(type==='location') return (crLocations[proj] = crLocations[proj] || []); else return (crGridNos[proj] = crGridNos[proj] || []); } // default: CCR if(type==='location') return (ccrLocations[proj] = ccrLocations[proj] || []); else return (ccrGridNos[proj] = ccrGridNos[proj] || []); } function fillCCRLocationSelect(selectId, proj){ const sel = document.getElementById(selectId); if(!sel) return; const saved = sel.value; const list = ccrLocations[proj] || []; sel.innerHTML = '' + list.map(l=>``).join('') + (list.length ? '' : ''); } function fillCCRGridSelect(selectId, proj){ const sel = document.getElementById(selectId); if(!sel) return; const saved = sel.value; const list = ccrGridNos[proj] || []; sel.innerHTML = '' + list.map(g=>``).join('') + (list.length ? '' : ''); } // ── Concrete Register (CR) — same pattern, separate data store ── function fillCRLocationSelect(selectId, proj){ const sel = document.getElementById(selectId); if(!sel) return; const saved = sel.value; const list = crLocations[proj] || []; sel.innerHTML = '' + list.map(l=>``).join('') + (list.length ? '' : ''); } function fillCRGridSelect(selectId, proj){ const sel = document.getElementById(selectId); if(!sel) return; const saved = sel.value; const list = crGridNos[proj] || []; sel.innerHTML = '' + list.map(g=>``).join('') + (list.length ? '' : ''); } // Open list manager for Concrete Register (CR) module function openCRListMgr(type, proj){ if(!proj){ showToast('Select a project first.','warn'); return; } _ccrListMgrModule = 'cr'; _ccrListMgrType = type; _ccrListMgrProj = proj; const isLoc = type === 'location'; document.getElementById('ccr-listmgr-title').textContent = isLoc ? '📍 Manage Locations' : '📐 Manage Grid References'; document.getElementById('ccr-listmgr-sub').textContent = isLoc ? 'Location entries for this project (e.g. Zone A, Block B, Podium, Basement…)' : 'Grid reference entries for this project (e.g. A1, B2, C-D / 3-5…)'; document.getElementById('ccr-listmgr-input').placeholder = isLoc ? 'e.g. Zone A, Tower B, Podium Level…' : 'e.g. A1, B-C / 3-4, Grid 12…'; document.getElementById('ccr-listmgr-proj-bar').textContent = '🏗️ Concrete Register — Project: ' + proj; const ov = document.getElementById('ccr-listmgr-overlay'); if(ov){ ov.style.display='flex'; } renderCCRListMgr(); } function openCCRListMgr(type, proj){ if(!proj){ showToast('Select a project first.','warn'); return; } _ccrListMgrModule = 'ccr'; _ccrListMgrType = type; _ccrListMgrProj = proj; const isLoc = type === 'location'; document.getElementById('ccr-listmgr-title').textContent = isLoc ? '📍 Manage Locations' : '📐 Manage Grid References'; document.getElementById('ccr-listmgr-sub').textContent = isLoc ? 'Location entries for this project (e.g. Zone A, Tower B, Podium, Basement…)' : 'Grid reference entries for this project (e.g. A1, B2, C-D / 3-5…)'; document.getElementById('ccr-listmgr-input').placeholder = isLoc ? 'e.g. Zone A, Tower B, Podium Level…' : 'e.g. A1, B-C / 3-4, Grid 12…'; document.getElementById('ccr-listmgr-proj-bar').textContent = '📁 Project: ' + proj; const ov = document.getElementById('ccr-listmgr-overlay'); if(ov){ ov.style.display='flex'; } renderCCRListMgr(); } function closeCCRListMgr(){ const ov = document.getElementById('ccr-listmgr-overlay'); if(ov) ov.style.display='none'; persist(); const proj = document.getElementById('ccrf-project')?.value || _ccrListMgrProj; if(_ccrListMgrModule === 'cr'){ // Refresh CR form dropdowns fillCRLocationSelect('crf-location', _ccrListMgrProj); fillCRGridSelect('crf-gridno', _ccrListMgrProj); } else { // Refresh CCR form dropdowns fillCCRLocationSelect('ccrf-location', proj); fillCCRGridSelect('ccrf-gridno', proj); } } function renderCCRListMgr(){ const list = _getCCRList(_ccrListMgrType, _ccrListMgrProj); const cnt = document.getElementById('ccr-listmgr-count'); const lc = document.getElementById('ccr-listmgr-list'); if(cnt) cnt.textContent = `(${list.length})`; if(!lc) return; if(!list.length){ lc.innerHTML = '
No entries yet — add one below.
'; return; } lc.innerHTML = list.map((item, i) => `
${i+1} ${esc(item)}
`).join(''); } function addCCRListItem(){ const inp = document.getElementById('ccr-listmgr-input'); const val = inp ? inp.value.trim() : ''; if(!val){ showToast('Enter a value.','warn'); return; } const list = _getCCRList(_ccrListMgrType, _ccrListMgrProj); if(list.includes(val)){ showToast('Entry already exists.','warn'); return; } list.push(val); if(inp) inp.value = ''; renderCCRListMgr(); showToast('Added: ' + val, 'ok'); } function deleteCCRListItem(i){ const list = _getCCRList(_ccrListMgrType, _ccrListMgrProj); if(!confirm('Remove "' + list[i] + '"?')) return; list.splice(i, 1); renderCCRListMgr(); } function moveCCRListItem(i, dir){ const list = _getCCRList(_ccrListMgrType, _ccrListMgrProj); const j = i + dir; if(j < 0 || j >= list.length) return; [list[i], list[j]] = [list[j], list[i]]; renderCCRListMgr(); } let _floorMgrTargetId = null; // which select to update after manager closes const STANDARD_FLOORS = [ 'Sub-Basement (SB)','Basement 2 (B2)','Basement 1 (B1)','Ground Floor (GF)', 'Mezzanine Floor','First Floor (1F)','Second Floor (2F)','Third Floor (3F)', 'Fourth Floor (4F)','Fifth Floor (5F)','Sixth Floor (6F)','Seventh Floor (7F)', 'Eighth Floor (8F)','Ninth Floor (9F)','Tenth Floor (10F)', 'Eleventh Floor (11F)','Twelfth Floor (12F)','Fifteenth Floor (15F)', 'Twentieth Floor (20F)','Twenty Fifth Floor (25F)','Thirtieth Floor (30F)', 'Fortieth Floor (40F)','Fiftieth Floor (50F)', 'Roof Level','Terrace / Podium','Plant Room','Mechanical Floor','Car Park Level' ]; function fillFloorSelect(selectId, currentVal){ const sel = document.getElementById(selectId); if(!sel) return; const saved = currentVal || sel.value; let opts = ''; // Group by basement / above ground / roof const basements = floorLevels.filter(f=>f.toLowerCase().includes('basement')||f.toLowerCase().includes('sub-basement')); const grounds = floorLevels.filter(f=>f.toLowerCase().includes('ground')||f.toLowerCase().includes('mezzanine')); const floors = floorLevels.filter(f=>!basements.includes(f)&&!grounds.includes(f)&&!['Roof Level','Terrace / Podium','Plant Room','Mechanical Floor','Car Park Level'].includes(f)&&f.toLowerCase().includes('floor')); const special = floorLevels.filter(f=>!basements.includes(f)&&!grounds.includes(f)&&!floors.includes(f)); const addGroup = (label, arr) => { if(!arr.length) return ''; return `${arr.map(f=>``).join('')}`; }; opts += addGroup('🅱 Basement', basements); opts += addGroup('🟢 Ground', grounds); opts += addGroup('🔵 Upper Floors', floors); if(special.length) opts += addGroup('⭐ Other', special); sel.innerHTML = opts; } function fillAllFloorSelects(){ // Fill every floor select in the page document.querySelectorAll('[id$="-floor"]').forEach(sel=>{ if(sel.tagName==='SELECT') fillFloorSelect(sel.id, sel.value); }); } function onFloorChange(sel){ // If user picks "Manage...", open manager if(sel.value==='__manage__'){ sel.value=''; openFloorManager(sel.id); } } function openFloorManager(returnSelectId){ _floorMgrTargetId = returnSelectId||null; const ov = document.getElementById('floor-manager-overlay'); if(ov){ ov.style.display='flex'; ov.style.alignItems='center'; ov.style.justifyContent='center'; } renderFloorManager(); } function closeFloorManager(){ const ov = document.getElementById('floor-manager-overlay'); if(ov) ov.style.display='none'; fillAllFloorSelects(); persist(); } function renderFloorManager(){ // Quick-add buttons (standards not yet added) const qb = document.getElementById('floor-quick-btns'); if(qb){ const missing = STANDARD_FLOORS.filter(f=>!floorLevels.includes(f)); qb.innerHTML = missing.slice(0,18).map(f=> `` ).join('') || 'All standard floors already added.'; } // Current list const lc = document.getElementById('floor-list-container'); const cnt = document.getElementById('floor-count'); if(cnt) cnt.textContent = `(${floorLevels.length})`; if(lc){ if(!floorLevels.length){ lc.innerHTML='
No floors added yet.
'; return; } lc.innerHTML = floorLevels.map((f,i)=> `
${i+1} ${esc(f)}
` ).join(''); } } function quickAddFloor(name){ if(!floorLevels.includes(name)){ floorLevels.push(name); renderFloorManager(); } } function addCustomFloor(){ const inp = document.getElementById('floor-new-input'); const val = inp ? inp.value.trim() : ''; if(!val){ showToast('Enter a floor name.','warn'); return; } if(floorLevels.includes(val)){ showToast('Floor already exists.','warn'); return; } floorLevels.push(val); if(inp) inp.value=''; renderFloorManager(); showToast('Floor added: '+val,'ok'); } function deleteFloor(i){ if(!confirm('Remove "'+floorLevels[i]+'" from the floor list?')) return; floorLevels.splice(i,1); renderFloorManager(); } function moveFloor(i, dir){ const j = i+dir; if(j<0||j>=floorLevels.length) return; [floorLevels[i],floorLevels[j]]=[floorLevels[j],floorLevels[i]]; renderFloorManager(); } function getFloorLocation(prefix){ // Combine floor dropdown + location text into single location string const floor = document.getElementById(prefix+'-floor')?.value||''; const loc = document.getElementById(prefix+'-location')?.value?.trim()||''; if(floor && loc) return floor+' · '+loc; if(floor) return floor; return loc; } // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // PROJECT TRACKING SYSTEM (PTS) — DATA & FUNCTIONS // Senior Planning Manager Module // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // ── Data ── let boqSpecLib = load('cims_boq_spec_lib', sampleBOQSpecs()); let ptsActivities = load('cims_pts_activities', samplePTSActivities()); let ptsMilestones = load('cims_pts_milestones', samplePTSMilestones()); let ptsDelays = load('cims_pts_delays', samplePTSDelays()); let _ptsTab = 'overview'; let _ptsNewType = 'activity'; let _ptsSelId = null; function samplePTSActivities(){ const today = new Date(); const y=today.getFullYear(), m=today.getMonth(); const d = (offset)=>{ const dt=new Date(y,m,today.getDate()+offset); return dt.toISOString().split('T')[0]; }; return[ {id:'ACT-001',wbs:'1.0',name:'Site Preparation & Mobilisation',project:'Al Barsha Residential Tower',discipline:'Civil',responsible:'Project Manager',plannedStart:d(-60),plannedEnd:d(-45),actualStart:d(-60),actualEnd:d(-46),plannedProgress:100,actualProgress:100,criticalPath:false,float:0,status:'Completed',weight:3,remarks:'Completed on schedule.'}, {id:'ACT-002',wbs:'2.0',name:'Substructure — Excavation',project:'Al Barsha Residential Tower',discipline:'Civil',responsible:'Site Engineer',plannedStart:d(-45),plannedEnd:d(-30),actualStart:d(-43),actualEnd:d(-32),plannedProgress:100,actualProgress:100,criticalPath:true,float:0,status:'Completed',weight:5,remarks:''}, {id:'ACT-003',wbs:'2.1',name:'Piling & Foundation Works',project:'Al Barsha Residential Tower',discipline:'Structural',responsible:'Site Engineer',plannedStart:d(-32),plannedEnd:d(-10),actualStart:d(-30),actualEnd:'',plannedProgress:100,actualProgress:82,criticalPath:true,float:0,status:'In Progress',weight:8,remarks:'Delayed 2 days due to equipment breakdown.'}, {id:'ACT-004',wbs:'2.2',name:'Basement Raft Slab — Pour',project:'Al Barsha Residential Tower',discipline:'Structural',responsible:'QA Manager',plannedStart:d(-10),plannedEnd:d(5),actualStart:'',actualEnd:'',plannedProgress:50,actualProgress:0,criticalPath:true,float:0,status:'Not Started',weight:6,remarks:''}, {id:'ACT-005',wbs:'3.0',name:'Superstructure — G Floor Columns',project:'Al Barsha Residential Tower',discipline:'Structural',responsible:'Site Engineer',plannedStart:d(4),plannedEnd:d(18),actualStart:'',actualEnd:'',plannedProgress:0,actualProgress:0,criticalPath:true,float:0,status:'Not Started',weight:7,remarks:''}, {id:'ACT-006',wbs:'3.1',name:'G Floor Slab & Beams',project:'Al Barsha Residential Tower',discipline:'Structural',responsible:'Site Engineer',plannedStart:d(18),plannedEnd:d(32),actualStart:'',actualEnd:'',plannedProgress:0,actualProgress:0,criticalPath:false,float:3,status:'Not Started',weight:7,remarks:''}, {id:'ACT-007',wbs:'4.0',name:'MEP Rough-in — Level 1',project:'Al Barsha Residential Tower',discipline:'MEP',responsible:'MEP Coordinator',plannedStart:d(20),plannedEnd:d(45),actualStart:'',actualEnd:'',plannedProgress:0,actualProgress:0,criticalPath:false,float:5,status:'Not Started',weight:5,remarks:''}, {id:'ACT-008',wbs:'5.0',name:'Earthworks — Phase 1',project:'Highway Interchange — Phase 1',discipline:'Civil',responsible:'Project Manager',plannedStart:d(-50),plannedEnd:d(-20),actualStart:d(-48),actualEnd:d(-25),plannedProgress:100,actualProgress:100,criticalPath:true,float:0,status:'Completed',weight:6,remarks:''}, {id:'ACT-009',wbs:'5.1',name:'Bridge Pier Construction — P1 to P4',project:'Highway Interchange — Phase 1',discipline:'Structural',responsible:'Site Engineer',plannedStart:d(-22),plannedEnd:d(15),actualStart:d(-18),actualEnd:'',plannedProgress:75,actualProgress:60,criticalPath:true,float:0,status:'In Progress',weight:10,remarks:'Delayed 4 days.
