NCR-0039 raised for undersized steel.'}, {id:'ACT-010',wbs:'5.2',name:'Deck Slab Formwork',project:'Highway Interchange — Phase 1',discipline:'Civil',responsible:'Site Engineer',plannedStart:d(14),plannedEnd:d(35),actualStart:'',actualEnd:'',plannedProgress:0,actualProgress:0,criticalPath:true,float:0,status:'Not Started',weight:8,remarks:''}, ]; } function samplePTSMilestones(){ const d=(offset)=>{ const dt=new Date(); dt.setDate(dt.getDate()+offset); return dt.toISOString().split('T')[0]; }; return[ {id:'MS-001',name:'Site Handover',project:'Al Barsha Residential Tower',plannedDate:d(-60),forecastDate:d(-60),actualDate:d(-60),status:'Achieved',delayDays:0,impact:'Low',remarks:'On time.'}, {id:'MS-002',name:'Foundation Complete',project:'Al Barsha Residential Tower',plannedDate:d(-10),forecastDate:d(2),actualDate:'',status:'Delayed',delayDays:12,impact:'High',remarks:'Delay due to piling equipment breakdown and concrete NCR.'}, {id:'MS-003',name:'Structure Topping Out',project:'Al Barsha Residential Tower',plannedDate:d(60),forecastDate:d(72),actualDate:'',status:'At Risk',delayDays:12,impact:'Critical',remarks:'Cascading impact from foundation delay.'}, {id:'MS-004',name:'Practical Completion',project:'Al Barsha Residential Tower',plannedDate:d(180),forecastDate:d(192),actualDate:'',status:'At Risk',delayDays:12,impact:'Critical',remarks:'EOT claim being prepared.'}, {id:'MS-005',name:'Earthworks Complete',project:'Highway Interchange — Phase 1',plannedDate:d(-20),forecastDate:d(-25),actualDate:d(-25),status:'Achieved',delayDays:0,impact:'Low',remarks:'Completed 5 days early.'}, {id:'MS-006',name:'All Piers Complete',project:'Highway Interchange — Phase 1',plannedDate:d(15),forecastDate:d(23),actualDate:'',status:'Delayed',delayDays:8,impact:'High',remarks:'NCR-0039 impact. Steel replacement in progress.'}, ]; } function samplePTSDelays(){ const d=(offset)=>{ const dt=new Date(); dt.setDate(dt.getDate()+offset); return dt.toISOString().split('T')[0]; }; return[ {id:'DLY-001',project:'Al Barsha Residential Tower',title:'Piling equipment breakdown — Rig R2',category:'Contractor',impactDays:4,affectedActivity:'ACT-003',dateRaised:d(-15),status:'Approved',eotClaimed:false,eotDays:0,remarks:'Rig R2 hydraulic failure. Replaced after 4 days.'}, {id:'DLY-002',project:'Al Barsha Residential Tower',title:'Concrete NCR — foundations delay pour',category:'Contractor',impactDays:8,affectedActivity:'ACT-003',dateRaised:d(-10),status:'Under Review',eotClaimed:false,eotDays:0,remarks:'NCR-0041 raised. Remediation required before next pour.'}, {id:'DLY-003',project:'Al Barsha Residential Tower',title:'Late drawing issue — Raft slab revision',category:'Client',impactDays:5,affectedActivity:'ACT-004',dateRaised:d(-5),status:'Submitted',eotClaimed:true,eotDays:5,remarks:'Client issued revised drawings 5 days late. EOT claim submitted.'}, {id:'DLY-004',project:'Highway Interchange — Phase 1',title:'Non-conforming steel sections — Pier beams',category:'Contractor',impactDays:8,affectedActivity:'ACT-009',dateRaised:d(-12),status:'Under Review',eotClaimed:false,eotDays:0,remarks:'NCR-0039. Steel replacement ordered.'}, ]; } // ── ID generators ── function genPTSId(prefix){ const arr = prefix==='ACT'?ptsActivities:prefix==='MS'?ptsMilestones:ptsDelays; const nums=arr.map(r=>parseInt((r.id||'0').split('-')[1]||0)).filter(n=>!isNaN(n)); const next=(nums.length?Math.max(...nums):0)+1; return prefix+'-'+String(next).padStart(3,'0'); } // ── Helpers ── function ptsSrc(arr){ const p=document.getElementById('pts-proj-filter')?.value||'ALL'; return p==='ALL'?[...arr]:arr.filter(r=>r.project===p); } function ptsDisc(arr){ const d=document.getElementById('pts-discipline-filter')?.value||''; return d?arr.filter(r=>r.discipline===d):arr; } function ptsStat(arr){ const s=document.getElementById('pts-status-filter')?.value||''; return s?arr.filter(r=>r.status===s):arr; } function ptsFilterActs(){ return ptsStat(ptsDisc(ptsSrc(ptsActivities))); } function daysBetween(a,b){ return Math.round((new Date(b)-new Date(a))/(86400000)); } // addDays() already defined above — reusing global function fmtDate(s){ if(!s)return'—'; const d=new Date(s); return d.toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{day:'2-digit',month:'short',year:'2-digit'}); } function ptsActColor(status){ return {Completed:'#22c55e','In Progress':'#60a5fa','Delayed':'#ef4444','Not Started':'rgba(255,255,255,.25)'}[status]||'#C8972A'; } function msRAGColor(status){ return {Achieved:'#22c55e','On Track':'#60a5fa','At Risk':'#f97316',Delayed:'#ef4444'}[status]||'#9ca3af'; } function dlyStatusColor(s){ return {Submitted:'#60a5fa','Under Review':'#f97316',Approved:'#22c55e',Rejected:'#ef4444'}[s]||'#9ca3af'; } function ptsProjOverallProgress(proj){ const acts=ptsActivities.filter(a=>a.project===proj); if(!acts.length) return 0; const totalW=acts.reduce((s,a)=>s+(a.weight||1),0); const earnedW=acts.reduce((s,a)=>s+((a.actualProgress||0)/100)*(a.weight||1),0); return totalW?Math.round(earnedW/totalW*100):0; } // ── SPI Calculation ── function ptsSPI(proj){ const acts=ptsActivities.filter(a=>a.project===proj); const planned=acts.reduce((s,a)=>s+((a.plannedProgress||0)/100)*(a.weight||1),0); const actual =acts.reduce((s,a)=>s+((a.actualProgress||0)/100)*(a.weight||1),0); return planned>0?(actual/planned).toFixed(2):'—'; } // ── Tab switcher ── function ptsSwitchTab(tab){ _ptsTab=tab; document.querySelectorAll('.pts-stab').forEach(b=>b.classList.toggle('active',b.dataset.pts===tab)); renderPTSModule(); } // ── Populate project filter ── function ptsFillProjectFilter(){ const sel=document.getElementById('pts-proj-filter');if(!sel)return; const cur=sel.value||'ALL'; sel.innerHTML=''+projects.map(p=>``).join(''); // ── Show action buttons only for Planner & super_admin ── const btnWrap=document.getElementById('pts-action-btns'); if(btnWrap){ if(canCreate('pts')){ btnWrap.innerHTML=` `; } else { btnWrap.innerHTML=`
🔒 View Only — Planner role required to create records
`; } } } // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // MAIN RENDER DISPATCHER // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════ function renderPTSModule(){ ptsFillProjectFilter(); const el=document.getElementById('pts-content');if(!el)return; if(_ptsTab==='overview') el.innerHTML=renderPTSOverview(); else if(_ptsTab==='gantt') el.innerHTML=renderPTSGantt(); else if(_ptsTab==='scurve') el.innerHTML=renderPTSSCurveHTML(); else if(_ptsTab==='milestones') el.innerHTML=renderPTSMilestones(); else if(_ptsTab==='lookahead') el.innerHTML=renderPTSLookahead(); else if(_ptsTab==='delays') el.innerHTML=renderPTSDelays(); if(_ptsTab==='scurve') renderSCurveCanvas(); } // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // OVERVIEW // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════ function renderPTSOverview(){ const filtActs = ptsFilterActs(); const allActs = ptsSrc(ptsActivities); const allMS = ptsSrc(ptsMilestones); const allDly = ptsSrc(ptsDelays); const totalActs = allActs.length; const completed = allActs.filter(a=>a.status==='Completed').length; const inProgress = allActs.filter(a=>a.status==='In Progress').length; const delayed = allActs.filter(a=>a.status==='Delayed').length; const notStarted = allActs.filter(a=>a.status==='Not Started').length; const criticalActs= allActs.filter(a=>a.criticalPath).length; const openDelays = allDly.filter(d=>d.status!=='Approved'&&d.status!=='Rejected').length; const totalDelayDays = allDly.reduce((s,d)=>s+(d.impactDays||0),0); const totalW = allActs.reduce((s,a)=>s+(a.weight||1),0)||1; const plannedPc = Math.round(allActs.reduce((s,a)=>s+((a.plannedProgress||0)/100)*(a.weight||1),0)/totalW*100); const actualPc = Math.round(allActs.reduce((s,a)=>s+((a.actualProgress||0)/100)*(a.weight||1),0)/totalW*100); const variance = actualPc-plannedPc; const pW=allActs.reduce((s,a)=>s+((a.plannedProgress||0)/100)*(a.weight||1),0); const aW=allActs.reduce((s,a)=>s+((a.actualProgress||0)/100)*(a.weight||1),0); const spi=pW>0?(aW/pW).toFixed(2):'—'; const spiNum = spi==='—' ? 1 : parseFloat(spi); const spiColor=spi==='—'?'#9ca3af':spiNum>=0.95?'#22c55e':spiNum>=0.85?'#f97316':'#ef4444'; const varColor=variance>=0?'#22c55e':variance>=-5?'#f97316':'#ef4444'; const nextMilestones = allMS.filter(m=>!m.actualDate).sort((a,b)=>(a.forecastDate||a.plannedDate||'').localeCompare(b.forecastDate||b.plannedDate||'')).slice(0,4); const delayItems = allDly.filter(d=>d.status!=='Approved'&&d.status!=='Rejected').sort((a,b)=>(b.impactDays||0)-(a.impactDays||0)).slice(0,4); const activeActivities = filtActs.filter(a=>['In Progress','Delayed','Not Started'].includes(a.status)).sort((a,b)=>{ const ad = a.forecastEnd||a.plannedEnd||'9999-12-31'; const bd = b.forecastEnd||b.plannedEnd||'9999-12-31'; return ad.localeCompare(bd); }).slice(0,5); const ragSummary = [ {label:'Completed', val:completed, col:'#22c55e', sub:'Closed activities'}, {label:'In Progress', val:inProgress, col:'#60a5fa', sub:'Execution underway'}, {label:'Delayed', val:delayed, col:'#ef4444', sub:'Needs recovery'}, {label:'Critical Path', val:criticalActs, col:'#fbbf24', sub:'Monitor closely'} ]; return `
Planning Control

Professional planning dashboard for milestones, delays, and look-ahead execution.

This view turns the Planning module into a real control room: progress, schedule health, delay exposure, upcoming milestones, and workfront focus are all grouped into one executive overview.
Overall progress
${actualPc}%
Planned ${plannedPc}% · weighted actual progress
SPI
${spi}
${spiNum>=0.95?'On or ahead of plan':spiNum>=0.85?'Recoverable schedule drift':'Immediate schedule recovery required'}
Schedule variance
${variance>=0?'+':''}${variance}%
Actual versus planned delivery
Open delays
${openDelays}
${totalDelayDays} impact day${totalDelayDays===1?'':'s'} currently recorded
🧭
Action Focus
Activities and delay items demanding planning attention
${activeActivities.length ? activeActivities.map(a=>{ const statusCol = ptsActColor(a.status); return `
${esc(a.name)}
${esc(a.project)} · ${esc(a.wbs||'—')} · End ${fmtDate(a.forecastEnd||a.plannedEnd)} · ${a.actualProgress||0}% complete
${esc(a.status)}
`; }).join('') : '
No active planning items in current filter.
'}
📈
Schedule Health Mix
Quick balance of execution state across visible activities
${ragSummary.map(r=>`
${r.val}
${r.label}
${r.sub}
`).join('')}
${actualPc}%
Overall Progress
Planned: ${plannedPc}%
${spi}
SPI
${spiNum>=1?'Ahead of schedule':spiNum>=0.9?'Slight delay':'Behind schedule'}
${variance>=0?'+':''}${variance}%
Variance
Actual vs Planned
${totalActs}
Total Activities
✅ ${completed} Completed · 🔄 ${inProgress} Active
${openDelays}
Open Delays
Impact ${totalDelayDays} days
${criticalActs}
Critical Path
${notStarted} not started
🏁 Upcoming Milestones
${nextMilestones.length ? nextMilestones.map(m=>`
${esc(m.name)}
${esc(m.project)} · Planned ${fmtDate(m.plannedDate)} · Forecast ${fmtDate(m.forecastDate||m.plannedDate)}
${esc(m.status)}
`).join('') : '
No upcoming milestones available.
'}
⚠️ Delay Register
${delayItems.length ? delayItems.map(d=>`
${esc(d.title)}
${esc(d.project)} · ${esc(d.category)} · Impact ${d.impactDays||0} days${d.eotClaimed?` · EOT ${d.eotDays||0}d`:''}
${esc(d.status)}
`).join('') : '
No active delays recorded.
'}
🏗️ Project Health
${projects.map(proj=>{ const pActs=ptsActivities.filter(a=>a.project===proj); if(!pActs.length)return''; const pProg=ptsProjOverallProgress(proj); const pSPI=ptsSPI(proj); const spiVal=pSPI==='—'?1:parseFloat(pSPI); const spiCol=spiVal>=0.95?'#22c55e':spiVal>=0.85?'#f97316':'#ef4444'; const pDelays=ptsDelays.filter(d=>d.project===proj&&d.status!=='Approved'&&d.status!=='Rejected').length; const pMS=ptsMilestones.filter(m=>m.project===proj); const nextMS=pMS.filter(m=>!m.actualDate).sort((a,b)=>a.plannedDate>b.plannedDate?1:-1)[0]; return`
${esc(proj)}
SPI ${pSPI}
${pDelays>0?`
${pDelays} Delay${pDelays>1?'s':''}
`:''}
${pProg}%
${nextMS?`
Next milestone ${esc(nextMS.name)} · ${fmtDate(nextMS.forecastDate||nextMS.plannedDate)} · ${esc(nextMS.status)}
`:''}
`; }).join('')}
`; } // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // GANTT CHART // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════ function renderPTSGantt(){ const acts=ptsFilterActs(); if(!acts.length) return '
No activities found.
'; // Determine date range const allDates=[...acts.map(a=>a.plannedStart),...acts.map(a=>a.plannedEnd)].filter(Boolean); if(!allDates.length) return '
No dates set.
'; const minDate=allDates.reduce((a,b)=>aa>b?a:b); const spanDays=Math.max(daysBetween(minDate,maxDate),30); const today=new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]; const todayOffset=Math.max(0,Math.min(daysBetween(minDate,today)/spanDays*100,100)); const rows=acts.map(a=>{ const ps=a.plannedStart?Math.max(0,daysBetween(minDate,a.plannedStart)/spanDays*100):0; const pw=a.plannedEnd?Math.max(1,daysBetween(a.plannedStart||minDate,a.plannedEnd)/spanDays*100):5; const acColor=a.criticalPath?'rgba(239,68,68,.75)':'rgba(96,165,250,.75)'; const actualW=a.actualProgress>0?pw*(a.actualProgress/100):0; const floatW=a.float>0?a.float/spanDays*100:0; const isCrit=a.criticalPath; return` ${esc(a.wbs)} ${esc(a.name)}${isCrit?` CP`:''} ${esc(a.discipline)} ${fmtDate(a.plannedStart)} ${fmtDate(a.plannedEnd)}
${actualW>0?`
`:''} ${floatW>0?`
`:''}
${a.actualProgress}%
${esc(a.status)} `; }).join(''); // Build month headers const startDt=new Date(minDate); const endDt=new Date(maxDate); let monthHeaders=''; let curDt=new Date(startDt.getFullYear(),startDt.getMonth(),1); while(curDt<=endDt){ const mn=curDt.toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{month:'short',year:'2-digit'}); const mStart=curDt.toISOString().split('T')[0]; const nextM=new Date(curDt.getFullYear(),curDt.getMonth()+1,1); const mEnd=nextM.toISOString().split('T')[0]; const left=Math.max(0,daysBetween(minDate,mStart)/spanDays*100); const w=Math.min(daysBetween(mStart,mEnd${mn}`; curDt=nextM; } return`
📅 Gantt Chart — Activity Schedule Click activity for detail · 🟦 Planned  🔴 Critical Path  ▮ Actual  🟩 Float
${monthHeaders}
${rows}
WBSActivity NameDiscipline Start (Plan)Finish (Plan) Timeline  ▼ Today ProgressStatus
Planned
Actual (non-critical)
Actual (critical path)
Float
Today
`; } // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // S-CURVE // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════ function renderPTSSCurveHTML(){ return`
📈 S-Curve — Planned vs Actual Progress
Planned Cumulative %
Actual Cumulative %
Today
${renderSCurveDataTable()}`; } function renderSCurveDataTable(){ const acts=ptsSrc(ptsActivities); const allDates=[...acts.map(a=>a.plannedStart),...acts.map(a=>a.plannedEnd)].filter(Boolean); if(!allDates.length||!acts.length) return ''; const minDate=allDates.reduce((a,b)=>aa>b?a:b); const totalW=acts.reduce((s,a)=>s+(a.weight||1),0)||1; // Build 6 progress points const points=[]; const span=daysBetween(minDate,maxDate)||1; for(let pct=0;pct<=100;pct+=20){ const cutDate=addDays(minDate,Math.round(span*pct/100)); let plannedCum=0, actualCum=0; acts.forEach(a=>{ if(!a.plannedEnd||!a.plannedStart) return; const aPct=Math.min(100,Math.max(0,(daysBetween(a.plannedStart,cutDate)/daysBetween(a.plannedStart,a.plannedEnd))*100)); plannedCum+=aPct/100*(a.weight||1); }); const today=new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]; if(cutDate<=today){ acts.forEach(a=>{ actualCum+=(a.actualProgress||0)/100*(a.weight||1); }); actualCum=Math.min(plannedCum*1.15,actualCum); // approximate } points.push({date:fmtDate(cutDate),planned:Math.round(plannedCum/totalW*100),actual:cutDate<=today?Math.round(actualCum/totalW*100):null}); } return`
📊 S-Curve Data Points
${points.map(p=>{ const v=p.actual!==null?p.actual-p.planned:null; const vc=v===null?'#9ca3af':v>=0?'#22c55e':'#ef4444'; return``; }).join('')}
Reference DatePlanned Cumulative %Actual Cumulative %Variance
${p.date}
${p.planned}%
 ${p.actual!==null?`
${p.actual}%
`:'Forecast'}		 ${v!==null?(v>=0?'+':'')+v+'%':'—'}
`; } function renderSCurveCanvas(){ const canvas=document.getElementById('pts-scurve-canvas');if(!canvas)return; canvas.width=canvas.offsetWidth||600; canvas.height=280; const ctx=canvas.getContext('2d'); const W=canvas.width,H=canvas.height; const PAD={l:42,r:20,t:18,b:32}; const cW=W-PAD.l-PAD.r, cH=H-PAD.t-PAD.b; // Build data const acts=ptsSrc(ptsActivities); const allDates=[...acts.map(a=>a.plannedStart),...acts.map(a=>a.plannedEnd)].filter(Boolean); if(!allDates.length||!acts.length){ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,.2)';ctx.font='14px serif';ctx.fillText('No data',W/2-30,H/2);return;} const minDate=allDates.reduce((a,b)=>aa>b?a:b); const totalW=acts.reduce((s,a)=>s+(a.weight||1),0)||1; const today=new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]; const span=daysBetween(minDate,maxDate)||1; const N=24; const plannedPts=[],actualPts=[]; for(let i=0;i<=N;i++){ const cutDate=addDays(minDate,Math.round(span*i/N)); let pc=0,ac=0; acts.forEach(a=>{ if(!a.plannedEnd||!a.plannedStart)return; const t=daysBetween(a.plannedStart,a.plannedEnd)||1; const elapsed=Math.min(Math.max(0,daysBetween(a.plannedStart,cutDate)),t); pc+=elapsed/t*(a.weight||1); }); plannedPts.push(Math.min(100,Math.round(pc/totalW*100))); if(cutDate<=today){ // Distribute actual proportionally up to today const todayFrac=i/N; acts.forEach(a=>{ ac+=(a.actualProgress||0)/100*(a.weight||1)*Math.min(1,todayFrac*1.3); }); actualPts.push(Math.min(100,Math.round(ac/totalW*100))); } else { actualPts.push(null); } } // Grid ctx.clearRect(0,0,W,H); ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(255,255,255,.06)';ctx.lineWidth=1; for(let y=0;y<=4;y++){ const yp=PAD.t+cH-y/4*cH; ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(PAD.l,yp);ctx.lineTo(PAD.l+cW,yp);ctx.stroke(); ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,.25)';ctx.font='9px sans-serif';ctx.fillText(y*25+'%',4,yp+3); } // Month ticks const startDt=new Date(minDate); const endDt=new Date(maxDate); let mt=new Date(startDt.getFullYear(),startDt.getMonth(),1); ctx.fillStyle='rgba(200,151,42,.4)';ctx.font='8px sans-serif'; while(mt<=endDt){ const x=PAD.l+Math.max(0,daysBetween(minDate,mt.toISOString().split('T')[0]))/span*cW; ctx.beginPath();ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(200,151,42,.15)';ctx.moveTo(x,PAD.t);ctx.lineTo(x,PAD.t+cH);ctx.stroke(); ctx.fillText(mt.toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{month:'short'}),x+2,H-8); mt=new Date(mt.getFullYear(),mt.getMonth()+1,1); } // Today line const tx=PAD.l+Math.max(0,Math.min(daysBetween(minDate,today)/span,1))*cW; ctx.beginPath();ctx.setLineDash([4,4]);ctx.strokeStyle='#f97316';ctx.lineWidth=1.5;ctx.moveTo(tx,PAD.t);ctx.lineTo(tx,PAD.t+cH);ctx.stroke();ctx.setLineDash([]); // Planned line const drawLine=(pts,color,lw=2)=>{ ctx.beginPath();ctx.strokeStyle=color;ctx.lineWidth=lw;ctx.lineJoin='round'; let first=true; pts.forEach((v,i)=>{ if(v===null)return; const x=PAD.l+i/N*cW, y=PAD.t+cH-(v/100)*cH; if(first){ctx.moveTo(x,y);first=false;}else ctx.lineTo(x,y); }); ctx.stroke(); }; // Fill under planned ctx.beginPath();ctx.fillStyle='rgba(96,165,250,.08)'; plannedPts.forEach((v,i)=>{const x=PAD.l+i/N*cW,y=PAD.t+cH-(v/100)*cH;i===0?ctx.moveTo(x,y):ctx.lineTo(x,y);}); ctx.lineTo(PAD.l+cW,PAD.t+cH);ctx.lineTo(PAD.l,PAD.t+cH);ctx.closePath();ctx.fill(); drawLine(plannedPts,'#60a5fa',2); // Fill under actual ctx.beginPath();ctx.fillStyle='rgba(200,151,42,.12)'; actualPts.forEach((v,i)=>{if(v===null)return;const x=PAD.l+i/N*cW,y=PAD.t+cH-(v/100)*cH;i===0?ctx.moveTo(x,y):ctx.lineTo(x,y);}); const lastActIdx=actualPts.reduce((li,v,i)=>v!==null?i:li,-1); if(lastActIdx>=0){ctx.lineTo(PAD.l+lastActIdx/N*cW,PAD.t+cH);ctx.lineTo(PAD.l,PAD.t+cH);ctx.closePath();ctx.fill();} drawLine(actualPts,'#C8972A',2.5); // Dots plannedPts.filter((_,i)=>i%4===0).forEach((v,ii)=>{const i=ii*4;const x=PAD.l+i/N*cW,y=PAD.t+cH-(v/100)*cH;ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(x,y,3,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fillStyle='#60a5fa';ctx.fill();}); actualPts.filter(v=>v!==null).filter((_,i)=>i%4===0).forEach((v,ii)=>{const i=ii*4;const x=PAD.l+i/N*cW,y=PAD.t+cH-(v/100)*cH;ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(x,y,3.5,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fillStyle='#C8972A';ctx.fill();}); } // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // MILESTONES // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════ function renderPTSMilestones(){ const ms=ptsSrc(ptsMilestones); const byStatus=(s)=>ms.filter(m=>m.status===s); const groups=[['Achieved',byStatus('Achieved')],['On Track',byStatus('On Track')],['At Risk',byStatus('At Risk')],['Delayed',byStatus('Delayed')]]; let html=`
🏁 Milestone Tracker — RAG Status
${groups.map(([lb,arr])=>`
${arr.length}
${lb}
`).join('')}
${ms.map(m=>{const rc=msRAGColor(m.status);return``;}).join('')}
IDMilestoneProjectPlannedForecastActualDelayImpactStatus
${esc(m.id)} ${esc(m.name)} ${esc(m.project)} ${fmtDate(m.plannedDate)} ${fmtDate(m.forecastDate||m.plannedDate)} ${m.actualDate?fmtDate(m.actualDate):'—'} ${m.delayDays>0?'+'+m.delayDays+'d':'On Time'} ${esc(m.impact||'Low')} ${esc(m.status)}
`; return html; } // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // 3-WEEK LOOKAHEAD // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════ function renderPTSLookahead(){ const today=new Date(); today.setHours(0,0,0,0); const acts=ptsSrc(ptsActivities).filter(a=>a.status!=='Completed'); const html_weeks=[]; for(let w=0;w<3;w++){ const wStart=new Date(today); wStart.setDate(today.getDate()+w*7); const wEnd=new Date(wStart); wEnd.setDate(wStart.getDate()+6); const ws=wStart.toISOString().split('T')[0]; const we=wEnd.toISOString().split('T')[0]; const wActs=acts.filter(a=>{ const ps=a.plannedStart||'',pe=a.plannedEnd||''; return ps<=we && pe>=ws; }); const wLabel=w===0?'Current Week':w===1?'Week 2':'Week 3'; const wDateRange=wStart.toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{day:'2-digit',month:'short'})+' – '+wEnd.toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{day:'2-digit',month:'short'}); html_weeks.push(`
${wLabel}  ·  ${wDateRange}  ·  ${wActs.length} activit${wActs.length===1?'y':'ies'}
${wActs.length===0?`
No activities scheduled this week.
`:''} ${wActs.map(a=>{ const ac=ptsActColor(a.status); return`
${esc(a.wbs)}
${esc(a.name)} ${a.criticalPath?'CP':''}
${esc(a.discipline)} · ${esc(a.responsible||'—')}
${a.actualProgress}%
${fmtDate(a.plannedStart)} → ${fmtDate(a.plannedEnd)}
${esc(a.status)}
`; }).join('')}
`); } const totalLook=acts.filter(a=>{const d21=addDays(new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],21);return(a.plannedStart||'')<=d21;}).length; return`
🔭 3-Week Lookahead Schedule ${totalLook} activities in view · Critical Path highlighted
${html_weeks.join('')}`; } // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // DELAY REGISTER // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════ function renderPTSDelays(){ const delays=ptsSrc(ptsDelays); const catCounts={}; delays.forEach(d=>{catCounts[d.category]=(catCounts[d.category]||0)+1;}); const totalImpact=delays.reduce((s,d)=>s+(d.impactDays||0),0); const eotTotal=delays.filter(d=>d.eotClaimed).reduce((s,d)=>s+(d.eotDays||0),0); const open=delays.filter(d=>d.status!=='Approved'&&d.status!=='Rejected'); let html=`
⚠️ Delay Register — Impact Analysis
${delays.length}
Total Delays
${totalImpact}
Total Impact (days)
${open.length}
Open / Under Review
${eotTotal}
EOT Claimed (days)
${Object.entries(catCounts).map(([cat,cnt])=>`
${esc(cat)}: ${cnt}
`).join('')}
${delays.map(d=>{const sc=dlyStatusColor(d.status);return``;}).join('')}
IDTitleProjectCategoryImpactAffected ActivityDate RaisedEOTStatus
${esc(d.id)} ${esc(d.title)} ${esc(d.project)} ${esc(d.category)} ${d.impactDays}d ${esc(d.affectedActivity||'—')} ${fmtDate(d.dateRaised)} ${d.eotClaimed?`EOT ${d.eotDays}d`:'—'} ${esc(d.status)}
`; return html; } // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // DETAIL OVERLAY // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════ function openPTSDetail(type,id){ let rec,html='',title=''; if(type==='act'){ rec=ptsActivities.find(a=>a.id===id);if(!rec)return; title=rec.id; const ac=ptsActColor(rec.status); html=`
${esc(rec.status)} ${rec.criticalPath?'CRITICAL PATH':''} ${esc(rec.discipline)}
${[['WBS',rec.wbs],['Project',rec.project],['Responsible',rec.responsible],['Float (days)',rec.float||0],['Planned Start',fmtDate(rec.plannedStart)],['Planned Finish',fmtDate(rec.plannedEnd)],['Actual Start',fmtDate(rec.actualStart)],['Actual Finish',rec.actualEnd?fmtDate(rec.actualEnd):'In Progress']].map(([k,v])=>`
${esc(String(v))}
`).join('')}
Progress
Planned: ${rec.plannedProgress}%Actual: ${rec.actualProgress}%
${rec.remarks?`
Remarks
${esc(rec.remarks)}
`:''} ${canCreate('pts')?`
`:'
🔒 View only — Planner role required to edit records.
'}`; } else if(type==='ms'){ rec=ptsMilestones.find(m=>m.id===id);if(!rec)return; title=rec.id;const rc=msRAGColor(rec.status); html=`
${esc(rec.status)}
${[['Project',rec.project],['Impact',rec.impact||'Low'],['Planned Date',fmtDate(rec.plannedDate)],['Forecast Date',fmtDate(rec.forecastDate||rec.plannedDate)],['Actual Date',rec.actualDate?fmtDate(rec.actualDate):'Not Achieved'],['Delay',rec.delayDays>0?'+'+rec.delayDays+' days':'On Time']].map(([k,v])=>`
${esc(String(v))}
`).join('')}
${rec.remarks?`
Remarks
${esc(rec.remarks)}
`:''} ${canCreate('pts')?`
`:'
🔒 View only — Planner role required.
'}`; } else if(type==='delay'){ rec=ptsDelays.find(d=>d.id===id);if(!rec)return; title=rec.id;const sc=dlyStatusColor(rec.status); html=`
${esc(rec.status)}${rec.eotClaimed?`EOT Claimed: ${rec.eotDays} days`:''}
${[['Project',rec.project],['Category',rec.category],['Impact (days)',rec.impactDays],['Affected Activity',rec.affectedActivity||'—'],['Date Raised',fmtDate(rec.dateRaised)],['EOT Claimed',rec.eotClaimed?'Yes — '+rec.eotDays+'d':'No']].map(([k,v])=>`
${esc(String(v))}
`).join('')}
${rec.remarks?`
Remarks / Narrative
${esc(rec.remarks)}
`:''} ${canCreate('pts')?`
`:'
🔒 View only — Planner role required.
'}`; } document.getElementById('pts-det-badges').innerHTML=`${esc(title)}`; document.getElementById('pts-det-title').textContent=(rec&&(rec.name||rec.title||'Record')); document.getElementById('pts-det-body').innerHTML=html; document.getElementById('pts-detail-overlay').classList.add('open'); } function closePTSDetail(){ document.getElementById('pts-detail-overlay').classList.remove('open'); } function deletePTSRecord(type,id){ if(!canDelete('pts')){ showToast('Only a Planner can delete Planning records.','warn'); return; } if(!confirm('Delete this record?'))return; if(type==='act') ptsActivities=ptsActivities.filter(a=>a.id!==id); else if(type==='ms') ptsMilestones=ptsMilestones.filter(m=>m.id!==id); else if(type==='delay') ptsDelays=ptsDelays.filter(d=>d.id!==id); persist();closePTSDetail();renderPTSModule(); showToast('Record deleted.','ok'); } // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // NEW RECORD FORMS // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════ function openPTSNew(type){ // ── Permission guard: only Planner (and super_admin) may create PTS records ── if(!canCreate('pts')){ showToast('Only a Planner can create Planning records. Your role: '+(ROLE_LABELS[currentUser?.role]||'Unknown'),'warn'); return; } _ptsNewType=type; const titles={activity:'➕ NEW ACTIVITY',milestone:'🏁 NEW MILESTONE',delay:'⚠️ NEW DELAY EVENT'}; document.getElementById('pts-new-title').textContent=titles[type]||'NEW'; document.getElementById('pts-new-body').innerHTML=buildPTSForm(type); document.getElementById('pts-new-overlay').classList.add('open'); } function closePTSNew(){ document.getElementById('pts-new-overlay').classList.remove('open'); } function buildPTSForm(type){ const projOpts=projects.map(p=>``).join(''); const actOpts=ptsActivities.map(a=>``).join(''); if(type==='activity') return`
Basic Information
Schedule
Progress & Weight
`; if(type==='milestone') return`
`; if(type==='delay') return`
`; return ''; } function v2(id){ const el=document.getElementById(id); return el?el.value.trim():''; } function submitPTSRecord(){ if(!canCreate('pts')){ showToast('Permission denied. Only a Planner can save Planning records.','error'); return; } if(_ptsNewType==='activity'){ const name=v2('pf-name'),wbs=v2('pf-wbs'),ps=v2('pf-ps'),pe=v2('pf-pe'),proj=v2('pf-proj'); if(!name||!wbs||!ps||!pe){showToast('Name, WBS, Start & Finish required.','warn');return;} ptsActivities.push({id:genPTSId('ACT'),wbs,name,project:proj,discipline:v2('pf-disc'),responsible:v2('pf-resp'), plannedStart:ps,plannedEnd:pe,actualStart:v2('pf-as'),actualEnd:v2('pf-ae'), plannedProgress:parseInt(v2('pf-pp'))||0,actualProgress:parseInt(v2('pf-ap'))||0, criticalPath:v2('pf-cp')==='true',float:parseInt(v2('pf-fl'))||0, status:v2('pf-st')||'Not Started',weight:parseInt(v2('pf-wt'))||5,remarks:v2('pf-rem')}); showToast('Activity added.','ok'); } else if(_ptsNewType==='milestone'){ const name=v2('pf-name'),pd=v2('pf-pd'),proj=v2('pf-proj'); if(!name||!pd){showToast('Name & Planned Date required.','warn');return;} ptsMilestones.push({id:genPTSId('MS'),name,project:proj,plannedDate:pd,forecastDate:v2('pf-fd')||pd, actualDate:v2('pf-ad'),status:v2('pf-rag')||'On Track',delayDays:parseInt(v2('pf-dl'))||0, impact:v2('pf-imp')||'Low',remarks:v2('pf-rem')}); showToast('Milestone added.','ok'); } else if(_ptsNewType==='delay'){ const name=v2('pf-name'),imp=v2('pf-imp'),proj=v2('pf-proj'); if(!name||!imp){showToast('Title & Impact days required.','warn');return;} const eotClaimed=v2('pf-eot')==='true'; ptsDelays.push({id:genPTSId('DLY'),title:name,project:proj,category:v2('pf-cat')||'Contractor', impactDays:parseInt(imp)||0,affectedActivity:v2('pf-act'),dateRaised:v2('pf-dr')||new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0], eotClaimed,eotDays:eotClaimed?parseInt(v2('pf-eotd'))||0:0,status:v2('pf-stat')||'Submitted',remarks:v2('pf-rem')}); showToast('Delay recorded.','ok'); } persist();closePTSNew();renderPTSModule(); } function openPTSEdit(type,id){ if(type!=='act')return; const rec=ptsActivities.find(a=>a.id===id);if(!rec)return; const html=`
`; closePTSDetail(); document.getElementById('pts-det-badges').innerHTML=`${esc(rec.id)}`; document.getElementById('pts-det-title').textContent='Edit: '+rec.name; document.getElementById('pts-det-body').innerHTML=html; document.getElementById('pts-detail-overlay').classList.add('open'); } function savePTSEdit(id){ if(!canCreate('pts')){ showToast('Only a Planner can update Planning records.','warn'); return; } const rec=ptsActivities.find(a=>a.id===id);if(!rec)return; rec.actualProgress=Math.min(100,Math.max(0,parseInt(document.getElementById('pfe-ap')?.value)||0)); rec.status=document.getElementById('pfe-st')?.value||rec.status; rec.actualStart=document.getElementById('pfe-as')?.value||rec.actualStart; rec.actualEnd=document.getElementById('pfe-ae')?.value||rec.actualEnd; rec.remarks=document.getElementById('pfe-rem')?.value?.trim()||rec.remarks; if(rec.actualProgress===100&&rec.status!=='Completed') rec.status='Completed'; persist();closePTSDetail();renderPTSModule(); showToast('Progress updated.','ok'); } // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // WIR BILLING — LIVE CALCULATOR & DATA FUNCTIONS // Senior Billing Engineer — IPC Measurement Precision Engine // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ function toggleWIRBOQSection(forceOpen=false){ const section = document.getElementById('wir-bil-block'); const icon = document.getElementById('wir-boq-toggle-icon'); const toggle = document.getElementById('wir-boq-toggle'); if(!section || !icon || !toggle) return; const shouldOpen = forceOpen || section.style.display === 'none' || !section.style.display; section.style.display = shouldOpen ? 'block' : 'none'; icon.textContent = shouldOpen ? '▼' : '▶'; toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', shouldOpen ? 'true' : 'false'); } function wirBilCalc(){ const g = id => parseFloat(document.getElementById(id)?.value)||0; const si = (id,v) => { const el=document.getElementById(id); if(el) el.value=v; }; const cur = document.getElementById('wf-boq-currency')?.value||'AED'; const fmt = n => isNaN(n)||n===0?'—':cur+' '+n.toLocaleString('en-US',{minimumFractionDigits:2,maximumFractionDigits:2}); const fmtQ= n => isNaN(n)||n===0?'—':n.toLocaleString('en-US',{minimumFractionDigits:2,maximumFractionDigits:3}); const contractQty = g('wf-boq-contract-qty'); const rate = g('wf-boq-rate'); const prevQty = g('wf-boq-prev-qty'); const thisQty = g('wf-boq-this-qty'); const retentionPct = g('wf-retention'); const contractAmt = contractQty * rate; const prevAmt = prevQty * rate; const thisAmt = thisQty * rate; const cumQty = prevQty + thisQty; const cumAmt = cumQty * rate; const pct = contractQty > 0 ? (cumQty/contractQty*100) : 0; const remaining = Math.max(0, contractQty - cumQty); const variance = cumQty - contractQty; const netAmt = thisAmt * (1 - retentionPct/100); si('wf-boq-contract-amt', contractAmt > 0 ? fmt(contractAmt) : ''); si('wf-boq-prev-amt', prevAmt > 0 ? fmt(prevAmt) : ''); si('wf-boq-this-amt', thisAmt > 0 ? fmt(thisAmt) : ''); si('wf-boq-cum-qty', cumQty > 0 ? fmtQ(cumQty) : ''); si('wf-boq-cum-amt', cumAmt > 0 ? fmt(cumAmt) : ''); si('wf-net-amt', netAmt > 0 ? fmt(netAmt) : ''); // Summary badges const pctEl = document.getElementById('wf-bcs-pct'); const remEl = document.getElementById('wf-bcs-remain'); const varEl = document.getElementById('wf-bcs-var'); const warnEl = document.getElementById('wf-bil-warn'); if(pctEl){ pctEl.textContent = contractQty>0 ? pct.toFixed(1)+'%' : '—'; pctEl.className = 'bil-calc-val' + (pct>100?' danger':pct>=90?' warn':''); } if(remEl){ remEl.textContent = contractQty>0 ? fmtQ(remaining) : '—'; remEl.className = 'bil-calc-val' + (remaining===0?' warn':''); } if(varEl){ const vs = variance > 0 ? '+'+fmtQ(variance) : (variance < 0 ? fmtQ(variance) : '0'); varEl.textContent = contractQty>0 ? vs : '—'; varEl.className = 'bil-calc-val' + (variance > 0?' danger': variance<0?' warn':''); } // Overbilling alert if(warnEl) warnEl.style.display = (contractQty>0 && cumQty>contractQty) ? 'block' : 'none'; } // Auto-fill BOQ description from WIR activity function wirBilAutoFill(){ const act = document.getElementById('wf-activity')?.value||''; const desc = document.getElementById('wf-boq-desc'); if(desc && act && !desc.value) desc.value = act; // Set currency based on country const country = document.getElementById('wf-country')?.value||''; const cur = document.getElementById('wf-boq-currency'); if(cur && country){ const map={UAE:'AED','Saudi Arabia':'SAR',Qatar:'QAR',Kuwait:'KWD',Bahrain:'BHD',Oman:'OMR',India:'INR',UK:'GBP',USA:'USD'}; if(map[country]) cur.value=map[country]; } } function wirBilGetData(){ const v=id=>document.getElementById(id)?.value?.trim()||''; const n=id=>parseFloat(document.getElementById(id)?.value)||0; const rate=n('wf-boq-rate'), contractQty=n('wf-boq-contract-qty'); const prevQty=n('wf-boq-prev-qty'), thisQty=n('wf-boq-this-qty'); const cumQty=prevQty+thisQty; const retPct=n('wf-retention'); return{ boqItem: v('wf-boq-item'), boqDesc: v('wf-boq-desc'), specClause: v('wf-spec-clause'), boqDrawing: v('wf-boq-drg'), measMethod: v('wf-meas-method'), measSheet: v('wf-meas-sheet'), boqUnit: v('wf-boq-unit'), contractQty, rate, currency: v('wf-boq-currency')||'AED', contractAmt: contractQty*rate, prevQty, prevAmt: prevQty*rate, thisQty, thisAmt: thisQty*rate, cumQty, cumAmt: cumQty*rate, pctCertified: contractQty>0?+(cumQty/contractQty*100).toFixed(2):0, remainingQty: Math.max(0,contractQty-cumQty), variance: +(cumQty-contractQty).toFixed(3), retentionPct: retPct, netThisAmt: thisQty*rate*(1-retPct/100), ipcNo: v('wf-ipc-no'), bilPeriod: v('wf-bil-period'), bilRemarks: v('wf-bil-remarks'), isOverbilled: contractQty>0 && cumQty>contractQty, }; } function wirBilReset(){ const bilBlock = document.getElementById('wir-bil-block'); const bilIcon = document.getElementById('wir-boq-toggle-icon'); const bilToggle = document.getElementById('wir-boq-toggle'); if(bilBlock){ bilBlock.style.display='none'; } if(bilIcon){ bilIcon.textContent='▶'; } if(bilToggle){ bilToggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded','false'); } const ids=['wf-boq-item','wf-boq-desc','wf-spec-clause','wf-boq-drg','wf-meas-sheet', 'wf-boq-contract-qty','wf-boq-rate','wf-boq-prev-qty','wf-boq-this-qty', 'wf-boq-contract-amt','wf-boq-prev-amt','wf-boq-this-amt','wf-boq-cum-qty', 'wf-boq-cum-amt','wf-net-amt','wf-ipc-no','wf-bil-period','wf-bil-remarks','wf-retention']; ids.forEach(id=>{const el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.value='';}); document.getElementById('wf-boq-unit')&&(document.getElementById('wf-boq-unit').selectedIndex=0); document.getElementById('wf-meas-method')&&(document.getElementById('wf-meas-method').selectedIndex=0); document.getElementById('wf-boq-currency')&&(document.getElementById('wf-boq-currency').value='AED'); const warnEl=document.getElementById('wf-bil-warn');if(warnEl)warnEl.style.display='none'; ['wf-bcs-pct','wf-bcs-remain','wf-bcs-var'].forEach(id=>{const el=document.getElementById(id);if(el){el.textContent='—';el.className='bil-calc-val';}}); } // ── Build billing detail HTML for openWIRDetail ────────────────────────── function buildWIRBillingHTML(w){ return ''; } // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // PROJECT BOQ SPECIFICATION LIBRARY — COMPLETE ENGINE // Senior Billing Engineer — Master Rate Schedule + IPC Auto-Fill // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // ── Data store ── // Key: "project::activity", Value: spec object // boqSpecLib loaded earlier function sampleBOQSpecs(){ return { 'Al Barsha Residential Tower::Slab Formwork — Level 3': { boqItem:'03.02.01', boqDesc:'Slab Formwork — RC Slab (All Levels)', specClause:'Spec §4.2.1, BS EN 13670', boqDrawing:'ITP-003 / DWG-STR-047 Rev.3', measMethod:'Area (L×B)', boqUnit:'m²', contractQty:1800, rate:185, currency:'AED', retentionPct:5, contractAmt:333000 }, 'Al Barsha Residential Tower::Rebar Placement — Slab': { boqItem:'03.03.01', boqDesc:'Rebar Supply & Fix — RC Slab', specClause:'Spec §5.1, BS 4449:2005', boqDrawing:'ITP-004 / DWG-STR-048', measMethod:'Weight / Mass (MT)', boqUnit:'MT', contractQty:380, rate:4200, currency:'AED', retentionPct:5, contractAmt:1596000 }, 'Al Barsha Residential Tower::Concrete Pour — Foundation': { boqItem:'02.01.03', boqDesc:'Ready-Mix Concrete — Foundation Raft', specClause:'Spec §3.4, BS 8500-1', boqDrawing:'ITP-001 / DWG-STR-010 Rev.2', measMethod:'Volume (L×B×D)', boqUnit:'m³', contractQty:520, rate:650, currency:'AED', retentionPct:5, contractAmt:338000 }, 'Al Barsha Residential Tower::Column Shuttering': { boqItem:'03.01.01', boqDesc:'Column Formwork — All Sizes', specClause:'Spec §4.2.2, BS EN 13670', boqDrawing:'ITP-002 / DWG-STR-020', measMethod:'Area (L×B)', boqUnit:'m²', contractQty:620, rate:210, currency:'AED', retentionPct:5, contractAmt:130200 }, 'Highway Interchange — Phase 1::Rebar Placement — Pier P3': { boqItem:'05.01.03', boqDesc:'Rebar Placement — Bridge Pier Foundation', specClause:'Spec §6.1.2, BS 4449', boqDrawing:'ITP-001 / DWG-CIV-022', measMethod:'Weight / Mass (MT)', boqUnit:'MT', contractQty:85, rate:4200, currency:'AED', retentionPct:5, contractAmt:357000 }, 'Highway Interchange — Phase 1::Earthworks — Bulk Excavation': { boqItem:'01.01.01', boqDesc:'Bulk Excavation — Rock & Soil', specClause:'Spec §2.1, AASHTO T99', boqDrawing:'ITP-EW-001 / DWG-CIV-005', measMethod:'Volume (L×B×D)', boqUnit:'m³', contractQty:12500, rate:28, currency:'AED', retentionPct:5, contractAmt:350000 } }; } // BOQ Spec Lib persisted via main persist() // ═══════════════════════════════════════ // BOQ LIBRARY ADMIN FUNCTIONS // ═══════════════════════════════════════ // [BOQ: openAdmin merged into original — see above] function boqLibFillProjects(){ ['boq-lib-proj','boq-f-proj'].forEach(id=>{ const sel=document.getElementById(id);if(!sel)return; const cur=sel.value||''; sel.innerHTML=''+ projects.map(p=>``).join(''); }); renderBOQLibTable(); } function renderBOQLibTable(){ const proj = document.getElementById('boq-lib-proj')?.value||''; const filt = (document.getElementById('boq-lib-filter')?.value||'').toLowerCase(); const tbody = document.getElementById('boq-lib-tbody'); if(!tbody)return; const entries = Object.entries(boqSpecLib) .filter(([k])=> proj ? k.startsWith(proj+'::') : true) .filter(([k,v])=> filt ? (k.toLowerCase().includes(filt)||v.boqItem?.toLowerCase().includes(filt)||(v.boqDesc||'').toLowerCase().includes(filt)) : true); if(!entries.length){ tbody.innerHTML=`${proj?'No BOQ specs for this project yet. Add below.':'Select a project above.'}`; return; } tbody.innerHTML = entries.map(([key,s])=>{ const parts=key.split('::'); const act=parts.slice(1).join('::'); const contractAmt = (s.contractQty||0)*(s.rate||0); const fmt = n=> (s.currency||'AED')+' '+Number(n).toLocaleString('en-US',{minimumFractionDigits:0,maximumFractionDigits:0}); return` ${esc(s.boqItem||'—')} ${esc(act)} ${esc(s.boqDesc||'—')} ${esc(s.boqUnit||'—')} ${(s.rate||0).toLocaleString('en-US',{minimumFractionDigits:2,maximumFractionDigits:2})} ${esc(s.currency||'AED')} ${(s.contractQty||0).toLocaleString()} ${s.retentionPct||0}% ${esc(s.specClause||'—')} `; }).join(''); } function boqFormFillDesc(){ const act = document.getElementById('boq-f-act')?.value||''; const desc = document.getElementById('boq-f-desc'); if(desc && act && !desc.value) desc.value = act; } function saveBOQSpec(){ const proj = document.getElementById('boq-f-proj')?.value||''; const act = document.getElementById('boq-f-act')?.value||''; const item = document.getElementById('boq-f-item')?.value?.trim()||''; const qty = parseFloat(document.getElementById('boq-f-qty')?.value)||0; const rate = parseFloat(document.getElementById('boq-f-rate')?.value)||0; if(!proj){showMsg('boq-save-msg','Select a project.','#dc2626');return;} if(!act) {showMsg('boq-save-msg','Select an activity.','#dc2626');return;} if(!item){showMsg('boq-save-msg','BOQ Item No. is required.','#dc2626');return;} if(!qty||!rate){showMsg('boq-save-msg','Contract Qty and Rate are required.','#dc2626');return;} const key=`${proj}::${act}`; boqSpecLib[key]={ boqItem: item, boqDesc: document.getElementById('boq-f-desc')?.value?.trim()||act, specClause:document.getElementById('boq-f-spec')?.value?.trim()||'', boqDrawing:document.getElementById('boq-f-drg')?.value?.trim()||'', measMethod:document.getElementById('boq-f-meas')?.value||'', boqUnit: document.getElementById('boq-f-unit')?.value||'', contractQty:qty, rate, contractAmt:qty*rate, currency: document.getElementById('boq-f-cur')?.value||'AED', retentionPct:parseFloat(document.getElementById('boq-f-ret')?.value)||0, }; persist(); renderBOQLibTable(); clearBOQForm(); showMsg('boq-save-msg','✅ BOQ Specification saved!','#059669'); setTimeout(()=>{ const m=document.getElementById('boq-save-msg'); if(m)m.textContent=''; },3000); } function editBOQSpec(key){ const s=boqSpecLib[key];if(!s)return; const parts=key.split('::'); const proj=parts[0], act=parts.slice(1).join('::'); document.getElementById('boq-edit-key').value=key; // Fill project selector const psel=document.getElementById('boq-f-proj');if(psel)psel.value=proj; // Populate activity dropdown for this project then set value boqFillActDropdown(proj, act); document.getElementById('boq-f-item').value = s.boqItem||''; document.getElementById('boq-f-desc').value = s.boqDesc||''; document.getElementById('boq-f-spec').value = s.specClause||''; document.getElementById('boq-f-drg').value = s.boqDrawing||''; const msel=document.getElementById('boq-f-meas');if(msel)msel.value=s.measMethod||''; const usel=document.getElementById('boq-f-unit');if(usel)usel.value=s.boqUnit||''; document.getElementById('boq-f-qty').value = s.contractQty||''; document.getElementById('boq-f-rate').value = s.rate||''; const csel=document.getElementById('boq-f-cur');if(csel)csel.value=s.currency||'AED'; document.getElementById('boq-f-ret').value = s.retentionPct||''; // Remove old key if project/activity changed document.getElementById('boq-edit-key').value=key; // Scroll to form document.getElementById('boq-f-item').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'center'}); } function boqFillActDropdown(proj, selVal){ const sel=document.getElementById('boq-f-act');if(!sel)return; const list=getProjActivities(proj,'wir'); sel.innerHTML=''+ list.map(a=>``).join(''); } // Watch project selector in BOQ form to fill activity dropdown (function(){ const psel=document.getElementById('boq-f-proj'); if(psel) psel.addEventListener('change',function(){ boqFillActDropdown(this.value,''); }); })(); function deleteBOQSpec(key){ if(!confirm('Delete BOQ specification for:\n'+key+'?'))return; delete boqSpecLib[key]; persist(); renderBOQLibTable(); showToast('BOQ Spec deleted.','ok'); } function clearBOQForm(){ ['boq-f-item','boq-f-desc','boq-f-spec','boq-f-drg','boq-f-qty','boq-f-rate','boq-f-ret','boq-edit-key'].forEach(id=>{const el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.value='';}); const psel=document.getElementById('boq-f-proj');if(psel)psel.value=''; const asel=document.getElementById('boq-f-act');if(asel)asel.innerHTML=''; const msel=document.getElementById('boq-f-meas');if(msel)msel.value=''; const usel=document.getElementById('boq-f-unit');if(usel)usel.value=''; const csel=document.getElementById('boq-f-cur');if(csel)csel.value='AED'; } function showMsg(id,msg,color){const el=document.getElementById(id);if(el){el.textContent=msg;el.style.color=color||'var(--text)';}} // ═══════════════════════════════════════ // WIR FORM — SPEC LIBRARY AUTO-FILL // ═══════════════════════════════════════ function wirLoadBOQSpec(){ const proj = document.getElementById('wf-project')?.value||''; const act = document.getElementById('wf-activity')?.value||''; const banner= document.getElementById('wf-spec-banner'); const badge = document.getElementById('wf-spec-loaded-badge'); if(!proj||!act){ if(banner){ banner.className='wir-spec-empty'; banner.innerHTML='📚 Select a Project & Activity above — billing spec will auto-load from the BOQ Library.'; } if(badge) badge.style.display='none'; return; } const key=`${proj}::${act}`; const s=boqSpecLib[key]; if(!s){ if(banner){ banner.className='wir-spec-empty'; banner.innerHTML=`📋 No BOQ spec found for ${esc(act)} in this project. Go to Admin → BOQ Library to add one.`; } if(badge) badge.style.display='none'; // Auto-fill description only const descEl=document.getElementById('wf-boq-desc'); if(descEl&&!descEl.value) descEl.value=act; return; } // ── Auto-fill all billing fields from spec ── const setV=(id,v)=>{ const el=document.getElementById(id); if(el&&v!==undefined&&v!==null&&v!=='') el.value=v; }; setV('wf-boq-item', s.boqItem); setV('wf-boq-desc', s.boqDesc); setV('wf-spec-clause', s.specClause); setV('wf-boq-drg', s.boqDrawing); setV('wf-boq-contract-qty', s.contractQty); setV('wf-boq-rate', s.rate); setV('wf-retention', s.retentionPct); const usel=document.getElementById('wf-boq-unit'); if(usel&&s.boqUnit) usel.value=s.boqUnit; const msel=document.getElementById('wf-meas-method');if(msel&&s.measMethod)msel.value=s.measMethod; const csel=document.getElementById('wf-boq-currency');if(csel&&s.currency) csel.value=s.currency; // Show/hide measurement breakdown panel const mbWrap=document.getElementById('wf-meas-breakdown-wrap'); if(mbWrap){ const needsLBD=['Volume (L×B×D)','Area (L×B)','Linear Measurement'].includes(s.measMethod); mbWrap.style.display = needsLBD ? '' : 'none'; } // Update banner const contractAmt=(s.contractQty||0)*(s.rate||0); const cur=s.currency||'AED'; const fmtAmt=n=>cur+' '+Number(n).toLocaleString('en-US',{minimumFractionDigits:0,maximumFractionDigits:0}); if(banner){ banner.className='wir-spec-loaded'; banner.innerHTML=`
✅
BOQ Spec Loaded: ${esc(s.boqItem)} — ${esc(s.boqDesc)}
${esc(s.boqUnit)} · Rate: ${cur} ${Number(s.rate).toLocaleString()} · Contract Qty: ${Number(s.contractQty).toLocaleString()} ${esc(s.boqUnit)} · Contract Amt: ${fmtAmt(contractAmt)} · Ret: ${s.retentionPct||0}% · ${esc(s.specClause||'')}
`; } if(badge) badge.style.display=''; wirBilCalc(); } function wirClearBOQSpec(){ wirBilReset(); const banner=document.getElementById('wf-spec-banner'); if(banner){ banner.className='wir-spec-empty'; banner.innerHTML='📚 Spec cleared. Select an activity to reload.'; } const badge=document.getElementById('wf-spec-loaded-badge'); if(badge) badge.style.display='none'; } // ── Measurement breakdown calc (L × B × D) ── function wirMeasCalc(){ const L=parseFloat(document.getElementById('wf-ml')?.value)||0; const B=parseFloat(document.getElementById('wf-mb')?.value)||0; const D=parseFloat(document.getElementById('wf-md')?.value)||0; let qty = L>0&&B>0&&D>0 ? L*B*D : L>0&&B>0 ? L*B : L>0 ? L : 0; qty = Math.round(qty*1000)/1000; const calcEl=document.getElementById('wf-mcalc'); if(calcEl) calcEl.value = qty>0 ? qty.toLocaleString('en-US',{minimumFractionDigits:3,maximumFractionDigits:3}) : ''; // Push to this-period qty const tqEl=document.getElementById('wf-boq-this-qty'); if(tqEl&&qty>0){ tqEl.value=qty; wirBilCalc(); } } function wirToggleMeasBreakdown(){ const method=document.getElementById('wf-meas-method')?.value||''; const mbWrap=document.getElementById('wf-meas-breakdown-wrap'); if(mbWrap){ const show=['Volume (L×B×D)','Area (L×B)','Linear Measurement'].includes(method); mbWrap.style.display=show?'':'none'; if(!show){['wf-ml','wf-mb','wf-md','wf-mcalc'].forEach(id=>{const el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.value='';});} } }
